导游 / 其他
Tour Guides / Other

Embersap Ooze.name: 余烬树液软泥 Embersap Ooze
Embersap Ooze.tokenName: 余烬树液软泥怪 Embersap Ooze

Climber.name: 攀爬者 Climber
Climber.description:
它获得25尺的攀爬速度。

It gains a climb Speed of 25 feet.

Resistance (Fire).name: 抗力（火） Resistance (Fire)
Resistance (Fire).description:
从下列选项中选择两项：酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火、毒素或音波。你的魔宠获得等于你等级一半的抗力，以对抗所选的伤害类型。

Choose two of the following: acid, cold, electricity, fire, poison, or sonic. Your familiar gains resistance equal to half your level against the chosen damage types.

Greater Resistance.name: 强效抗力 Greater Resistance
Greater Resistance.description:
你的魔宠将其从抗力魔宠能力获得的抗力提升至3 + 你等级的一半。你的魔宠必须拥有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.familiar-abilities.Item.FcQQLMAJMgOLjnSv]{抗力}能力才能选择此项。

Your familiar increases the resistance it gains from its resistance familiar ability to 3 + half your level. Your familiar must have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.familiar-abilities.Item.FcQQLMAJMgOLjnSv]{Resistance} ability to select this.

Tough.name: 强韧 Tough
Tough.description:
你的魔宠的最大生命值每等级提高2点。

Your familiar's max HP increase by 2 per level.

Cauterize.name: 烧灼 Cauterize
Cauterize.description:
频率 每小时一次

效果 余烬树液软泥流过一个开放性伤口，将其中所有热量吸到其表面，使你立即进行一次纯骰检定以终止流血，并使用较低的DC，以代表其提供了特别有效的协助。

Frequency once per hour

Effect The embersap ooze flows over an open wound and draws all of its heat onto its surface, giving an immediate flat check to end the bleed with the lower DC for particularly effective assistance.

Enflame Weapon.name: 点燃武器 Enflame Weapon
Enflame Weapon.description:
频率 每日一次

效果 余烬树液泥怪可以重塑其身体以覆盖一把近战武器，然后点燃其外表面。持续1分钟，或直到余烬树液泥怪恢复其原本形态为止，该武器每个武器伤害骰都会造成额外1点火伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.pVdbptaUck16kOgy]{效果：引燃武器}

Frequency once per day

Effect The embersap ooze can reshape its body to coat a melee weapon, and then set its outer surface ablaze. For 1 minute or until the embersap ooze resumes its original form, the weapon deals 1 additional fire damage per weapon damage die.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.pVdbptaUck16kOgy]{Effect: Enflame Weapon}

Frozen Sap.name: 冻结树液 Frozen Sap
Frozen Sap.description:
暴露在寒冷中会削弱灰烬树液软泥怪的火焰，并使构成其身体的树液凝固。它获得等于你等级的寒冷弱点。你可以花费一个额外的魔宠能力（永久或按天计算）来强化灰烬树液软泥怪的身体，从而移除这个弱点。

Exposure to cold dulls an embersap ooze's flames and solidifies the sap that forms its body. It gains weakness to cold equal to your level. You can spend an additional familiar ability, either permanently or on a per-day basis, to reinforce the embersap ooze's body, removing this weakness.

Ooze Defense.name: 软泥防御 Ooze Defense
Ooze Defense.description:
你的余烬树液泥怪魔宠很容易被击中，但它没有弱点。它免疫大成功与精确伤害，但它的AC只有10 + 你的等级（而不是等同于你的AC）。

Your embersap ooze familiar is easy to hit, but it lacks weak points. It is immune to critical hits and precision damage, but its AC is only 10 + your level (instead of an AC equal to yours).

Embersap Ooze.prototypeToken: 余烬树液泥怪 Embersap Ooze

Cinders at Dawn.name: 黎明的余烬 Cinders at Dawn
Cinders at Dawn.tokenName: 黎明余烬 Cinders at Dawn
Cinders at Dawn.publicNotes:
黎明余烬，一名无性别的野火莱西，是议会最新的成员，并且令他们自己十分懊恼的是，有一个派系正试图操纵他们，以推翻阿托克拉，取得非正式的领导地位。其原因在于“山之女”，一位卓越的艾尔达蒙，她与黎明余烬的灵体融合，赋予了黎明余烬难以置信的火力量。按照黎明余烬讲述的故事，他们因担心火山喷发而前往破火山口，并在那里目睹山之女现身。她因火山之生而疲惫，便在黎明余烬身上找到一处舒适的地方来休息。黎明余烬设法将山之女的一缕力量具现为一只魔宠，并借此与她沟通。通过这样做，他们获得了巨大的影响力，而克雷斯特的许多人相信，黎明余烬掌握着他们未来的关键。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.bpeAiPmv1sOnhiuh]{克雷斯特：山岳圣所}

Cinders at Dawn, an agender wildfire leshy, is the newest member of the council and, much to their own dismay, has a faction trying to maneuver them into toppling Artokra for informal leadership. The reason for this is Mountain's Daughter, an exceptional eldamon who merged with Cinders' spirit, granting Cinders incredible fire powers. The way Cinders tells the story, they were wary of a volcanic eruption and traveled to the caldera, where they witnessed Mountain's Daughter emerging. Tired from her volcanic birth, she found Cinders a nice place to rest. Cinders has managed to manifest a sliver of Mountain's Daughter's power as a familiar and uses that to commune with her. In so doing, they have gained great influence, and many in Crest believe that Cinders holds the key to their future.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.bpeAiPmv1sOnhiuh]{Crest: The Mountain Sanctum}
Cinders at Dawn.blurb:
无性别 野火 树灵 元素 化身
agender wildfire leshy elemental avatar
Cinders at Dawn.prototypeToken: 黎明余烬 Cinders at Dawn

Xotlxotl Cleric of Kuu.name: 库乌的佐特尔佐特尔牧师 Xotlxotl Cleric of Kuu
Xotlxotl Cleric of Kuu.tokenName: 索特索特尔，库乌的牧师 Xotlxotl Cleric of Kuu
Xotlxotl Cleric of Kuu.prototypeToken: 库乌的索特尔索特尔牧师 Xotlxotl Cleric of Kuu

Lilin, God of Chaos.name: 莉琳，混沌之神 Lilin, God of Chaos
Lilin, God of Chaos.publicNotes:
“母亲”通常只以“母亲”之名为人所知，但有时也被称为莉琳；她也被称为变革勇士与不可阻挡的力场。母亲代表世界中的混沌，既是毁灭的手段，也是创造的手段。对她而言，停滞才是唯一真正的罪，因为我们应当始终寻求自我提升、去创造，并在阿拉卡尔上留下些什么，让后世永不会忘记。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.ObjPQkXm7BW2lxZJ.JournalEntryPage.JpByaYC2d8oj1q4C]{莉琳，混沌之神}

The Mother often just goes by the name "The Mother," but also sometimes goes by the name Lilin, but she is also known as the Champion of Change and the Unstoppable Force. The Mother represents chaos in the world as both a means of destruction and creation. For her, stagnation is the only true sin, as we should always be looking to better ourselves, to create, and to make a mark on Alacar that future generations will not forget.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.ObjPQkXm7BW2lxZJ.JournalEntryPage.JpByaYC2d8oj1q4C]{Lilin, God of Chaos}

Xotlxotl Fighter.name: 索特尔索特尔战士 Xotlxotl Fighter
Xotlxotl Fighter.tokenName: 索特尔索特尔 战士 Xotlxotl Fighter
Xotlxotl Fighter.prototypeToken: 索特尔索特尔 战士 Xotlxotl Fighter

Adult Amber Dragon (Spellcaster).name: 成年琥珀巨龙（施法者） Adult Amber Dragon (Spellcaster)
Adult Amber Dragon (Spellcaster).tokenName: 成年琥珀巨龙 Adult Amber Dragon

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60英尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Sand Vision.name: 沙之视野 Sand Vision
Sand Vision.description:
沙砾不会妨碍琥珀巨龙的视野；它们无视由沙砾造成的隐蔽（状态）。

Sand doesn't impair an amber dragon's vision; they ignore the concealed condition from sand.

Electric Shock.name: 电击 Electric Shock
Electric Shock.description:
触发 一个相邻的生物以近战攻击对一条琥珀巨龙造成伤害，或一个生物以近战徒手攻击对一条琥珀巨龙造成伤害。

效果 覆盖在琥珀巨龙身上的一层薄薄的压电沙被压缩，使触发的生物遭到电击。触发的生物受到 @Damage[2d12[electricity]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:30|basic:true] 豁免）。如果触发的攻击使用的是金属武器，则触发的生物在其豁免上承受–1环境减值；如果该生物由金属构成（如铁魔像），则其在豁免上承受–2环境减值。若为大失败，其还会在1轮内处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}，因为电击使其身体痉挛。

Trigger An adjacent creature deals damage to an amber dragon with a melee attack, or a creature deals damage to an amber dragon with a melee unarmed attack.

Effect The thin layer of piezoelectric sand coating the amber dragon is compressed, electrocuting the triggering creature. The triggering creature takes @Damage[2d12[electricity]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:30|basic:true] save). If the triggering attack was with a metal weapon, the triggering creature takes a –1 circumstance penalty on their saving throw, and if the creature is made of metal (like an iron golem), they take a –2 circumstance penalty on their saving throw. On a critical failure, they're also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round, as their body seizes from the electric shock.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
巨龙吐息喷出一股压电沙爆，在@Template[type:cone|distance:40]内造成 @Damage[12d6[electricity]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:30|basic:true] 豁免）。它在[[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 轮}内无法再次使用吐息武器。

The dragon breathes a blast of piezoelectric sand that deals @Damage[12d6[electricity]] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:40] (@Check[type:reflex|dc:30|basic:true] save). It can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

Compelling Rumor.name: 引人注目的谣言 Compelling Rumor
Compelling Rumor.description:
琥珀巨龙用关于某个60尺内生物的流言蜚语与谣传轰炸它。该目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]。此外，其中一条谣言会在目标心中生根，可能迫使它在自己下个回合执行以下之一：接近你、逃跑（如同其具有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} 逃跑（状态））、放开它正拿着的东西、倒地 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，或原地不动。在完成该任务之前，它不能延迟或进行任何反应动作。该生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:30] 意志豁免，效果如下。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物在1轮内处于措手不及，且不遵从命令。

失败 该生物在2轮内处于措手不及，且在其下个回合的第一个动作中，该生物必须使用单动作来服从该谣言。

大成功或大失败 该生物在3轮内处于措手不及，且必须在其下个回合使用其所有动作来服从该谣言。

The amber dragon bombards a creature within 60 feet with gossip and rumors circulating about them. The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]. Additionally, one of these rumors takes hold of the target, potentially forcing them to do one of the following on their next turn: approach you, run away (as if it had the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} condition), release what it's holding, drop @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, or stand in place. It can't delay or take any reactions until it has completed this task. The creature must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:30] save with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is off-guard for 1 round and doesn't follow the command.

Failure The creature is off-guard for 2 rounds and for the first action on its next turn, the creature must use a single action to obey the rumor.

Critical Failure The creature is off-guard for 3 rounds and must use all its actions on its next turn to obey the rumor.

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Translate (Self Only).name: （仅限自身） Translate (Self Only)
Translate (Self Only).description:
你施放该法术时，目标可以理解它正在听到或读到的单一语言的含义。这不会让它理解密码、以隐喻方式表达的语言等（由GM酌情决定）。如果目标能听到多种语言并且知道这一点，它可以选择要理解哪一种语言；否则，从这些语言中随机选择一种。

升阶（3环）目标也可以说该语言。

升阶（4环）你最多可以以10个生物为目标，且目标也可以说该语言。

The target can understand the meaning of a single language it is hearing or reading when you cast the spell. This doesn't let it understand codes, language couched in metaphor, and the like (subject to GM discretion). If the target can hear multiple languages and knows that, it can choose which language to understand; otherwise, choose one of the languages randomly.

Heightened (3rd) The target can also speak the language.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures, and targets can also speak the language.

Message.name: 信息 Message
Message.description:
你轻声默念字句，但这些字句并不会从你口中发出，而是直接传送到目标的耳中。其他人听到你的字句并不会比你平时动口型时更清楚，但目标听到你的字句就如同他们正站在你身旁一样。

若目标愿意，他们可以用反应动作给出简短回应，或在他们下个回合以自由动作（）回应，但他们必须能看见你且处于射程内才能这么做。如果他们回应，他们的回应会像原始信息一样，直接传到你的耳中。

强化（3环） 该法术的射程增加至500英尺。

You mouth words quietly, but instead of coming out of your mouth, they're transferred directly to the ears of the target. While others can't hear your words any better than if you normally mouthed them, the target can hear your words as if they were standing next to you.

The target can give a brief response as a reaction, or as a free action on their next turn if they wish, but they must be able to see you and be within range to do so. If they respond, their response is delivered directly to your ear, just like the original message.

Heightened (3rd) The spell's range increases to 500 feet.

Clairaudience.name: 千里听声 Clairaudience
Clairaudience.description:
你在射程内的一处位置创造一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的漂浮耳朵（即使该位置在你的视觉线或效果线之外也可以）。它无法移动，但你可以通过这只耳朵听到声音，就如同使用你正常的听觉感官一样。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} floating ear at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect). It can't move, but you can hear through the ear as if using your normal auditory senses.

Suggestion.name: 建议 Suggestion
Suggestion.description:
你甜蜜的言辞让生物难以抗拒。你向目标提出一项行动建议，该建议必须以对目标而言像是合乎逻辑的行动方案来措辞，且不能是自我毁灭的，或明显违背目标自身利益。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你试图控制它。

成功 目标不受影响，并认为你只是正常地和它说话，而不是对它施放法术。

失败 目标立刻遵从你的建议。该法术的持续时间为1分钟，或直到目标完成某个有限的建议、或该建议变得自我毁灭、或产生其他明显的负面效果为止。

大失败 同失败，但基础持续时间为1小时。

升阶（8环） 你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

Your honeyed words are difficult for creatures to resist. You suggest a course of action to the target, which must be phrased in such a way as to seem like a logical course of action to the target and can't be self-destructive or obviously against the target's self-interest. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and knows you tried to control it.

Success The target is unaffected and thinks you were talking to them normally, not casting a spell on them.

Failure The target immediately follows your suggestion. The spell has a duration of 1 minute, or until the target has completed a finite suggestion or the suggestion becomes self-destructive or has other obvious negative effects.

Critical Failure As failure, but the base duration is 1 hour.

Heightened (8th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Sand Trap.name: 流沙陷阱 Sand Trap
Sand Trap.description:
频率 每分钟一次

效果 巨龙向40尺内的一个@Template[type:line|distance:10|width:10]{10×10尺方形}吐出压电沙。该区域为困难地形。生物第一次进入该区域时，沙子会释放一次电击冲击，造成@Damage[12d6[electricity]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:30|basic:true] 豁免）。1分钟后，沙子仍然存在，但不再带有电荷。

Frequency once per minute

Effect The dragon exhales piezoelectric sand into a @Template[type:line|distance:10|width:10]{10 by 10-foot square} within 40 feet. The area is difficult terrain. The first time a creature enters the area, the sand releases an electric shock, dealing @Damage[12d6[electricity]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:30|basic:true] save). After 1 minute, the sand remains, but it no longer holds an electric charge.

Arcane Prepared Spells.name: 奥术备妥法术 Arcane Prepared Spells

Blur.name: 朦胧 Blur
Blur.description:
目标的形态看起来模糊不清。它变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。由于此效果的性质仍使目标的位置显而易见，目标无法利用此隐蔽来躲藏或潜行。

The target's form appears blurry. It becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}. As the nature of this effect still leaves the target's location obvious, the target can't use this concealment to Hide or Sneak.

Phantom Crowd.name: 魅影人群 Phantom Crowd
Phantom Crowd.description:
一群与该区域相称、挤得密密麻麻的人形生物出现，面向你，并对你说的任何话都大声表示赞同。触碰人群成员的生物，或使用“搜寻”动作检查人群的生物，可以尝试识破你的幻术。对任何尚未识破该幻术的人而言，这群人构成困难地形。

当你花费1个或更多动作来施放一个咏唱法术，或进行一个包含表演检定的行动时，你也可以将维持该法术作为该动作的一部分。

升阶（+1） 人群在射程内额外占据一个10英尺见方的方格。这个额外方格不需要与该法术创造的任何其他方格相邻。它可以重叠，但在重叠的方格中没有额外效果。

A tightly packed crowd of humanoids appropriate to the area appear, facing you and agreeing loudly with anything you say. A creature that touches a member of the crowd or makes a Seek action to examine the crowd can attempt to disbelieve your illusion. The crowd is difficult terrain for anyone who hasn't disbelieved the illusion.

When you spend 1 or more actions to cast a composition spell or to perform an activity that includes a Performance check, you can also Sustain this Spell as part of that action.

Heightened (+1) The crowd occupies an additional 10-foot square in range. The additional square doesn't need to be adjacent to any other square created by the spell. It can overlap, but there's no additional effect in the overlapped squares.

Charm.name: 魅惑 Charm
Charm.description:
对目标而言，你的话语如蜜一般甜美，你的容貌仿佛笼罩在梦幻的薄雾中。它必须尝试一次意志豁免；如果你或你的盟友最近威胁过它或对它使用过敌对动作，则该豁免获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。如果你对目标使用敌对动作，则法术结束。当法术结束时，除非它对你的友谊或你说服它采取的动作与它的预期发生冲突，否则目标未必会意识到自己被魅惑了，这意味着你可能可以通过世俗手段说服目标继续做你的朋友。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响，并且知道你试图魅惑它。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害的东西而非魅惑，除非它辨识了该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友善}。如果它原本为友善，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于助人}。它无法对你使用敌对动作。

大成功或大失败 目标对你的态度变为乐于助人，并且它无法对你使用敌对动作。

升阶（4环） 持续时间持续至你下一次进行每日准备为止。

升阶（8环） 持续时间持续至你下一次进行每日准备为止，且你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Fear.name: 恐惧 Fear
Fear.description:
你在目标心中种下恐惧；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功或大失败成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大成功或大失败失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}，持续1轮。

升阶（3环） 你可以以最多五个生物为目标。

You plant fear in the target; it must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to five creatures.

Illusory Object.name: 幻象物体 Illusory Object
Illusory Object.description:
你创造一个静止物体的虚假视觉影像。整个影像必须完全容纳在该法术的区域内。该物体看起来会自然地活动，但不会发出声音或产生气味。例如，水看起来会从虚假的瀑布中倾泻而下，但会是无声的。

任何接触该影像的生物，或使用【搜索】动作检查它的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻觉。

升阶（2环）你的影像会发出恰当的声音，产生正常的气味，触感也与真实一致。该法术获得听觉（特征）。持续时间增加至1小时。

升阶（5环）同2环版本，但持续时间为无限。

You create an illusory visual image of a stationary object. The entire image must fit within the spell's area. The object appears to animate naturally, but it doesn't make sounds or generate smells. For example, water would appear to pour down an illusory waterfall, but it would be silent.

Any creature that touches the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (2nd) Your image makes appropriate sounds, generates normal smells, and feels right to the touch. The spell gains the auditory trait. The duration increases to 1 hour.

Heightened (5th) As the 2nd-level version, but the duration is unlimited.

Electric Arc.name: 电弧 Electric Arc
Electric Arc.description:
一道闪电弧从一个目标跃向另一个。你造成等于 1d4 加上你的施法能力调整值的电击伤害。

强化（+1） 伤害增加 1d4。

An arc of lightning leaps from one target to another. You deal electricity damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Ghost Sound.name: 幽灵之音 Ghost Sound
Ghost Sound.description:
你创造一个简单声音的听觉幻象，其最大音量相当于四个正常人同时喊叫。声音从你在射程内指定的一个方格中发出。你无法创造可理解的词语或其他复杂的声音（例如音乐）。

升阶（3环） 射程增加至60尺。

升阶（5环） 射程增加至120尺。

You create an auditory illusion of simple sounds that has a maximum volume equal to four normal humans shouting. The sounds emanate from a square you designate within range. You can't create intelligible words or other intricate sounds (such as music).

Heightened (3rd) The range increases to 60 feet.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 120 feet.

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你将注意力集中于目标物体，使你的心智敞开以感知魔法灵光。施法完成后，你会知道该物品是否具有魔法；若是，你还会得知其魔法学派。

若该物体是幻象，你只有在该效果的等级低于你的辨识灵光法术的等级时才会侦测到这一点。

升阶（3环） 你可以以最多 10 个物体为目标。

升阶（6环） 你可以以任意数量的物体为目标。

You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras. When the casting is complete, you know whether that item is magical, and if it is, you learn the school of magic.

If the object is illusory, you detect this only if the effect's level is lower than the level of your read aura spell.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to 10 objects.

Heightened (6th) You can target any number of objects.

Sigil.name: 印记 Sigil
Sigil.description:
你无害地将自己独特的魔法印记（约 1 平方英寸大小）置于所选的目标生物或物体之上。印记可以是可见或不可见的，你可以通过使用一个交互动作来接触目标，将其从一种状态切换为另一种状态。印记可以通过 5 分钟的擦洗或刮除工作移除。若印记在生物身上，它会在一周内自然消退。印记消退前所需的时长会随着你以更高等级施放而增加。

升阶（3环） 印记改为在 1 个月后消退。

升阶（5环） 印记改为在 1 年后消退。

升阶（7环） 印记永不消退。

You harmlessly place your unique magical sigil, which is about 1 square inch in size, on the targeted creature or object. The mark can be visible or invisible, and you can change it from one state to another by using an Interact action to touch the target. The mark can be scrubbed or scraped off with 5 minutes of work. If it's on a creature, it fades naturally over the course of a week. The time before the mark fades increases depending on your heightened level.

Heightened (3rd) The sigil instead fades after 1 month.

Heightened (5th) The sigil instead fades after 1 year.

Heightened (7th) The sigil never fades.

Translate.name: 请提供需要翻译的英文原文内容（可直接粘贴文本或上传图片）。 Translate
Translate.description:
当你施放该法术时，目标可以理解它正在听到或阅读的一种语言的含义。这不会让它理解密码、以隐喻方式表达的语言等（由GM酌情决定）。如果目标能听到多种语言并且知道这一点，它可以选择要理解的语言；否则，随机选择其中一种语言。

升阶（3环） 目标也可以说这种语言。

升阶（4环） 你最多可以以10个生物为目标，并且目标也可以说这种语言。

The target can understand the meaning of a single language it is hearing or reading when you cast the spell. This doesn't let it understand codes, language couched in metaphor, and the like (subject to GM discretion). If the target can hear multiple languages and knows that, it can choose which language to understand; otherwise, choose one of the languages randomly.

Heightened (3rd) The target can also speak the language.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures, and targets can also speak the language.

Hallucination.name: 幻觉 Hallucination
Hallucination.description:
目标会持续将某物侦测为另一种东西、无法侦测到确实存在的东西，或侦测到并不存在的东西，不过这不会改变其信念。你选择适用上述哪一种效果，并决定幻觉的具体内容。例如，你可以让目标将所有精灵看成是人类、无法侦测到其兄弟的存在、即使怀表并不在身上也看见自己随身带着心爱的怀表，或看见城镇中心有一座高塔。目标可以尝试进行一次初始的意志豁免，其效果如下。每当目标进行搜索或直接与幻觉交互时，它也会获得一次意志豁免以识破幻觉。例如，目标每次与一名精灵交互、意外撞上自己的兄弟、试图查看怀表，或研究那座高塔时，都可以尝试识破幻觉。在由GM决定的情境中，目标可以带有很大的环境加值来尝试识破，例如目标试图攀爬那座不存在的高塔时。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物会感知到你所选择的内容直到它识破为止，但它知道这是什么幻觉。

失败 该生物会感知到你所选择的内容直到它识破为止。

大失败 该生物会感知到你所选择的内容直到它识破为止，且它信任自己错误的感官，对用于识破的豁免承受-4环境减值。

升阶（6环） 选择以下其一：以最多10个生物为目标，或将该法术的持续时间改为直到你下次进行每日准备为止。

升阶（8环） 选择以下其一：以任意数量的生物为目标，或将该法术的持续时间改为无限。

The target consistently detects one thing as another, can't detect something that's there, or detects something that's not there, though it doesn't alter their beliefs. You choose which of these effects applies, and you determine the specifics of the hallucination. For example, you could make the target see all elves as humans, be unable to detect the presence of their brother, see their beloved pocket watch on their person even when it isn't, or see a tower in the center of town. The target can attempt an initial Will save, with effects below. They also receive a Will save to disbelieve the hallucination every time they Seek or directly interact with the hallucination. For example, the target could attempt to disbelieve the hallucination each time they interacted with an elf, bumped into their brother accidentally, tried to check their pocket watch, or studied the tower. The target can attempt to disbelieve with a large circumstance bonus in situations determined by the GM, such as if the target attempted to climb the nonexistent tower.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature perceives what you chose until it disbelieves, but it knows what the hallucination is.

Failure The creature perceives what you chose until it disbelieves.

Critical Failure The creature perceives what you chose until it disbelieves, and it trusts its false senses, taking a -4 circumstance penalty to saves to disbelieve.

Heightened (6th) Choose to either target up to 10 creatures or change the spell's duration to until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) Choose to either target any number of creatures or change the spell's duration to unlimited.

Mind Probe.name: 心智探查 Mind Probe
Mind Probe.description:
你将思绪投射进一个生物的心智中，筛查信息。你会接触到目标的记忆与知识，除非它用一次意志豁免将你击退。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 在法术持续时间的每一轮，你都可以维持法术以提出一个不同的问题，并尝试揭示答案。对于每个问题，目标都可以尝试进行一次欺瞒检定来对抗你的法术DC；如果目标成功，你不会得知答案；若为大成功或大失败中的大成功，目标会给出一个你认为真实的错误答案。一旦你向目标提出过某个特定问题，再次提出同一个问题——即使是用另一份心智探查的独立施放——也会产生相同的结果。

大成功或大失败 如同失败，且目标在针对你的问题进行的欺瞒检定上承受-4环境减值。

You cast your thoughts through a creature's mind, sifting for information. You access the target's memories and knowledge unless it fends you off with a Will save.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure Each round of the spell's duration, you can Sustain the Spell to ask a different question and attempt to uncover the answer. For each question, the target can attempt a Deception check against your spell DC; if the target succeeds, you don't learn the answer, and on a critical success, the target gives you a false answer that you believe is truthful Once you've asked the target a given question, asking it again, even with a separate casting of mind probe, produces the same result.

Critical Failure As failure, and the target takes a -4 circumstance penalty to Deception checks against your questions.

Confusion.name: 困惑 Confusion
Confusion.description:
你用怪异的冲动迷惑你的目标，使其随机行动。效果由目标的意志豁免决定。你可以解消该法术。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标含糊不清地胡言乱语，并处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

失败 目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}，持续1分钟。它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免以结束该困惑。

大失败 目标陷入Confused，持续1分钟，且无法通过豁免提前结束。

强化（8环） 你可以以最多10个生物为目标。

You befuddle your target with strange impulses, causing it to act randomly. The effects are determined by the target's Will save. You can Dismiss the spell.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target babbles incoherently and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 minute. It can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns to end the confusion.

Critical Failure The target is Confused for 1 minute, with no save to end early.

Heightened (8th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Freedom of Movement.name: 行动自如 Freedom of Movement
Freedom of Movement.description:
你排斥那些会阻碍生物或减缓其移动的效果。在此法术效果影响下，目标无视那些会使其速度受到环境减值的效果。当其尝试 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} 一个使其处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} 的效果时，除非该效果是魔法且等级高于行动自如法术，否则其自动成功。

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher level than the freedom of movement spell.

Glyph of Warding.name: 守护结界符文 Glyph of Warding
Glyph of Warding.description:
你通过将一个敌对法术束缚进一个符文来制作一个陷阱。在施放此法术时，你还要施放一个更低法术等级的法术以将其储存在符文中。被储存的法术必须以3个动作或更少来施放，具有敌对效果，并以一个生物为目标或具有一个区域。你可以为符文设置一个口令、一个触发条件，或两者皆有。任何移动、打开或触碰目标容器，或进入目标区域且未说出口令，或符合触发条件的生物都会启动符文，释放其中的有害法术。

一旦有法术被储存在符文中，该符文获得该法术的所有特征。若被储存的法术以一个或更多生物为目标，它以触发符文的生物为目标。若它具有区域，则该区域以触发符文的生物为中心。防护符文的持续时间在符文被触发时结束。该符文视为一个魔法陷阱：用你的法术DC来进行用于察觉检定以注意到它，以及用于盗贼检定以解除它；两项检定都要求尝试的生物必须为受训才能成功。

你可以解消防护符文。你在同一时间内可保持生效的防护符文的最大数量等于你的施法能力调整值。

You craft a trap by binding a hostile spell into a symbol. While Casting this Spell, you also Cast a Spell of a lower spell level to store in the glyph. The stored spell must take 3 actions or fewer to cast, have a hostile effect, and target one creature or have an area. You can set a password, a trigger, or both for the glyph. Any creature that moves, opens, or touches the target container or enters the target area that doesn't speak the password or that matches the trigger activates the glyph, releasing the harmful spell within.

Once a spell is stored in the glyph, the glyph gains all the traits of that spell. If the stored spell targets one or more creatures, it targets the creature that set off the glyph. If it has an area, that area is centered on the creature that set off the glyph. Glyph of warding's duration ends when the glyph is triggered. The glyph counts as a magical trap, using your spell DC for both the Perception check to notice it and the Thievery check to disable it; both checks require the creature attempting them to be trained in order to succeed.

You can Dismiss glyph of warding. The maximum number of glyphs of warding you can have active at a time is equal to your spellcasting ability modifier.

Adult Amber Dragon (Spellcaster).publicNotes:
琥珀巨龙是巨龙之中最友善、最平易近人的一类。它们富有魅力、热情好客，并且热爱结交朋友。它们喜欢聊天，精通多种语言，并且总能知道些有用的事情。它们是出色的倾听者，总是准备好耐心聆听与温和鼓励，促使与其交往的对象倾诉任何他们觉得有必要说出的事。琥珀巨龙常被视为无害的长舌者，但它们远比人们给予的鸣谢更狡猾、更善于操纵。

琥珀巨龙不只是爱管闲事的健谈家；它们是操纵人心的造谣者，最爱的莫过于打探并传播流言。它们对自己选择传播的闲话是否属实毫无兴趣。事实上，传闻越是离奇，它们越可能散播。它们只在乎自我娱乐，并且总乐意为变得有点乏味的流言添点润色或来个转折。它们是执拗的搅局者，从不在意自己的言语会毁掉多少人生。

琥珀巨龙偏好生活在人口稠密的环境中。通常这意味着都市环境，但它们住在人类城市或矮人要塞的可能性，并不比住在妖精飞地或一片满是健谈动物的林地更低。它们不在乎周围环境，而在乎身边有多少聪慧、且最重要的是健谈的生物。许多个体会在很长一段时间里保持定居。它们喜欢在某个地区安顿下来，尽可能吸收当地的文化、人群与时事。只要还能从“家”里摘取更多流言，它们就会留下；一旦厌倦，便会离开去寻找新的地区，以便潜入并融入其中。要抓住一条琥珀巨龙的注意力，一个地区必须人口密集，其居民还得容易被操纵。小村庄与城镇不足以让琥珀巨龙长久取乐；同样，那些政府施加过多禁令、可能让市民噤声或变得过度多疑的地方也不行。

琥珀巨龙理解言语的力量，而大多数还偏爱文字。与多数巨龙相比，它们更可能收集并囤积稀有书籍、卷轴与典籍；它们对古老羊皮纸与刻铭的重视胜过黄金与宝石。它们往往会用守护雕文与其他防护符印来保护自己珍贵的私人藏书。

尽管很少有琥珀巨龙愿意承认，它们是耐心而聪明的间谍，会观察、倾听，并操纵身边发生的事件，以便收集最劲爆的故事与闲话再加以传播。最年轻的琥珀巨龙最在意流言、新闻、时事，以及短命者的生活——这些都在不断变化。年长的琥珀巨龙则偏好更持久的传闻、黑暗而古老的历史、禁忌典籍、神话与传奇，以及那些足以推翻君主、引发社会革命并造成其他重大事件或动荡的流言。

英奎斯提亚尔

英奎斯提亚尔，“活的法典”，是一条隐居的琥珀巨龙，维护着物质位面上规模最大的图书馆之一。在其中，古代文本与禁忌巨著被远离窥探的目光——并置于巨龙的守护凝视之下。英奎斯提亚尔允许外人向他请愿以求入内；失败者将再也不会被见到。

秘密宝库

琥珀巨龙最珍爱的财物，是它们独自保守的秘密。大多数会把这些秘密牢牢记住，但它们对文本的偏爱意味着许多个体会将其写下来，以文本或加密账册的形式保存。另一些则会保留一件与秘密相关联的物体，使其作为触觉记忆触发器。

情报掮客

一些琥珀巨龙会充当情报掮客。它们免费散播简单而有趣的流言以引诱客户，然后对更敏感的情报与传闻收费。多数只接受以秘密与个人信息作为报酬——非常适合再卖给其他客户！

Amber dragons are among the friendliest and most approachable of dragons. They're charismatic, welcoming, and adore making friends. They love to chat, are fluent in numerous languages, and always know something useful. They're excellent listeners, always ready with a patient ear and kind encouragement, prodding those they socialize with to share whatever they feel the need to. Often seen as harmless gossips, amber dragons are far more cunning and manipulative than they're given credit for.

Amber dragons are more than chatty busybodies; they're manipulative rumormongers who adore nothing more than learning and spreading rumors. They have no interest in whether the gossip they choose to spread is true. In fact, the more outlandish a rumor, the more likely they are to spread it. They care for their own entertainment and are always willing to add a bit of embellishment or a twist to rumors that are getting a little stale. They're persistent meddlers who care not for the lives their words could ruin.

Amber dragons prefer to live in populous environments. Usually, this means urban environments, but they're just as likely to live within a human city or a dwarven fortress as they are in a fey enclave or a grove of talkative animals. They care not for their surroundings but for the number of intelligent and, most importantly, talkative creatures around them. Many are sedentary for large portions of time. They love to settle in a region and absorb all they can of its culture, people, and current events. So long as there are more rumors to pluck from their home, they stay, moving on when they grow bored to find a new region into which to insinuate themselves. To hold an amber dragon's attention, a region must be densely populated, and its inhabitants must be susceptible to manipulation. Hamlets and towns aren't big enough to keep an amber dragon amused for long, nor are places whose government enforces too many prohibitions that could cause its citizens to clam up or be overly suspicious.

Amber dragons understand the power of words, and most have a fondness for the written word. They're more likely to collect and hoard rare books, scrolls, and texts than most dragons, placing a higher value on old parchment and carvings than they do on gold and gemstones. They're prone to protecting their valuable personal libraries with glyphs of warding and other protective sigils.

While few amber dragons would admit it, they're patient and clever spies who watch, listen, and manipulate events around them to collect the juiciest tales and gossip to spread. The youngest amber dragons care most for gossip, news, current events, and the lives of the short-lived, which are constantly changing. Older amber dragons favor more lasting rumors, dark and ancient history, forbidden texts, myths, and legends, as well as rumors that could topple monarchs, cause a social revolution, and produce other major events or upheavals.

Inguistial

Inguistial, the "Living Libram," is a reclusive amber dragon who maintains one of the largest libraries on the Material Plane. Within, ancient texts and forbidden tomes are kept far from prying eyes—and under the dragon's protective gaze. Inguistial allows outsiders to petition him for entry; those who fail are never seen again.

Secret Hoards

An amber dragon's most prized possessions are the secrets they keep to themselves. Most keep these secrets memorized, but their fondness for texts means many write them down, keeping them as texts or coded ledgers. Some instead keep an object tied to the secret, which functions as a tactile memory trigger.

Information Brokers

Some amber dragons work as information brokers. They spread simple and entertaining rumors for free to tempt clients, then charge for more sensitive information and rumors. Most accept payment only in secrets and personal information— perfect for selling to other clients!
Adult Amber Dragon (Spellcaster).prototypeToken: 成年琥珀巨龙 Adult Amber Dragon

Climber.name: 攀爬者 Climber
Climber.description:
它获得25英尺的攀爬速度。

It gains a climb Speed of 25 feet.

Inkwell.name: 墨水瓶 Inkwell
Inkwell.description:
一只典型的健康图格图格每天能产出足以装满一只标准墨水瓶的墨水。图格图格魔宠也可以选择产出另一种适合用于纹身的墨水。这种带有微弱魔法的墨水无毒且不易褪色。图格图格的主人可以随意为这种墨水重新着色，使其能够改变纹身的颜色，甚至在需要时让它们变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}。尽管是一个仆从，你的图格图格魔宠在其每个回合开始时获得1个反应动作，它只能用该反应动作来援助你进行一次用于创造纹身或其他以墨水为基础的艺术作品的制作检定（它仍然必须像援助反应动作那样正常地准备帮助你）。它在其用于援助你的该类检定中自动成功；若你是相关技能的大师，则它在该类检定中自动大成功。

A typical healthy toogtoog produces enough ink to fill a standard ink vial every day. Toogtoog familiars can also choose to produce a different type of ink that is well-suited for tattoos. This faintly magical ink is nontoxic and resistant to fading. The toogtoog's master can recolor this ink at will, allowing them to alter the color of tattoos or even make them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} if desired. Despite being a minion, your toogtoog familiar gains 1 reaction at the start of its turns, which it can use only to Aid you on a Crafting check to create a tattoo or other ink-based artwork (it still has to prepare to help you as normal for the Aid reaction). It automatically succeeds at its check to Aid you with those skills or automatically critically succeeds if you're a master of the skill in question.

Orpok Tusked Champion.name: 奥波克獠牙勇士 Orpok Tusked Champion
Orpok Tusked Champion.tokenName: 奥波克·长牙勇士 Orpok Tusked Champion
Orpok Tusked Champion.prototypeToken: 奥尔波克长牙勇士 Orpok Tusked Champion

Tova, God of Law.name: 托瓦，律法之神 Tova, God of Law
Tova, God of Law.publicNotes:
父亲常常就被称作“父亲”，但有时也用托瓦这个名字。他也被称为法律执行者与不可移动的物体。有些人认为父亲是法律与秩序的化身，但这是否使他仁慈或邪恶，则取决于个人观点。尽管他的职责领域与目标与母亲相悖，他们之间仍保持着相对合作的关系；然而，当他们在某事上产生分歧时，秩序与混沌的力量便会冲突，并可能在全世界范围内创造巨大的纷争。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.ObjPQkXm7BW2lxZJ.JournalEntryPage.Ee99QGmoRQO60TZW]{托瓦，法律之神}

The Father often just goes by "The Father," but also sometimes goes by the name Tova. He is also known as Lawbringer and the Immovable Object. Some consider the Father the epitome of law and order, but whether that makes him benevolent or malicious depends upon one's point of view. Though his portfolio and goals run counter to the Mother's, they share a relatively cooperative relationship; however, when they disagree on something, the powers of order and chaos clash and can create great strife throughout the world.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.ObjPQkXm7BW2lxZJ.JournalEntryPage.Ee99QGmoRQO60TZW]{Tova, God of Law}

Young Harlequin Dragon (Spellcaster).name: 幼年丑角巨龙（施法者） Young Harlequin Dragon (Spellcaster)
Young Harlequin Dragon (Spellcaster).tokenName: 幼年丑角巨龙 Young Harlequin Dragon

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60英尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Jester's Jeer.name: 弄臣的嘲弄 Jester's Jeer
Jester's Jeer.description:
触发 一名敌人对巨龙的打击造成大失败。

效果 巨龙嘲弄触发生物的无能，让触发生物充满恐惧，直到其对巨龙造成一次打击命中为止。巨龙尝试对触发生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize}。若成功，则在触发生物的回合结束时，其惊惧（状态）无法降低至低于1，直到其成功以打击命中巨龙，或直到其至少1轮未观察或以感官感知到巨龙为止。

Trigger A foe critically fails a Strike against the dragon.

Effect The dragon pokes fun at the triggering creature's incompetence, filling the triggering creature with dread until they land a blow against the dragon. The dragon attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} the triggering creature. On a success, the triggering creature's frightened condition can't decrease to less than 1 at the end of its turn until it either successfully Strikes the dragon or until it doesn't observe or sense the dragon for at least 1 round.

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Mirror Image.name: 镜影术 Mirror Image
Mirror Image.description:
三个虚幻的你在你的空间中盘旋，可能导致攻击你的人击中其中一个幻象而非你自己。任何本应命中你的攻击都有一个随机几率改为命中你的一个幻象而非你。如果三个幻象都还在，则有 1/4 的几率命中你（在 [[/r 1d4]] 中掷出 1）。若剩余两个幻象，则有 1/3 的几率命中你（在 [[/r 1d6]] 中掷出 1-2）。若只剩一个幻象，则几率为 1/2（在 [[/r 1d6]] 中掷出 1-3）。

一旦某个幻象被命中，它就会被摧毁。如果一次攻击掷骰未能命中你的 AC 但没有大失败，它会摧毁一个幻象，但没有额外效果（即使该攻击通常会在失败时产生效果）。如果一次攻击掷骰为大成功，并且本应命中某个幻象，则摧毁一个幻象，且该次攻击掷骰改为对你成功。当所有幻象都被摧毁后，该法术结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.0PO5mFRhh9HxGAtv]{法术效果：镜像术}

Three illusory images of you swirl about your space, potentially causing those who attack you to hit one of the images instead of you. Any attack that would hit you has a random chance of hitting one of your images instead of you. If all three images remain, there is a 1 in 4 chance of hitting you (1 on [[/r 1d4]]). With two images remaining, there is a 1 in 3 chance of hitting you (1-2 on [[/r 1d6]]). With only one image, the chances are 1 in 2 (1-3 on [[/r 1d6]]).

Once an image is hit, it is destroyed. If an attack roll fails to hit your AC but doesn't critically fail, it destroys an image but has no additional effect (even if the attack would normally have an effect on a failure). If an attack roll is a critical success and would hit one of the images, one of the images is destroyed and the attack roll becomes a success against you. Once all the images are destroyed, the spell ends.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.0PO5mFRhh9HxGAtv]{Spell Effect: Mirror Image}

Prestidigitation.name: 戏法 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法会听从你的指令。只要你维持法术，你就能施展简单的魔法效果。每次你维持法术时，你都可以从四个选项中选择一个。

  • 烹饪 冷却、加热或调味1磅非生物材料。
  • 抬起 缓慢地 将一件无人照看的、负载为轻或更低的物体缓慢抬离地面1英尺。
  • 制作 创造一个临时物体，其负载可忽略不计，由凝结的魔法物质构成。该物体外观粗糙且不自然，并且极其脆弱——不能用作工具、武器或法术材料成分。
  • 整理 为一件负载为轻或更低的物体上色、清洁或弄脏。你可以以10轮的专注影响一件负载为1的物体，而更大的物体则每负载需要1分钟。

戏法无法造成伤害或引发不利状态。对物体进行的任何实际改变（除上述注明者之外）仅在你维持法术期间持续。

The simplest magic does your bidding. You can perform simple magical effects for as long as you Sustain the Spell. Each time you Sustain the Spell, you can choose one of four options.

  • Cook Cool, warm, or flavor 1 pound of nonliving material.
  • Lift Slowly lift an unattended object of light Bulk or less 1 foot off the ground.
  • Make Create a temporary object of negligible Bulk, made of congealed magical substance. The object looks crude and artificial and is extremely fragile-it can't be used as a tool, weapon, or spell component.
  • Tidy Color, clean, or soil an object of light Bulk or less. You can affect an object of 1 Bulk with 10 rounds of concentration, and a larger object a 1 minute per Bulk.

Prestidigitation can't deal damage or cause adverse conditions. Any actual change to an object (beyond what is noted above) persists only as long as you Sustain the Spell.

Arcane Prepared Spells.name: 奥术预备法术 Arcane Prepared Spells

Befitting Attire.name: 得体装束 Befitting Attire
Befitting Attire.description:
你用幻术为目标披上斗篷，将其衣物与穿戴物品塑造成适合特定场合的样式。你在脑海中想象该场合，而法术会为每个目标创造量身定制的幻象装束。例如，若你想象的是一场贵族舞会，那么护甲看起来会是精美的服装。这不会改变目标外貌中除衣物之外的任何可辨识细节。

任何触摸该装束、使用“搜寻”动作来检查它，或以其他方式与其交互的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻术。

升阶（4环）你最多可以以20个生物为目标。

升阶（5环）你最多可以以100个生物为目标。

You cloak the targets in an illusion, shaping their clothing and worn items into ones suitable for a particular occasion. You visualize the occasion, and the spell creates illusory attire customized to each target. For instance, if you visualized a noble ball, armor would appear to be fine clothing. This doesn't change identifying details of the targets' appearances other than their clothes.

Any creature that touches the attire, uses the Seek action to examine it, or otherwise interacts with it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 20 creatures.

Heightened (5th) You can target up to 100 creatures.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你解构某个法术或效果背后的魔法。对目标尝试一次反制检定。若你成功反制一件魔法物品，该物品在10分钟内变为其类型的普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。若目标为神器或类似物品，你自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Glitterdust.name: 闪光尘 Glitterdust
Glitterdust.description:
区域内的生物被闪烁的尘埃勾勒出轮廓。每个生物必须尝试一次反射豁免。如果某个生物的隐形被此法术抵消，则它获得的是 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 而非 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}。这既适用于该生物原本就处于隐形状态的情况，也适用于在此法术所造成的隐形抵消效果结束前，该生物从新的隐形效果中获益的情况。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标的隐形被抵消，持续2轮。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 状态，持续1分钟，且其隐形被抵消，持续1分钟。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲} 状态，持续1轮，并目眩10分钟。其隐形被抵消10分钟。

Creatures in the area are outlined by glittering dust. Each creature must attempt a Reflex save. If a creature has its invisibility negated by this spell, it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} instead of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. This applies both if the creature was already Invisible and if it benefits from new invisibility effects before the end of the invisibility negation effect from this spell.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target's invisibility is negated for 2 rounds.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 minute and its invisibility is negated for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round and Dazzled for 10 minutes. Its invisibility is negated for 10 minutes.

Color Spray.name: 万色彩喷 Color Spray
Color Spray.description:
旋转的色彩会根据观看者的意志豁免影响他们。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 状态，持续 1 轮。

失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{昏迷 1}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明} 状态，持续 1 轮，并获得目眩状态，持续 1 分钟。

大失败 该生物昏迷，持续 1 轮，并失明，持续 1 分钟。

Swirling colors affect viewers based on their Will saves.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round, and Dazzled for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature is Stunned for 1 round and Blinded for 1 minute.

Grease.name: 油腻术 Grease
Grease.description:
你召唤出油脂，其效果取决于你选择的区域或目标。

  • 区域 [4个相邻的5尺方格] 区域内所有坚实地面都被油脂覆盖。每个位于油滑表面上的生物必须在一次反射豁免或一次特技检定中对抗你的法术DC并成功，否则倒下并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。在法术持续时间内，使用一个动作移动到油滑表面上的生物必须尝试一次反射豁免或一次特技检定以保持平衡。进行「挪步」或「匍匐」的生物无需尝试检定或豁免。
  • 目标 [1个负载1或更少的物体] 若你将该法术施放在无人持用的物体上，任何试图拾取该物体的人都必须进行一次特技检定或反射豁免以对抗你的法术DC并成功，才能将其拾起。若你以有人持用的物体为目标，则持有该物体的生物必须尝试一次特技检定或反射豁免。若失败，则持有者或使用者在所有涉及使用该物体的检定上承受-2环境减值；若大成功或大失败，则持有者或使用者松开该物品。该物体落在GM选择的相邻方格中。若你将此法术施放在一件穿戴的物体上，穿戴者在对抗试图擒抱他们的强韧豁免中获得+2环境加值。

You conjure grease, with effects based on choosing area or target.

  • Area [4 contiguous 5-foot squares] All solid ground in the area is covered with grease. Each creature standing on the greasy surface must succeed at a Reflex save or an Acrobatics check against your spell DC or fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. Creatures using an action to move onto the greasy surface during the spell's duration must attempt either a Reflex save or an Acrobatics check to Balance. A creature that Steps or Crawls doesn't have to attempt a check or save.
  • Target [1 object of Bulk 1 or less] If you cast the spell on an unattended object, anyone trying to pick up the object must succeed at an Acrobatics check or Reflex save against your spell DC to do so. If you target an attended object, the creature that has the object must attempt an Acrobatics check or Reflex save. On a failure, the holder or wielder takes a -2 circumstance penalty to all checks that involve using the object; on a critical failure, the holder or wielder releases the item. The object lands in an adjacent square of the GM's choice. If you cast this spell on a worn object, the wearer gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Fortitude saves against attempts to grapple them.

Ventriloquism.name: 腹语术 Ventriloquism
Ventriloquism.description:
每当你说话或以发声的方式制造任何其他声音时，你可以让你的发声看起来像是从60英尺内的别处传来，并且你可以在发声时自由改变该表观位置。任何听到该声音的生物都可以尝试识破你的幻觉。

升阶（2环） 该法术的持续时间增加至1小时，并且你还可以改变你声音的音调、音色、品质和其他性相。在生物可以尝试识破你的幻觉之前，它必须主动尝试一次察觉检定，或以其他方式使用动作来与该声音交互。

Whenever you speak or make any other sound vocally, you can make your vocalization seem to originate from somewhere else within 60 feet, and you can change that apparent location freely as you vocalize. Any creature that hears the sound can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (2nd) The spell's duration increases to 1 hour, and you can also change the tone, quality, and other aspects of your voice. Before a creature can attempt to disbelieve your illusion, it must actively attempt a Perception check or otherwise use actions to interact with the sound.

Bullhorn.name: 扩音器 Bullhorn
Bullhorn.description:
你放大自己的声音，大到能让你在极远距离也能被轻易听见。在持续时间内，所有位于500尺内的听众都能清晰而响亮地听到你的声音，即使周遭环境噪音原本会遮蔽声音也不例外。尽管音量很大，这也不会让你的声音变得刺耳或令人分心。这不会增加其他听觉或语言效果的射程或区域，并且墙壁与门等物理屏障仍会如常阻挡或削弱你的声音。

你的洪亮嗓音让你更容易胁迫他人，而声学效果也有助于你在大型场馆中表演。你在进行胁迫的检定，以及在大型场馆中进行表演的听觉表演检定时，获得+1状态加值。你可以解消该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.9yzlmYUdvdQshTDF]{法术效果：扩音喇叭}

升阶（5环） 你的声音能在最远1,200尺处仍清晰可闻。

升阶（7环） 你的声音能在最远1英里处仍清晰可闻。

You amplify your voice, loud enough for you to be heard easily at a great distance. For the duration, your voice can be heard loudly and clearly by all listeners within 500 feet, even if other ambient noise would otherwise block the sound. Despite the volume, this doesn't make your voice jarring or distracting. This doesn't increase the range or area of other auditory or linguistic effects, and physical barriers such as walls and doors still block or muffle your voice as normal.

Your loud voice makes it easier to Coerce others, and the acoustics assist in Performing at a large venue. You gain a +1 status bonus to checks to Coerce and auditory Performance checks to Perform at a large venue. You can Dismiss the spell.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.9yzlmYUdvdQshTDF]{Spell Effect: Bullhorn}

Heightened (5th) Your voice can be heard clearly up to 1,200 feet away.

Heightened (7th) Your voice can be heard clearly up to 1 mile away.

Daze.name: 恍惚 Daze
Daze.description:
你使目标的心智变得混乱，并用一次心智冲击使其恍惚。该冲击造成等同于你的施法能力调整值的心智伤害；目标必须尝试一次基础意志豁免。如果目标在该豁免中大失败，它还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 伤害增加 1d6。

You cloud the target's mind and daze it with a mental jolt. The jolt deals mental damage equal to your spellcasting ability modifier; the target must attempt a basic Will save. If the target critically fails the save, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你释放出一道脉冲，用以确认魔法的存在。除是否存在魔法之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你已完全知晓的魔法，例如你与盟友的魔法物品以及正在持续的法术。你只有在幻术魔法的效果阶位低于你的侦测魔法法术阶位时，才能侦测到幻术魔法。然而，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

增幅（3环）你会得知该法术侦测到的最强魔法效果的阶位或等级，由GM判定。

增幅（4环）如3环，但你还会精确定位最高阶位魔法的来源。如同模糊感官，你不会得知确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到5尺立方体内（若目标大于此范围，则缩小到最近的等效范围）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Message.name: 信息 Message
Message.description:
你轻声用口型念出词语，但它们不会从你口中发出，而是直接传到目标的耳中。其他人听你的话并不会比你平时只做口型时更清楚，但目标能听见你的话，就好像他们正站在你身旁一样。

若目标愿意，他们可以用反应动作给出简短回应，或在其下一个回合以自由动作（）回应，但他们必须能够看见你且处于射程内才能这样做。若他们回应，其回应会像最初的信息一样，直接传到你的耳中。

强化（3环） 该法术的射程提升至500尺。

You mouth words quietly, but instead of coming out of your mouth, they're transferred directly to the ears of the target. While others can't hear your words any better than if you normally mouthed them, the target can hear your words as if they were standing next to you.

The target can give a brief response as a reaction, or as a free action on their next turn if they wish, but they must be able to see you and be within range to do so. If they respond, their response is delivered directly to your ear, just like the original message.

Heightened (3rd) The spell's range increases to 500 feet.

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你将注意力集中在目标物体上，敞开心智以感知魔法灵光。当施法完成时，你会知道该物品是否为魔法物品。你或任何经你告知该灵光信息的人，在该物品上进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{鉴定魔法} 时获得+2环境加值。如果该物体是幻象，你只有在其效果的环阶低于你的阅读灵光法术的环阶时才会侦测到这一点。

升阶（3环） 你可以以最多10个物体为目标。

升阶（6环） 你可以以任意数量的物体为目标。

You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras. When the casting is complete, you know whether that item is magical. You or anyone you advise about the aura gains a +2 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic} on the item. If the object is illusory, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your read aura spell.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to 10 objects.

Heightened (6th) You can target any number of objects.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
丑角巨龙以两种方式之一吐息。巨龙在[[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用吐息武器。

  • 笑气（奥术，情绪，惑控，精神）；巨龙吐出一团笑气云，形成一个@Template[type:cone|distance:30]。区域内每个生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:will|dc:24|traits:arcane,emotion,enchantment,mental]意志豁免，具有以下效果。

    大成功 生物不受影响。

    成功 生物会在不合时宜的时刻咯咯发笑，使其在1轮内，所有作为反应动作（）一部分进行的检定承受–2状态减值。

    失败 生物被无法控制的笑声折磨。它在2轮内无法使用反应动作（）。

    大失败 生物完全被笑声击溃。它在2轮内无法使用反应动作（），并在2轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}。

  • 毒气（奥术，塑能，毒素）；巨龙吐出一团有毒气体云，形成一个@Template[type:cone|distance:30]，造成@Damage[7d6[poison]]伤害（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:24|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,poison]强韧基础豁免）。

The harlequin dragon breathes in one of two ways. The dragon can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

  • Laughing Gas (arcane, emotion, enchantment, mental); The dragon exhales a cloud of laughing gas in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30]. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:24|traits:arcane,emotion,enchantment,mental] save with the following effects.

    Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

    Success The creature chuckles at inopportune moments, giving it a –2 status penalty on all checks made as part of a reaction for 1 round.

    Failure The creature is plagued with uncontrollable laughter. It can't use reactions for 2 rounds.

    Critical Failure The creature is completely overcome by laughter. It can't use reactions for 2 rounds and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 2 rounds.

  • Poison Gas (arcane, evocation, poison); The dragon exhales a cloud of poisonous gas in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] that deals @Damage[7d6[poison]] damage (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:24|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,poison] save).

Fool's Insight.name: 愚者洞见 Fool's Insight
Fool's Insight.description:
巨龙试图快速评估一名敌人，洞悉其内心、心智与动机。巨龙进行一次察觉检定，对抗30英尺内一个目标的 @Check[type:perception|defense:deception]{欺瞒} 或 @Check[type:perception|defense:stealth]{潜行} DC，并具有以下效果。

大成功或大失败：成功 巨龙对该生物的动机获得极其深刻的洞见，在1分钟内，对该生物进行的所有欺瞒、交涉与威吓检定获得+2环境加值。

成功 巨龙对该生物的动机获得一定的洞见，在1分钟内，对该生物进行的所有欺瞒、交涉与威吓检定获得+1环境加值。

失败 巨龙未能洞悉该生物的动机。该生物在1天内暂时免疫“愚者洞察”。

大成功或大失败：失败 巨龙对该生物的动机做出错误假设。巨龙在1小时内，对该生物进行的所有欺瞒、交涉与威吓检定承受–2环境减值。该生物在1天内暂时免疫“愚者洞察”。

The dragon attempts to quickly assess a foe, gaining insight into their heart, mind, and motivations. The dragon attempts a Perception check against the @Check[type:perception|defense:deception]{Deception} or @Check[type:perception|defense:stealth]{Stealth} DC of one target within 30 feet with the following effects.

Critical Success The dragon gains tremendous insight into the creature's motivations, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to all Deception, Diplomacy, and Intimidation checks attempted against the creature for 1 minute.

Success The dragon gains some insight into the creature's motivations, gaining a +1 circumstance bonus to all Deception, Diplomacy, and Intimidation checks attempted against the creature for 1 minute.

Failure The dragon gains no insight into the creature's motivations. The creature is temporarily immune to Fool's Insight for 1 day.

Critical Failure The dragon makes false assumptions about the creature's motivations. The dragon takes a –2 circumstance penalty on all Deception, Diplomacy, and Intimidation checks attempted against the creature for 1 hour. The creature is temporarily immune to Fool's Insight for 1 day.

Young Harlequin Dragon (Spellcaster).publicNotes:
丑角巨龙是终极的喜剧大师，他们机敏而洞察入微，以机智与世界过招；一边开着轻松的恶作剧，一边抛出狡黠的侮辱、机智的俏皮话与令人捧腹的笑话。尽管他们显然轻佻，丑角巨龙的戏谑却蕴含更深的意义，往往将聚光灯照向社会怪癖、逻辑谬误与个人真相。

丑角巨龙极具洞察力，并以能在一瞥之间评估他人、情势乃至社会习俗为傲。他们擅长从对象的外在行为中辨识隐藏的动机、感受与偏见，常常获知连对象自己都尚未察觉的秘密。随后，丑角巨龙以幽默向对象揭示这些见解——用机智的笑话、嘲弄与恶作剧加以包装，以掩藏更深层的意义，而那意义会在自省与经验中显露。大多数丑角巨龙希望对象能解开并理解他们所传达的感知，从而导向有意义的个人启示与积极的改变。借由这些方法，他们希望自己不请自来的忠告能够扎根，影响即便最沉默、最顽固、最停滞的对象，使其踏上自我启示与成长之路。就此而言，丑角巨龙的幽默是一面镜子，将对象的动机与缺陷照回给他们。对象是否接受并从所见之中学习，仍掌握在自己手中。丑角巨龙虽能提供启示与引导，但真正的改变必须发自内心。

丑角巨龙自认才华绝伦、妙语连珠且睿智。他们刻薄而讥讽（尽管很少出于恶意），这可能会让与之交互的人感到厌烦。像大多数巨龙一样，他们很骄傲。他们渴望他人欣赏自己、自己的机智与自己的感知；当他们的戏谑遭到冷淡或无视时，会伤及他们的自尊。一条被冷落的丑角巨龙通常会用“认知”来自我安慰：任何不欣赏他们笑话的人，只是没聪明到能把握其中更深的含义；因此丑角巨龙会把这类蠢货当作浪费吐息。更糟的是，那些能够理解丑角巨龙戏谑中隐藏的教训，却要么未能从中学习，要么将这些启示斥为谬误、将忠告视为不可靠的对象。此类侮辱与顽固的傲慢很少能让丑角巨龙低落太久。

丑角巨龙总是在狩猎新的观众——这种习惯让他们不断在路上。他们热爱旅行，也很少长期保有巢穴（若他们真的定居于某处的话）。他们偏好城市区域或能够与聪慧生物交谈并表演的地区；他们不喜欢孤独，也很容易感到无聊。当丑角巨龙相遇时，往往会演变为一场小丑对决——一场充满娱乐性、节奏极快的唇枪舌剑之战，由尖刻的俏皮话与爆笑的妙语交锋往返，甚至能持续数日。

丑角巨龙明白，切勿以掩蔽来评判一本书，也勿以外表或环境来评判一名生物。他们以不仅能看见一名生物当下的状态，也能看见其未来潜力为傲，并自认是卓越的角色评鉴者。丑角巨龙不会把精力浪费在拒绝倾听之人身上，也不会浪费在会利用巨龙所赐洞见将邪恶带入世界之人身上；相反，他们旨在为自己所娱乐的对象提供引导与帮助，让世界比他们初来时更好。

Tavalavat

在所有丑角巨龙中最具传奇色彩的之一便是塔瓦拉瓦特（Tavalavat），这位丑角洞察力强且极具娱乐性，以至于吸引了异界存在的注意，并踏上穿越外环的旅程。据说塔瓦拉瓦特栖居于涅槃（Nirvana），以令人愉悦的嘲弄与发自内心的喜悦，引导阿加西翁与天使走向自我开悟。

丑角的宝库

不同于大多数巨龙，许多丑角巨龙并不在乎黄金、珠宝或无价宝藏，而在乎机巧的俏皮话、诙谐的笑话、某个尤其难以捉摸的魔法戏法之秘密，以及所有宝藏中最珍贵的一项：笑声。

嘲弄鬼面

邪恶的丑角巨龙，也被称为“嘲弄鬼面”，会运用其能力塑造虔诚的爪牙，以操纵他人、揭露秘密、摧毁人生并颠覆社会。他们的笑话残酷而沉重，总是把对象踩进尘土里，或将其推向更深的悲伤与绝望。

Harlequin dragons are the ultimate comedians, clever and insightful jesters who match wits with the world, playing light-hearted pranks while spouting cunning insults, witty quips, and hilarious jokes. Despite their obvious frivolity, a harlequin dragon's jests contain deeper meaning, often shining a spotlight on societal idiosyncrasies, logical fallacies, and personal truths.

Harlequin dragons are incredibly insightful, and they pride themselves on being able to assess people, situations, and even social mores at a glance. They're adept at discerning hidden motivations, feelings, and biases from a subject's outer behavior, often learning secrets that their subjects have yet to discover about themselves. Harlequin dragons then reveal these insights to their subjects through humor, with witty jokes, mockeries, and pranks crafted to hide deeper meaning that's revealed through introspection and experience. Most harlequin dragons hope that their subjects can unravel and understand the wisdom they impart, leading to meaningful personal revelations and positive change. Through their methods, they hope their unsolicited advice can take root and influence even the most reticent, stubborn, and stagnant subjects, placing them on a path to self-revelation and growth. In this way, a harlequin dragon's humor is a mirror that reflects a subject's motivations and flaws back at them. Whether the subject accepts and learns from what they see reflected remains in their own hands. While a harlequin dragon can offer revelation and guidance, true change must come from within.

Harlequin dragons consider themselves incredibly brilliant, witty, and wise. They're snarky and sarcastic (though rarely maliciously so), which can grate on the nerves of those with whom they interact. Like most dragons, they're proud. They want others to appreciate them, their wit, and their wisdom, and it wounds their pride when their jests are met with disinterest or disregard. A jilted harlequin dragon typically consoles themselves with the "knowledge" that anyone who doesn't appreciate their jokes simply isn't clever enough to grasp the deeper meaning, and so harlequin dragons treat such fools as a waste of breath. Worse are those subjects who understand the lessons hidden in a harlequin dragon's jests and either fail to learn from them or reject the revelations as faulty or the advice as unsound. Such insults and stubborn insolence rarely keep a harlequin dragon down for long.

Harlequin dragons are always on the hunt for fresh audiences—a habit that keeps them on the road. They love to travel and rarely keep a lair for long (if they reside in one at all). They prefer urban areas or regions where they can converse and perform for intelligent creatures, and they dislike solitude and bore easily. When harlequin dragons meet, it often results in a jester's duel, an entertaining and fast-paced war of cutting quips and hilarious witticisms that can go back and forth for days.

Harlequin dragons know that one should never judge a book by its cover or a creature by its appearance or circumstances. They pride themselves on seeing not only a creature's present status but also their future potential, and they consider themselves excellent judges of character. Harlequin dragons won't waste their efforts on those who refuse to listen or those who would use their dragon-given insights to bring evil into the world; rather, they aim to offer guidance and help to those they entertain, leaving the world a better place than they found it.

Tavalavat

Among the most legendary of all harlequin dragons is Tavalavat, a jester so insightful and entertaining that she caught the attention of otherworldly beings and embarked upon a journey through the Outer Spheres. It's believed that Tavalavat resides in Nirvana, guiding agathions and angels to self-enlightenment through pleasant mockery and heartfelt joy.

A Harlequin's Hoard

Unlike most dragons, many harlequin dragons care not for gold, jewels, or priceless treasures but for clever quips, humorous jokes, the secret of a particularly elusive magic trick, and the most prized treasure of all: laughter.

The Mocking Grim

Evil harlequin dragons, also referred to as the "Mocking Grim," use their abilities to shape devoted minions to manipulate, reveal secrets, ruin lives, and upend societies. Their jokes are cruel and crushing, always driving their subjects to the dirt or deeper into sadness and desperation.
Young Harlequin Dragon (Spellcaster).prototypeToken: 幼年丑角巨龙 Young Harlequin Dragon

Young Cerulean Dragon.name: 幼年天蓝色巨龙 Young Cerulean Dragon
Young Cerulean Dragon.tokenName: 幼年天蓝巨龙 Young Cerulean Dragon

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Wavesense (Imprecise) 30 feet.name: 波感（不精确）30尺 Wavesense (Imprecise) 30 feet

Experienced Traveler.name: 老练旅者 Experienced Traveler
Experienced Traveler.description:
蔚蓝巨龙是经验丰富的生存专家，不会被大多数环境带来的普通危险所阻碍。它们无视非魔法的困难地形。

Cerulean dragons are experienced survivalists and are unhindered by the mundane dangers posed by most environments. They ignore non-magical difficult terrain.

Peregrinate.name: 游历 Peregrinate
Peregrinate.description:
触发 一名敌人的回合结束，且在该回合中该敌人以近战打击命中了蔚蓝巨龙

效果 蔚蓝巨龙远离危险游走，使自己保持在更安全的距离并重新调整位置以便打击。蔚蓝巨龙疾走、游泳或飞行，移动距离至多为其速度的一半，且其移动不会触发由移动触发的反应动作（例如借机攻击）。

Trigger A foe's turn ends, during which that foe hit the cerulean dragon with a melee Strike

Effect The cerulean dragon wanders away from danger, putting themselves at a safer distance and repositioning to strike. The cerulean dragon Strides, Swims, or Flies up to half their Speed, and their movement doesn't trigger reactions triggered by movement (such as Attacks of Opportunity).

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Translate.name: 请提供需要翻译的英文原文（或上传图片/粘贴文本），我会将其翻译为简体中文。 Translate
Translate.description:
当你施放该法术时，目标可以理解其正在听到或阅读的一种语言的含义。这不会让它理解密码、以隐喻方式表达的语言等（由GM酌情决定）。如果目标能听到多种语言并且知道这一点，它可以选择要理解的语言；否则，随机选择其中一种语言。

升阶（3环） 目标也可以说该语言。

升阶（4环） 你可以以最多10个生物为目标，且目标也可以说该语言。

The target can understand the meaning of a single language it is hearing or reading when you cast the spell. This doesn't let it understand codes, language couched in metaphor, and the like (subject to GM discretion). If the target can hear multiple languages and knows that, it can choose which language to understand; otherwise, choose one of the languages randomly.

Heightened (3rd) The target can also speak the language.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures, and targets can also speak the language.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你解构一个法术或效果背后的魔法。对目标进行一次反制检定。如果你成功反制一件魔法物品，该物品在10分钟内变为其类型的普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。如果目标是一件神器或类似物品，你会自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Humanoid Form.name: 类人形态 Humanoid Form
Humanoid Form.description:
你将自己的外貌变为一个小型或中型的类人生物（特征），例如矮人、精灵、地精、半身人、人类、兽人或蜥蜴人。当你处于此形态时，除了你原本的其他特征外，你获得类人生物（特征），以及任何与该生物种类相关的特征（例如地精或人类）。如果该变形使你的体型变小，则你的触及也会相应减少（如同 shrink 法术）。此变形不会以任何方式改变你的数据，你也不会获得你所采用的类人生物形态的任何特殊能力。你仍然可以穿戴并使用你的道具；它们会改变体型（如有必要）以匹配你的新形态。如果物品离开你的身上，它们会恢复为其通常的体型。

类人生物形态使你在用以伪装成所选族裔的一般成员的 Deception 检定中获得+4状态加值，并且即使你未受训，你也要将你的等级加入该检定，但你无法让自己看起来像某个特定的人。如果你想要 Impersonate 某个个体，你仍需要创造一个伪装，不过 GM 在决定你的 Deception 检定 DC 时不会将族裔差异纳入考量。你可以 Dismiss 这个法术。

升阶（3环） 若你所采用的形态具有该能力，你获得黑暗视觉或弱光视野。

升阶（5环） 你可以呈现为大型的类人生物（特征）外貌。若这使你的体型变大，你获得 enlarge 法术的效果。

You transform your appearance to that of a Small or Medium humanoid, such as a dwarf, elf, goblin, halfling, human, orc, or lizardfolk. You gain the humanoid trait in addition to your other traits while in this form, as well as any trait related to the creature's kind (such as goblin or human). If this transformation reduces your size, it reduces your reach accordingly (as the shrink spell). This transformation doesn't change your statistics in any way, and you don't gain any special abilities of the humanoid form you assume. You can still wear and use your gear, which changes size (if necessary) to match your new form. If items leave your person, they return to their usual size.

Humanoid form grants you a +4 status bonus to Deception checks to pass as a generic member of the chosen ancestry, and you add your level even if you're untrained, but you can't make yourself look like a specific person. If you want to Impersonate an individual, you still need to create a disguise, though the GM won't factor in the difference in ancestry when determining the DC of your Deception check. You can Dismiss this spell.

Heightened (3rd) You gain darkvision or low-light vision if the form you assume has that ability.

Heightened (5th) You can take on the appearance of a Large humanoid. If this increases your size, you gain the effects of the enlarge spell.

Create Water (At Will).name: 创造 水（随意） Create Water (At Will)
Create Water (At Will).description:
当你双手捧起时，水开始从中流出。你创造2加仑的水。如果没有人饮用，它会在1天后蒸发。

As you cup your hands, water begins to flow forth from them. You create 2 gallons of water. If no one drinks it, it evaporates after 1 day.

True Strike.name: 真实打击 True Strike
True Strike.description:
对未来的一瞥确保你的下一击命中无误。在你的回合结束前，你下一次进行攻击掷骰时，将该次攻击掷骰掷两次并采用较高的结果。该次攻击忽略对攻击掷骰的环境减值，以及因目标处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}状态而需要进行的任何纯骰检定。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{法术效果: True Strike}

A glimpse into the future ensures your next blow strikes true. The next time you make an attack roll before the end of your turn, roll the attack twice and use the better result. The attack ignores circumstance penalties to the attack roll and any flat check required due to the target being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{Spell Effect: True Strike}

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你释放出一道脉冲，用于感知魔法的存在。除了魔法是否存在之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友的魔法物品与持续中的法术。你只能在该幻术魔法的效果位阶低于你的侦测魔法法术位阶时侦测到幻术魔法。然而，带有幻术灵光但外观并不具欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环） 你得知该法术所侦测到的最强魔法效果的位阶或等级，由GM判定。

升阶（4环） 同3环，但你还会锁定最高位阶魔法的来源。与模糊感官类似，你不会得知确切位置，但能将来源缩小到5尺立方体范围内（若来源大于此范围，则缩小到最近的等效范围）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你将注意力集中在目标物体上，敞开心智以感知魔法灵光。施放完成后，你会知道该物品是否具有魔法。你或任何你就该灵光提供建议的人，在该物品上进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{鉴定魔法} 时获得 +2 环境加值。若该物体是幻象，你只有在该效果的环位低于你的阅读灵光法术的环位时才能侦测到这一点。

升阶（3环）你可以以最多 10 个物体为目标。

升阶（6环）你可以以任意数量的物体为目标。

You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras. When the casting is complete, you know whether that item is magical. You or anyone you advise about the aura gains a +2 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic} on the item. If the object is illusory, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your read aura spell.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to 10 objects.

Heightened (6th) You can target any number of objects.

Spout.name: 喷涌 Spout
Spout.description:
区域 5英尺立方体或5英尺爆发

水向上喷涌，从地面涌出、从水池升起，甚至从稀薄空气中显现。区域内的任何生物受到等同于1d4加上你的施法能力调整值的钝击伤害，并进行一次基础反射豁免。

你可以将此法术的区域改为5英尺爆发，但你必须将爆发的中心置于一片水域中。这片水域可以小到池塘或小溪，但不能小到水坑或浴缸。

升阶 (+1) 伤害增加1d4。

Area 5-foot cube or 5-foot burst

Water blasts upward, coming out of the ground, rising from a pool, or even manifesting from thin air. Any creatures in the area take bludgeoning damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier, with a basic Reflex saving throw.

You can change this spell's area to a 5-foot burst, provided you center the burst in a body of water. This body of water can be as small as a pond or creek, but not as small as a puddle or bathtub.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
蔚蓝巨龙以两种方式之一进行吐息。他们的巨龙吐息区域内所有非魔法火焰都会被熄灭。该巨龙在[[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用吐息武器。

  • 冲击波 巨龙在一个@Template[type:cone|distance:30]内吐出一道强力、猛烈的波浪。区域内每个生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:fortitude|dc:29]强韧豁免，具有以下效果。

    大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响。

    成功 该生物被沿圆锥同方向推开5英尺。

    失败 该生物被沿圆锥同方向推开10英尺。若在被完全推开前会撞上坚固的物体，则它每剩余本应被推动的5英尺会受到@Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]]钝击伤害。

    大成功或大失败 失败 该生物被沿圆锥同方向推开20英尺。若在被完全推开前会撞上坚固的物体，则它每剩余本应被推动的5英尺会受到@Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]]钝击伤害。

  • 加压水流 巨龙在一个@Template[type:cone|distance:30]内吐出一股加压水流的爆发，造成@Damage[11d6[bludgeoning]]钝击伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:29|basic:true]基础豁免）。

The cerulean dragon breathes in one of two ways. All non-magical fires within the area of their Dragon Breath are extinguished. The dragon can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

  • Battering Wave The dragon breathes a powerful, pummeling wave in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30]. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:29] save with the following effects.

    Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

    Success The creature is pushed 5 feet away in the same direction as the cone.

    Failure The creature is pushed 10 feet away in the same direction as the cone. If it would hit a solid object before being completely pushed, it takes @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage for every remaining 5 feet it would be pushed.

    Critical Failure The creature is pushed 20 feet away in the same direction as the cone. If it would hit a solid object before being completely pushed, it takes @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]] damage for every remaining 5 feet it would be pushed.

  • Pressurized Water The dragon breathes a blast of pressurized water in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] that deals @Damage[11d6[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:29|basic:true] save).

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙之狂乱 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
巨龙进行两次爪击打击和一次翼打击，顺序任意。

The dragon makes two claw Strikes and one wing Strike in any order.

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙族动能 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
当巨龙用一次打击造成大成功或大失败时，他们会为其吐息武器充能。

When the dragon scores a critical hit with a Strike, they recharge their Breath Weapon.

At-Will Spells.name: 随意施放法术 At-Will Spells

Young Cerulean Dragon.publicNotes:
蔚蓝巨龙是巨龙世界的开拓者，是深掘者、地城探险者与探索者；它们为满足永无止境的好奇心，在对它们而言未知的土地上勘定路线、开辟小径。蔚蓝巨龙为冒险而生，总是推动自己比以往更快、更远、更深、更高。它们决意看看下一个走廊尽头有什么、紧闭的门后有什么、地平线之外有什么，并发现其他世界、位面与其他次元中有什么。它们探索不寻常的地点与神秘的奇观，从不满足于无所事事或安于一隅，也从不畏惧命运可能为它们准备的惊喜或未来可能带来的危险。

蔚蓝巨龙满怀永恒的漂泊渴望与不减的旅行热情。它们过着快节奏的生活，因此更偏好始终保持移动。大多数蔚蓝巨龙不保留传统巢穴，宁愿在荒野之中、在千百种不同的天空下生活，也不愿被束缚在同一地点、享受被奢华禁锢的日子。有些蔚蓝巨龙更喜欢魔法居所与异位面领域——当它们足够强大与年长，能够创造它们之时——让它们得以同时拥有舒适的生活与冒险的生活。

蔚蓝巨龙对周遭世界及其中一切都极其好奇。它们喜欢把鼻子伸到不该伸的地方，越过界限，打破各种禁忌。它们爱打探，不过比起挖掘人们隐秘的过往与家族秘密，它们更可能去撬开上锁的门、闯入禁止进入的地点。与琥珀巨龙不同，它们对人们生活的细枝末节或散落在城市街巷里的流言蜚语与尴尬事并不太感兴趣。这并不代表它们排斥交友——恰恰相反，蔚蓝巨龙很乐于结识新朋友并建立友谊，尤其是与其他志同道合的探索者与冒险者建立合作关系，以便共同协作。

尽管蔚蓝巨龙喜欢结识新朋友、发现稀有宝藏并学习失落的秘密，但对它们而言，没有什么比去往新的地方更令人兴奋。探索一个对它们而言完全崭新且未知的地点最能让蔚蓝巨龙感到激动，无论该地点对社会、历史，或为扩大其藏品而获取财富而言是否具有强效的重要性（或根本无关紧要）。

在年轻时，许多蔚蓝巨龙主要专注于寻常的旅行形式。它们造访从未见过的城市与聚居地，闯入金库，跋涉穿行下水道，并开启坟墓。它们探索荒野地带，攀登高山，钻探洞窟，穿游沼泽，并潜入湖泊与海洋之下。待到成年时，大多数蔚蓝巨龙更喜欢探索更危险的地点，例如闹鬼的庄园、沉没的船只、偏远的神殿、古老的遗迹，以及——广受欢迎的一类——地城。

随着时代流逝，多数蔚蓝巨龙必须走得越来越远，才能找到自己从未去过的地方并满足其漂泊渴望。在这段时期，它们多半会走向极端，深探最幽邃的深处与最遥远、最难抵达的地区，旅行到其他位面与星球，甚至去往其他时代与次元。这是深入怪异、狂野与全然不可置信之物的时代。

Zemedrilon

“永寻者”泽梅德里隆或许是异位面探索方面最强效的专家，曾亲自探索过23个位面，其中包括两个其存在目前尚未得到证实的位面。多数人相信，泽梅德里隆在30年之前试图开启通往遥远未来的传送门时被汽化——蔚蓝巨龙认为这故事可笑至极。它们坚称那条古老的巨龙已成功抵达未来，并将在足够长的时代过去之后再度现身。

Adventuring Parties

蔚蓝巨龙常为探索之目的结成紧密的小队，每条巨龙都专精于某一研究领域或某种探索侧重。有些学者认为，传统“冒险小队”的概念正是源自蔚蓝巨龙——这一完全缺乏根据且无法证实的说法，让大多数短命的凡人感到恼火。

Mobile Hoards

如同大多数冒险者，蔚蓝巨龙把自己的财富带在身上，形式包括贵重的魔法物品、远古遗物、昂贵的珠宝以及其他可穿戴的财富。因此，尽管蔚蓝巨龙缺乏真正的宝藏堆，它们往往会穿戴（或挥舞！）一笔巨大的财富。

Cerulean dragons are the trailblazers of the dragon world, the delvers, the dungeoneers, and the explorers, charting paths and blazing trails through lands unknown to them to sate their neverending curiosity. Cerulean dragons live for adventure and are always pushing themselves faster, further, deeper, and higher than they've ever gone before. They're determined to see what's down the next hall, behind the closed door, beyond the horizon, and discover what lies on other worlds, planes, and other dimensions. They explore unusual sites and mysterious wonders, never content to be idle or sedentary, and never afraid of what surprises fate might have in store for them or what dangers the future may hold.

Cerulean dragons are filled with an eternal wanderlust and an unabating passion for travel. They live a fast-paced life, and thus they prefer to stay on the move at all times. Most cerulean dragons don't keep traditional lairs, preferring a life lived in the wilderness and under a thousand different skies rather than a life of luxury shackled to the same place. Some cerulean dragons prefer magical homes and extraplanar domains—when they're powerful and old enough to create them—which allow them a life of comfort and a life of adventure all at once.

Cerulean dragons are incredibly curious about the world around them and all it contains. They enjoy sticking their noses where they don't belong, treading beyond boundaries, and breaking taboos of all sorts. They're snoops, though they're far more likely to pry behind locked doors and into off-limit locations than they are to delve into people's hidden pasts and family secrets. They're not overly interested in the details of people's lives or the gossip and embarrassments scattered down city streets, unlike amber dragons. It's not that they're averse to making friends—on the contrary, cerulean dragons are interested in meeting new people and forging friendships, particularly working relationships with other like-minded explorers and adventurers with whom they can collaborate.

While cerulean dragons enjoy meeting new people, discovering rare treasures, and learning lost secrets, nothing is more exciting to them than traveling somewhere new. Exploring a place that's completely new and unknown to them excites cerulean dragons the most, regardless of that location's greater importance (or lack thereof) to society, history, or the acquisition of wealth to grow their hoard.

In their youth, many cerulean dragons focus primarily on ordinary forms of travel. They visit cities and settlements they've never seen before, breaking into vaults, trudging through sewers, and opening tombs. They explore tracts of wilderness, climbing mountains, spelunking through caves, swimming through swamps, and diving beneath lakes and oceans. By the time they're grown, most cerulean dragons prefer to explore more dangerous locations, such as haunted manors, sunken ships, remote temples, ancient ruins, and—a common favorite—dungeons.

As time passes, most cerulean dragons must go further and further to find places they've never been and fulfill their wanderlust. During this time, most go to extremes, plumbing the deepest depths and the most distant and inaccessible regions, traveling to other planes and planets, or even to other times and dimensions. It's a time to delve into the weird, the wild, and the utterly unbelievable.

Zemedrilon

Zemedrilon the Ever-Seeking is perhaps the greatest expert on extraplanar exploration, having personally explored 23 planes, including two whose existence is currently unconfirmed. Most believe Zemedrilon was vaporized 30 years ago while attempting to open a portal to the distant future—a tale cerulean dragons consider laughable. They insist the ancient dragon successfully arrived in the future and, after a long enough time has passed, will reemerge.

Adventuring Parties

Cerulean dragons often band together into tightly knit teams for the purpose of exploration, with each dragon specializing in a field of study or exploratory focus. Some scholars believe it's from cerulean dragons that the concept of the traditional "adventuring party" was born—a completely unsubstantiated and unprovable claim that irks most short- lived mortals.

Mobile Hoards

Like most adventurers, cerulean dragons carry their wealth on them in the form of valuable magic items, ancient artifacts, valuable jewelry, and other wearable wealth. Thus, while a cerulean dragon lacks a true hoard, they often wear (or wield!) a fortune.
Young Cerulean Dragon.prototypeToken: 幼年天蓝巨龙 Young Cerulean Dragon

Adult Vermilion Dragon.name: 成年朱红巨龙 Adult Vermilion Dragon
Adult Vermilion Dragon.tokenName: 成年朱红巨龙 Adult Vermilion Dragon

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Effortless Linguist.name: 轻松语言学家 Effortless Linguist
Effortless Linguist.description:
一条朱红巨龙在聆听某种语言1分钟后，便能说并理解他们听到的任何语言。这些语言会在24小时后从他们的心智中消退

A vermilion dragon can speak and understand any language they hear spoken after listening to the language for 1 minute. These languages fade from their mind after 24 hours

Exaggerate Strength.name: 夸大力量 Exaggerate Strength
Exaggerate Strength.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 朱红巨龙即将再次尝试对抗一个失能效果的豁免

效果 朱红巨龙膨胀自己的自负，将自己吹嘘成一个比实际更有能力的传奇版本。虽然这并不会让它变得更强大，但其效果足以困扰失能魔法。触发的失能效果将朱红巨龙视为高出两个等级。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger The vermilion dragon is about to attempt a saving throw again an incapacitation effect
