Effect The vermilion dragon inflates their own ego, building themself up into a tall tale version of themself more capable than they actually are. While this doesn't make them more powerful, the effect is enough to bedevil incapacitating magic. The triggering incapacitation effect treats the vermilion dragon as if they were two levels higher.

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Illusory Creature.name: 幻象生物 Illusory Creature
Illusory Creature.description:
你创造一个大型或更小体型生物的幻象影像。它会产生相应的声音与气味，并且在接触时也显得可信。如果你与该影像之间的距离曾经超过500尺，则该法术结束。

该影像不能说话，但你可以使用你的动作通过该生物说话，法术会将你的声音恰当地伪装。你可能需要依照GM的判断，尝试一次欺瞒或表演检定来模仿该生物。若你试图模仿某个特定的人并与认识那个人的对象互动，这尤其常见。

在战斗中，该幻术每回合可以使用2个动作，这些动作会在你维持法术时使用。它进行攻击掷骰时使用你的法术攻击掷骰，而它的AC使用你的法术DC。它的豁免调整值等于你的法术DC - 10。它足够具有实体感，以至于可以夹击其他生物。若该影像被一次攻击命中或在一次豁免中失败，则该法术结束。

该幻术可以通过让目标相信幻术的攻击是真实的来造成伤害，但除此之外它无法直接影响物理世界。若该幻象生物以一次打击命中，则目标受到等于1d4加上你的施法关键属性调整值的精神伤害。这是一种精神效果。该幻术的打击为非致命。若该伤害与怪物影像不相符——例如，一个幻象大型巨龙只造成5点伤害——GM可能允许目标立刻尝试一次察觉检定以识破该法术。若目标认为相关抗力与弱点适用，则它们适用，由GM裁定。例如，若该幻术挥舞一把战锤并攻击一个对钝击伤害具有抗力的生物，则该生物会受到更少的精神伤害。然而，幻象伤害不会使再生失效，也不会触发其他需要特定伤害类型的效果。GM应追踪该幻术造成的幻象伤害。

任何接触该影像的生物，或使用搜索动作来检查它的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻术。当一个生物识破该幻术时，它从先前因此受到的伤害中恢复一半（若有），并且不再受到它的任何进一步伤害。

升阶（+1） 该影像打击的伤害增加1d4，并且你可以创造的生物最大体型提高一级（最大至超巨型）。

You create an illusory image of a Large or smaller creature. It generates the appropriate sounds, smells, and feels believable to the touch. If you and the image are ever farther than 500 feet apart, the spell ends.

The image can't speak, but you can use your actions to speak through the creature, with the spell disguising your voice as appropriate. You might need to attempt a Deception or Performance check to mimic the creature, as determined by the GM. This is especially likely if you're trying to imitate a specific person and engage with someone that person knows.

In combat, the illusion can use 2 actions per turn, which it uses when you Sustain the Spell. It uses your spell attack roll for attack rolls and your spell DC for its AC. Its saving throw modifiers are equal to your spell DC - 10. It is substantial enough that it can flank other creatures. If the image is hit by an attack or fails a save, the spell ends.

The illusion can cause damage by making the target believe the illusion's attacks are real, but it cannot otherwise directly affect the physical world. If the illusory creature hits with a Strike, the target takes mental damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. This is a mental effect. The illusion's Strikes are nonlethal. If the damage doesn't correspond to the image of the monster-for example, if an illusory Large dragon deals only 5 damage-the GM might allow the target to attempt an immediate Perception check to disbelieve the spell. Any relevant resistances and weaknesses apply if the target thinks they do, as judged by the GM. For example, if the illusion wields a warhammer and attacks a creature resistant to bludgeoning damage, the creature would take less mental damage. However, illusory damage does not deactivate regeneration or trigger other effects that require a certain damage type. The GM should track illusory damage dealt by the illusion.

Any creature that touches the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion. When a creature disbelieves the illusion, it recovers from half the damage it had taken from it (if any) and doesn't take any further damage from it.

Heightened (+1) The damage of the image's Strikes increases by 1d4, and the maximum size of creature you can create increases by one (to a maximum of Gargantuan).

Illusory Disguise.name: 幻象伪装 Illusory Disguise
Illusory Disguise.description:
你创造一个幻象，使你看起来像另一个与自己体型相同、身高（相差不超过6英寸）与体重（相差不超过50磅）大致相近的生物。此伪装通常足以隐藏你的身份，但不足以冒充某个特定个体。该法术不会改变你的声音、嗅觉或举止。你可以改变你的衣物与穿戴物品的外观，比如让你的护甲看起来像一件裙子。手持物品不受影响，而你移除的任何穿戴物品都会恢复其真实外观。

施放幻象伪装视为为以欺瞒进行的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.action-macros.Macro.k5nW4jGyXD0Oq9LR]{Impersonate} 用途设定伪装；它无视你因将自己伪装成不相似生物而可能承受的任何环境减值；它使你在进行欺瞒检定以防止他人看穿你的伪装时获得+4状态加值；且即使你未受训，你也要加上你的等级。你可以解消此法术。

升阶（2环）该法术也会伪装你的声音与嗅觉，并获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）特性。

升阶（3环）你可以看起来像任何与自己体型相同的生物，甚至是某个特定个体。你必须见过该个体才能呈现其外貌。该法术也会伪装你的声音与嗅觉，并获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）特性。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3Ktyd5F9lOPo4myk]{法术效果：幻象伪装}

You create an illusion that causes you to appear as another creature of the same body shape, and with roughly similar height (within 6 inches) and weight (within 50 pounds), as yourself. The disguise is typically good enough to hide your identity, but not to impersonate a specific individual. The spell doesn't change your voice, scent, or mannerisms. You can change the appearance of your clothing and worn items, such as making your armor look like a dress. Held items are unaffected, and any worn item you remove returns to its true appearance.

Casting illusory disguise counts as setting up a disguise for the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.action-macros.Macro.k5nW4jGyXD0Oq9LR]{Impersonate} use of Deception; it ignores any circumstance penalties you might take for disguising yourself as a dissimilar creature, it gives you a +4 status bonus to Deception checks to prevent others from seeing through your disguise, and you add your level even if you're untrained. You can Dismiss this spell.

Heightened (2nd) The spell also disguises your voice and scent, and it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

Heightened (3rd) You can appear as any creature of the same size, even a specific individual. You must have seen an individual to take on their appearance. The spell also disguises your voice and scent, and it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3Ktyd5F9lOPo4myk]{Spell Effect: Illusory Disguise}

Illusory Object.name: 幻象物体 Illusory Object
Illusory Object.description:
你创造一个静止物体的虚幻视觉影像。整个影像必须完全容纳于该法术的区域内。该物体看起来会自然地动起来，但它不会发出声音或产生气味。例如，水看起来会从虚幻的瀑布倾泻而下，但会是无声的。

任何接触该影像的生物，或使用搜寻动作来检查它的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻觉。

强化（2环） 你的影像会发出适当的声音，产生正常的气味，且接触时手感正确。该法术获得听觉（特征）。持续时间增加至1小时。

强化（5环） 如同2环版本，但持续时间为无限。

You create an illusory visual image of a stationary object. The entire image must fit within the spell's area. The object appears to animate naturally, but it doesn't make sounds or generate smells. For example, water would appear to pour down an illusory waterfall, but it would be silent.

Any creature that touches the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (2nd) Your image makes appropriate sounds, generates normal smells, and feels right to the touch. The spell gains the auditory trait. The duration increases to 1 hour.

Heightened (5th) As the 2nd-level version, but the duration is unlimited.

Ventriloquism.name: 腹语术 Ventriloquism
Ventriloquism.description:
每当你说话或用嗓音发出任何其他声音时，你可以让你的发声看起来像是从60尺内的其他某处传来，并且在你发声时可以自由改变该表观位置。任何听到该声音的生物都可以尝试识破你的幻觉。

升阶（2环） 法术的持续时间提升至1小时，并且你还可以改变你声音的音调、音色与其他性相。在生物能够尝试识破你的幻觉之前，它必须主动尝试一次察觉检定，或以其他方式使用动作与该声音进行交互。

Whenever you speak or make any other sound vocally, you can make your vocalization seem to originate from somewhere else within 60 feet, and you can change that apparent location freely as you vocalize. Any creature that hears the sound can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (2nd) The spell's duration increases to 1 hour, and you can also change the tone, quality, and other aspects of your voice. Before a creature can attempt to disbelieve your illusion, it must actively attempt a Perception check or otherwise use actions to interact with the sound.

Charm.name: 魅惑 Charm
Charm.description:
对目标而言，你的话语如蜜般甜美，你的容貌仿佛沐浴在梦幻的薄雾中。它必须尝试一次意志豁免；若你或你的盟友最近曾威胁它或对它使用过敌对动作，则该豁免获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。若你对目标使用敌对动作，则该法术结束。当法术结束时，除非它与你的友谊或你说服它采取的动作与它的预期相冲突，否则目标不一定会意识到自己曾被魅惑；这意味着你可能通过世俗手段说服目标继续当你的朋友。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知晓你试图魅惑它。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害之物而非魅惑，除非它辨识该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友善}。若它原本为友善，则变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于助人}。它不能对你使用敌对动作。

大失败 目标对你的态度变为乐于助人，并且它不能对你使用敌对动作。

升阶（4环） 持续时间持续至你下次进行每日准备。

升阶（8环） 持续时间持续至你下次进行每日准备，且你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Ghost Sound.name: 幽灵之声 Ghost Sound
Ghost Sound.description:
你创造一个简单声音的听觉幻象，其最大音量相当于四个正常人同时喊叫。声音从你在射程内指定的一个方格发出。你无法创造可理解的词语或其他复杂声音（例如音乐）。

Heightened (3rd) 射程增加至60英尺。

Heightened (5th) 射程增加至120英尺。

You create an auditory illusion of simple sounds that has a maximum volume equal to four normal humans shouting. The sounds emanate from a square you designate within range. You can't create intelligible words or other intricate sounds (such as music).

Heightened (3rd) The range increases to 60 feet.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 120 feet.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
朱红巨龙以两种方式之一喷吐吐息。巨龙在 [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4轮} 内无法再次使用吐息武器。

  • 易燃香料（奥术，塑能，火）；巨龙在一个@Template[type:cone|distance:40]中打喷嚏喷出一团易燃香料云，造成@Damage[14d6[fire]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:33|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,fire]豁免）。在大失败时，香料进入其眼睛，使其暂时目盲；该生物成为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}，持续1轮。
  • 刺激性香料（奥术，塑能，毒素）；巨龙在一个@Template[type:cone|distance:40]中打喷嚏喷出一团刺激性香料云，造成@Damage[14d6[poison]]伤害（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:33|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,poison]强韧豁免）。在大失败时，香料进入其鼻腔，以强烈的灼烧感将其淹没；该生物为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

The vermilion dragon breathes in one of two ways. The dragon can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

  • Flammable Spice (arcane, evocation, fire); The dragon sneezes a cloud of flammable spice in a @Template[type:cone|distance:40] that deals @Damage[14d6[fire]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:33|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,fire] save). On a critical failure, the spice gets in their eyes, temporarily blinding them; the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.
  • Irritating Spice (arcane, evocation, poison); The dragon sneezes a cloud of irritating spice in a @Template[type:cone|distance:40] that deals @Damage[14d6[poison]] damage (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:33|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,poison] save). On a critical failure, the spice gets up their nose, overwhelming them with a powerful burning sensation; the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙之狂乱 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
巨龙以任意顺序进行两次爪击打击和一次翼打击。

The dragon makes two claw Strikes and one wing Strike in any order.

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙裔动势 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
当巨龙以打击造成大成功或大失败时，它们会为其吐息武器充能。

When the dragon scores a critical hit with a Strike, they recharge their Breath Weapon.

Exaggerate Weakness.name: 夸大弱点 Exaggerate Weakness
Exaggerate Weakness.description:
触发 朱红巨龙在对抗敌人效果的豁免中大失败，或敌人对朱红巨龙造成重击

效果 朱红巨龙将自己的失败演得更夸张，刻意表现出自己有多么无助与挫败，并可能借由敌人因巨龙可怜相而感到好笑的心情来分散其注意。触发生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:33] 意志豁免，效果如下。之后，该敌人会对“夸大弱点”获得24小时的暂时免疫。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该敌人分心，在1轮内进行察觉检定与意志豁免时承受–1状态减值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.gMDEdKAvFv85yXiJ]{效果：夸大弱点}

失败 该敌人被逗得乐不可支，并在1轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}。

大失败 该敌人沉浸在对巨龙凄惨失败的嘲笑中，在1轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

Trigger The vermilion dragon critically fails a saving throw against a foe's effect or a foe critically hits the vermilion dragon

Effect The vermilion dragon leans into its failure, playing up how helpless and defeated they are and potentially distracting their foe with their amusement at the dragon's piteousness. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:33] save with the following effects. Afterwards, the foe is temporarily immune to Exaggerate Weakness for 24 hours.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The foe is distracted, taking a –1 status penalty on Perception checks and Will saves for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.gMDEdKAvFv85yXiJ]{Effect: Exaggerate Weakness}

Failure The foe is overcome with amusement and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The foe is lost in its amusement at the dragon's miserable failure and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Adult Vermilion Dragon.publicNotes:
朱红巨龙是出色的说书人，比起真相更在意故事与技艺本身。他们以夸大与说谎闻名，总觉得任何故事或事件都有改进空间——那样才更有趣！许多朱红巨龙都是讲述与胡编乱造的高手，以至于他们那些离奇的传闻与荒唐的谎言竟会显得格外引人入胜。即便现实与更符合事实的说法明显与朱红巨龙的故事相矛盾，仍有许多人会相信他们。当别人指出他们的谎话、前后矛盾与大量剧情漏洞时，大多数朱红巨龙会顺势接下指控、就势发挥，然后继续编造荒诞离谱的奇谈怪论。

朱红巨龙热爱收集各式各样的传说与故事，并将其编织成能够跨越数百年乃至数千年的流行传奇。朱红巨龙的故事无论看起来多么荒诞与杜撰，都总会在虚构之中保有一枚真相的核心。找出这份隐藏的真相可能是个巨大挑战——尤其当时代的步伐不断前进，原本的故事愈发宏大，最终淹没在围绕其周遭的谎言之中。有些学者建议听众忽略朱红巨龙故事里所有描写性的内容；另一些则鼓励读者把朱红巨龙的故事拆解为最基础的情节要点，并忽略其余一切。朱红巨龙认为这荒谬至极，因为这种狭隘的审查抹杀了他们故事的意义——朱红巨龙的故事不是为了真相，而是为了娱乐。简单说，讲夸张故事很有趣，对讲述者与听众皆然。重复会令人厌烦，而无聊的故事注定走向消亡。对朱红巨龙而言，没有什么比自己的故事或功绩被遗忘更糟。

朱红巨龙最爱的故事几乎总是围绕他们自己。毕竟他们喧闹张扬、骄傲自负，又以吹嘘成性著称，因此他们最喜欢编织关于自己冒险、英勇事迹与壮举的故事也就不足为奇。为了收集更多自己壮举的故事，也为了刺激与奖励，朱红巨龙常常扮演野心勃勃的亡命之徒，迷恋危险与未知带来的战栗。然而，即便是最自恋的朱红巨龙也愿意承认：由他们那些疯狂胡闹所带来的史诗成就，仍然可以再多添些润色。事实上，在他们的说书目录里，他们往往是最具传奇色彩、也最被夸大的英雄。

尽管朱红巨龙确实相对以自我为中心，他们也并不总把自己塑造成夸张故事的核心。他们也喜欢讲述各种关于自己认识或见过的人、亲眼所见或观察到的事件，以及更广阔世界的消息的添油加醋故事。他们通常更偏好分享自己亲身参与或目睹的内容，而非完全遥远、远在自己经验之外的故事——尽管他们也很爱聆听那些天涯海角、陌生离奇的故事！有时，一则激昂的故事被反复讲述之后，朱红巨龙对其“经历”得足够多，几乎觉得自己就在现场，于是便会选择把这则故事据为己有——当然还要加上一些“迫切需要”的改良。

朱红巨龙的胡闹已够疯狂，可不知为何，他们的故事更为狂野。

Pentheravix

Pentheravix，“见证者”，作为一条朱红巨龙显得有些异类，因为她从不把自己塑造成自己故事中的英雄。相反，她只讲述她声称自己目睹过的重要事件。她对时事与历史的叙述版本极具说服力，甚至会迅速取代真相——哪怕是在事件发生的地区也是如此。她说的就是真相——即便明显不是。

渴求受骗者

朱红巨龙是天赋异禀的幻术师，编织奇幻幻象如同呼吸与讲故事一般轻松。照理这应使他们擅长辨识幻象，然而事实恰恰相反。朱红巨龙如此享受体验幻象并欣赏其艺术性，以至于他们宁可被骗，也不愿识破。

亡命行径的危险

朱红巨龙追求刺激、嗜好肾上腺素；他们喜欢沉醉的观众，却几乎不在乎组成这些观众的个体性命。因此，他们的胡闹经常给附近的聚居地带来麻烦。为暴怒的怪物、受辱的军队与环境浩劫付出价格的总是人们——从来不是朱红巨龙。

Vermilion dragons are fabulous storytellers who care more for the tale and their craft than they do for the truth. They're notorious exaggerators and liars who always believe a story or event has room for improvement—it's far more entertaining that way! Many vermilion dragons are such expert storytellers and confabulators that their outlandish tales and outrageous lies can seem strangely compelling. Many people believe them, even when reality and more factual accounts clearly contradict the vermilion dragon's stories. When called out on their lies, contradictions, and numerous plot holes, most vermilion dragons roll with the accusations, riff off them, and just keep making up extraordinarily tall tales.

Vermilion dragons adore collecting all sorts of different tales and stories and spinning them into popular legends that will endure across centuries and millennia. A vermilion dragon's stories, no matter how outrageous and fabricated they might seem, always maintain a central core of truth amid the fiction. Finding this hidden truth can be a significant challenge—particularly as the march of time passes and the original tale becomes grander and grander, lost amid the lies that surround it. Some scholars recommend that listeners ignore everything descriptive contained in a vermilion dragon's tale, while others encourage the reader to break a vermilion dragon's tale down to its most basic plot points and ignore everything else in the story. Vermilion dragons believe this is absurd, for such close-minded censorship removes the point of their stories—a vermilion dragon's stories aren't about truth but about entertainment. Put simply, telling tall tales is fun, both for the teller and the audience. Repetition is boring, and a boring tale is primed for extinction. To a vermilion dragon, nothing is worse than having one's stories or deeds forgotten.

A vermilion dragon's favorite stories nearly always revolve around themselves. After all, they're boisterous, proud, and notorious braggarts, so it should come as no surprise that they most enjoy weaving tales of their own adventures, daring deeds, and exploits. Both for the purpose of collecting more stories of their exploits and for the excitement and rewards, vermilion dragons often play the part of ambitious daredevils who love the thrill of danger and the unknown. Yet, even the most egoistic vermilion dragon is willing to admit that the epic accomplishments arising from their own wild antics could use some extra embellishment. In fact, they're often the most legendary and exaggerated heroes in their storytelling catalog.

Although vermilion dragons are admittedly relatively self-centered, they don't always cast themselves as the central core of their own exaggerated tales. They also enjoy telling all sorts of embellished stories about people they know or have met, events they've seen or observed, and news of the wider world around them. They usually prefer to share something they had a hand in or witnessed as opposed to a completely distant tale far outside their experience—although they love listening to such far-flung and unfamiliar stories! Sometimes, after hearing a rousing tale told repeatedly, a vermilion dragon has experienced it enough that they feel they were practically there, and they then choose to adopt the tale as their own—complete with some much- needed improvements.

As wild as the antics of a vermilion dragon are, their stories are somehow even wilder.

Pentheravix

Pentheravix, "the Witness," is odd for a vermilion dragon since she never casts herself as the hero of her own tales. Instead, she solely tells tales of important events she claims to have witnessed. So compelling are her versions of current events and history that they quickly supplant the truth, even in regions where the events occurred. Her word is truth—even when it clearly isn't.

Eager Dupes

Vermilion dragons are talented illusionists who weave fantastical illusions as easily as they breathe and spin tales. While this should make them excellent at identifying illusions, this couldn't be further from the truth. Vermilion dragons so enjoy experiencing illusions and admiring their artistry that they'd rather be duped than disbelieve.

The Dangers Of Daredevilry

Vermilion dragons are thrill-seeking adrenaline junkies, and while they enjoy an enthralled audience, they care little for the lives of the individuals who compose such audiences. Thus, their antics regularly cause trouble for nearby settlements. It's people who pay the price for riled-up monsters, embarrassed armies, and environmental cataclysms—never the vermilion dragon.
Adult Vermilion Dragon.prototypeToken: 成年赤红巨龙 Adult Vermilion Dragon

Ancient Cerulean Dragon.name: 远古天蓝巨龙 Ancient Cerulean Dragon
Ancient Cerulean Dragon.tokenName: 远古天蓝巨龙 Ancient Cerulean Dragon

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60 尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Wavesense (Imprecise) 40 feet.name: 波感（不精确）40尺 Wavesense (Imprecise) 40 feet

Experienced Traveler.name: 老练旅者 Experienced Traveler
Experienced Traveler.description:
天蓝巨龙是经验丰富的生存专家，不会被大多数环境所带来的凡俗危险所阻碍。它们无视非魔法的困难地形。

Cerulean dragons are experienced survivalists and are unhindered by the mundane dangers posed by most environments. They ignore non-magical difficult terrain.

Peregrinate.name: 漫游 Peregrinate
Peregrinate.description:
触发 一名敌人的回合结束，且在该回合中该敌人用近战打击命中了蔚蓝巨龙

效果 蔚蓝巨龙游离危险，拉开到更安全的距离并重新定位以便打击。蔚蓝巨龙疾走、游泳或飞行至多其速度的一半，并且其移动不会触发由移动触发的反应动作（）（例如借机攻击）。

Trigger A foe's turn ends, during which that foe hit the cerulean dragon with a melee Strike

Effect The cerulean dragon wanders away from danger, putting themselves at a safer distance and repositioning to strike. The cerulean dragon Strides, Swims, or Flies up to half their Speed, and their movement doesn't trigger reactions triggered by movement (such as Attacks of Opportunity).

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Translate.name: 请提供要翻译的英文原文（粘贴文本或上传图片/文件），我会将其翻译为简体中文。 Translate
Translate.description:
你施放该法术时，目标可以理解它正在听到或读到的单一语言的含义。这不会让它理解暗号、用隐喻包装的语言等（由GM酌情决定）。如果目标能听到多种语言且知道这一点，它可以选择要理解哪种语言；否则，随机选择其中一种语言。

强化（3环） 目标也可以说这种语言。

强化（4环） 你可以以最多10个生物为目标，且目标也可以说这种语言。

The target can understand the meaning of a single language it is hearing or reading when you cast the spell. This doesn't let it understand codes, language couched in metaphor, and the like (subject to GM discretion). If the target can hear multiple languages and knows that, it can choose which language to understand; otherwise, choose one of the languages randomly.

Heightened (3rd) The target can also speak the language.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures, and targets can also speak the language.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你解开某个法术或效果背后的魔法。对目标进行一次反制检定。若你成功反制一件魔法物品，该物品在10分钟内变为其类型的普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。若目标为神器或类似物品，你自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Humanoid Form.name: 类人形态 Humanoid Form
Humanoid Form.description:
你将自己的外表变形为一个小型或中型的类人生物（特征），例如矮人、精灵、地精、半身人、人类、兽人或蜥蜴人。当你处于此形态时，除了你原本的其他特征外，你获得类人生物（特征），以及任何与该生物种类相关的特征（例如地精或人类）。如果此变形使你的体型变小，则会相应减少你的触及（如同 shrink 法术）。此变形不会以任何方式改变你的数据，你也不会获得你所采取的类人生物形态的任何特殊能力。你仍然可以穿戴并使用你的道具；这些道具会改变体型（如有必要）以匹配你的新形态。如果物品离开你的身上，它们会恢复为其通常的体型。

类人生物形态使你在进行欺瞒检定以冒充所选族裔的一般成员时获得+4状态加值，并且即使你未受训也要加上你的等级，但你不能让自己看起来像某个特定的人。如果你想要冒充某个个体，你仍然需要创造一个伪装，不过GM在决定你的欺瞒检定DC时不会将族裔差异纳入考量。你可以解消此法术。

升阶（3环） 如果你所采取的形态具有该能力，你获得黑暗视觉或弱光视野。

升阶（5环） 你可以呈现为大型类人生物（特征）的外表。如果这使你的体型增大，你获得 enlarge 法术的效果。

You transform your appearance to that of a Small or Medium humanoid, such as a dwarf, elf, goblin, halfling, human, orc, or lizardfolk. You gain the humanoid trait in addition to your other traits while in this form, as well as any trait related to the creature's kind (such as goblin or human). If this transformation reduces your size, it reduces your reach accordingly (as the shrink spell). This transformation doesn't change your statistics in any way, and you don't gain any special abilities of the humanoid form you assume. You can still wear and use your gear, which changes size (if necessary) to match your new form. If items leave your person, they return to their usual size.

Humanoid form grants you a +4 status bonus to Deception checks to pass as a generic member of the chosen ancestry, and you add your level even if you're untrained, but you can't make yourself look like a specific person. If you want to Impersonate an individual, you still need to create a disguise, though the GM won't factor in the difference in ancestry when determining the DC of your Deception check. You can Dismiss this spell.

Heightened (3rd) You gain darkvision or low-light vision if the form you assume has that ability.

Heightened (5th) You can take on the appearance of a Large humanoid. If this increases your size, you gain the effects of the enlarge spell.

Create Water (At Will).name: 创造 水（随意） Create Water (At Will)
Create Water (At Will).description:
当你把双手捧成杯状时，水开始从中流出。你创造2加仑的水。如果没有人喝掉它，它会在1天后蒸发。

As you cup your hands, water begins to flow forth from them. You create 2 gallons of water. If no one drinks it, it evaporates after 1 day.

True Strike.name: 精准打击 True Strike
True Strike.description:
对未来的一瞥确保你的下一击精准命中。在你的回合结束前，你下一次进行攻击掷骰时，将该次攻击掷骰掷两次并使用较好的结果。该次攻击无视攻击掷骰的环境减值，以及由于目标处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} 状态而需要进行的任何纯骰检定。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{法术效果：真实打击}

A glimpse into the future ensures your next blow strikes true. The next time you make an attack roll before the end of your turn, roll the attack twice and use the better result. The attack ignores circumstance penalties to the attack roll and any flat check required due to the target being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{Spell Effect: True Strike}

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你释放出一次脉冲，以登记魔法的存在。除魔法是否存在之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你与盟友的魔法物品和持续中的法术。你只有在该魔法的效果的阶位低于你的侦测魔法法术的阶位时，才能侦测到幻术魔法。然而，带有幻术灵光但外观并不具欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环）你得知该法术侦测到的最强魔法效果的阶位或等级，由GM判定。

升阶（4环）同3环，但你还会指明最高阶位魔法的来源。与模糊感官类似，你不会得知确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个5英尺立方体范围内（若来源大于此范围，则为最近的一个）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你专注于目标物体，敞开心智以感知魔法灵光。施放完成后，你会知道该物品是否具有魔法。你或任何经你告知该灵光信息的人，在对该物品进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{辨识魔法} 时获得+2环境加值。若该物体是幻象，只有当该效果的环阶低于你的阅读灵光法术的环阶时，你才会侦测到这一点。

强化（3环）你最多可以以10个物体为目标。

强化（6环）你可以以任意数量的物体为目标。

You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras. When the casting is complete, you know whether that item is magical. You or anyone you advise about the aura gains a +2 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic} on the item. If the object is illusory, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your read aura spell.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to 10 objects.

Heightened (6th) You can target any number of objects.

Spout.name: 喷涌 Spout
Spout.description:
区域 5英尺立方体或5英尺爆发

水向上喷涌，可能从地面涌出、从水池中升起，甚至从稀薄的空气中显现。区域内的任何生物承受等同于1d4加上你的施法能力调整值的钝击伤害，并进行一次基础反射豁免。

你可以将此法术的区域改为5英尺爆发，前提是你将爆发的中心置于一处水体之中。该水体可以小到池塘或小溪，但不能小到水洼或浴缸。

升阶 (+1) 伤害增加1d4。

Area 5-foot cube or 5-foot burst

Water blasts upward, coming out of the ground, rising from a pool, or even manifesting from thin air. Any creatures in the area take bludgeoning damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier, with a basic Reflex saving throw.

You can change this spell's area to a 5-foot burst, provided you center the burst in a body of water. This body of water can be as small as a pond or creek, but not as small as a puddle or bathtub.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
天蓝色巨龙以两种方式之一吐息。其巨龙吐息的区域内所有非魔法火焰都会被熄灭。巨龙在 [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4轮} 内无法再次使用吐息武器。

  • 冲击波 巨龙在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:50] 中吐出一道强力的、猛烈的波浪。区域内的每个生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:41] 豁免，具有以下效果。

    大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响。

    成功 该生物沿圆锥的同一方向被推离10尺。

    失败 该生物沿圆锥的同一方向被推离20尺。如果在被完全推离前会撞到坚固的物体，则其每剩余5尺会被推离的距离会受到 @Damage[3d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害。

    大成功或大失败 失败 该生物沿圆锥的同一方向被推离30尺。如果在被完全推离前会撞到坚固的物体，则其每剩余5尺会被推离的距离会受到 @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害。

  • 加压水流 巨龙在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:50] 中吐出一股加压水的爆喷，造成 @Damage[20d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:41|basic:true] 豁免）。

The cerulean dragon breathes in one of two ways. All non-magical fires within the area of their Dragon Breath are extinguished. The dragon can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

  • Battering Wave The dragon breathes a powerful, pummeling wave in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50]. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:41] save with the following effects.

    Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

    Success The creature is pushed 10 feet away in the same direction as the cone.

    Failure The creature is pushed 20 feet away in the same direction as the cone. If it would hit a solid object before being completely pushed, it takes @Damage[3d6[bludgeoning]] damage for every remaining 5 feet it would be pushed.

    Critical Failure The creature is pushed 30 feet away in the same direction as the cone. If it would hit a solid object before being completely pushed, it takes @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]] damage for every remaining 5 feet it would be pushed.

  • Pressurized Water The dragon breathes a blast of pressurized water in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50] that deals @Damage[20d6[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:41|basic:true] save).

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙狂乱 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
巨龙以任意顺序进行两次爪击打击和一次翼打击。

The dragon makes two claw Strikes and one wing Strike in any order.

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙裔动能 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
当巨龙以打击造成大成功或大失败时，他们的吐息武器会重新充能。

When the dragon scores a critical hit with a Strike, they recharge their Breath Weapon.

Deny Advantage.name: 拒绝优势 Deny Advantage
Deny Advantage.description:
这只蔚蓝巨龙不受19级或更低等级的生物通过夹击、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}所带来的影响，也不受18级或更低等级且使用突袭攻击的生物影响。

The cerulean dragon isn't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] to flanking, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} creatures of 19th level or lower, or to creatures of 18th level or lower using surprise attack.

Hazard Sense.name: 危害 感官 Hazard Sense
Hazard Sense.description:
天蓝巨龙拥有一种直觉感官，会提醒他们危险与陷阱的存在。他们在用于发现陷阱与危害的察觉检定上获得+2环境加值；对抗由陷阱与危害发动的攻击时的AC上获得+2环境加值；以及对抗陷阱与危害时的豁免上获得+2环境加值。即使天蓝巨龙没有进行搜索，他们仍然可以进行检定以发现通常需要他们处于搜索状态才能发现的陷阱与危害。

The cerulean dragon has an intuitive sense that alerts them to dangers and the presence of traps. They gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to find traps and hazards, to AC against attacks made by traps and hazards, and to save against traps and hazards. Even if the cerulean dragon isn't searching, they still get a check to find traps and hazards that normally require them to be Searching.

Freedom of Movement.name: 行动自如 Freedom of Movement
Freedom of Movement.description:
你会排斥那些会妨碍生物或减缓其移动的效果。处于该法术效果影响下时，目标无视那些会使其速度受到环境减值的效果。当其尝试 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱} 一个使其处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱}, 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚} 的效果时，他们自动成功，除非该效果是魔法的，且其等级高于行动自如法术。

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher level than the freedom of movement spell.

Wall of Water.name: 水墙 Wall of Water
Wall of Water.description:
你将手举向空中，召来一道巨浪席卷战场。墙体保持直立，呈一条长度60英尺、高10英尺、厚5英尺的直线。

水墙区域内任何非魔法的火焰，只要其体型不大于水墙，就会立刻被熄灭。它也会尝试反制其区域内的任何魔法火焰。这两种效果会在法术施放时发生，并且每当有火焰进入水墙区域时也会发生。若水墙未能反制某一特定火焰，则在法术持续时间内它无法再反制该火焰。

钝击或挥砍的投射物无法穿过水墙，而穿刺的投射物若穿过水墙，其射程增量减半。穿越水墙的生物必须通过游泳穿过。水中战斗规则适用于穿越水墙的生物、以水墙内的生物为目标，或穿过水墙的情况。例如，一次以墙内生物为目标的钝击或挥砍近战攻击会承受-2环境减值。

Raising your hand in the air, you call a massive wave onto the battlefield. The wall stays upright in a straight line that is 60 feet long, 10 feet high, and 5 feet thick.

Any non-magical fires within the wall of water's area that are its size or smaller are put out instantly. It also attempts to counteract any magical fires in its area. Both of these effects happen when the spell is cast and whenever a fire enters the wall's area. If the wall fails to counteract a given fire, it can't counteract that fire for the duration of the spell.

Bludgeoning or slashing projectiles can't pass through the wall, and piercing projectiles have their range increments halved if they pass through the wall. A creature traversing the wall of water needs to Swim through. The rules of aquatic combat apply to creatures traversing the wall of water, targeting creatures within the wall, or passing through the wall. For instance, a bludgeoning or slashing melee attack targeting a creature in the wall would take a -2 circumstance penalty.

At-Will Spells.name: 随意施放法术 At-Will Spells

Extra Reaction.name: 额外反应动作 Extra Reaction
Extra Reaction.description:
巨龙在每轮开始其回合时获得2个反应动作。

The dragon gets 2 reactions at the start of its turn each round.

Attack of Opportunity (Jaws Only).name: 借机攻击（仅颌骨） Attack of Opportunity (Jaws Only)

True Seeing.name: 真实视域 True Seeing
True Seeing.description:
你能如其真实样貌般看见60尺内的事物。GM针对区域内任何幻术或变化系效果进行一次秘密的反制检定，但仅用于决定你是否能看穿它（例如，若该检定成功反制一个变形法术，你可以看见该生物的真实形态，但你不会结束该变形法术）。

You see things within 60 feet as they actually are. The GM rolls a secret counteract check against any illusion or transmutation in the area, but only for the purpose of determining whether you see through it (for instance, if the check succeeds against a polymorph spell, you can see the creature's true form, but you don't end the polymorph spell).

Ancient Cerulean Dragon.publicNotes:
天青巨龙是巨龙世界的开拓者，是探险者、地城探掘者与探索者；它们为满足永无止境的好奇心，在对自己而言未知的土地上勘定道路、开辟小径。天青巨龙为冒险而生，总是推动自己比以往更快、更远、更深、更高。它们决心看看下一条走廊尽头有什么、紧闭的门后藏着什么、地平线之外有什么，并发现其他世界、位面以及其他次元中有什么。它们探索不寻常的地点与神秘的奇观，从不满足于闲置或久居一处，也从不惧怕命运会为它们准备何种惊喜或未来可能带来的危险。

天青巨龙心中充满永恒的漂泊渴望与不减的旅行热情。它们过着快节奏的生活，因此更偏好始终在路上。多数天青巨龙不保留传统巢穴，宁愿在荒野中、在千变万化的天空下生活，也不愿被奢华却束缚于同一地点的生活所禁锢。有些天青巨龙则偏好魔法居所与位面外的领域——当它们足够强大且年迈到能够创造这些时——使它们得以同时享有舒适生活与冒险生活。

天青巨龙对周遭世界及其所包含的一切都极其好奇。它们喜欢把鼻子伸到不该去的地方、跨越界限、打破各式各样的禁忌。它们爱窥探，不过它们更可能去撬开上锁的门、潜入禁区，而不是去挖掘人们隐秘的过往与家族秘密。与琥珀巨龙不同，它们对人们生活的细节，或散落在城市街道上的流言与尴尬并不怎么感兴趣。并非它们排斥交友——恰恰相反，天青巨龙乐于结识新人并缔结友谊，尤其是与其他志趣相投的探索者与冒险者建立合作关系，以便共同协作。

尽管天青巨龙喜欢结识新人、发现稀有宝藏并学习失落的秘密，但对它们而言，没有什么比前往一处全新的地方更令人兴奋。探索一个对它们而言完全新奇且未知之地最能让天青巨龙热血沸腾，无论那个地点对社会、历史的重要性（或缺乏重要性），或对获取财富以壮大它们收藏的意义如何。

在幼年时期，许多天青巨龙主要专注于普通的旅行形态。它们造访从未见过的城市与聚居地，闯入金库、跋涉下水道、开启坟墓。它们探索广袤荒野，攀登群山、洞穴探险、横渡沼泽，并潜入湖泊与海洋之下。等到成年时，大多数天青巨龙更偏好探索更危险的地点，例如闹鬼的庄园、沉没的船只、偏远的神殿、远古遗迹，以及——最常见的挚爱——地城。

随着时代流逝，多数天青巨龙必须走得越来越远，才能找到从未去过之处并满足自己的漂泊渴望。在这段时期，多数个体会走向极端，探入最深的深渊与最遥远且难以抵达的地区，旅行前往其他位面与星球，甚至前往其他时代与次元。这是深入怪诞、狂野与完全不可置信之物的时代。

Zemedrilon

“永寻者”泽梅德里隆或许是位面外探索领域最强效的专家，亲自探索过23个级别位面，其中包括两个其存在目前仍未被证实的位面。多数人相信，泽梅德里隆在30年之前试图开启通往遥远未来的传送门时被汽化——而天青巨龙认为这故事荒唐可笑。它们坚持这头远古巨龙已成功抵达未来，并将在足够长的时间过去之后再度现身。

Adventuring Parties

天青巨龙常为探索目的而结成紧密的团队，每条巨龙各自在某个研究领域或探索侧重点上专精。一些学者认为，传统“冒险者小队”的概念正是源自天青巨龙——这一完全缺乏依据且无法证实的说法令多数短命凡人颇为恼火。

Mobile Hoards

像大多数冒险者一样，天青巨龙会把自己的财富以贵重魔法物品、远古器物、贵重珠宝以及其他可穿戴财富的形式随身携带。因此，尽管天青巨龙缺少真正的收藏，它们往往会佩戴（或挥舞！）一笔巨额财富。

Cerulean dragons are the trailblazers of the dragon world, the delvers, the dungeoneers, and the explorers, charting paths and blazing trails through lands unknown to them to sate their neverending curiosity. Cerulean dragons live for adventure and are always pushing themselves faster, further, deeper, and higher than they've ever gone before. They're determined to see what's down the next hall, behind the closed door, beyond the horizon, and discover what lies on other worlds, planes, and other dimensions. They explore unusual sites and mysterious wonders, never content to be idle or sedentary, and never afraid of what surprises fate might have in store for them or what dangers the future may hold.

Cerulean dragons are filled with an eternal wanderlust and an unabating passion for travel. They live a fast-paced life, and thus they prefer to stay on the move at all times. Most cerulean dragons don't keep traditional lairs, preferring a life lived in the wilderness and under a thousand different skies rather than a life of luxury shackled to the same place. Some cerulean dragons prefer magical homes and extraplanar domains—when they're powerful and old enough to create them—which allow them a life of comfort and a life of adventure all at once.

Cerulean dragons are incredibly curious about the world around them and all it contains. They enjoy sticking their noses where they don't belong, treading beyond boundaries, and breaking taboos of all sorts. They're snoops, though they're far more likely to pry behind locked doors and into off-limit locations than they are to delve into people's hidden pasts and family secrets. They're not overly interested in the details of people's lives or the gossip and embarrassments scattered down city streets, unlike amber dragons. It's not that they're averse to making friends—on the contrary, cerulean dragons are interested in meeting new people and forging friendships, particularly working relationships with other like-minded explorers and adventurers with whom they can collaborate.

While cerulean dragons enjoy meeting new people, discovering rare treasures, and learning lost secrets, nothing is more exciting to them than traveling somewhere new. Exploring a place that's completely new and unknown to them excites cerulean dragons the most, regardless of that location's greater importance (or lack thereof) to society, history, or the acquisition of wealth to grow their hoard.

In their youth, many cerulean dragons focus primarily on ordinary forms of travel. They visit cities and settlements they've never seen before, breaking into vaults, trudging through sewers, and opening tombs. They explore tracts of wilderness, climbing mountains, spelunking through caves, swimming through swamps, and diving beneath lakes and oceans. By the time they're grown, most cerulean dragons prefer to explore more dangerous locations, such as haunted manors, sunken ships, remote temples, ancient ruins, and—a common favorite—dungeons.

As time passes, most cerulean dragons must go further and further to find places they've never been and fulfill their wanderlust. During this time, most go to extremes, plumbing the deepest depths and the most distant and inaccessible regions, traveling to other planes and planets, or even to other times and dimensions. It's a time to delve into the weird, the wild, and the utterly unbelievable.

Zemedrilon

Zemedrilon the Ever-Seeking is perhaps the greatest expert on extraplanar exploration, having personally explored 23 planes, including two whose existence is currently unconfirmed. Most believe Zemedrilon was vaporized 30 years ago while attempting to open a portal to the distant future—a tale cerulean dragons consider laughable. They insist the ancient dragon successfully arrived in the future and, after a long enough time has passed, will reemerge.

Adventuring Parties

Cerulean dragons often band together into tightly knit teams for the purpose of exploration, with each dragon specializing in a field of study or exploratory focus. Some scholars believe it's from cerulean dragons that the concept of the traditional "adventuring party" was born—a completely unsubstantiated and unprovable claim that irks most short- lived mortals.

Mobile Hoards

Like most adventurers, cerulean dragons carry their wealth on them in the form of valuable magic items, ancient artifacts, valuable jewelry, and other wearable wealth. Thus, while a cerulean dragon lacks a true hoard, they often wear (or wield!) a fortune.
Ancient Cerulean Dragon.prototypeToken: 远古蔚蓝巨龙 Ancient Cerulean Dragon

Linara.name: 莉娜拉 Linara
Linara.publicNotes:
嘿，我可以把一个秘密托付给你吗？莉娜拉看起来不过是一个与世隔绝的小村庄里、一座满是尘土的小神殿的袖珍女祭司。但请记住，在生命中，就像在冒险中一样，外表可能会骗人。事实上，莉娜拉远比她表现出来的要不简单。真的，如果金谷岛上还有更受祝福的牧师，我肯定没听说过。她尽量低调，但在莫尔雾镇流传的传闻是：她曾是伦普兰克大教堂的高阶女祭司，地位甚至高过虹彩科尔维本人，后来却突然辞职，把自己埋在这个偏僻落后的小村子里。莫尔雾镇的大多数人都不知道她的过往，所以帮我个忙，别到处传，好吗？

莉娜拉很低调，但她能治愈的病痛比大多数神殿看守多得多。要是你得了什么严重的病——比如死亡这种——莉娜拉能立刻为你诊治，而且如果你付不起常规费用也别担心。她也接受以履行神殿职责与善行作为报酬。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.cYI4YkccGjyFPyLP]{莫尔雾镇：朴素宅园}

Hey, can I trust you with a secret? Linara may not look like much more than the pocket-sized priestess of a dusty shrine in an isolated little village. But remember, in life, just as in adventures, appearances can be deceiving. In fact, there's much more to Linara than she lets on. In fact, if there's a more blessed cleric on Goldcrop, I certainly don't know about them. She tries to keep it quiet, but the rumor in Molmist is that she was once a high priestess at the Rumplank cathedral, outranking even Prismatic Colvi himself, before she abruptly quit and buried herself in this backwater village. Most people in Molmist don't know about her history, though, so please do me a favor and don't spread it around, alright?

Linara keeps it quiet, but she can cure a lot more ailments than most shrine tenders. If you come down with a case of something serious—like death, for instance—Linara can see you right away, and don't worry if you can't afford the usual fees. She also accepts payment for shrine duties and good deeds.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.cYI4YkccGjyFPyLP]{Molmist: Humble Homestead}

Lacha'ala Nim.name: 拉查阿拉·尼姆 Lacha'ala Nim
Lacha'ala Nim.tokenName: 拉查阿拉·尼姆 Lacha'ala Nim
Lacha'ala Nim.publicNotes:
想要更轻松的活动，不妨考虑在奥卡皮丘陵的名为“欢歌”的健康静修地停留一下，这里由g'mayun励志演说家拉查'阿拉·尼姆（性别流动的g'mayun励志演说家）拥有。它宣称自己是丘陵中唯一的永久建筑——不算那些各式营地，毕竟它们的帐篷几乎也和永久的一样。

无论是谁创造了“傻子和他们的金子很容易分开”这句话，大概就是在“欢歌”获得了顿悟。现在我并不是说拉查'阿拉在任何方面心怀恶意；我从未见过比她更真诚的人，但傻子常常很真诚，因为他们不懂得更好。在这里，你可以以每瓶1 sp买到“阳光亲吻的水”——这其实是把冰水放在太阳下晒到冰块刚好融化的暗号，虽然他们声称其中注入了复苏的光能量——以及其他难以置信的优惠，比如5 sp买腌制水果、1 gp买塞满枯死奥卡皮草的寝具，以及15 gp让你被锁在汗蒸帐篷里一小时。不过，翅膀按摩确实值世上所有的金子；千万别错过！如果你没有翅膀，那我很遗憾；你真的错过了。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.b9MCg5n3LKKAvkAs]{裂喙盐沙漠与奥卡皮丘陵}

For a more relaxing endeavor, consider stopping at the Okapi Hills wellness retreat named Jubilant Song, owned by g'mayun motivational speaker Lacha'ala Nim (genderfluid g'mayun motivational speaker). It claims to be the only permanent structure in the hills, discounting the various campsites whose tents may as well be permanent.

Whoever coined the phrase, "Fools and their gold are easily parted," probably came to the epiphany at Jubilant Song. Now I am not claiming that Lacha'ala is in any way malicious; I have never met a more earnest person, but fools are often earnest because they don't know better. Here you can buy sun-kissed water for 1 sp a bottle—that's code for iced water that's been left out in the sun just long enough for the cubes to melt, though the claim is that it is infused with rejuvenating light energy—and other incredible deals such as 5 sp for pickled fruit, 1 gp for bedding stuffed with dead Okapi grass, and 15 gp to be locked in a sweat tent for an hour. The wing massages are worth all the gold in the world, though; don't miss out on those! If you don't have wings, I'm sorry; you are truly missing out.

Effortless Linguist.name: 毫不费力的语言学家 Effortless Linguist
Effortless Linguist.description:
一条朱红巨龙在聆听某种语言被说出 1 分钟后，便能说并理解他们听到的任何语言。这些语言会在 24 小时后从他们的心智中淡去

A vermilion dragon can speak and understand any language they hear spoken after listening to the language for 1 minute. These languages fade from their mind after 24 hours

Exaggerate Strength.name: 夸大力量 Exaggerate Strength
Exaggerate Strength.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 朱红巨龙即将再次尝试对一个无力化效果进行豁免

效果 朱红巨龙膨胀自己的自尊，将自己塑造成一个比实际更能干的传奇版本。虽然这并不会让它更强大，但这种效果足以戏弄无力化魔法。触发的无力化效果将朱红巨龙视为比其实际等级高2级。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger The vermilion dragon is about to attempt a saving throw again an incapacitation effect

Effect The vermilion dragon inflates their own ego, building themself up into a tall tale version of themself more capable than they actually are. While this doesn't make them more powerful, the effect is enough to bedevil incapacitating magic. The triggering incapacitation effect treats the vermilion dragon as if they were two levels higher.

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Illusory Creature.name: 幻象生物 Illusory Creature
Illusory Creature.description:
你创造一个大型或更小体型生物的幻象影像。它会产生相应的声音与气味，并且在接触时也显得可信。如果你与该影像之间的距离曾经超过500尺，该法术结束。

该影像无法说话，但你可以用你的动作通过该生物说话，而法术会将你的声音适当地伪装。根据GM的裁定，你可能需要尝试一次欺骗或表演检定来模仿该生物。若你试图模仿某个特定人物并与认识那个人的人互动时，尤其可能需要这样做。

在战斗中，该幻觉每回合可以使用2个动作，你在维持法术时由它使用。它使用你的法术攻击掷骰来进行攻击掷骰，并使用你的法术DC作为它的AC。它的豁免调整值等于你的法术DC - 10。它足够具有实体感，因此可以夹击其他生物。若影像被一次攻击命中或一次豁免失败，该法术结束。

该幻觉能通过使目标相信幻觉的攻击是真实的来造成伤害，但除此之外无法直接影响物理世界。若幻象生物以一次打击命中，则目标受到等于1d4加上你的施法关键属性调整值的精神伤害。这是一个精神效果。该幻觉的打击为非致命。若该伤害与怪物的影像不相符——例如，一条幻象大型巨龙只造成5点伤害——GM可能允许目标立即尝试一次察觉检定以识破该法术。任何相关的抗力与弱点都会在目标认为它们适用时生效，由GM裁定。例如，若幻觉挥舞一把战锤并攻击一个对钝击伤害有抗力的生物，则该生物会受到更少的精神伤害。然而，幻象伤害不会使再生失效，也不会触发其他需要特定伤害类型的效果。GM应记录该幻觉造成的幻象伤害。

任何接触该影像的生物，或使用“搜索”动作检查它的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻觉。当某个生物识破该幻觉时，它会从其先前因该幻觉所受伤害的一半中恢复（若有），并且不再受到来自该幻觉的任何进一步伤害。

升阶（+1） 影像的打击伤害提高1d4，并且你能创造的生物最大体型提高一级（最高至超巨型）。

You create an illusory image of a Large or smaller creature. It generates the appropriate sounds, smells, and feels believable to the touch. If you and the image are ever farther than 500 feet apart, the spell ends.

The image can't speak, but you can use your actions to speak through the creature, with the spell disguising your voice as appropriate. You might need to attempt a Deception or Performance check to mimic the creature, as determined by the GM. This is especially likely if you're trying to imitate a specific person and engage with someone that person knows.

In combat, the illusion can use 2 actions per turn, which it uses when you Sustain the Spell. It uses your spell attack roll for attack rolls and your spell DC for its AC. Its saving throw modifiers are equal to your spell DC - 10. It is substantial enough that it can flank other creatures. If the image is hit by an attack or fails a save, the spell ends.

The illusion can cause damage by making the target believe the illusion's attacks are real, but it cannot otherwise directly affect the physical world. If the illusory creature hits with a Strike, the target takes mental damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. This is a mental effect. The illusion's Strikes are nonlethal. If the damage doesn't correspond to the image of the monster-for example, if an illusory Large dragon deals only 5 damage-the GM might allow the target to attempt an immediate Perception check to disbelieve the spell. Any relevant resistances and weaknesses apply if the target thinks they do, as judged by the GM. For example, if the illusion wields a warhammer and attacks a creature resistant to bludgeoning damage, the creature would take less mental damage. However, illusory damage does not deactivate regeneration or trigger other effects that require a certain damage type. The GM should track illusory damage dealt by the illusion.

Any creature that touches the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion. When a creature disbelieves the illusion, it recovers from half the damage it had taken from it (if any) and doesn't take any further damage from it.

Heightened (+1) The damage of the image's Strikes increases by 1d4, and the maximum size of creature you can create increases by one (to a maximum of Gargantuan).

Illusory Disguise.name: 幻象伪装 Illusory Disguise
Illusory Disguise.description:
你创造一个幻象，使你看起来像另一名体型相同、身高（相差不超过6英寸）与体重（相差不超过50磅）大致相近的生物。该伪装通常足以隐藏你的身份，但不足以冒充某个特定个体。此法术不会改变你的声音、嗅觉或举止。你可以改变你衣物与穿戴物品的外观，例如让你的护甲看起来像一件裙子。手持物品不受影响，且你移除的任何穿戴物品都会恢复其真实外观。

施放幻象伪装视为为使用欺瞒的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.action-macros.Macro.k5nW4jGyXD0Oq9LR]{冒充} 建立了一次伪装；它无视你因将自己伪装成不相似生物而可能承受的任何环境减值；它给予你+4状态加值，用于进行欺瞒检定以防止他人看穿你的伪装；并且即使你未受训，你也可以加入你的等级。你可以解消此法术。

升阶（2环） 该法术还会伪装你的声音与嗅觉，并获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）特征。

升阶（3环） 你可以显现为任何体型相同的生物，甚至是某个特定个体。你必须见过该个体，才能变成其外观。该法术还会伪装你的声音与嗅觉，并获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）特征。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3Ktyd5F9lOPo4myk]{法术效果：幻象伪装}

You create an illusion that causes you to appear as another creature of the same body shape, and with roughly similar height (within 6 inches) and weight (within 50 pounds), as yourself. The disguise is typically good enough to hide your identity, but not to impersonate a specific individual. The spell doesn't change your voice, scent, or mannerisms. You can change the appearance of your clothing and worn items, such as making your armor look like a dress. Held items are unaffected, and any worn item you remove returns to its true appearance.

Casting illusory disguise counts as setting up a disguise for the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.action-macros.Macro.k5nW4jGyXD0Oq9LR]{Impersonate} use of Deception; it ignores any circumstance penalties you might take for disguising yourself as a dissimilar creature, it gives you a +4 status bonus to Deception checks to prevent others from seeing through your disguise, and you add your level even if you're untrained. You can Dismiss this spell.

Heightened (2nd) The spell also disguises your voice and scent, and it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

Heightened (3rd) You can appear as any creature of the same size, even a specific individual. You must have seen an individual to take on their appearance. The spell also disguises your voice and scent, and it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3Ktyd5F9lOPo4myk]{Spell Effect: Illusory Disguise}

Illusory Object.name: 幻象物体 Illusory Object
Illusory Object.description:
你创造一个静止物体的虚假视觉图像。整个图像必须能容纳在该法术的区域内。该物体看起来会自然地运动，但不会发出声音或产生气味。例如，水看起来会沿着虚假的瀑布倾泻而下，但会是无声的。

任何接触该图像的生物，或使用【搜寻】动作来检查它的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻觉。

强化（2环） 你的图像会发出适当的声音，产生正常的气味，并且接触时触感正确。该法术获得听觉（特征）。持续时间增加至1小时。

强化（5环） 同2环版本，但持续时间为无限。

You create an illusory visual image of a stationary object. The entire image must fit within the spell's area. The object appears to animate naturally, but it doesn't make sounds or generate smells. For example, water would appear to pour down an illusory waterfall, but it would be silent.

Any creature that touches the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (2nd) Your image makes appropriate sounds, generates normal smells, and feels right to the touch. The spell gains the auditory trait. The duration increases to 1 hour.

Heightened (5th) As the 2nd-level version, but the duration is unlimited.

Ventriloquism.name: 腹语术 Ventriloquism
Ventriloquism.description:
每当你说话或以声音发声时，你可以让你的发声看起来是从60英尺内的其他地方传来，并且你在发声的过程中可以自由改变该表观位置。任何听到该声音的生物都可以尝试识破你的幻觉。

升阶（2环） 该法术的持续时间增加至1小时，并且你还可以改变你声音的语调、音质以及其他性相。在生物能够尝试识破你的幻觉之前，它必须主动尝试一次察觉检定，或以其他方式使用动作与该声音进行交互。

Whenever you speak or make any other sound vocally, you can make your vocalization seem to originate from somewhere else within 60 feet, and you can change that apparent location freely as you vocalize. Any creature that hears the sound can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (2nd) The spell's duration increases to 1 hour, and you can also change the tone, quality, and other aspects of your voice. Before a creature can attempt to disbelieve your illusion, it must actively attempt a Perception check or otherwise use actions to interact with the sound.

Charm (At Will).name: 魅惑（意志） Charm (At Will)
Charm (At Will).description:
对目标而言，你的话语如蜜般甜美，你的面容仿佛笼罩在梦幻般的薄雾中。它必须尝试一次意志豁免；若你或你的盟友最近威胁过它或对它使用过敌对动作，则该豁免获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。若你对目标使用敌对动作，该法术结束。法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己曾被魅惑，除非它对你的友谊或你说服它采取的动作与它的预期相冲突，这意味着你可能可以通过世俗手段说服目标继续做你的朋友。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且意识到你试图魅惑它。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害之物而非魅惑，除非它辨识出该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友善}。若它原本为友善，则变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于助人}。它不能对你使用敌对动作。

大失败 目标对你的态度变为乐于助人，并且它不能对你使用敌对动作。

升阶（4环） 持续时间延长至你下次进行每日准备为止。

升阶（8环） 持续时间延长至你下次进行每日准备为止，且你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Ghost Sound.name: 幽灵之音 Ghost Sound
Ghost Sound.description:
你创造一个由简单声音组成的听觉幻象，其最大音量相当于四名普通人同时大喊。声音从你在射程内指定的一个方格中发出。你无法创造可辨识的词语或其他复杂的声音（例如音乐）。

强化（3环） 射程增加至60英尺。

强化（5环） 射程增加至120英尺。

You create an auditory illusion of simple sounds that has a maximum volume equal to four normal humans shouting. The sounds emanate from a square you designate within range. You can't create intelligible words or other intricate sounds (such as music).

Heightened (3rd) The range increases to 60 feet.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 120 feet.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
朱红巨龙以两种方式之一吐息。巨龙在 [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4轮} 内无法再次使用吐息武器。

  • 易燃香料（奥术，塑能，火）；巨龙在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:50] 内打喷嚏喷出一团易燃香料云，造成 @Damage[19d6[fire]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:40|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,fire] 豁免）。在大失败时，香料进入其眼睛，使其暂时失明；该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲} 1轮。
  • 刺激性香料（奥术，塑能，毒素）；巨龙在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:50] 内打喷嚏喷出一团刺激性香料云，造成 @Damage[19d6[poison]] 伤害（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:40|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,poison] 豁免）。在大失败时，香料钻入其鼻腔，以强烈的灼烧感将其淹没；该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{昏迷 2}。

The vermilion dragon breathes in one of two ways. The dragon can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

  • Flammable Spice (arcane, evocation, fire); The dragon sneezes a cloud of flammable spice in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50] that deals @Damage[19d6[fire]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:40|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,fire] save). On a critical failure, the spice gets in their eyes, temporarily blinding them; the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round.
  • Irritating Spice (arcane, evocation, poison); The dragon sneezes a cloud of irritating spice in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50] that deals @Damage[19d6[poison]] damage (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:40|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,poison] save). On a critical failure, the spice gets up their nose, overwhelming them with a powerful burning sensation; the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Arcane Prepared Spells.name: 奥术备置法术 Arcane Prepared Spells

Freedom of Movement.name: 行动自如 Freedom of Movement
Freedom of Movement.description:
你可以排斥会妨碍生物或减缓其移动的效果。在此法术效果持续期间，目标无视会使其速度获得环境减值的效果。当其尝试 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱} 使其陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚}的效果时，除非该效果是魔法且其等级高于行动自如法术，否则其自动成功。

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher level than the freedom of movement spell.

Hypnotic Pattern.name: 催眠图纹 Hypnotic Pattern
Hypnotic Pattern.description:
你创造出一个不断变换颜色的图案，它以几何形态的云团悬浮在空气中。生物在图案内时处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 状态。此外，若生物在你施放该法术时位于图案内、进入图案、在图案内结束其回合，或对图案使用【搜索】或【交互】动作，则必须尝试一次意志豁免。当前已被该图案 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷} 的生物不会再尝试新的豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标被该图案着迷。

大失败 目标被该图案着迷。只要其仍处于着迷状态，就无法使用反应动作。

You create a pattern of shifting colors that hovers in the air in a geometric cloud. Creatures are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} while inside the pattern. In addition, a creature must attempt a Will saving throw if it is inside the pattern when you cast it, when it enters the pattern, when it ends its turn within the pattern, or if it uses a Seek or Interact action on the pattern. A creature currently @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by the pattern doesn't attempt new saves.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target is Fascinated by the pattern.

Critical Failure The target is Fascinated by the pattern. While it remains Fascinated, it can't use reactions.

Blur.name: 朦胧术 Blur
Blur.description:
目标的形态看起来模糊不清。它变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。由于此效果的性质仍使目标的位置显而易见，目标无法使用此隐蔽来躲藏或潜行。

The target's form appears blurry. It becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}. As the nature of this effect still leaves the target's location obvious, the target can't use this concealment to Hide or Sneak.

Charm.name: 魅惑 Charm
Charm.description:
对目标而言，你的话语如蜜般甜美，你的面容仿佛沐浴在梦幻般的薄雾之中。它必须尝试一次意志豁免；如果你或你的盟友最近威胁过它或对它使用过敌对动作，则该豁免获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。若你对目标使用敌对动作，该法术结束。法术结束时，目标未必会意识到自己曾被魅惑，除非它与你的友谊或你说服它采取的动作与它的预期相冲突；这意味着你有可能通过世俗手段说服目标继续做你的朋友。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知晓你试图魅惑它。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害的东西而非魅惑，除非它识别出该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友好}。若它原本为友好，则变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于助人}。它不能对你使用敌对动作。

大失败 目标对你的态度变为乐于助人，且它不能对你使用敌对动作。

升阶（4环） 持续时间持续到你下次进行每日准备为止。

升阶（8环） 持续时间持续到你下次进行每日准备为止，且你可以以至多10个生物为目标。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Color Spray.name: 虹彩喷射 Color Spray
Color Spray.description:
旋转的色彩会根据观看者的意志豁免影响他们。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}，持续1轮。

失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}，持续1轮，并获得目眩，持续1分钟。

大成功或大失败 该生物获得震慑，持续1轮，并获得目盲，持续1分钟。

Swirling colors affect viewers based on their Will saves.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round, and Dazzled for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature is Stunned for 1 round and Blinded for 1 minute.

Unseen Servant.name: 隐形仆役 Unseen Servant
Unseen Servant.description:
你召唤一个隐形仆役，你可以在维持法术时作为其中一部分对其下达命令。它为你服务，直到其生命值降至 0（此时法术结束），或直到你停止维持法术。该隐形仆役获得被召唤（特征）。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.j7NNPfZwD19BwSEZ]{隐形仆役}（无阵营）

You summon an unseen servant, which you can command as part of Sustaining the Spell. It serves you until its Hit Points are reduced to 0, at which point the spell ends, or until you stop Sustaining the Spell. The unseen servant gains the summoned trait.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.j7NNPfZwD19BwSEZ]{Unseen Servant} (No Alignment)

Bullhorn.name: 喇叭扩音器 Bullhorn
Bullhorn.description:
你增强自己的声音，让你在极远的距离也能轻松被听见。在持续时间内，500尺内的所有听众都能响亮而清晰地听到你的声音，即使周遭的环境噪音本会阻挡声音传播。尽管音量很大，这也不会让你的声音刺耳或令人分心。这不会增加其他听觉或语言效果的射程或区域，而诸如墙壁与门等物理屏障仍会如常阻挡或削弱你的声音。

你的洪亮声音让你更容易胁迫他人，而良好的声学效果也有助于你在大型场地表演。你获得+1状态加值，用于胁迫的检定，以及在大型场地进行表演的听觉表演检定。你可以解消该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.9yzlmYUdvdQshTDF]{法术效果：扩音喇叭}

升阶（5环）你的声音最远可在1,200尺外被清晰听见。

升阶（7环）你的声音最远可在1英里外被清晰听见。

You amplify your voice, loud enough for you to be heard easily at a great distance. For the duration, your voice can be heard loudly and clearly by all listeners within 500 feet, even if other ambient noise would otherwise block the sound. Despite the volume, this doesn't make your voice jarring or distracting. This doesn't increase the range or area of other auditory or linguistic effects, and physical barriers such as walls and doors still block or muffle your voice as normal.

Your loud voice makes it easier to Coerce others, and the acoustics assist in Performing at a large venue. You gain a +1 status bonus to checks to Coerce and auditory Performance checks to Perform at a large venue. You can Dismiss the spell.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.9yzlmYUdvdQshTDF]{Spell Effect: Bullhorn}

Heightened (5th) Your voice can be heard clearly up to 1,200 feet away.

Heightened (7th) Your voice can be heard clearly up to 1 mile away.

Dancing Lights.name: 舞光 Dancing Lights
Dancing Lights.description:
你创造至多四个漂浮的光，它们彼此之间任意两者相距不超过10尺。每个都像火把一样照明。当你维持法术时，你可以将任意数量的光移动至多60尺。每个光必须保持在你120尺范围内，并且与所有其他光保持在10尺之内，否则它会熄灭。

You create up to four floating lights, no two of which are more than 10 feet apart. Each sheds light like a torch. When you Sustain the Spell, you can move any number of lights up to 60 feet. Each light must remain within 120 feet of you and within 10 feet of all others, or it winks out.

Telekinetic Hand.name: 念动力之手 Telekinetic Hand
Telekinetic Hand.description:
你创造一只漂浮的魔法手，可以是隐形的或幽灵般的，它抓住目标物体并使其以缓慢的速度在任意方向漂浮移动，最多20英尺。当你维持该法术时，你可以让该物体额外移动20英尺。若该法术结束时物体仍在空气中，则物体会坠落。

强化（3环）你可以以负载为1或更低的无人看管物体为目标。

强化（5环）射程增加至60英尺，且你可以以负载为1或更低的无人看管物体为目标。

强化（7环）射程增加至60英尺，且你可以以负载为2或更低的无人看管物体为目标。

You create a floating, magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and levitates it slowly up to 20 feet in any direction. When you Sustain the spell, you can move the object an additional 20 feet. If the object is in the air when the spell ends, the object falls.

Heightened (3rd) You can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (7th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 2 or less.

Prestidigitation.name: 戏法﻿ Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法会听从你的差遣。只要你维持法术，你就可以施展简单的魔法效果。每次你维持法术时，你可以从四个选项中选择一个。

  • 烹饪 使1磅非生物材料变凉、变暖或调味。
  • 提起 缓慢地 将一个无人看管的、负载为轻或更低的物体抬离地面1英尺。
  • 制造 创造一个临时物体，其负载可忽略不计，由凝结的魔法物质制成。该物体看起来粗糙而不自然，并且极其脆弱——不能用作工具、武器或法术成分。
  • 整理 为一个负载为轻或更低的物体上色、清洁或弄脏。你可以用10轮的专注影响一个负载为1的物体，而更大的物体则需要每负载1分钟。

戏法手势无法造成伤害或引发不利状态。对物体的任何实际改变（除上述注明者之外）仅在你维持法术期间持续。

The simplest magic does your bidding. You can perform simple magical effects for as long as you Sustain the Spell. Each time you Sustain the Spell, you can choose one of four options.

  • Cook Cool, warm, or flavor 1 pound of nonliving material.
  • Lift Slowly lift an unattended object of light Bulk or less 1 foot off the ground.
  • Make Create a temporary object of negligible Bulk, made of congealed magical substance. The object looks crude and artificial and is extremely fragile-it can't be used as a tool, weapon, or spell component.
  • Tidy Color, clean, or soil an object of light Bulk or less. You can affect an object of 1 Bulk with 10 rounds of concentration, and a larger object a 1 minute per Bulk.

Prestidigitation can't deal damage or cause adverse conditions. Any actual change to an object (beyond what is noted above) persists only as long as you Sustain the Spell.

Chromatic Image.name: 虹彩幻象 Chromatic Image
Chromatic Image.description:
你召唤出三个自身的幻象影像，你们四个各自呈现不同的颜色，并且每次有人对你进行攻击时，你们的颜色都会改变。此效果如同@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.j8vIoIEWElvpwkcI]{镜像术}，但不同之处在于：每当一名敌人摧毁其中一个影像时，掷骰 [[/r 1d4]]{1d4} 以确定该影像在被摧毁时是什么颜色。攻击者承受对应的效果。

  1. 红色 @Damage[5[fire]] 火伤害 和 @Damage[5[mental]] 精神伤害。
  2. 橙色 @Damage[5[acid]] 酸伤害 和 @Damage[5[mental]] 精神伤害。
  3. 黄色 @Damage[5[electricity]] 电击伤害 和 @Damage[5[mental]] 精神伤害。
  4. 绿色 @Damage[5[poison]] 毒素伤害 和 @Damage[5[mental]] 精神伤害，此外其获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 1}。

You call forth three illusory images of yourself, and each of the four of you takes on a different color, your colors all shifting each time someone attacks you. This has the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.j8vIoIEWElvpwkcI]{Mirror Image}, except that whenever a foe destroys one of the images, roll [[/r 1d4]]{1d4} to see which color the image was when it was destroyed. The attacker takes the corresponding effect.

  1. Red @Damage[5[fire]] damage and @Damage[5[mental]] damage.
  2. Orange @Damage[5[acid]] damage and @Damage[5[mental]] damage.
  3. Yellow @Damage[5[electricity]] damage and @Damage[5[mental]] damage.
  4. Green @Damage[5[poison]] damage and @Damage[5[mental]] damage, plus it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Hallucinatory Terrain.name: 幻觉地形 Hallucinatory Terrain
Hallucinatory Terrain.description:
你创造一个幻象，使自然地形看起来、听起来、摸起来并闻起来像另一种地形。这不会伪装区域内的任何建筑或生物。任何触碰该幻象或使用“寻找”动作检视它的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻象。

强化（5环） 你的影像也可以伪装建筑或创造虚幻的建筑（但仍不会伪装生物）。

You create an illusion that causes natural terrain to look, sound, feel, and smell like a different kind of terrain. This doesn't disguise any structures or creatures in the area. Any creature that touches the illusion or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (5th) Your image can also disguise structures or create illusory structures (but still doesn't disguise creatures).

Illusory Scene.name: 幻景 Illusory Scene
Illusory Scene.description:
你构筑一个想象场景，其中包含至多10个彼此独立的生物或物体，体型可各不相同，但它们都必须位于该法术的区域内。这些元素会产生恰当的声音与气味，并且在接触时触感逼真。幻觉场景的元素无法说话。与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.f8SBoXiXQjlCKqly]{Illusory Creature}法术不同，你场景中的生物缺乏战斗能力与数据。你的场景不包含对其周围环境的改变，不过你可以将该场景置于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HBJPsonQnWcC3qdX]{Hallucinatory Terrain}法术的幻觉环境之中。

当你创造该场景时，你可以选择让它保持静止，或依照一段程序运作。尽管静态场景是固定不动的，它仍包含基础的自然移动。例如，风吹过一张幻觉纸张会使其沙沙作响。程序最长可达1分钟，结束后会重复。例如，你可以创造两个兽人互相战斗的场景，而每次重复时战斗都会以相同方式进行。若你创造一个循环，两个战士会在场景开始与结束时处于相同位置，但你可以润饰该程序，使人难以分辨循环何时结束、何时开始。任何观察该场景超过几分钟的人几乎总会注意到它在循环。你在创造幻觉之后无法更改该程序。

任何接触图像任意部分的生物，或使用“搜索”动作检查它的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻觉。若他们与幻觉的某一部分进行交互，他们只会识破该部分。只有在大成功或大失败时，他们才会识破整个场景。

升阶（6环）你场景中的生物或物体可以说话。你在创造程序时，必须为每个角色说出其特定台词。该法术会为每个角色伪装你的声音。

升阶（8环）同6环版本，且持续时间为无限。

You form an imaginary scene that includes up to 10 discrete creatures or objects of various sizes, all of which must be within the spell's area. These elements generate appropriate sounds and smells, and they feel right to the touch. Elements of an illusory scene are incapable of speech. Unlike with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.f8SBoXiXQjlCKqly]{Illusory Creature} spell, creatures in your scene lack combat abilities and statistics. Your scene doesn't include changes to the environment around it, though you can place your scene within the illusory environment of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HBJPsonQnWcC3qdX]{Hallucinatory Terrain} spell.

When you create the scene, you can choose to have it be static or follow a program. Though a static scene is stationary, it includes basic natural movement. For example, wind blowing on an illusory piece of paper would rustle it. A program can be up to 1 minute long and repeats when finished. For instance, you could create a scene of two orcs fighting each other, and the fight would go the same way for each repetition. If you create a loop, the two fighters end up in the same place at the start of the scene and at the end of it, but you can smooth the program so it's hard to tell when the loop ends and begins. Anyone observing the scene for more than a few minutes almost always notices it looping. You're unable to alter the program after you create the illusion.

Any creature that touches any part of the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion. If they interact with a portion of the illusion, they disbelieve only that portion. They disbelieve the entire scene only on a critical success.

Heightened (6th) Creatures or objects in your scene can speak. You must speak the specific lines for each actor when creating your program. The spell disguises your voice for each actor.

Heightened (8th) As the 6th-level version, and the duration is unlimited.

Veil.name: 面纱 Veil
Veil.description:
你将各个目标伪装成其他体型相同、且身高（相差不超过6英寸）与体重（相差不超过50磅）大致相近的生物。该伪装可以隐藏目标的身份，或让他们看起来像是另一种族裔，但其精确度不足以冒充特定个体。此法术不会改变声音、嗅觉或举止。你为每个目标选择其伪装；例如，你可以让一个目标看起来像矮人，另一个看起来像精灵。施放 veil 在“冒充”动作的用途上视为建立了一个伪装。它使目标能够忽略因伪装成差异较大的生物而可能受到的任何环境减值，并使目标在进行用于防止他人看穿其伪装的欺瞒检定时获得+4状态加值，且即使未受训也将其等级加入其中。你可以解消这些伪装中的任意一个或全部。

升阶（5环） 该法术也会伪装目标的声音与嗅觉；它获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）。

升阶（7环） 目标可以呈现为任意同体型的生物，甚至是特定个体。你必须见过某个个体才能复现其外貌。该法术也会伪装目标的声音与嗅觉；它获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）。

You disguise the targets as other creatures of the same body shape and roughly similar height (within 6 inches) and weight (within 50 pounds). The disguise can hide the targets' identities or let them appear to be of another ancestry, but it's not precise enough to impersonate specific individuals. The spell doesn't change voice, scent, or mannerisms. You choose the disguise for each target; for example, you could make one target appear to be a dwarf and another an elf. Casting veil counts as setting up a disguise for the purpose of the Impersonate action. It allows the target to ignore any circumstance penalties they might take for being disguised as dissimilar creatures, and it gives the targets a +4 status bonus to Deception checks to prevent others from seeing through their disguises, and add their level even if untrained. You can Dismiss any or all of these disguises.

Heightened (5th) The spell also disguises the targets' voices and scents; it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

Heightened (7th) The targets can appear as any creature of the same size, even specific individuals. You must have seen an individual to reproduce their appearance. The spell also disguises the targets' voices and scents; it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

Phantom Crowd.name: 魅影人群 Phantom Crowd
Phantom Crowd.description:
一群与该地区相称、紧密挤作一团的人形生物出现，面向你，并对你说的任何话都大声赞同。触碰人群成员的生物，或以寻觅动作检查人群的生物，可以尝试识破你的幻术。对任何尚未识破该幻术的人而言，人群属于困难地形。

当你花费1个或更多动作来施放一个咏唱法术，或执行一个包含表演检定的行动时，你也可以将维持该法术作为该动作的一部分。

强化（+1） 人群在射程内额外占据一个10尺方格。这个额外方格不需要与该法术创造的任何其他方格相邻。它可以重叠，但在重叠的方格中不会产生额外效果。

A tightly packed crowd of humanoids appropriate to the area appear, facing you and agreeing loudly with anything you say. A creature that touches a member of the crowd or makes a Seek action to examine the crowd can attempt to disbelieve your illusion. The crowd is difficult terrain for anyone who hasn't disbelieved the illusion.

When you spend 1 or more actions to cast a composition spell or to perform an activity that includes a Performance check, you can also Sustain this Spell as part of that action.

Heightened (+1) The crowd occupies an additional 10-foot square in range. The additional square doesn't need to be adjacent to any other square created by the spell. It can overlap, but there's no additional effect in the overlapped squares.

Phantasmal Killer.name: 幻影杀手 Phantasmal Killer
Phantasmal Killer.description:
你为目标创造出其所能想象的最可怖生物的幻影。只有该法术的目标能看见这个杀手，不过你能看见这幻象在疾驰向前发动攻击时的模糊轮廓。杀手的效果取决于目标的意志豁免结果。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到4d6点精神伤害，并陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 1}。

失败 目标受到8d6点精神伤害，并陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 2}。

大失败 目标恐惧到可能会死去。它必须尝试一次强韧豁免；若目标失败，则其死亡。若强韧豁免成功，目标受到12d6点精神伤害，直到其下个回合结束前陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃离}，并陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 4}。此效果具有失能（特征）。

升阶（+1） 在失败时伤害增加2d6，在大失败时伤害增加3d6。

You create a phantasmal image of the most fearsome creature imaginable to the target. Only the spell's target can see the killer, though you can see the vague shape of the illusion as it races forth to attack. The effect of the killer is based on the outcome of the target's Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes 4d6 mental damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target takes 8d6 mental damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target is so afraid it might die. It must attempt a Fortitude save; if the target fails, it dies. On a successful Fortitude save, the target takes 12d6 mental damage, is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} until the end of its next turn, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4}. This effect has the incapacitation trait.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6 on a failure and by 3d6 on a critical failure.

Exaggerate Weakness.name: 夸大弱点 Exaggerate Weakness
Exaggerate Weakness.description:
触发 朱红巨龙在对抗敌人效果的豁免中大失败，或敌人对朱红巨龙造成重击

效果 朱红巨龙顺势将自己的失败演得更夸张，强调自己有多么无助与败北，并可能让敌人因觉得这头巨龙可怜而发笑，从而分心。触发的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:33] 意志豁免，具有以下效果。之后，该敌人会在24小时内暂时免疫“夸大弱点”。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该敌人分心，在1轮内，其察觉检定与意志豁免承受–1状态减值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.gMDEdKAvFv85yXiJ]{效果：夸大弱点}

失败 该敌人被笑意淹没，并在1轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}。

大失败 该敌人沉浸在对巨龙凄惨失败的笑意中，在1轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

Trigger The vermilion dragon critically fails a saving throw against a foe's effect or a foe critically hits the vermilion dragon

Effect The vermilion dragon leans into its failure, playing up how helpless and defeated they are and potentially distracting their foe with their amusement at the dragon's piteousness. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:33] save with the following effects. Afterwards, the foe is temporarily immune to Exaggerate Weakness for 24 hours.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The foe is distracted, taking a –1 status penalty on Perception checks and Will saves for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.gMDEdKAvFv85yXiJ]{Effect: Exaggerate Weakness}

Failure The foe is overcome with amusement and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The foe is lost in its amusement at the dragon's miserable failure and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Inscrutable.name: 高深莫测 Inscrutable
Inscrutable.description:
一条朱红巨龙会自动尝试反制任何会迫使巨龙说出真相或判定其何时在说谎的效果，使用其 @Check[type:deception] 调整值进行反制检定，反制等级为9。反制检定成功使其可以无视该效果，而非将其完全移除

A vermilion dragon automatically tries to counteract any effects that would force the dragon to tell the truth or determine when they are lying, using its @Check[type:deception] modifier for the counteract check, with a counteract level of 9. Success on the counteract check allows them to ignore the effect, rather than removing it entirely

Mask of Terror.name: 恐惧面具 Mask of Terror
Mask of Terror.description:
目标看起来像是一只残忍可怖的生物。该效果对每位观察者而言都各不相同，因此人类观看目标时可能会看到一只长着滴血獠牙的恶魔，但恶魔观察目标时可能会看到一张发光的天使面容。当任何生物试图对目标进行敌对动作时，该生物必须尝试一次意志豁免。随后它会暂时免疫，直到其下个回合结束。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物在使用其动作之前成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大成功或大失败 该生物成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}，且其动作失败并被浪费。

升阶（8环） 你可以以最多5个生物为目标。若某生物使用一个会同时影响多个目标的敌对动作或反应动作（），则它只需针对恐惧面具尝试一次豁免。

The target appears to be a gruesome and terrifying creature. The effect is unique to each observer, so a human viewing the target might see a demon with bloody fangs, but a demon observing the target might see a glowing angelic visage. When any creature attempts a hostile action against the target, the creature must attempt a Will save. It is then temporarily immune until the end of its next turn.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} before using its action.

Critical Failure The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}, and its action fails and is wasted.
