Heightened (8th) You can target up to 5 creatures. If a creature uses a hostile action or reaction that affects multiple targets simultaneously, it needs to attempt only one save against mask of terror.

Phantom Prison.name: 魅影牢狱 Phantom Prison
Phantom Prison.description:
你用无法移动的幻象墙完全包围一个大型或更小的生物，将其困在一个无法逃脱的虚假牢狱中。其他生物既看不见也感觉不到这些墙，而目标也无法看见幻象墙外的任何东西。该法术施放时、目标每次试图与墙进行交互或试图逃离墙时，以及每当墙外的事物影响到目标时，目标都可以尝试一次意志豁免。若成功，则其识破该幻象且法术结束。

升阶（8环） 你最多可以选择5个目标。

You completely surround a Large or smaller creature in immobile illusory walls, trapping it inside a false prison it can't escape. No other creatures see or feel these walls, and the target can't see anything outside of the illusory walls. The target can attempt a Will save when the spell is cast, each time it attempts to interact with or escape the walls, and each time something from outside the walls affects the target. On a success, it disbelieves the illusion and the spell ends.

Heightened (8th) You can target up to 5 creatures.

Suggestion.name: 建议 Suggestion
Suggestion.description:
你甜言蜜语的话语令生物难以抗拒。你向目标提出一项行动建议，该建议必须以对目标而言看似合乎逻辑的行动方案来表述，并且不能是自我毁灭性的，也不能明显违背目标的自身利益。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你试图控制它。

成功 目标不受影响，并认为你只是正常在与其交谈，并未对其施放法术。

失败 目标立刻遵从你的建议。该法术的持续时间为1分钟，或直到目标完成一个有限的建议，或该建议变得自我毁灭性，或出现其他明显的负面效果为止。

大失败 同失败，但基础持续时间为1小时。

升阶（8环） 你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

Your honeyed words are difficult for creatures to resist. You suggest a course of action to the target, which must be phrased in such a way as to seem like a logical course of action to the target and can't be self-destructive or obviously against the target's self-interest. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and knows you tried to control it.

Success The target is unaffected and thinks you were talking to them normally, not casting a spell on them.

Failure The target immediately follows your suggestion. The spell has a duration of 1 minute, or until the target has completed a finite suggestion or the suggestion becomes self-destructive or has other obvious negative effects.

Critical Failure As failure, but the base duration is 1 hour.

Heightened (8th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Mirror Malefactors.name: 镜中恶徒 Mirror Malefactors
Mirror Malefactors.description:
你用一圈闪烁的幻象镜子完全包围一个大型或更小的生物；这圈镜子会随着其移动而跟随，即使该生物移动到法术射程之外也是如此。这些镜子会映出目标的倒影，但如果目标没有倒影（例如具有吸血鬼（特征）者），则不受mirror malefactors影响。只要目标被镜子包围，它就会处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}，且无法降低其恐惧值。

当你施放法术时，倒影从镜子中跃出并攻击目标，造成7d8心灵伤害，进行一次基础意志豁免。在后续回合中，你在该回合第一次维持该法术时，此效果会再次发生。若目标在对抗mirror malefactors所进行的任何意志豁免中成功，则这些幻象镜子会粉碎，法术结束。

升阶（+1） 初始效果与后续回合的伤害各增加1d8。

You completely surround a Large or smaller creature in a shimmering ring of illusory mirrors that follows it as it moves, even when the creature moves outside the range of the spell. These mirrors reflect the target, though if the target has no reflection, like a vampire, it's unaffected by mirror malefactors. As long as the target is surrounded by mirrors, it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}, and it can't reduce its frightened value.

When you Cast the Spell, the reflections leap from the mirrors and attack the target, dealing 7d8 mental damage with a basic Will save. On subsequent turns, this effect repeats the first time you Sustain the spell that turn. If the target succeeds at any Will save it attempts against mirror malefactors, the illusory mirrors shatter and the spell ends.

Heightened (+1) The damage for both the initial effect and on subsequent turns increases by 1d8.

Phantasmal Calamity.name: 幻影灾厄 Phantasmal Calamity
Phantasmal Calamity.description:
末日毁灭的景象充斥区域内每个生物的心智。该景象造成11d6心智伤害（基础意志豁免）。在大失败时，该生物还必须在一次反射豁免中成功，否则会相信自己被困住了（卡在裂隙中、漂泊于海上，或与其景象相符的其他命运）。若第二次豁免失败，它还会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑（状态）}1分钟。它可以在自己每个回合结束时尝试一次新的意志豁免，并在成功时识破该幻觉并从震慑（状态）中恢复。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加2d6。

A vision of apocalyptic destruction fills the mind of each creature in the area. The vision deals 11d6 mental damage (basic Will save). On a critical failure, the creature must also succeed at a Reflex save or believe it's trapped (stuck in a fissure, adrift at sea, or some other fate in keeping with its vision). If it fails the second save, it's also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} for 1 minute. It can attempt a new Will save at the end of each of its turns, and on a success, it disbelieves the illusion and recovers from the Stunned condition.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Project Image.name: 项目图像 Project Image
Project Image.description:
你投射出一个自身的幻象影像。你必须待在影像的射程内，并且若在任何时刻你无法看见该影像，则法术结束。每当你施放一个法术（除了其区域为放射的法术之外），你可以使该法术效果从你自己或影像处发源。由于该影像是幻术，它无法从法术中受益，尽管法术的视觉显现仍会出现。该影像具有与你相同的AC与豁免。若它被一次攻击命中或一次豁免失败，则法术结束。

升阶（+2） 你能够维持法术的最大持续时间提高至10分钟。

You project an illusory image of yourself. You must stay within range of the image, and if at any point you can't see the image, the spell ends. Whenever you Cast a Spell other than one whose area is an emanation, you can cause the spell effect to originate from either yourself or the image. Because the image is an illusion, it can't benefit from spells, though visual manifestations of the spell appear. The image has the same AC and saves as you. If it is hit by an attack or fails a save, the spell ends.

Heightened (+2) The maximum duration you can Sustain the Spell increases to 10 minutes.

Vibrant Pattern.name: 绚丽图案 Vibrant Pattern
Vibrant Pattern.description:
你创造出一个光的图样，其强度脉动起伏。生物在该图样内时处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}。此外，若生物在你施放时位于图样内、进入图样、在图样内结束其回合，或对图样使用“搜索”或交互动作，则必须尝试一次意志豁免。当前已被该图样 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲（状态）} 的生物不必再尝试新的豁免。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物被该图样目盲。若其离开图样，则它可在其每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免以从目盲（状态）中恢复，最大持续时间为1分钟。

大失败 该生物目盲1分钟。

You create a pattern of lights that pulses with intensity. Creatures are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} while inside the pattern. In addition, a creature must attempt a Will saving throw if it's inside the pattern when you cast it, enters the pattern, ends its turn within the pattern, or uses a Seek or Interact action on the pattern. A creature currently @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} by the pattern doesn't need to attempt new saving throws.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is Blinded by the pattern. If it exits the pattern, it can attempt a new save to recover from the Blinded condition at the end of each of its turns, to a maximum duration of 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature is Blinded for 1 minute.

Fantastical Tale.name: 奇幻故事 Fantastical Tale
Fantastical Tale.description:
朱红巨龙激情洋溢地讲述了一个关于其敌人的夸张且令人难以置信的故事，尽管如此仍然很难识破。60尺内的所有生物必须在一次 @Check[type:will|dc:44] 意志豁免中成功，否则将因试图调和故事与现实而陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑} 状态1分钟。大失败时，困惑的生物在受到伤害以结束该状态时不会进行纯骰检定。之后，目标在24小时内暂时免疫“奇幻故事”。

The vermilion dragon spins an over-the-top and unbelievable tale about their foes with so much passion it's nonetheless hard to disbelieve. All creatures with 60 feet must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:44] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 minute as they attempt to reconcile the story with their reality. On a critical failure, a confused creature doesn't receive a flat check when damaged to end the condition. Afterwards, the targets are temporarily immune to Fantastical Tale for 24 hours.

Ancient Vermilion Dragon (Spellcaster).publicNotes:
朱红巨龙是妙不可言的讲故事高手，比起真相，他们更在意故事本身与讲述技艺。他们以夸夸其谈与撒谎成名，总觉得任何故事或事件都有改进空间——那样才更有趣！许多朱红巨龙都是极其老练的讲述者与编造者，以至于他们那些离奇的传说与荒唐的谎言会显得诡异地引人入胜。许多人都会相信他们，即便现实与更符合事实的记载明明白白地与朱红巨龙的故事相矛盾。即使被当面指出他们的谎言、前后矛盾与大量剧情漏洞，大多数朱红巨龙也会顺势接招，把指控当作新的素材即兴发挥，然后继续编造那些荒诞离谱的天方夜谭。

朱红巨龙热爱收集各种不同的逸闻故事，并将其编织成广为流传、足以跨越数百年乃至数千年的流行传奇。朱红巨龙的故事无论多么夸张、看似多么捏造，总会在虚构之中保留一条真相的核心脉络。找出这条隐藏的真相可能是一项重大挑战——尤其是随着时代的推移，原始故事会变得越来越宏大，最终在层层谎言之中迷失无踪。有些学者建议听众忽略朱红巨龙故事中一切带描述性的内容；也有人鼓励读者将朱红巨龙的故事拆解为最基础的情节要点，把其余内容一概无视。朱红巨龙认为这荒谬至极，因为这种狭隘的审查抹杀了故事的意义——朱红巨龙的故事并非关乎真相，而是关乎娱乐。说到底，讲天方夜谭很有趣，对讲述者与听众都是如此。重复令人厌倦，而乏味的故事注定走向消亡。对朱红巨龙而言，没有什么比自己的故事或事迹被遗忘更糟糕。

朱红巨龙最喜欢的故事几乎总是围绕他们自己展开。毕竟他们喧嚣张扬、骄傲自负，又以爱吹嘘而闻名，因此他们最乐于编织自己冒险经历、英勇事迹与壮举的故事也就不足为奇。为了收集更多关于自身功业的故事，同时也为了刺激与奖励，朱红巨龙常常扮演野心勃勃的亡命之徒，沉迷于危险与未知带来的战栗快感。然而，就算是最自我中心的朱红巨龙也愿意承认：由他们那些疯狂胡闹衍生出的史诗成就，还可以再多些润色。事实上，在他们的故事收藏中，他们往往就是最具传奇色彩、也最被夸大的英雄。

尽管朱红巨龙确实相对自我中心，但他们并不总把自己塑造成自家夸张故事的核心。他们也喜欢讲述各种添油加醋的故事：关于他们认识或见过的人、关于他们目睹或观察到的事件，以及关于更广阔世界的消息。他们通常更偏好分享自己参与过或亲眼见证过的内容，而不是与自身经历完全无关、遥不可及的故事——尽管他们也很爱听那些远在天边、陌生奇异的故事！有时，当某个激昂的故事被反复讲述后，朱红巨龙会觉得自己仿佛亲历过一般，于是便选择把这故事据为己有——当然，还要加上些“急需”的改进。

朱红巨龙的胡闹行径已经够狂野了，而他们的故事却不知为何更加狂野。

潘瑟拉维克斯

潘瑟拉维克斯，“见证者”，作为朱红巨龙显得颇为古怪，因为她从不把自己塑造成自身故事里的英雄。相反，她只讲述那些她声称亲眼见证过的重要事件。她对时事与历史的版本极具煽动性与说服力，以至于它们会迅速取代真相，即便是在事件发生的地区也是如此。她说的就是真相——哪怕显然并非如此。

热切的受骗者

朱红巨龙是天赋异禀的幻术师，编织奇幻幻象如同呼吸与讲故事一样轻松。照理说，这应当让他们在辨识幻象方面表现出色，但事实恰恰相反。朱红巨龙太享受体验幻象、欣赏其艺术性，以至于他们宁愿被蒙骗，也不愿识破。

亡命狂飙的危险

朱红巨龙追逐刺激、嗜好肾上腺素；尽管他们喜欢沉醉其中的观众，他们却几乎不在乎组成这些观众的个体的生命。因此，他们的胡闹行径经常给附近的聚居地带来麻烦。为暴怒的怪物、出丑的军队与环境性的灾变付出价格的总是人们——从来不是朱红巨龙。

Vermilion dragons are fabulous storytellers who care more for the tale and their craft than they do for the truth. They're notorious exaggerators and liars who always believe a story or event has room for improvement—it's far more entertaining that way! Many vermilion dragons are such expert storytellers and confabulators that their outlandish tales and outrageous lies can seem strangely compelling. Many people believe them, even when reality and more factual accounts clearly contradict the vermilion dragon's stories. When called out on their lies, contradictions, and numerous plot holes, most vermilion dragons roll with the accusations, riff off them, and just keep making up extraordinarily tall tales.

Vermilion dragons adore collecting all sorts of different tales and stories and spinning them into popular legends that will endure across centuries and millennia. A vermilion dragon's stories, no matter how outrageous and fabricated they might seem, always maintain a central core of truth amid the fiction. Finding this hidden truth can be a significant challenge—particularly as the march of time passes and the original tale becomes grander and grander, lost amid the lies that surround it. Some scholars recommend that listeners ignore everything descriptive contained in a vermilion dragon's tale, while others encourage the reader to break a vermilion dragon's tale down to its most basic plot points and ignore everything else in the story. Vermilion dragons believe this is absurd, for such close-minded censorship removes the point of their stories—a vermilion dragon's stories aren't about truth but about entertainment. Put simply, telling tall tales is fun, both for the teller and the audience. Repetition is boring, and a boring tale is primed for extinction. To a vermilion dragon, nothing is worse than having one's stories or deeds forgotten.

A vermilion dragon's favorite stories nearly always revolve around themselves. After all, they're boisterous, proud, and notorious braggarts, so it should come as no surprise that they most enjoy weaving tales of their own adventures, daring deeds, and exploits. Both for the purpose of collecting more stories of their exploits and for the excitement and rewards, vermilion dragons often play the part of ambitious daredevils who love the thrill of danger and the unknown. Yet, even the most egoistic vermilion dragon is willing to admit that the epic accomplishments arising from their own wild antics could use some extra embellishment. In fact, they're often the most legendary and exaggerated heroes in their storytelling catalog.

Although vermilion dragons are admittedly relatively self-centered, they don't always cast themselves as the central core of their own exaggerated tales. They also enjoy telling all sorts of embellished stories about people they know or have met, events they've seen or observed, and news of the wider world around them. They usually prefer to share something they had a hand in or witnessed as opposed to a completely distant tale far outside their experience—although they love listening to such far-flung and unfamiliar stories! Sometimes, after hearing a rousing tale told repeatedly, a vermilion dragon has experienced it enough that they feel they were practically there, and they then choose to adopt the tale as their own—complete with some much- needed improvements.

As wild as the antics of a vermilion dragon are, their stories are somehow even wilder.

Pentheravix

Pentheravix, "the Witness," is odd for a vermilion dragon since she never casts herself as the hero of her own tales. Instead, she solely tells tales of important events she claims to have witnessed. So compelling are her versions of current events and history that they quickly supplant the truth, even in regions where the events occurred. Her word is truth—even when it clearly isn't.

Eager Dupes

Vermilion dragons are talented illusionists who weave fantastical illusions as easily as they breathe and spin tales. While this should make them excellent at identifying illusions, this couldn't be further from the truth. Vermilion dragons so enjoy experiencing illusions and admiring their artistry that they'd rather be duped than disbelieve.

The Dangers Of Daredevilry

Vermilion dragons are thrill-seeking adrenaline junkies, and while they enjoy an enthralled audience, they care little for the lives of the individuals who compose such audiences. Thus, their antics regularly cause trouble for nearby settlements. It's people who pay the price for riled-up monsters, embarrassed armies, and environmental cataclysms—never the vermilion dragon.
Ancient Vermilion Dragon (Spellcaster).prototypeToken: 远古朱红巨龙 Ancient Vermilion Dragon

Orpok Cutpurse.name: 奥尔波克割包贼 Orpok Cutpurse
Orpok Cutpurse.tokenName: 奥尔波克扒手 Orpok Cutpurse
Orpok Cutpurse.prototypeToken: 奥尔波克扒手 Orpok Cutpurse

Kragrak Fighter.name: 克拉格拉克 战士 Kragrak Fighter
Kragrak Fighter.tokenName: 克拉格拉克 战士 Kragrak Fighter
Kragrak Fighter.prototypeToken: 克拉格拉克 战士 Kragrak Fighter

Manual Dexterity.name: 手部敏捷 Manual Dexterity
Manual Dexterity.description:
它最多可以将其两条肢体当作手来使用，以执行操作动作。

It can use up to two of its limbs as if they were hands to use manipulate actions.

Plant Form.name: 植物形态 Plant Form
Plant Form.description:
你的植物魔宠可以以单动作改变形态，变形为一种与魔宠天性大致相似类型的超小型植物。除此之外，它使用树形术的效果。你必须拥有具有植物（特征）的魔宠，例如莱西，才能选择此能力。

Your plant familiar can change shape as a single action, transforming into a Tiny plant of a type roughly similar to the familiar's nature. This otherwise uses the effects of tree shape. You must have a familiar with the plant trait, such as a leshy, to select this ability.

Speech.name: 言语 Speech
Speech.description:
它理解并能说一种你所知的语言。

It understands and speaks a language you know.

Resistance (Fire).name: 抗力（火） Resistance (Fire)
Resistance (Fire).description:
从以下选项中选择两项：酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火、毒素或音波。你的魔宠获得对所选伤害类型的抗力，数值等于你等级的一半。

Choose two of the following: acid, cold, electricity, fire, poison, or sonic. Your familiar gains resistance equal to half your level against the chosen damage types.

Greater Resistance.name: 强效抗力 Greater Resistance
Greater Resistance.description:
你的魔宠将其从抗力魔宠能力获得的抗力提升至3 + 你等级的一半。你的魔宠必须具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.familiar-abilities.Item.FcQQLMAJMgOLjnSv]{抗力}能力才能选择此项。

Your familiar increases the resistance it gains from its resistance familiar ability to 3 + half your level. Your familiar must have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.familiar-abilities.Item.FcQQLMAJMgOLjnSv]{Resistance} ability to select this.

Self-Immolate.name: 自焚 Self-Immolate
Self-Immolate.description:
频率 每小时一次

效果 你的野火莱希魔宠可以让自身燃烧的余烬猛然爆燃，在其所站立之处制造一股浓厚的不透明烟雾，形成一个 @Template[type:burst|distance:5]。野火莱希失去4点生命值。所有位于受影响区域内的生物均为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，且所有其他生物对它们而言也为隐蔽。该烟雾持续1分钟，或直到被强风吹散。

Frequency Once per hour

Effect Your wildfire leshy familiar can flare up its own burning embers, creating a thick plume of opaque smoke where it stands in a @Template[type:burst|distance:5]. The wildfire leshy loses 4 Hit Points. All creatures within the affected area are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, and all other creatures are concealed to them. The smoke persists for 1 minute or until it is dispersed by a strong wind.

Smoke Vision.name: 烟雾 视野 Smoke Vision
Smoke Vision.description:
烟雾不会妨碍野火莱西的视野；它无视来自烟雾的隐蔽。

Smoke doesn't impair a wildfire leshy's vision; it ignores concealment from smoke.

Water Weakness.name: 水 弱点 Water Weakness
Water Weakness.description:
你的野火莱西魔宠具有等同于你等级的水（特征）弱点。除了如常对带有水（特征）的伤害效果生效外，当你的野火莱西暴露于不造成伤害的水效果时，这个弱点也会生效，例如它被水浇湿时（无论是通过法术还是其他效果，例如把一桶水倒在它身上或被雨淋到）。你可以额外花费一个魔宠能力（可以永久花费，或按每日花费）来加固你的野火莱西并使其防水，从而移除此弱点。

Your wildfire leshy familiar has weakness to water equal to your level. In addition to damaging effects with the water trait, as normal, the weakness applies when your wildfire leshy is exposed to a nondamaging water effect, such as when it's doused with water (either through a spell or some other effect, such as pouring a bucket of water over it or being caught in the rain). You can spend an additional familiar ability, either permanently or on a per-day basis, to reinforce your wildfire leshy and waterproof it, removing this weakness.

Young Vermilion Dragon (Spellcaster).name: 幼年朱红巨龙（施法者） Young Vermilion Dragon (Spellcaster)
Young Vermilion Dragon (Spellcaster).tokenName: 幼年朱红巨龙 Young Vermilion Dragon

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Effortless Linguist.name: 轻松语言学家 Effortless Linguist
Effortless Linguist.description:
一条朱红色巨龙可以说并理解他们在聆听某种语言1分钟后听到的任何语言。这些语言会在他们的心智中于24小时后消退

A vermilion dragon can speak and understand any language they hear spoken after listening to the language for 1 minute. These languages fade from their mind after 24 hours

Exaggerate Strength.name: 夸大力量 Exaggerate Strength
Exaggerate Strength.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 朱红巨龙即将再次尝试一次对抗一个失能效果的豁免

效果 朱红巨龙膨胀自己的自负，把自己塑造成一个比实际更有能耐的夸张传说版本。虽然这不会让它更强大，但该效果足以使失能魔法受到困扰。触发的失能效果将朱红巨龙视为比实际高2个等级。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger The vermilion dragon is about to attempt a saving throw again an incapacitation effect

Effect The vermilion dragon inflates their own ego, building themself up into a tall tale version of themself more capable than they actually are. While this doesn't make them more powerful, the effect is enough to bedevil incapacitating magic. The triggering incapacitation effect treats the vermilion dragon as if they were two levels higher.

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Illusory Creature.name: 幻象生物 Illusory Creature
Illusory Creature.description:
你创造一个大型或更小的生物的幻象影像。它会产生相应的声音与气味，并且在接触时感觉逼真。如果你与影像之间的距离曾经超过500尺，该法术结束。

该影像无法说话，但你可以用你的动作通过该生物说话，法术会适当地将你的声音伪装。你可能需要进行一次欺瞒或表演检定来模仿该生物，由GM决定。如果你试图模仿某个特定人物并与认识那个人的人互动，这尤其常见。

在战斗中，该幻觉每回合可以使用2个动作，你在维持法术时它会使用这些动作。它的攻击掷骰使用你的法术攻击掷骰，它的AC使用你的法术DC。它的豁免调整值等于你的法术DC - 10。它足够真实，能够夹击其他生物。如果影像被一次攻击命中或未通过一次豁免，该法术结束。

该幻觉可以通过让目标相信幻觉的攻击是真实的来造成伤害，但除此之外它无法直接影响物理世界。若该幻象生物以一次打击命中，目标受到等同于1d4加上你的施法能力调整值的精神伤害。这是一个精神效果。该幻觉的打击为非致命。若伤害与怪物的影像不相符——例如，一个幻象大型巨龙只造成5点伤害——GM可能允许目标立即尝试一次察觉检定以识破该法术。任何相关的抗力与弱点都会在目标认为它们适用时生效，由GM裁定。例如，若该幻觉挥舞一把战锤并攻击一个对钝击伤害有抗力的生物，该生物将受到更少的精神伤害。然而，幻象伤害不会使再生失效，也不会触发其他需要特定伤害类型的效果。GM应记录该幻觉造成的幻象伤害。

任何接触该影像的生物，或使用搜索动作来检查它的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻觉。当一个生物识破该幻觉时，它从之前因此受到的伤害中恢复一半（若有），并且不再从该幻觉受到任何进一步伤害。

强化（+1） 影像的打击伤害增加1d4，并且你能够创造的生物最大体型提高一级（最大至超巨型）。

You create an illusory image of a Large or smaller creature. It generates the appropriate sounds, smells, and feels believable to the touch. If you and the image are ever farther than 500 feet apart, the spell ends.

The image can't speak, but you can use your actions to speak through the creature, with the spell disguising your voice as appropriate. You might need to attempt a Deception or Performance check to mimic the creature, as determined by the GM. This is especially likely if you're trying to imitate a specific person and engage with someone that person knows.

In combat, the illusion can use 2 actions per turn, which it uses when you Sustain the Spell. It uses your spell attack roll for attack rolls and your spell DC for its AC. Its saving throw modifiers are equal to your spell DC - 10. It is substantial enough that it can flank other creatures. If the image is hit by an attack or fails a save, the spell ends.

The illusion can cause damage by making the target believe the illusion's attacks are real, but it cannot otherwise directly affect the physical world. If the illusory creature hits with a Strike, the target takes mental damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. This is a mental effect. The illusion's Strikes are nonlethal. If the damage doesn't correspond to the image of the monster-for example, if an illusory Large dragon deals only 5 damage-the GM might allow the target to attempt an immediate Perception check to disbelieve the spell. Any relevant resistances and weaknesses apply if the target thinks they do, as judged by the GM. For example, if the illusion wields a warhammer and attacks a creature resistant to bludgeoning damage, the creature would take less mental damage. However, illusory damage does not deactivate regeneration or trigger other effects that require a certain damage type. The GM should track illusory damage dealt by the illusion.

Any creature that touches the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion. When a creature disbelieves the illusion, it recovers from half the damage it had taken from it (if any) and doesn't take any further damage from it.

Heightened (+1) The damage of the image's Strikes increases by 1d4, and the maximum size of creature you can create increases by one (to a maximum of Gargantuan).

Illusory Disguise.name: 幻象伪装 Illusory Disguise
Illusory Disguise.description:
你创造一个幻象，使你看起来像另一种体型相同的生物，并且身高（相差不超过6英寸）与体重（相差不超过50磅）与你自己大致相近。该伪装通常足以隐藏你的身份，但不足以冒充某个特定个体。该法术不会改变你的声音、嗅觉或举止。你可以改变你的衣物与穿戴物品的外观，例如让你的护甲看起来像一件裙子。手持物品不受影响，而任何你移除的穿戴物品都会恢复其真实外观。

施放幻术伪装视同为进行一次伪装，用于以欺骗进行的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.action-macros.Macro.k5nW4jGyXD0Oq9LR]{冒充}；它无视你因将自己伪装成不同类生物而可能承受的任何环境减值；它使你在进行欺骗检定以防止他人看穿你的伪装时获得+4状态加值；并且即使你未受训，也要加上你的等级。你可以解消该法术。

升阶（2环） 该法术也会伪装你的声音与嗅觉，并获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）特性。

升阶（3环） 你可以看起来像任何体型相同的生物，甚至是某个特定个体。你必须见过某个个体才能采用其外观。该法术也会伪装你的声音与嗅觉，并获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）特性。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3Ktyd5F9lOPo4myk]{法术效果：幻术伪装}

You create an illusion that causes you to appear as another creature of the same body shape, and with roughly similar height (within 6 inches) and weight (within 50 pounds), as yourself. The disguise is typically good enough to hide your identity, but not to impersonate a specific individual. The spell doesn't change your voice, scent, or mannerisms. You can change the appearance of your clothing and worn items, such as making your armor look like a dress. Held items are unaffected, and any worn item you remove returns to its true appearance.

Casting illusory disguise counts as setting up a disguise for the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.action-macros.Macro.k5nW4jGyXD0Oq9LR]{Impersonate} use of Deception; it ignores any circumstance penalties you might take for disguising yourself as a dissimilar creature, it gives you a +4 status bonus to Deception checks to prevent others from seeing through your disguise, and you add your level even if you're untrained. You can Dismiss this spell.

Heightened (2nd) The spell also disguises your voice and scent, and it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

Heightened (3rd) You can appear as any creature of the same size, even a specific individual. You must have seen an individual to take on their appearance. The spell also disguises your voice and scent, and it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3Ktyd5F9lOPo4myk]{Spell Effect: Illusory Disguise}

Illusory Object.name: 幻象物体 Illusory Object
Illusory Object.description:
你创造一幅静止物体的幻象视觉影像。整个影像必须容纳于该法术的区域内。该物体看起来会自然地活动，但不会发出声音或产生气味。例如，水看起来会从一座幻象瀑布倾泻而下，但会是无声的。

任何生物只要接触该影像，或使用“搜索”动作检查它，均可尝试识破你的幻象。

升阶（2环） 你的影像会发出适当的声音、产生正常的气味，且触感正确。该法术获得听觉（特征）。持续时间增加至1小时。

升阶（5环） 如同2环版本，但持续时间为无限。

You create an illusory visual image of a stationary object. The entire image must fit within the spell's area. The object appears to animate naturally, but it doesn't make sounds or generate smells. For example, water would appear to pour down an illusory waterfall, but it would be silent.

Any creature that touches the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (2nd) Your image makes appropriate sounds, generates normal smells, and feels right to the touch. The spell gains the auditory trait. The duration increases to 1 hour.

Heightened (5th) As the 2nd-level version, but the duration is unlimited.

Ventriloquism.name: 腹语术 Ventriloquism
Ventriloquism.description:
每当你说话或用声音发出任何其他口头声音时，你可以让你的发声看起来像是从60尺内的其他地方传出，并且你可以在发声时自由改变该表面位置。任何听到该声音的生物都可以尝试识破你的幻觉。

升阶（2环） 该法术的持续时间增加至1小时，并且你还可以改变你声音的音调、质感和其他性相。在生物能够尝试识破你的幻觉之前，它必须主动尝试一次察觉检定，或以其他方式使用动作与该声音进行交互。

Whenever you speak or make any other sound vocally, you can make your vocalization seem to originate from somewhere else within 60 feet, and you can change that apparent location freely as you vocalize. Any creature that hears the sound can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (2nd) The spell's duration increases to 1 hour, and you can also change the tone, quality, and other aspects of your voice. Before a creature can attempt to disbelieve your illusion, it must actively attempt a Perception check or otherwise use actions to interact with the sound.

Charm.name: 魅惑 Charm
Charm.description:
对目标而言，你的话语如蜜般甜美，你的面容仿佛浸在朦胧的梦幻薄雾中。它必须尝试一次意志豁免；若你或你的盟友最近威胁过它或对它使用过敌对动作，则该豁免获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。若你对目标使用敌对动作，则该法术结束。当法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己曾被魅惑，除非它对你的友谊或你说服它采取的动作与它的预期相冲突；这意味着你可能通过世俗手段说服目标继续做你的朋友。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你试图魅惑它。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害效果而非魅惑，除非它辨识该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友好}。若它原本为友好，则变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于助人}。它不能对你使用敌对动作。

大失败 目标对你的态度变为乐于助人，并且它不能对你使用敌对动作。

升阶（4环） 持续时间延续至你下次进行每日准备时。

升阶（8环） 持续时间延续至你下次进行每日准备时，且你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Ghost Sound.name: 幽灵之声 Ghost Sound
Ghost Sound.description:
你创造一个简单声音的听觉幻象，其最大音量相当于四名正常人同时喊叫。声音从你在射程内指定的一个方格中发出。你无法创造可理解的词语或其他复杂的声音（例如音乐）。

升阶（3环） 射程增加至60英尺。

升阶（5环） 射程增加至120英尺。

You create an auditory illusion of simple sounds that has a maximum volume equal to four normal humans shouting. The sounds emanate from a square you designate within range. You can't create intelligible words or other intricate sounds (such as music).

Heightened (3rd) The range increases to 60 feet.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 120 feet.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
朱红巨龙以两种方式之一吐息。巨龙在 [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4轮} 内无法再次使用吐息武器。

  • 易燃香料（奥术，塑能，火）；巨龙在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30] 内打喷嚏喷出一团易燃香料云，造成 @Damage[10d6[fire]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:28|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,fire] 豁免）。在大失败时，香料进入其眼睛，使其暂时失明；该生物成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1轮。
  • 刺激性香料（奥术，塑能，毒素）；巨龙在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30] 内打喷嚏喷出一团刺激性香料云，造成 @Damage[10d6[poison]] 伤害（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:28|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,poison] 强韧 豁免）。在大失败时，香料钻入其鼻腔，以强烈的灼烧感将其淹没；该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

The vermilion dragon breathes in one of two ways. The dragon can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

  • Flammable Spice (arcane, evocation, fire); The dragon sneezes a cloud of flammable spice in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] that deals @Damage[10d6[fire]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:28|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,fire] save). On a critical failure, the spice gets in their eyes, temporarily blinding them; the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.
  • Irritating Spice (arcane, evocation, poison); The dragon sneezes a cloud of irritating spice in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] that deals @Damage[10d6[poison]] damage (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:28|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,poison] save). On a critical failure, the spice gets up their nose, overwhelming them with a powerful burning sensation; the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Arcane Prepared Spells.name: 奥术准备法术 Arcane Prepared Spells

Freedom of Movement.name: 行动自如 Freedom of Movement
Freedom of Movement.description:
你会排斥那些会妨碍生物或减缓其移动的效果。在此法术效果影响下，目标无视那些会使其速度受到环境减值的效果。当他们尝试@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}一个使其处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}的效果时，他们会自动成功，除非该效果是魔法且其等级高于行动自如法术。

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher level than the freedom of movement spell.

Hypnotic Pattern.name: 催眠图纹 Hypnotic Pattern
Hypnotic Pattern.description:
你创造出一个由不断变换的颜色组成的图案，它以几何形态的云团悬浮在空气中。生物在图案内时将处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}状态。此外，若生物在你施放该法术时位于图案内、进入图案、在图案内结束其回合，或对图案使用【搜寻】或【交互】动作，则必须尝试一次意志豁免。当前被图案@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷}的生物不再尝试新的豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标被该图案着迷。

大失败 目标被该图案着迷。在其仍处于着迷状态期间，它不能使用反应动作。

You create a pattern of shifting colors that hovers in the air in a geometric cloud. Creatures are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} while inside the pattern. In addition, a creature must attempt a Will saving throw if it is inside the pattern when you cast it, when it enters the pattern, when it ends its turn within the pattern, or if it uses a Seek or Interact action on the pattern. A creature currently @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by the pattern doesn't attempt new saves.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target is Fascinated by the pattern.

Critical Failure The target is Fascinated by the pattern. While it remains Fascinated, it can't use reactions.

Phantom Prison.name: 魅影监狱 Phantom Prison
Phantom Prison.description:
你用无法移动的幻象墙完全包围一个大型或更小的生物，将其困在无法逃脱的虚假牢狱之中。其他生物既看不见也感觉不到这些墙，而目标无法看见幻象墙外的任何事物。该法术施放时、目标每次尝试与墙交互或从墙中逃脱时、以及每当墙外的某物影响到目标时，目标都可以尝试进行一次意志豁免。若成功，它便识破该幻象，且该法术结束。

强化（8环） 你最多可以以5个生物为目标。

You completely surround a Large or smaller creature in immobile illusory walls, trapping it inside a false prison it can't escape. No other creatures see or feel these walls, and the target can't see anything outside of the illusory walls. The target can attempt a Will save when the spell is cast, each time it attempts to interact with or escape the walls, and each time something from outside the walls affects the target. On a success, it disbelieves the illusion and the spell ends.

Heightened (8th) You can target up to 5 creatures.

Blur.name: 朦胧术 Blur
Blur.description:
目标的形态看起来模糊不清。它变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。由于此效果的本质仍使目标的位置显而易见，目标无法使用此隐蔽来躲藏或潜行。

The target's form appears blurry. It becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}. As the nature of this effect still leaves the target's location obvious, the target can't use this concealment to Hide or Sneak.

Color Spray.name: 色彩喷射 Color Spray
Color Spray.description:
旋转的色彩会根据观看者的意志豁免影响他们。

大成功或大失败成功 生物不受影响。

成功 生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}，持续1轮。

失败 生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}，持续1轮，并且目眩持续1分钟。

大成功或大失败失败 生物震慑持续1轮，并且目盲持续1分钟。

Swirling colors affect viewers based on their Will saves.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round, and Dazzled for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature is Stunned for 1 round and Blinded for 1 minute.

Unseen Servant.name: 隐形仆役 Unseen Servant
Unseen Servant.description:
你召唤一个隐形仆役，你可以在维持法术时将其作为其中一部分进行指挥。它为你效劳，直到其生命值降至0（此时法术结束），或直到你停止维持法术。该隐形仆役获得被召唤（特征）特征。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.j7NNPfZwD19BwSEZ]{隐形仆役}（无阵营）

You summon an unseen servant, which you can command as part of Sustaining the Spell. It serves you until its Hit Points are reduced to 0, at which point the spell ends, or until you stop Sustaining the Spell. The unseen servant gains the summoned trait.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.j7NNPfZwD19BwSEZ]{Unseen Servant} (No Alignment)

Bullhorn.name: 牛角喇叭 Bullhorn
Bullhorn.description:
你放大自己的声音，响亮到能在极远距离也能轻易被听见。在持续时间内，500英尺内的所有听众都能清晰而洪亮地听到你的声音，即使周遭环境噪音原本会遮蔽声音。尽管音量很大，但这不会让你的声音刺耳或令人分心。这不会增加其他听觉或语言效果的射程或区域，且诸如墙壁与门等物理屏障仍会像平常一样阻挡或削弱你的声音。

你洪亮的嗓音让你更容易威吓他人，而良好的声学效果也有助于你在大型场地进行表演。你在进行威吓的检定，以及在大型场地进行表演时的听觉表演检定上，获得+1状态加值。你可以解消该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.9yzlmYUdvdQshTDF]{法术效果：扩音器}

升阶（5环）你的声音最远可在1,200英尺外被清晰听见。

升阶（7环）你的声音最远可在1英里外被清晰听见。

You amplify your voice, loud enough for you to be heard easily at a great distance. For the duration, your voice can be heard loudly and clearly by all listeners within 500 feet, even if other ambient noise would otherwise block the sound. Despite the volume, this doesn't make your voice jarring or distracting. This doesn't increase the range or area of other auditory or linguistic effects, and physical barriers such as walls and doors still block or muffle your voice as normal.

Your loud voice makes it easier to Coerce others, and the acoustics assist in Performing at a large venue. You gain a +1 status bonus to checks to Coerce and auditory Performance checks to Perform at a large venue. You can Dismiss the spell.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.9yzlmYUdvdQshTDF]{Spell Effect: Bullhorn}

Heightened (5th) Your voice can be heard clearly up to 1,200 feet away.

Heightened (7th) Your voice can be heard clearly up to 1 mile away.

Dancing Lights.name: 舞动之光 Dancing Lights
Dancing Lights.description:
你创造至多四个漂浮的光，任意两者之间相距不超过10英尺。每个都像火把一样散发光。你维持法术时，你可以将任意数量的光移动至多60英尺。每个光必须保持在你120英尺范围内并且与所有其他光相距不超过10英尺，否则它会熄灭。

You create up to four floating lights, no two of which are more than 10 feet apart. Each sheds light like a torch. When you Sustain the Spell, you can move any number of lights up to 60 feet. Each light must remain within 120 feet of you and within 10 feet of all others, or it winks out.

Telekinetic Hand.name: 念动力之手 Telekinetic Hand
Telekinetic Hand.description:
你创造一只漂浮的魔法手，它可以是隐形的或幽灵般的，它抓住目标物体并使其缓慢地向任意方向悬浮移动最多20英尺。当你维持法术时，你可以让该物体额外移动20英尺。如果法术结束时该物体在空气中，该物体会坠落。

强化（3环） 你可以以负载为1或更低的无人持用物体为目标。

强化（5环） 射程增加至60英尺，并且你可以以负载为1或更低的无人持用物体为目标。

强化（7环） 射程增加至60英尺，并且你可以以负载为2或更低的无人持用物体为目标。

You create a floating, magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and levitates it slowly up to 20 feet in any direction. When you Sustain the spell, you can move the object an additional 20 feet. If the object is in the air when the spell ends, the object falls.

Heightened (3rd) You can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (7th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 2 or less.

Prestidigitation.name: 戏法 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法听从你的差遣。只要你维持法术，你就能施展简单的魔法效果。每次你维持法术时，你可以从四个选项中选择一个。

  • 烹调 冷却、加热或为1磅非生物材料调味。
  • 提起 缓慢地 将一个无人看管、负载为轻或更低的物体从地面上抬起1英尺。
  • 制造 创造一个临时的、负载可忽略不计的物体，由凝结的魔法物质构成。该物体看起来粗糙且不自然，并且极其脆弱——它不能用作工具、武器或法术材料。
  • 整理 为一个负载为轻或更低的物体上色、清洁或弄脏。你可以用10轮的专注影响一个负载为1的物体，而更大的物体则需要每点负载1分钟。

戏法无法造成伤害或引发不利状态。对物体的任何实际改变（除上述注明者外）仅在你维持法术期间持续。

The simplest magic does your bidding. You can perform simple magical effects for as long as you Sustain the Spell. Each time you Sustain the Spell, you can choose one of four options.

  • Cook Cool, warm, or flavor 1 pound of nonliving material.
  • Lift Slowly lift an unattended object of light Bulk or less 1 foot off the ground.
  • Make Create a temporary object of negligible Bulk, made of congealed magical substance. The object looks crude and artificial and is extremely fragile-it can't be used as a tool, weapon, or spell component.
  • Tidy Color, clean, or soil an object of light Bulk or less. You can affect an object of 1 Bulk with 10 rounds of concentration, and a larger object a 1 minute per Bulk.

Prestidigitation can't deal damage or cause adverse conditions. Any actual change to an object (beyond what is noted above) persists only as long as you Sustain the Spell.

Young Vermilion Dragon (Spellcaster).publicNotes:
朱红巨龙是了不起的说书人；与其说在乎真相，不如说更在乎故事本身与他们的技艺。他们是臭名昭著的夸大狂与骗子，总觉得任何故事或事件都还有改进空间——那样才更有趣！许多朱红巨龙都是讲故事与胡编乱造的大师，以至于他们那些离奇的传闻与荒诞的谎言会显得异常有吸引力。很多人都会相信他们，即便现实与更符合事实的记载明显与朱红巨龙的故事相矛盾。即使被当面指出他们的谎言、前后不一，以及数不清的剧情漏洞，多数朱红巨龙也会顺势接下指控、就着指控继续即兴发挥，然后接着编造更加夸张离谱的天方夜谭。

朱红巨龙热爱搜集各式各样的传说与故事，并将其编织成能跨越数个世纪乃至数千年而流传的热门传奇。朱红巨龙的故事不论看起来多么荒唐与杜撰，总会在虚构之中保有一枚真相的核心。找出这层隐藏的真相可能是巨大的挑战——尤其当时间的脚步不断推移，原本的故事愈发宏大，最终淹没在环绕其外的谎言之中。有些学者建议听众无视朱红巨龙故事里所有描述性的内容；另一些则鼓励读者将朱红巨龙的故事拆解为最基础的情节点，并忽略故事中其他一切。朱红巨龙认为这太荒谬了：这种狭隘的审查抹去了他们故事的意义——朱红巨龙的故事关乎的不是事实，而是娱乐。说到底，讲天方夜谭很有趣，不论对讲述者还是听众皆然。重复会让人厌倦，而无聊的故事注定走向消亡。对朱红巨龙来说，没有什么比自己的故事或功绩被遗忘更糟。

朱红巨龙最喜欢的故事几乎总是围绕他们自己展开。毕竟他们喧嚣张扬、骄傲自负，而且以吹嘘成性而闻名，所以他们最享受编织关于自己冒险、英勇事迹与壮举的故事也就不足为奇了。为了收集更多关于自身壮举的故事，同时也为了刺激与奖励，朱红巨龙往往会扮演雄心勃勃的亡命之徒，沉迷于危险与未知带来的战栗。然而，即便是最自我中心的朱红巨龙也愿意承认，源自他们那些狂野行径的史诗成就仍可以再多添些润色。事实上，在他们的说书目录里，他们往往是最具传奇色彩、也最被夸张放大的英雄。

尽管朱红巨龙确实相当以自我为中心，但他们并不总把自己塑造成夸张故事的核心。他们也喜欢讲述各类添油加醋的故事：关于他们认识或见过的人、他们目睹或观察到的事件、以及周遭更广阔世界的消息。他们通常更愿意分享自己亲手参与过或亲眼见证过的事情，而不是与自身经验完全无关、遥不可及的故事——尽管他们也很爱聆听这种遥远而陌生的故事！有时，当一则激昂的故事被反复讲述后，朱红巨龙会因为“听得太多”而仿佛亲历其境，于是他们会选择将这故事据为己有——并加入一些“迫切需要”的改良。

朱红巨龙的行径再怎么狂野，他们的故事却不知为何更加狂野。

Pentheravix

Pentheravix，“见证者”，对一条朱红巨龙而言颇为古怪，因为她从不把自己塑造成自己故事中的英雄。相反，她只讲述那些她声称亲眼见证过的重要事件。她对时事与历史的版本极具说服力，以至于真相很快就会被取而代之——即便是在事件发生的地区也是如此。她的话就是真相——即便显然并非如此。

急切的受骗者

朱红巨龙是天赋异禀的幻术师，他们编织奇幻幻象如同呼吸与讲故事一样轻而易举。按理说，这应当让他们非常擅长辨识幻象，但事实恰恰相反。朱红巨龙太喜欢体验幻象并欣赏其中的艺术性，以至于他们宁可受骗，也不愿识破。

亡命行径的危险

朱红巨龙追逐刺激、嗜好肾上腺素；尽管他们喜欢被沉醉的观众簇拥，却几乎不在乎构成这些观众的个体生命。因此，他们的胡闹行径经常给附近聚居地带来麻烦。为被激怒的怪物、受辱的军队与环境性的灾变付出代价的，总是人们——从来不是朱红巨龙。

Vermilion dragons are fabulous storytellers who care more for the tale and their craft than they do for the truth. They're notorious exaggerators and liars who always believe a story or event has room for improvement—it's far more entertaining that way! Many vermilion dragons are such expert storytellers and confabulators that their outlandish tales and outrageous lies can seem strangely compelling. Many people believe them, even when reality and more factual accounts clearly contradict the vermilion dragon's stories. When called out on their lies, contradictions, and numerous plot holes, most vermilion dragons roll with the accusations, riff off them, and just keep making up extraordinarily tall tales.

Vermilion dragons adore collecting all sorts of different tales and stories and spinning them into popular legends that will endure across centuries and millennia. A vermilion dragon's stories, no matter how outrageous and fabricated they might seem, always maintain a central core of truth amid the fiction. Finding this hidden truth can be a significant challenge—particularly as the march of time passes and the original tale becomes grander and grander, lost amid the lies that surround it. Some scholars recommend that listeners ignore everything descriptive contained in a vermilion dragon's tale, while others encourage the reader to break a vermilion dragon's tale down to its most basic plot points and ignore everything else in the story. Vermilion dragons believe this is absurd, for such close-minded censorship removes the point of their stories—a vermilion dragon's stories aren't about truth but about entertainment. Put simply, telling tall tales is fun, both for the teller and the audience. Repetition is boring, and a boring tale is primed for extinction. To a vermilion dragon, nothing is worse than having one's stories or deeds forgotten.

A vermilion dragon's favorite stories nearly always revolve around themselves. After all, they're boisterous, proud, and notorious braggarts, so it should come as no surprise that they most enjoy weaving tales of their own adventures, daring deeds, and exploits. Both for the purpose of collecting more stories of their exploits and for the excitement and rewards, vermilion dragons often play the part of ambitious daredevils who love the thrill of danger and the unknown. Yet, even the most egoistic vermilion dragon is willing to admit that the epic accomplishments arising from their own wild antics could use some extra embellishment. In fact, they're often the most legendary and exaggerated heroes in their storytelling catalog.

Although vermilion dragons are admittedly relatively self-centered, they don't always cast themselves as the central core of their own exaggerated tales. They also enjoy telling all sorts of embellished stories about people they know or have met, events they've seen or observed, and news of the wider world around them. They usually prefer to share something they had a hand in or witnessed as opposed to a completely distant tale far outside their experience—although they love listening to such far-flung and unfamiliar stories! Sometimes, after hearing a rousing tale told repeatedly, a vermilion dragon has experienced it enough that they feel they were practically there, and they then choose to adopt the tale as their own—complete with some much- needed improvements.

As wild as the antics of a vermilion dragon are, their stories are somehow even wilder.

Pentheravix

Pentheravix, "the Witness," is odd for a vermilion dragon since she never casts herself as the hero of her own tales. Instead, she solely tells tales of important events she claims to have witnessed. So compelling are her versions of current events and history that they quickly supplant the truth, even in regions where the events occurred. Her word is truth—even when it clearly isn't.

Eager Dupes

Vermilion dragons are talented illusionists who weave fantastical illusions as easily as they breathe and spin tales. While this should make them excellent at identifying illusions, this couldn't be further from the truth. Vermilion dragons so enjoy experiencing illusions and admiring their artistry that they'd rather be duped than disbelieve.

The Dangers Of Daredevilry

Vermilion dragons are thrill-seeking adrenaline junkies, and while they enjoy an enthralled audience, they care little for the lives of the individuals who compose such audiences. Thus, their antics regularly cause trouble for nearby settlements. It's people who pay the price for riled-up monsters, embarrassed armies, and environmental cataclysms—never the vermilion dragon.
Young Vermilion Dragon (Spellcaster).prototypeToken: 幼年朱红巨龙 Young Vermilion Dragon

Snowsong Isle Citizen.name: 雪歌岛市民 Snowsong Isle Citizen
Snowsong Isle Citizen.tokenName: 雪歌岛居民 Snowsong Isle Citizen
Snowsong Isle Citizen.prototypeToken: 雪歌岛居民 Snowsong Isle Citizen

Adult Amber Dragon.name: 成年琥珀巨龙 Adult Amber Dragon
Adult Amber Dragon.tokenName: 成年琥珀巨龙 Adult Amber Dragon

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60英尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Sand Vision.name: 沙之视野 Sand Vision
Sand Vision.description:
沙尘不会妨碍琥珀巨龙的视野；他们无视来自沙尘的隐蔽（状态）。

Sand doesn't impair an amber dragon's vision; they ignore the concealed condition from sand.

Electric Shock.name: 电击 Electric Shock
Electric Shock.description:
触发 一个相邻生物以近战攻击对一条琥珀巨龙造成伤害，或一个生物以近战徒手攻击对一条琥珀巨龙造成伤害。

效果 覆盖琥珀巨龙的那层薄薄的压电沙被压缩，使触发的生物遭受电击。触发的生物受到 @Damage[2d12[electricity]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:30|basic:true] 豁免）。如果触发的攻击使用金属武器，则触发的生物在其豁免上承受 –1 环境减值；如果该生物由金属构成（如铁魔像），则其豁免承受 –2 环境减值。在大成功或大失败的失败时，其还会 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 持续 1 轮，因为其身体因电击而痉挛。

Trigger An adjacent creature deals damage to an amber dragon with a melee attack, or a creature deals damage to an amber dragon with a melee unarmed attack.

Effect The thin layer of piezoelectric sand coating the amber dragon is compressed, electrocuting the triggering creature. The triggering creature takes @Damage[2d12[electricity]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:30|basic:true] save). If the triggering attack was with a metal weapon, the triggering creature takes a –1 circumstance penalty on their saving throw, and if the creature is made of metal (like an iron golem), they take a –2 circumstance penalty on their saving throw. On a critical failure, they're also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round, as their body seizes from the electric shock.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
巨龙吐出一股压电沙爆，在@Template[type:cone|distance:40]内造成@Damage[12d6[electricity]]电击伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:30|basic:true]豁免）。它在[[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用吐息武器。

The dragon breathes a blast of piezoelectric sand that deals @Damage[12d6[electricity]] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:40] (@Check[type:reflex|dc:30|basic:true] save). It can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

Compelling Rumor.name: 引人信服的传闻 Compelling Rumor
Compelling Rumor.description:
琥珀巨龙以关于某个生物的流言蜚语与谣传轰炸60尺内的一个生物。目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]。此外，其中一条谣言会在目标心中扎根，可能迫使其在下个回合进行以下之一：接近你、逃离（如同其具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}逃跑（状态））、放开它正握着的东西、倒地@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，或原地不动。在其完成该任务前，它不能延后或进行任何反应动作。该生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:will|dc:30]意志豁免，效果如下。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物在1轮内措手不及，且不遵从命令。

失败 该生物在2轮内措手不及，且在其下个回合的第一个动作中，该生物必须用单动作服从该谣言。

大失败 该生物在3轮内措手不及，且必须在其下个回合用尽其所有动作来服从该谣言。

The amber dragon bombards a creature within 60 feet with gossip and rumors circulating about them. The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]. Additionally, one of these rumors takes hold of the target, potentially forcing them to do one of the following on their next turn: approach you, run away (as if it had the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} condition), release what it's holding, drop @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, or stand in place. It can't delay or take any reactions until it has completed this task. The creature must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:30] save with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is off-guard for 1 round and doesn't follow the command.

Failure The creature is off-guard for 2 rounds and for the first action on its next turn, the creature must use a single action to obey the rumor.

Critical Failure The creature is off-guard for 3 rounds and must use all its actions on its next turn to obey the rumor.

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙族狂乱 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
巨龙以任意顺序进行两次爪击打击和一次翼打击。

The dragon makes two claw Strikes and one wing Strike in any order.

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙之动量 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
当巨龙用一次打击造成大成功时，他们会为他们的吐息武器充能。

When the dragon scores a critical hit with a Strike, they recharge their Breath Weapon.

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Translate (Self Only).name: （仅自己） Translate (Self Only)
Translate (Self Only).description:
你施放法术时，目标可以理解它正在听到或正在阅读的一种语言的含义。这不会让它理解密码、以隐喻方式表达的语言等类似内容（由GM酌情裁定）。如果目标能听到多种语言并且知道这一点，它可以选择要理解哪一种语言；否则，随机选择一种语言。

强化（3环） 目标也可以说该语言。

强化（4环） 你可以以最多10个生物为目标，且目标也可以说该语言。

The target can understand the meaning of a single language it is hearing or reading when you cast the spell. This doesn't let it understand codes, language couched in metaphor, and the like (subject to GM discretion). If the target can hear multiple languages and knows that, it can choose which language to understand; otherwise, choose one of the languages randomly.

Heightened (3rd) The target can also speak the language.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures, and targets can also speak the language.

Message.name: 信息 Message
Message.description:
你轻声动唇，但这些话并不会从你口中说出，而是直接传递到目标的耳中。其他人听不见你的话（效果不会比你平常无声动唇更好），但目标能听得一清二楚，如同站在你身旁一般。

若愿意，目标可以用反应动作给予简短回应，或在其下一个回合以自由动作（）回应，但他们必须能看见你且处于射程内才能这么做。若他们回应，其回应也会像原本的信息一样，直接传到你的耳中。

升阶（3环） 该法术的射程提升至500英尺。

You mouth words quietly, but instead of coming out of your mouth, they're transferred directly to the ears of the target. While others can't hear your words any better than if you normally mouthed them, the target can hear your words as if they were standing next to you.

The target can give a brief response as a reaction, or as a free action on their next turn if they wish, but they must be able to see you and be within range to do so. If they respond, their response is delivered directly to your ear, just like the original message.

Heightened (3rd) The spell's range increases to 500 feet.

Clairaudience.name: 千里耳 Clairaudience
Clairaudience.description:
你在射程内的一处位置创造一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的漂浮耳朵（即使该位置在你的视觉线或效果线之外）。它无法移动，但你可以通过这只耳朵听见声音，如同使用你正常的听觉感官。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} floating ear at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect). It can't move, but you can hear through the ear as if using your normal auditory senses.

Suggestion.name: 建议 Suggestion
Suggestion.description:
你甜蜜的言辞令生物难以抗拒。你向目标提出一项行动建议，该建议必须以对目标而言看似合乎逻辑的行动方案来表述，且不能是自我毁灭的，或明显违背目标自身利益。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你试图控制它。

成功 目标不受影响，并认为你只是像平常一样在和它说话，并未对它施放法术。

失败 目标立即遵从你的建议。该法术的持续时间为1分钟，或直到目标完成一个有限的建议，或该建议变得自我毁灭，或出现其他明显的负面效果为止。

大失败 同失败，但基础持续时间为1小时。

升阶（8环） 你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

Your honeyed words are difficult for creatures to resist. You suggest a course of action to the target, which must be phrased in such a way as to seem like a logical course of action to the target and can't be self-destructive or obviously against the target's self-interest. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and knows you tried to control it.

Success The target is unaffected and thinks you were talking to them normally, not casting a spell on them.

Failure The target immediately follows your suggestion. The spell has a duration of 1 minute, or until the target has completed a finite suggestion or the suggestion becomes self-destructive or has other obvious negative effects.

Critical Failure As failure, but the base duration is 1 hour.

Heightened (8th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Sand Trap.name: 沙之陷阱 Sand Trap
Sand Trap.description:
频率 每分钟一次

效果 巨龙向40英尺内的一个@Template[type:line|distance:10|width:10]{10乘10英尺方形}喷吐压电沙。该区域为困难地形。第一次有生物进入该区域时，沙子会释放电击，造成@Damage[12d6[electricity]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:30|basic:true] 豁免）。1分钟后，沙子仍在，但不再带电。

Frequency once per minute

Effect The dragon exhales piezoelectric sand into a @Template[type:line|distance:10|width:10]{10 by 10-foot square} within 40 feet. The area is difficult terrain. The first time a creature enters the area, the sand releases an electric shock, dealing @Damage[12d6[electricity]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:30|basic:true] save). After 1 minute, the sand remains, but it no longer holds an electric charge.

Adult Amber Dragon.publicNotes:
琥珀巨龙是巨龙之中最友善、最平易近人的一类。它们富有魅力、热情好客，并且痴迷于结交朋友。它们爱聊天，精通多种语言，总能知道些有用的事情。它们还是出色的倾听者，总是耐心聆听、温和鼓励，推动与之交往的人把自己觉得有必要说的都说出来。琥珀巨龙常被视为无害的长舌之辈，但它们远比人们给予它们的鸣谢更多地狡猾且善于操纵。

琥珀巨龙不只是爱管闲事的健谈者；它们是操弄人心的谣言贩子，最爱的莫过于探听并散布流言。它们对自己选择传播的闲话是真是假毫不在意。事实上，传闻越是离奇荒诞，它们就越可能去传播。它们只顾自娱自乐，并且总乐意给开始变得有些陈腐的流言添点润色或来个转折。它们是锲而不舍的搅局者，对自己的话可能毁掉他人生计也毫不关心。

琥珀巨龙偏好居住在生物密集的环境中。通常这意味着城市环境，但它们既可能住在人类城市或矮人要塞中，也同样可能住在妖精飞地或一片爱说话的动物林地里。它们不在乎周围环境，而在乎身边有多少聪明、而且最重要的是健谈的生物。许多琥珀巨龙会在很长一段time里久居不动。它们喜欢在某个地区安顿下来，尽可能吸收当地的文化、人物与时事。只要还能从巢穴周边采撷到更多流言，它们就会留下；待到厌倦了，才会动身寻找新的地区，伺机渗透其中。要抓住一条琥珀巨龙的注意力，一个地区必须人口稠密，且其居民必须容易被操纵。小村庄与小镇不足以让琥珀巨龙长期消遣；同样，那些政府施加过多禁令、可能导致公民噤声或过度多疑的地方也不合适。

琥珀巨龙明白言语的力量，而其中多数还偏爱文字。与大多数巨龙相比，它们更可能收集并囤积稀有书籍、卷轴与典籍；它们对古旧羊皮纸与刻文的重视胜过黄金与宝石。它们往往会用守护符文以及其他防护印记来保护自己珍贵的私人藏书。

尽管很少有琥珀巨龙愿意承认，它们其实是耐心而聪明的间谍，会观察、倾听并操纵身边的事件，只为收集最有料的故事与八卦来传播。最年轻的琥珀巨龙最在意闲话、新闻、时事，以及那些短命之辈不断变化的生活。年长的琥珀巨龙则偏好更持久的传闻：阴暗而古老的历史、禁忌文本、神话与传奇，以及那些足以推翻君主、引发社会革命并制造其他重大事件或动荡的谣言。

Inguistial

Inguistial，“活的巨册”，是一条隐居的琥珀巨龙，维护着物质位面上最大规模的图书馆之一。其内，古老文本与禁忌巨著被远离窥探的目光——并置于巨龙守护的注视之下。Inguistial允许外来者向他请愿以求入内；失败者将再也无人见过。

秘密宝库

琥珀巨龙最珍贵的财物，是它们只留给自己的秘密。大多数会把这些秘密牢记于心，但它们对文本的偏爱意味着许多会把秘密写下来，作为文本或加密账册保存。有些则会保留一件与该秘密相关联的物体，用作触感记忆触发。

情报掮客

有些琥珀巨龙会充当情报掮客。它们会免费散布简单而有趣的流言来引诱客户，然后对更敏感的情报与传闻收费。多数只接受以秘密与个人信息作为报酬——非常适合再卖给其他客户！

Amber dragons are among the friendliest and most approachable of dragons. They're charismatic, welcoming, and adore making friends. They love to chat, are fluent in numerous languages, and always know something useful. They're excellent listeners, always ready with a patient ear and kind encouragement, prodding those they socialize with to share whatever they feel the need to. Often seen as harmless gossips, amber dragons are far more cunning and manipulative than they're given credit for.

Amber dragons are more than chatty busybodies; they're manipulative rumormongers who adore nothing more than learning and spreading rumors. They have no interest in whether the gossip they choose to spread is true. In fact, the more outlandish a rumor, the more likely they are to spread it. They care for their own entertainment and are always willing to add a bit of embellishment or a twist to rumors that are getting a little stale. They're persistent meddlers who care not for the lives their words could ruin.

Amber dragons prefer to live in populous environments. Usually, this means urban environments, but they're just as likely to live within a human city or a dwarven fortress as they are in a fey enclave or a grove of talkative animals. They care not for their surroundings but for the number of intelligent and, most importantly, talkative creatures around them. Many are sedentary for large portions of time. They love to settle in a region and absorb all they can of its culture, people, and current events. So long as there are more rumors to pluck from their home, they stay, moving on when they grow bored to find a new region into which to insinuate themselves. To hold an amber dragon's attention, a region must be densely populated, and its inhabitants must be susceptible to manipulation. Hamlets and towns aren't big enough to keep an amber dragon amused for long, nor are places whose government enforces too many prohibitions that could cause its citizens to clam up or be overly suspicious.

Amber dragons understand the power of words, and most have a fondness for the written word. They're more likely to collect and hoard rare books, scrolls, and texts than most dragons, placing a higher value on old parchment and carvings than they do on gold and gemstones. They're prone to protecting their valuable personal libraries with glyphs of warding and other protective sigils.

While few amber dragons would admit it, they're patient and clever spies who watch, listen, and manipulate events around them to collect the juiciest tales and gossip to spread. The youngest amber dragons care most for gossip, news, current events, and the lives of the short-lived, which are constantly changing. Older amber dragons favor more lasting rumors, dark and ancient history, forbidden texts, myths, and legends, as well as rumors that could topple monarchs, cause a social revolution, and produce other major events or upheavals.

Inguistial

Inguistial, the "Living Libram," is a reclusive amber dragon who maintains one of the largest libraries on the Material Plane. Within, ancient texts and forbidden tomes are kept far from prying eyes—and under the dragon's protective gaze. Inguistial allows outsiders to petition him for entry; those who fail are never seen again.

Secret Hoards

An amber dragon's most prized possessions are the secrets they keep to themselves. Most keep these secrets memorized, but their fondness for texts means many write them down, keeping them as texts or coded ledgers. Some instead keep an object tied to the secret, which functions as a tactile memory trigger.

Information Brokers

Some amber dragons work as information brokers. They spread simple and entertaining rumors for free to tempt clients, then charge for more sensitive information and rumors. Most accept payment only in secrets and personal information— perfect for selling to other clients!
Adult Amber Dragon.prototypeToken: 成年琥珀巨龙 Adult Amber Dragon

Ancient Indigo Dragon (Spellcaster).name: 远古靛蓝巨龙（施法者） Ancient Indigo Dragon (Spellcaster)
Ancient Indigo Dragon (Spellcaster).tokenName: 远古靛蓝巨龙 Ancient Indigo Dragon

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60 英尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Celebratory Cheer.name: 庆祝欢呼 Celebratory Cheer
Celebratory Cheer.description:
触发 靛蓝巨龙60英尺内的一名盟友对一名敌人造成重击

效果 靛蓝巨龙以一阵令人陶醉、富有感染力的热情来庆祝盟友的成功。靛蓝巨龙在对其触发的盟友重击命中的那名敌人进行攻击掷骰时获得+1状态加值，持续2轮。若靛蓝巨龙在拥有来自庆祝欢呼的该加值期间对该敌人造成重击，则触发庆祝欢呼的那名盟友可以使用其反应动作来在对该敌人进行攻击掷骰时获得+1状态加值，持续2轮。

Trigger An ally within 60 feet of the indigo dragon critically hits a foe

Effect The indigo dragon celebrates their ally's success with a heady rush of contagious ardor. The indigo dragon gains a +1 status bonus on attack rolls against the foe that their triggering ally critically hit for 2 rounds. If the indigo dragon critically hits that foe while they have the bonus from Celebratory Cheer, the ally who triggered Celebratory Cheer can use their reaction to gain a +1 status bonus on attack rolls against that foe for 2 rounds.

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术先天法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Hideous Laughter.name: 骇人狂笑 Hideous Laughter
Hideous Laughter.description:
目标被无法控制的笑声所淹没。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标被无法控制的笑声所折磨。它无法使用反应动作。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} 且无法使用反应动作。

大失败 目标倒地 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} 且在1轮内无法使用动作或反应动作。之后它承受失败的效果。

The target is overtaken with uncontrollable laughter. It must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is plagued with uncontrollable laugher. It can't use reactions.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and can't use reactions.

Critical Failure The target falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and can't use actions or reactions for 1 round. It then suffers the failure effects.

Charm.name: 魅惑 Charm
Charm.description:
对目标而言，你的话语如蜜般甜美，而你的面容仿佛沐浴在梦幻般的薄雾中。它必须尝试一次意志豁免；若你或你的盟友最近威胁过它或对其使用过敌对动作，则该豁免获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。若你对目标使用敌对动作，则该法术结束。当法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己曾被魅惑，除非它与您的友谊或你说服它采取的动作与它的预期相冲突；这意味着你可能可以通过世俗手段说服目标继续做你的朋友。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你试图魅惑它。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害的东西而非魅惑，除非它辨识了该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly}。若它原本为Friendly，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}。它无法对你使用敌对动作。

大失败 目标对你的态度变为Helpful，并且它无法对你使用敌对动作。

升阶（4环） 持续时间持续到你下次进行每日准备为止。

升阶（8环） 持续时间持续到你下次进行每日准备为止，并且你可以以最多10个生物为目标。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Infectious Enthusiasm.name: 感染性热情 Infectious Enthusiasm
Infectious Enthusiasm.description:
你以充满魔力的热情鼓励自己把事情完成，并将你的动力分享给你的盟友。你获得+1状态加值，可在攻击掷骰、意志豁免或基于魅力的技能检定中选择其一适用。在法术的持续时间内，一名在你施放该法术时观察到你施法且当时位于30英尺内的盟友，可以花费一个带有专注（特征）的单动作，以获得你所选择的同样加值，直到其下个回合开始。

在社交场合使用该法术影响他人通常会被视为失礼之举；若该检定的对象观察到你施放该法术，则会使基于魅力的技能所获得的好处失效。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.nU4SxAk6XreHUi5h]{法术效果：传染性的热情}

With enchanted gusto, you encourage yourself to get things done and share your motivation with your allies. You gain a +1 status bonus to your choice of attack rolls, Will saves, or Charisma-based skill checks. During the spell's duration, an ally who observed you Casting this Spell and was within 30 feet when you did so can take a single action, which has the concentrate trait, to gain the same bonus you chose until the start of its next turn.

Using this spell to influence someone in a social situation is typically considered a faux pas, negating the benefit on Charisma-based skills if the subject of the check observed you casting the spell.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.nU4SxAk6XreHUi5h]{Spell Effect: Infectious Enthusiasm}

Tangle Vine.name: 纠缠藤蔓 Tangle Vine
Tangle Vine.description:
一条藤蔓从空气中出现，从你手中弹射而出并缠绕住目标。尝试一次以目标为对象的法术攻击掷骰。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{法术效果：缠结藤蔓}

大成功或大失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）}状态，并在1轮内其速度受到–10英尺的环境减值。它可以尝试对抗你的法术DC进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}，以移除该减值和禁足（状态）状态。

成功 目标在1轮内其速度受到–10英尺的环境减值。它可以尝试对抗你的法术DC进行逃脱，以移除该减值。

失败 目标不受影响。

升阶（2环） 该效果持续2轮。

升阶（4环） 该效果持续1分钟。

A vine appears from thin air, flicking from your hand and lashing itself to the target. Attempt a spell attack roll against the target.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{Spell Effect: Tangle Vine}

Critical Success The target gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} condition and takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} against your spell DC to remove the penalty and the immobilized condition.

Success The target takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape against your spell DC to remove the penalty.

Failure The target is unaffected.

Heightened (2nd) The effects last for 2 rounds.

Heightened (4th) The effects last for 1 minute.

Arcane Prepared Spells.name: 奥术备妥法术 Arcane Prepared Spells

Enthrall.name: 蛊惑 Enthrall
Enthrall.description:
你的言辞令你的目标着迷。你在整个施放过程与持续时间内不中断地说话或歌唱。注意到你言语或歌声的目标可能会全神贯注；每个目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。若目标持有相反的宗教、族裔或政治倾向，或基于其他原因不太可能同意你所说的话，GM可能给予环境加值（最高至+4）。

每个进入射程内的生物在你维持法术时都必须尝试一次豁免。若你在说话，enthrall获得语言（特征）。

大成功目标不受影响，并注意到你试图使用魔法。

成功目标不必注意，但不会注意到你试图使用魔法（它可能会注意到其他人被迷住）。

失败目标对你处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated}。若其目睹了它不同意的动作或言语，它可以再尝试一次意志豁免。若其成功，它不再处于Fascinated，且在1小时内暂时免疫。若目标遭受敌对行为，或另一生物对其进行交涉或威吓检定并成功，则该着迷立即结束。

大失败同失败，但若目标不同意你，它不能尝试豁免来结束该着迷。

Your words fascinate your targets. You speak or sing without interruption throughout the casting and duration. Targets who notice your speech or song might give their undivided attention; each target must attempt a Will save. The GM might grant a circumstance bonus (to a maximum of +4) if the target is of an opposing religion, ancestry, or political leaning, or is otherwise unlikely to agree with what you're saying.

Each creature that comes within range has to attempt a save when you Sustain the Spell. If you're speaking, enthrall gains the linguistic trait.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and notices that you tried to use magic.

Success The target needn't pay attention but doesn't notice you tried to use magic (it might notice others are enthralled).

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} with you. It can attempt another Will save if it witnesses actions or speech with which it disagrees. If it succeeds, it's no longer Fascinated and is temporarily immune for 1 hour. If the target is subject to a hostile act, or if another creature succeeds at a Diplomacy or Intimidation check against it, the fascination ends immediately.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target can't attempt a save to end the fascination if it disagrees with you.

Haste.name: 加速 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法强化目标，使其行动更快。它获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{迅捷（状态）}状态，并且每轮只能将额外的动作用于打击和疾走动作。

升阶（7环） 你最多可以选择6个生物作为目标。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{法术效果：加速}

Magic empowers the target to act faster. It gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} condition and can use the extra action each round only for Strike and Stride actions.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 6 creatures.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{Spell Effect: Haste}

Roaring Applause.name: 雷鸣般的喝彩 Roaring Applause
Roaring Applause.description:
你浮夸的华丽动作在观众心中激起强烈情感，从而引发欢呼与掌声。该法术的目标必须能够看见、听见或以其他方式理解你。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标被你的表演稍微分神，并在未被完全占用时鼓掌。它不能使用反应动作。

失败 目标为你鼓掌得极为卖力，以至于它不能使用反应动作，并且处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}。鼓掌的动作过于投入，以至于其具有操作（特征）。这会在目标回合开始时触发基于操作（特征）的反应动作。

大失败 同失败，且目标因对你的热烈鼓掌而分神，变得对你@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated}。

增幅（6环） 你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

Your flamboyant flourish invokes such powerful feelings in your audience that you incite cheers and applause. Targets of this spell must be able to see, hear, or otherwise understand you. The targets must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target becomes mildly distracted by your display and applauds while it isn't fully occupied. It can't use reactions.

Failure The target applauds you so vigorously that it can't use reactions and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}. The applause is so involved that it has the manipulate trait. This triggers reactions based on the manipulate trait at the start of the target's turn.

Critical Failure As failure, plus the target is so distracted by its vigorous applauding of you that it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} with you.

Heightened (6th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Befitting Attire.name: 得体装束 Befitting Attire
Befitting Attire.description:
你用幻术为目标披上一层斗篷，将其衣物与穿戴物品塑造成适合特定场合的样式。你想象该场合，而法术会为每个目标创造量身定制的幻象服饰。例如，如果你想象的是一场贵族舞会，那么护甲看起来会像精致的礼服。这不会改变目标外观中除衣物之外的可辨识细节。

任何触摸这身服饰、使用搜寻动作检查它，或以其他方式与其交互的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻术。

升阶（4环）你最多可以以20个生物为目标。

升阶（5环）你最多可以以100个生物为目标。

You cloak the targets in an illusion, shaping their clothing and worn items into ones suitable for a particular occasion. You visualize the occasion, and the spell creates illusory attire customized to each target. For instance, if you visualized a noble ball, armor would appear to be fine clothing. This doesn't change identifying details of the targets' appearances other than their clothes.

Any creature that touches the attire, uses the Seek action to examine it, or otherwise interacts with it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 20 creatures.

Heightened (5th) You can target up to 100 creatures.

Glitterdust.name: 闪光尘 Glitterdust
Glitterdust.description:
区域内的生物会被闪烁的尘埃勾勒出来。每个生物必须尝试一次反射豁免。若某个生物的隐形被该法术抵消，则它处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}而非@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}。无论该生物原本就处于Invisible状态，还是在该法术造成的隐形抵消效果结束之前从新的隐形效果中受益，该规则都适用。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标的隐形被抵消2轮。

失败 目标在1分钟内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}，且其隐形被抵消1分钟。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}，并在10分钟内处于Dazzled。其隐形被抵消10分钟。

Creatures in the area are outlined by glittering dust. Each creature must attempt a Reflex save. If a creature has its invisibility negated by this spell, it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} instead of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. This applies both if the creature was already Invisible and if it benefits from new invisibility effects before the end of the invisibility negation effect from this spell.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target's invisibility is negated for 2 rounds.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 minute and its invisibility is negated for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round and Dazzled for 10 minutes. Its invisibility is negated for 10 minutes.

Touch of Idiocy.name: 白痴之触 Touch of Idiocy
Touch of Idiocy.description:
你使目标的心智变得迟钝；目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4}。

You dull the target's mind; the target must attempt a Will save.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4}.

Color Spray.name: 虹彩喷射 Color Spray
Color Spray.description:
旋转的色彩会根据观者的意志豁免影响他们。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} 1轮。

失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} 1轮，且 Dazzled 1分钟。

大失败 该生物获得 Stunned 1轮，且 Blinded 1分钟。

Swirling colors affect viewers based on their Will saves.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round, and Dazzled for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature is Stunned for 1 round and Blinded for 1 minute.

Fleet Step.name: 疾步如飞 Fleet Step
Fleet Step.description:
你获得你的速度+30尺状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ThFug45WHkQQXcoF]{法术效果：迅捷步伐}

You gain a +30-foot status bonus to your Speed.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ThFug45WHkQQXcoF]{Spell Effect: Fleet Step}

Bullhorn.name: 牛角喇叭 Bullhorn
Bullhorn.description:
你增强自己的声音，使其足够响亮，让你在很远的距离也能轻松被听见。在持续时间内，你的声音可以被500尺内所有听众清晰且响亮地听到，即使周围的环境噪音通常会阻挡声音传播。尽管音量很大，这也不会让你的声音刺耳或令人分心。这不会增加其他听觉或语言效果的射程或区域，而墙壁与门等物理障碍仍会如常阻挡或削弱你的声音。

你响亮的声音让你更容易胁迫他人，而良好的音响效果也有助于你在大型场地进行表演。你在进行胁迫的检定，以及在大型场地进行表演时的听觉表演检定中，获得+1状态加值。你可以解消该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.9yzlmYUdvdQshTDF]{法术效果：扩音器}

升阶（5环） 你的声音在最远1,200尺外也能被清晰听见。

升阶（7环） 你的声音在最远1英里外也能被清晰听见。

You amplify your voice, loud enough for you to be heard easily at a great distance. For the duration, your voice can be heard loudly and clearly by all listeners within 500 feet, even if other ambient noise would otherwise block the sound. Despite the volume, this doesn't make your voice jarring or distracting. This doesn't increase the range or area of other auditory or linguistic effects, and physical barriers such as walls and doors still block or muffle your voice as normal.

Your loud voice makes it easier to Coerce others, and the acoustics assist in Performing at a large venue. You gain a +1 status bonus to checks to Coerce and auditory Performance checks to Perform at a large venue. You can Dismiss the spell.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.9yzlmYUdvdQshTDF]{Spell Effect: Bullhorn}

Heightened (5th) Your voice can be heard clearly up to 1,200 feet away.

Heightened (7th) Your voice can be heard clearly up to 1 mile away.

Dancing Lights.name: 舞动之光 Dancing Lights
Dancing Lights.description:
你创造至多四个漂浮的光，彼此之间任意两者相距不超过10英尺。每个都像火把一样发出光。当你维持该法术时，你可以将任意数量的光移动至多60英尺。每个光必须保持在你120英尺内并且与所有其他光相距不超过10英尺，否则它会熄灭。

You create up to four floating lights, no two of which are more than 10 feet apart. Each sheds light like a torch. When you Sustain the Spell, you can move any number of lights up to 60 feet. Each light must remain within 120 feet of you and within 10 feet of all others, or it winks out.

Prestidigitation.name: 戏法 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法听从你的命令。只要你维持该法术，你就能施展简单的魔法效果。每次你维持该法术时，你可以从四个选项中选择一个。

  • 烹饪 使 1 磅非生物材料冷却、变暖或调味。
  • 抬升 缓慢地 将一件无人持用且负载为轻或更低的物体从地面抬起 1 英尺。
  • 制造 创造一个临时物体，其负载可忽略不计，由凝结的魔法物质构成。该物体看起来粗糙且不自然，并且极其脆弱——不能用作工具、武器或法术成分。
  • 整理 为一件负载为轻或更低的物体上色、清洁或弄脏。你可以用 10 轮专注影响一件负载为 1 的物体，而更大的物体则每 1 负载需要 1 分钟。

戏法无法造成伤害或引发不利状态。对物体的任何实际改变（除上述注明者外）仅在你维持该法术期间持续存在。

The simplest magic does your bidding. You can perform simple magical effects for as long as you Sustain the Spell. Each time you Sustain the Spell, you can choose one of four options.

  • Cook Cool, warm, or flavor 1 pound of nonliving material.
  • Lift Slowly lift an unattended object of light Bulk or less 1 foot off the ground.
  • Make Create a temporary object of negligible Bulk, made of congealed magical substance. The object looks crude and artificial and is extremely fragile-it can't be used as a tool, weapon, or spell component.
  • Tidy Color, clean, or soil an object of light Bulk or less. You can affect an object of 1 Bulk with 10 rounds of concentration, and a larger object a 1 minute per Bulk.

Prestidigitation can't deal damage or cause adverse conditions. Any actual change to an object (beyond what is noted above) persists only as long as you Sustain the Spell.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
靛蓝巨龙吐出一团旋转并扩散的荆棘与靛蓝花朵爆风，在一个@Template[type:cone|distance:50]内造成@Damage[18d6[piercing]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:38|basic:true]豁免）。它在[[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用吐息武器。

The indigo dragon breathes a swirling and spreading blast of thorns and indigo flowers that deals @Damage[18d6[piercing]] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50] (@Check[type:reflex|dc:38|basic:true] save). It can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙狂乱 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
靛蓝巨龙以任意顺序进行两次爪击打击和一次翼打击。

The indigo dragon makes two claw Strikes and one wing Strike in any order.

Ride the High.name: 高乘骑 Ride the High
Ride the High.description:
频率 每轮一次

触发 靛蓝巨龙正处于一个持续时间至少为2轮的有益情绪效果影响下，且该效果的持续时间将要结束

需求 靛蓝巨龙尚未对触发的情绪效果使用过 Ride the High

效果 靛蓝巨龙将情绪的涌动发挥到极致，将感受在心中多保留片刻，以防随该情绪而来的益处消退。巨龙将触发的情绪效果在自身（但不包括任何其他生物）上的持续时间延长1轮。若该效果因正常持续时间届满以外的任何原因而结束（例如被驱散或被对抗），巨龙不能使用 Ride the High 来继续该效果。

Frequency once per round

Trigger The indigo dragon is under the effect of a beneficial emotion effect with a duration of at least 2 rounds, and the effect's duration would end

Requirements The indigo dragon hasn't used Ride the High on the triggering emotion effect

Effect The indigo dragon rides the rush of emotion to its fullest, holding the feelings in their heart for just a little while longer in order to keep the benefits that come with that emotion from fading away. The dragon extends the duration of the triggering emotion effect on themself (though not any other creatures) by 1 round. The dragon can't use Ride the High to continue the effect if it ends for any reason other than its normal duration expiring, such as if it is dispelled or counteracted.

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙裔动势 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
当靛蓝巨龙以打击造成大成功或大失败时，它们会为其吐息武器充能。

When the indigo dragon scores a critical hit with a Strike, they recharge their Breath Weapon.

Cloak of Colors.name: 百色斗篷 Cloak of Colors
Cloak of Colors.description:
一件色彩旋涡的斗篷笼罩着目标。生物在与其相邻时会处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}，而攻击目标会引发一道耀眼的闪光。以近战攻击命中目标的生物必须尝试一次意志豁免。该生物会暂时免疫直到其回合结束；此效果具有失能（特征）。

成功 攻击者不受影响。

失败 攻击者@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} 1轮。

大失败 攻击者@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} 1轮。

A cloak of swirling colors shrouds the target. Creatures are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} while adjacent to it, and attacking the target causes a brilliant flash of light. A creature that hits the target with a melee attack must attempt a Will save.The creature is temporarily immune until the end of its turn; this effect has the incapacitation trait.

Success The attacker is unaffected.

Failure The attacker is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The attacker is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} for 1 round.

Hallucinatory Terrain.name: 幻觉地形 Hallucinatory Terrain
Hallucinatory Terrain.description:
你创造一个幻觉，使自然地形看起来、听起来、触起来和闻起来像另一种地形。这不会伪装区域内的任何建筑或生物。任何触碰该幻觉或使用搜寻动作来检查它的生物都可以尝试识破你的幻觉。

升阶（5环） 你的影像也可以伪装建筑或创造虚幻的建筑（但仍不会伪装生物）。

You create an illusion that causes natural terrain to look, sound, feel, and smell like a different kind of terrain. This doesn't disguise any structures or creatures in the area. Any creature that touches the illusion or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (5th) Your image can also disguise structures or create illusory structures (but still doesn't disguise creatures).

Truespeech.name: 真言 Truespeech
Truespeech.description:
目标能够理解所有词语，无论是什么语言，并且也能说其他生物的语言。当处于由不同生物组成的混合群体中时，每当目标说话，它都可以选择一个生物，并用该生物能理解的语言说话，即使目标并不知道那是什么语言。

升阶（第7环） 持续时间为 8 小时。
