The target can understand all words regardless of language and also speak the languages of other creatures. When in a mixed group of creatures, each time the target speaks, it can choose a creature and speak in a language that creature understands, even if the target doesn't know what language that is.

Heightened (7th) The duration is 8 hours.

Confusion.name: 困惑 Confusion
Confusion.description:
你用奇异的冲动扰乱你的目标，使其随机行动。效果由目标的意志豁免决定。你可以解消该法术。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标语无伦次地胡言乱语，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}，持续1分钟。它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免以结束该混乱。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标陷入 Confused，持续1分钟，且不能通过豁免提前结束。

升阶（8环） 你可以以最多10个生物为目标。

You befuddle your target with strange impulses, causing it to act randomly. The effects are determined by the target's Will save. You can Dismiss the spell.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target babbles incoherently and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 minute. It can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns to end the confusion.

Critical Failure The target is Confused for 1 minute, with no save to end early.

Heightened (8th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Freedom of Movement.name: 行动自如 Freedom of Movement
Freedom of Movement.description:
你会排斥那些会妨碍生物或减缓其移动的效果。在此法术效果的持续时间内，目标无视那些会使其速度获得环境减值的效果。当他们尝试@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}一个使其处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}的效果时，他们会自动成功，除非该效果是魔法且其等级高于自由移动法术。

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher level than the freedom of movement spell.

Suggestion.name: 建议 Suggestion
Suggestion.description:
你甜言蜜语，令生物难以抗拒。你向目标提出一项行动建议，该建议必须以对目标而言合乎逻辑的方式措辞，且不能是自我毁灭的，或明显违背目标自身利益。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你试图控制它。

成功 目标不受影响，并认为你只是正常与其交谈，而不是对其施放法术。

失败 目标立即遵从你的建议。该法术的持续时间为1分钟，或直到目标完成某个有限的建议，或该建议变得自我毁灭，或出现其他明显的负面效果为止。

大失败 同失败，但基础持续时间为1小时。

升阶（8环） 你可以以最多10个生物为目标。

Your honeyed words are difficult for creatures to resist. You suggest a course of action to the target, which must be phrased in such a way as to seem like a logical course of action to the target and can't be self-destructive or obviously against the target's self-interest. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and knows you tried to control it.

Success The target is unaffected and thinks you were talking to them normally, not casting a spell on them.

Failure The target immediately follows your suggestion. The spell has a duration of 1 minute, or until the target has completed a finite suggestion or the suggestion becomes self-destructive or has other obvious negative effects.

Critical Failure As failure, but the base duration is 1 hour.

Heightened (8th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened Emotions.name: 升华情绪 Heightened Emotions
Heightened Emotions.description:
每当一条远古靛蓝巨龙施放一个情绪法术或使用一个持续时间为2轮或更长的情绪效果时，该法术或效果的持续时间增加1轮。

Whenever an ancient indigo dragon casts an emotion spell or uses an emotion effect with a duration of 2 rounds or more, the duration of that spell or effect is increased by 1 round.

Maze.name: 迷宫 Maze
Maze.description:
你将目标传送进一个源自诡异力量的异次元迷宫，并将其困在其中。每回合一次，目标可以花费1个动作，尝试一次对抗你法术DC的求生检定或察觉检定，以逃离迷宫。可能的结果如下。传送魔法无法帮助生物逃离，除非该魔法能够跨位面传送，例如位面转移。当法术结束时，无论是因为目标逃脱还是持续时间耗尽，目标会返回其被放逐时所占据的空间；若原空间现在已被占据，则返回最近的空间。

大成功或大失败：成功目标逃脱，法术结束。

成功目标走在通往出口的正确路径上。如果目标已经在正确路径上，则它逃离迷宫，法术结束。

失败目标在逃离方面没有任何进展。

大成功或大失败：失败目标在逃离方面没有任何进展，并且如果它原本在正确路径上，则不再在正确路径上。

You transport the target into an extradimensional maze of eldritch origin and trap it there. Once each turn, the target can spend 1 action to attempt a Survival check or Perception check against your spell DC to escape the maze. The possible outcomes are as follows. Teleportation magic doesn't help the creature escape unless the magic can transport across planes, such as plane shift. When the spell ends, either because the target escaped or the duration ran out, the target returns to the space it occupied when it was banished, or to the nearest space if the original is now filled.

Critical Success The target escapes and the spell ends.

Success The target is on the right path to the exit. If the target was already on the right path, it escapes the maze and the spell ends.

Failure The target makes no progress toward escape.

Critical Failure The target makes no progress toward escape, and if it was on the right path, it no longer is.

Uncontrollable Dance.name: 失控之舞 Uncontrollable Dance
Uncontrollable Dance.description:
目标被一种无以复加的跳舞冲动所支配。在法术的持续时间内，目标处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 状态，并且不能使用反应动作。受影响期间，该生物不能使用带有移动（特征）的动作，除非是为了跳舞而使用疾走动作移动至多其速度的一半。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 该法术的持续时间为3轮，且目标每回合必须至少花费1个动作跳舞。

失败 该法术的持续时间为1分钟，且目标每回合必须至少花费2个动作跳舞。

大失败 该法术的持续时间为1分钟，且目标每回合必须将其所有动作都用于跳舞。

The target is overcome with an all-consuming urge to dance. For the duration of the spell, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} and can't use reactions. While affected, the creature can't use actions with the move trait except to dance, using the Stride action to move up to half its Speed.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The spell's duration is 3 rounds, and the target must spend at least 1 action each turn dancing.

Failure The spell's duration is 1 minute, and the target must spend at least 2 actions each turn dancing.

Critical Failure The spell's duration is 1 minute, and the target must spend all its actions each turn dancing.

Energy Aegis.name: 能量庇护 Energy Aegis
Energy Aegis.description:
你用强大而持久的能量屏障保护目标。目标获得对酸、寒冷、电击、火、力场、负能量、正能量与音波伤害的抗力 5。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.4Lo2qb5PmavSsLNk]{法术效果：能量神盾}

升阶（9环） 这些抗力提高至 10。

You protect the target with a powerful, long-lasting energy barrier. The target gains resistance 5 to acid, cold, electricity, fire, force, negative, positive, and sonic damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.4Lo2qb5PmavSsLNk]{Spell Effect: Energy Aegis}

Heightened (9th) The resistances increase to 10.

Planar Palace.name: 异界宫殿 Planar Palace
Planar Palace.description:
你生长出一个异次元的半位面，由一座宽敞的居所构成，并且只有一个入口。该入口连接到你施放法术时所在的位面，在法术射程内的任意位置显现为一个微弱、闪烁的垂直矩形，宽5英尺、高10英尺。你在施放法术时指定谁可以进入。一旦进入，你可以关闭入口，使其变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}。你以及你所指定的生物可以随意重新打开这扇门。

在内部，这个半位面看起来是一座宅邸，拥有宏伟的前厅与众多奢华的房间。你在施放法术时可以让宅邸拥有你想象中的任何平面布局，只要它能容纳在一处宽40英尺、深40英尺、高30英尺的空间内。当宅邸的入口关闭时，来自宅邸外的效果无法穿透它，反之亦然，但跨位面传送除外，其可用于进入宅邸。你只能在占卜魔法以及类似效果具备跨越位面的能力时，才可以用它们来观察外界。

最多有24名仆从在宅邸内侍奉其中的任何人。这些仆从类似于由幻影仆从法术创造的仆从，不过它们是可见的，其外观由你在施法时决定。宅邸内储备了足够的食物，可为150人提供九道菜的宴席。

You grow an extradimensional demiplane consisting of a spacious dwelling with a single entrance. The entrance connects to the plane where you Cast the Spell, appearing anywhere within the spell's range as a faint, shimmering, vertical rectangle 5 feet wide and 10 feet high. You designate who can enter when you Cast the Spell. Once inside, you can shut the entrance, making it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. You and the creatures you designated can reopen the door at will.

Inside, the demiplane appears to be a mansion featuring a magnificent foyer and numerous opulent chambers. The mansion can have any floor plan you imagine as you Cast the Spell, provided it fits within a space 40 feet wide, 40 feet deep, and 30 feet tall. While the entrance to the mansion is closed, effects from outside the mansion fail to penetrate it, and vice versa, except for interplanar teleport, which can be used to enter the mansion. You can use scrying magic and similar effects to observe the outside only if they're capable of crossing planes.

A staff of up to 24 servants attends to anyone within the mansion. These are like the servant created by the phantasmal minion spell, though they're visible, with an appearance you determine during casting. The mansion is stocked with enough food to serve a nine-course banquet to 150 people.

Prismatic Spray.name: 虹彩喷射 Prismatic Spray
Prismatic Spray.description:
一道彩虹般的光束喷流自你张开的手中倾泻而出。区域内的每个生物必须在下表掷1d8，以确定哪一道光束影响它，然后尝试进行所示类型的豁免。表中注明了每种射线适用的任何额外特征。若一个生物被多道光束击中，它在所有豁免中使用同一次d20结果。对于所有射线，一次成功的豁免将使该生物免受该效果影响。

虹彩喷射

1d8 颜色 豁免 效果（特征）
1 红 反射 50火伤害（火）
2 橙 反射 60酸蚀伤害（酸蚀）
3 黄 反射 70电击伤害（电击）
4 绿 强韧 30毒素伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱1}持续1分钟（毒素）
5 蓝 强韧 如同受到@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.znv4ECL7ZtuiagtA]{石化}影响
6 靛 意志 困惑，如同@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs]{扭曲心智}法术（心智）
7 紫 意志 迟缓持续1分钟；若大失败，则被送往另一个位面，如同@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{异界传送}（传送）
8 强力光束 - 受到两道光束影响——掷两次，任何重复结果或结果为8都要重掷

@Check[type:fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)] @Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)] @Check[type:will|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)]

A spray of rainbow light beams cascades from your open hand. Each creature in the area must roll 1d8 on the table below to see which beam affects it, then attempt a saving throw of the indicated type. The table notes any additional traits that apply to each type of ray. If a creature is struck by multiple beams, it uses the same d20 result for all its saving throws. For all rays, a successful saving throw negates the effect for that creature.

Prismatic Spray

1d8 Color Save Effects (Traits)
1 Red Reflex 50 fire damage (fire)
2 Orange Reflex 60 acid damage (acid)
3 Yellow Reflex 70 electricity damage (electricity)
4 Green Fortitude 30 poison damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 minute (poison)
5 Blue Fortitude Affected as if by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.znv4ECL7ZtuiagtA]{Petrify}
6 Indigo Will Confused, as the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs]{Warp Mind} spell (mental)
7 Violet Will Slowed for 1 minute; if a critical failure, sent to another plane, as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{Plane Shift} (teleportation)
8 Potent beam - Affected by two beams - roll twice, rerolling any duplicates or results of 8

@Check[type:fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)] @Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)] @Check[type:will|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)]

Baleful Polymorph.name: 恶毒变形术 Baleful Polymorph
Baleful Polymorph.description:
你将目标生物变形为一种适合该区域的无害动物，其效果取决于其强韧豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标的身体获得该无害动物的轻微特性。它的内脏在部分变形时翻搅不已，使其陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心（状态） 1}。当它从恶心（状态）中恢复时，其特性恢复正常。

失败 目标变形1分钟，但保留其心智。若它在其回合将全部动作都用于专注于其原本的形态，它可以尝试一次意志豁免以立即结束该效果。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标在身体与心智上都变形为所选的无害动物，持续时间为无限。

You transform the target creature into a harmless animal appropriate to the area, with effects based on its Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target's body gains minor features of the harmless animal. Its insides churn as they partially transform, causing it to be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. When it recovers from the Sickened condition, its features revert to normal.

Failure The target transforms for 1 minute but keeps its mind. If it spends all its actions on its turn concentrating on its original form, it can attempt a Will save to end the effect immediately.

Critical Failure The target is transformed into the chosen harmless animal, body and mind, for an unlimited duration.

True Seeing.name: 真知术 True Seeing
True Seeing.description:
你能在60英尺内如实看见事物。GM会对区域内任何幻术或变化系效果进行一次秘密的反制检定，但仅用于决定你是否能看穿它（例如，如果该检定成功反制一个变形法术，你可以看见该生物的真实形态，但你不会终止该变形法术）。

You see things within 60 feet as they actually are. The GM rolls a secret counteract check against any illusion or transmutation in the area, but only for the purpose of determining whether you see through it (for instance, if the check succeeds against a polymorph spell, you can see the creature's true form, but you don't end the polymorph spell).

Unexpected Transposition.name: 意外换位 Unexpected Transposition
Unexpected Transposition.description:
触发 你被敌人的打击选为目标。

当你遭到攻击时，你试图迅速将自己的位置与另一名生物的位置互换。若某个生物不愿与你交换位置，则它必须尝试一次意志豁免。愿意的生物自动豁免失败。若你成功与目标互换位置，则将针对该生物结算触发的攻击，如同它是该次攻击的原始目标一般。互换后，你与目标双方在1分钟内暂时免疫于出其不意的换位法术。若目标愿意，你自动与其互换位置。若其不愿，它可以尝试一次意志豁免。若目标的豁免成功，则你们双方都不会传送。

Trigger You are targeted with an enemy's Strike.

When attacked, you attempt to quickly swap your own position with that of another creature. A creature that is unwilling to swap places with you must attempt a Will save. Willing creatures automatically fail. If you successfully switch places with the target, the triggering attack is resolved against that creature as if it had been the original target of the attack. After the swap, you and the target are both temporarily immune to unexpected transposition spells for 1 minute. You automatically switch places if the target is willing. If it's unwilling, it can attempt a Will save. Neither of you teleports if the target succeeds at its save.

Rapturous Revel.name: 狂喜狂欢 Rapturous Revel
Rapturous Revel.description:
频率 每日一次

效果 你召来一场由你自身汹涌的派对渴望直接塑成的狂喜幻梦。一阵灵感与喜悦的涌动在你周围的 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 中环绕，充满明亮色彩与美妙音乐。对你在该区域内感知到的每个目标，选择要激励、魅惑或困惑他们。

  • 魅惑 目标必须在一次 @Check[type:will|dc:38] 豁免中成功；若巨龙或其盟友最近威胁过它或对它采取过敌对动作，则该豁免获得+4环境加值。失败时，它对巨龙变为友好1分钟；大成功或大失败中的大失败时，它对巨龙变为乐于助人1分钟；并且在因该魅惑而处于友好或乐于助人期间，它不能对靛蓝巨龙采取敌对动作。此种使用「狂喜狂欢」获得失能（特征）。
  • 困惑 目标必须在一次 @Check[type:will|dc:38] 豁免中成功，否则将获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑} 1轮；大成功或大失败中的大失败则为1分钟。处于困惑的生物除了困惑的其他效果外，还会发出喧闹的大笑。

  • 激励 目标在1分钟内，其攻击掷骰、豁免与技能检定获得+1状态加值。

    @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.cX0rBgS6heRXZxB6]{效果：狂喜狂欢（激励）}

Frequency once per day

Effect You bring forth a rapturous reverie formed directly from your own overwhelming desire to party. A surge of inspiration and joy surrounds you in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] filled with bright colors and beautiful music. For each target you perceive in the area, choose whether to inspire, charm, or confuse them.

  • Charm The target must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:38] save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if the dragon or their allies have threatened it or taken a hostile action against it recently. On a failure, it becomes friendly to the dragon for 1 minute, or helpful for 1 minute on a critical failure, and it can't take hostile actions against the indigo dragon while friendly or helpful from this charm. This use of Rapturous Revel gains the incapacitation trait.
  • Confuse The target must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:38] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round, or for 1 minute on a critical failure. Confused creatures engage in raucous laughter in addition to the other effects of confusion.

  • Inspire The target gains a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, saving throws, and skill checks for 1 minute.

    @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.cX0rBgS6heRXZxB6]{Effect: Rapturous Revel (Inspire)}

Ancient Indigo Dragon (Spellcaster).publicNotes:
靛蓝巨龙是热衷社交的派对达人，喜爱庆祝与狂欢。他们喧闹、热情、好玩，总是充满活力与灵体。他们在动作与情感上都张扬而大胆。他们的情绪浓烈得超乎寻常，表达自我毫不羞怯或犹豫，并鼓励身边的人同样坦率、自由地表达。靛蓝巨龙富有魅力、善良而好客，极具亲和力，能很快结交朋友；他们常常给所遇见的形形色色之人留下良好印象，即便只是擦肩而过。

靛蓝巨龙冲动、热烈而纯真，只为快乐本身而尽情作乐，并将同样的幸福与兴奋毫无保留地传播给周围的人，不图任何别的目的，也不期待回报或人情。靛蓝巨龙相信快乐不该有门槛，因此派对应当是安全、包容的空间，对所有人免费开放，无需邀请。他们在各处都有联系——有时是朋友，有时是朋友的朋友，有时只是他们在某次派对上结识并留下好印象的人。他们能混进任何派对，而只要有他们在场，派对总会更精彩。

靛蓝巨龙非常认真地对待狂欢——不是在语气上，而是在重要性上。他们狂欢得很猛，也很频繁，但总是以让派对延续为目标，而不是为了短期快感去破坏它。他们努力创造奇观、节目与消遣，让欢乐贯穿整个派对，在整场活动中逐步堆叠氛围与强度，而非一股脑爆发。他们会鼓励、带动并影响派对，就像他们对待派对来宾那样，但从不越界。他们不会哄骗、操纵或施压其他狂欢者或旁观者。事实上，他们认为那样极其低俗，并相信这种不当行为会毁掉派对——他们不使用这类粗鄙手段，也不允许在场的其他人这么做。他们知道并非所有人都喜欢派对，或能在公开的采集中感到自在；他们会努力让这些访客放松并感到受欢迎，却不会强迫他们参与；快乐与同意应当相辅相成。靛蓝巨龙尊重同伴的界限，即便他们不理解这些界限。

尽管他们热爱老派的欢宴，派对并不是靛蓝巨龙做的全部。他们白天辛勤工作，然后用轰轰烈烈的庆祝来纪念一天的成功。对靛蓝巨龙而言，一天最好在喧腾的欢笑与良伴中落幕。

靛蓝巨龙偏爱人群、城市与城市环境——任何大量人群聚集之处。他们喜欢朋友与邻里之间的多样性，因为观念与信仰的差异能带来各式各样新奇美妙的庆典与体验。靛蓝巨龙更愿意合作与协作，而不是独自工作；一旦久坐不动就会坐立不安、浑身不舒服。他们在大多数聚居地都能融入得很好，尽管常常因为打扰近邻而惹人非议，却往往能在更广泛的社群中留下好印象。作为友善、乐于助人的社群成员，他们几乎每晚都会举办派对并主持采集。这种热闹与喧嚣并不总受欢迎。即便如此，也无法否认靛蓝巨龙的存在对社群有益。他们常常担任深度参与的社群代表；他们总是第一个自愿组织社群活动，而他们的庆祝活动有助于强化社群羁绊并带动当地经济增长。

赛勒格蕾缇娅

赛勒格蕾缇娅在同族靛蓝巨龙中备受敬重，因为他们保持着举办持续时间最长的庆典的记录。他们臭名昭著的“无尽盛会”已持续了惊人的157年——而且还在继续！这场令人叹服的派对至今仍未触及高潮。

应对捣乱者

大多数靛蓝巨龙不喜欢暴力，也很少诉诸暴力——没有什么比血腥斗殴更能迅速毁掉一场庆典！他们更倾向于用三寸不烂之舌与友谊之手去面对捣乱者；当善意失效、无辜生命受到威胁时，才会升级为以操控与维持和平为目的的魔法手段。

奢华巢穴

大多数靛蓝巨龙过着富丽的生活，居住在繁荣城镇与城市中的宏伟、广阔的庄园里。他们的居所专为举办奢华舞会、派对与其他活动而建，能容纳大量访客。许多巢穴还拥有辽阔的场地，并雇佣成群的厨师、清洁工、乐师与表演者。

Indigo dragons are social butterflies who love to celebrate and party. They're boisterous, exuberant, fun, and always full of energy and spirit. They're bombastic and bold, both in action and in emotion. They experience larger-than-life emotions, express themselves without shame or hesitation, and encourage the same openness and freedom of expression in those around them. Charismatic, kind, and welcoming, indigo dragons are charming and make friends quickly, often leaving a positive impression on the various people they meet, even if only in passing.

Indigo dragons are impulsive, passionate, and pure-hearted, making merry for the joy of it and spreading that same happiness and excitement to those around them with no ulterior motives or favors expected in return. Indigo dragons believe there should be no barriers to fun, and thus parties should be safe, inclusive spaces open to all free of charge and without invitation. They have contacts everywhere—sometimes friends, sometimes friends of friends, and sometimes someone they simply met at a party upon whom they made a good impression. They can get into any party, and parties are always better for their presence.

Indigo dragons take revelry very seriously—not in tone but in importance. They party hard and often but always aim to make a party endure rather than disrupt it for short-term enjoyment. They endeavor to create spectacles, events, and diversions that spread joy over the course of the party, building intensity over an entire event rather than all at once. They encourage, build up, and influence a party, just as they do partygoers, but never cross the line. They don't cajole, manipulate, or pressure fellow revelers or bystanders. In fact, they consider such acts in incredibly bad taste and believe such misbehavior spoils a party—they don't utilize such crass methods and don't allow others present to do so either. They know that not everyone likes to party or is comfortable in public gatherings, and while they aim to make such visitors feel at ease and welcome, they don't force them to participate; fun and consent go hand in hand. Indigo dragons respect the boundaries of their fellows, even if they don't understand them.

Despite their love of a good old-fashioned revel, partying isn't all indigo dragons ever do. They work hard throughout the day, then celebrate the day's successes with a bang. To an indigo dragon, a day is best ended with riotous joy and good company.

Indigo dragons prefer crowds, cities, and urban environments—anywhere lots of people gather. They favor variety in their friends and neighbors since diversity in perspectives and beliefs leads to all sorts of new and wonderful celebrations and experiences. Indigo dragons prefer to cooperate and collaborate rather than work alone, and they get fidgety and uncomfortable whenever they are sedentary. They fit in well in most settlements, often making a good impression on their wider communities despite causing disruptions for their close neighbors. While friendly and helpful community members, they throw frequent parties and host gatherings nearly every night. This spectacle and ruckus aren't always welcome. Even so, there's no denying that the presence of an indigo dragon is good for the community. They often serve as deeply involved community representatives; they're always the first to volunteer to organize community events, and their celebrations are good for strengthening community bonds and growing the local economy.

Celegrateia

Celegrateia is deeply respected among their fellow indigo dragons thanks to the fact that they hold the record for hosting the longest- running celebration. Their infamous "Fathomless Fete" has lasted an astonishing 157 years—and counting! The impressive party has yet to reach its climax.

Dealing With Troublemakers

Most indigo dragons dislike violence and resort to it rarely—nothing ruins a celebration faster than a bloody fight! They prefer to confront troublemakers with a silver tongue and the hand of friendship, escalating to magical methods of manipulation and peacekeeping when kindness fails and innocent lives are threatened.

Lavish Lairs

Most indigo dragons live in splendor, residing in magnificent, sprawling manors in prosperous towns and cities. Their homes are built to host lavish galas, parties, and other events and accommodate large crowds of visitors. Many have expansive grounds and employ legions of cooks, cleaners, musicians, and entertainers.
Ancient Indigo Dragon (Spellcaster).prototypeToken: 远古靛蓝巨龙 Ancient Indigo Dragon

Adult Vermilion Dragon (Spellcaster).name: 成年朱红巨龙（施法者） Adult Vermilion Dragon (Spellcaster)
Adult Vermilion Dragon (Spellcaster).tokenName: 成年的朱红巨龙 Adult Vermilion Dragon

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60 尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Effortless Linguist.name: 轻松语言学家 Effortless Linguist
Effortless Linguist.description:
一条朱红巨龙在聆听某种语言被说出1分钟后，便能说并理解他们所听到的任何语言。这些语言会在24小时后从他们的心智中消退

A vermilion dragon can speak and understand any language they hear spoken after listening to the language for 1 minute. These languages fade from their mind after 24 hours

Exaggerate Strength.name: 夸大力量 Exaggerate Strength
Exaggerate Strength.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 朱红巨龙即将再次尝试对抗一个失能效果的豁免

效果 朱红巨龙膨胀自己的自负，将自己塑造成一个比实际更能干的夸张传奇版本。尽管这并不会让它变得更强大，但这一效果足以扰乱失能魔法。触发的失能效果将朱红巨龙视为其等级高2级。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger The vermilion dragon is about to attempt a saving throw again an incapacitation effect

Effect The vermilion dragon inflates their own ego, building themself up into a tall tale version of themself more capable than they actually are. While this doesn't make them more powerful, the effect is enough to bedevil incapacitating magic. The triggering incapacitation effect treats the vermilion dragon as if they were two levels higher.

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Illusory Creature.name: 幻象生物 Illusory Creature
Illusory Creature.description:
你创造一个大型或更小生物的幻象影像。它会产生相应的声音、气味，并且接触起来也令人信服。如果你与该影像之间的距离曾超过500英尺，该法术结束。

该影像不能说话，但你可以用你的动作通过该生物说话，法术会适当地将你的声音伪装。你可能需要进行一次欺瞒或表演检定来模仿该生物，由GM决定。如果你试图模仿某个特定人物并与认识那个人的对象互动，这种情况尤其常见。

在战斗中，该幻觉每回合可以使用2个动作，你在维持法术时它才会使用这些动作。它进行攻击掷骰时使用你的法术攻击掷骰，并以你的法术DC作为它的AC。它的豁免调整值等于你的法术DC - 10。它足够实体化，因此可以夹击其他生物。如果该影像被一次攻击命中或一次豁免失败，该法术结束。

该幻觉可以通过让目标相信幻觉的攻击是真实的来造成伤害，但除此之外无法直接影响物理世界。若该幻象生物以一次打击命中，目标受到等于1d4加上你的施法能力调整值的精神伤害。这是精神效果。该幻觉的打击为非致命。若伤害与怪物影像不相符——例如，一个幻象大型巨龙只造成5点伤害——GM可能允许目标尝试立即进行一次察觉检定以识破该法术。任何相关的抗力与弱点都会在目标认为它们适用时生效，由GM裁定。例如，如果幻觉挥舞战锤并攻击一个对钝击伤害具有抗力的生物，该生物会受到更少的精神伤害。然而，幻象伤害不会使再生失效，也不会触发其他要求特定伤害类型的效果。GM应当追踪该幻觉造成的幻象伤害。

任何接触该影像的生物，或使用搜寻动作检查它的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻觉。当一个生物识破该幻觉时，它会从先前因此受到的一半伤害中恢复（若有），并且不再受到来自该幻觉的进一步伤害。

升阶（+1） 该影像打击的伤害增加1d4，并且你能够创造的生物最大体型提高一级（最大至超巨型）。

You create an illusory image of a Large or smaller creature. It generates the appropriate sounds, smells, and feels believable to the touch. If you and the image are ever farther than 500 feet apart, the spell ends.

The image can't speak, but you can use your actions to speak through the creature, with the spell disguising your voice as appropriate. You might need to attempt a Deception or Performance check to mimic the creature, as determined by the GM. This is especially likely if you're trying to imitate a specific person and engage with someone that person knows.

In combat, the illusion can use 2 actions per turn, which it uses when you Sustain the Spell. It uses your spell attack roll for attack rolls and your spell DC for its AC. Its saving throw modifiers are equal to your spell DC - 10. It is substantial enough that it can flank other creatures. If the image is hit by an attack or fails a save, the spell ends.

The illusion can cause damage by making the target believe the illusion's attacks are real, but it cannot otherwise directly affect the physical world. If the illusory creature hits with a Strike, the target takes mental damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. This is a mental effect. The illusion's Strikes are nonlethal. If the damage doesn't correspond to the image of the monster-for example, if an illusory Large dragon deals only 5 damage-the GM might allow the target to attempt an immediate Perception check to disbelieve the spell. Any relevant resistances and weaknesses apply if the target thinks they do, as judged by the GM. For example, if the illusion wields a warhammer and attacks a creature resistant to bludgeoning damage, the creature would take less mental damage. However, illusory damage does not deactivate regeneration or trigger other effects that require a certain damage type. The GM should track illusory damage dealt by the illusion.

Any creature that touches the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion. When a creature disbelieves the illusion, it recovers from half the damage it had taken from it (if any) and doesn't take any further damage from it.

Heightened (+1) The damage of the image's Strikes increases by 1d4, and the maximum size of creature you can create increases by one (to a maximum of Gargantuan).

Illusory Disguise.name: 幻术伪装 Illusory Disguise
Illusory Disguise.description:
你创造出一个幻觉，使你看起来像另一个具有相同体型的生物，并且身高（相差不超过6英寸）与体重（相差不超过50磅）都与自己大致相近。该伪装通常足以隐藏你的身份，但不足以冒充某个特定个体。该法术不会改变你的声音、嗅觉或举止。你可以改变你的衣物和穿戴物品的外观，例如让你的护甲看起来像一件连衣裙。手持物品不受影响，并且你移除的任何穿戴物品都会恢复其真实外观。

施放幻影伪装视为为使用欺瞒的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.action-macros.Macro.k5nW4jGyXD0Oq9LR]{冒充} 而进行伪装；它会忽略你因将自己伪装成不相似生物而可能承受的任何环境减值；它使你在进行欺瞒检定以防止他人看穿你的伪装时获得+4状态加值，并且即使你未受训也能将你的等级加入其中。你可以解消该法术。

升阶（2环） 该法术也会伪装你的声音与嗅觉，并获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）特征。

升阶（3环） 你可以显现为任何相同体型的生物，甚至是特定个体。你必须见过某个个体，才能变成其外观。该法术也会伪装你的声音与嗅觉，并获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）特征。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3Ktyd5F9lOPo4myk]{法术效果：幻影伪装}

You create an illusion that causes you to appear as another creature of the same body shape, and with roughly similar height (within 6 inches) and weight (within 50 pounds), as yourself. The disguise is typically good enough to hide your identity, but not to impersonate a specific individual. The spell doesn't change your voice, scent, or mannerisms. You can change the appearance of your clothing and worn items, such as making your armor look like a dress. Held items are unaffected, and any worn item you remove returns to its true appearance.

Casting illusory disguise counts as setting up a disguise for the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.action-macros.Macro.k5nW4jGyXD0Oq9LR]{Impersonate} use of Deception; it ignores any circumstance penalties you might take for disguising yourself as a dissimilar creature, it gives you a +4 status bonus to Deception checks to prevent others from seeing through your disguise, and you add your level even if you're untrained. You can Dismiss this spell.

Heightened (2nd) The spell also disguises your voice and scent, and it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

Heightened (3rd) You can appear as any creature of the same size, even a specific individual. You must have seen an individual to take on their appearance. The spell also disguises your voice and scent, and it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3Ktyd5F9lOPo4myk]{Spell Effect: Illusory Disguise}

Illusory Object.name: 幻象物体 Illusory Object
Illusory Object.description:
你创造一个静止物体的幻觉视觉影像。整个影像必须完全容纳在该法术的区域内。该物体看起来会自然地活动，但它不会发出声音或产生气味。例如，水看起来会从一座幻觉瀑布中倾泻而下，但会是无声的。

任何接触该影像的生物，或使用【搜寻】动作来检查它的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻觉。

升阶（2环）你的影像会发出适当的声音，产生正常的气味，并且触感也正确。该法术获得听觉（特征）。持续时间增加至1小时。

升阶（5环）同2环版本，但持续时间为无限。

You create an illusory visual image of a stationary object. The entire image must fit within the spell's area. The object appears to animate naturally, but it doesn't make sounds or generate smells. For example, water would appear to pour down an illusory waterfall, but it would be silent.

Any creature that touches the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (2nd) Your image makes appropriate sounds, generates normal smells, and feels right to the touch. The spell gains the auditory trait. The duration increases to 1 hour.

Heightened (5th) As the 2nd-level version, but the duration is unlimited.

Ventriloquism.name: 腹语术 Ventriloquism
Ventriloquism.description:
无论何时你说话或以发声方式制造任何其他声音，你都可以让你的发声看起来像是从60英尺内的其他某处传来，并且在你发声时可以自由改变这个表面位置。任何听到该声音的生物都可以尝试识破你的幻术。

升阶（2环） 该法术的持续时间增加至1小时，并且你还可以改变你声音的音调、质感与其他性相。在生物可以尝试识破你的幻术之前，它必须主动尝试一次察觉检定，或以其他方式使用动作与该声音交互。

Whenever you speak or make any other sound vocally, you can make your vocalization seem to originate from somewhere else within 60 feet, and you can change that apparent location freely as you vocalize. Any creature that hears the sound can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (2nd) The spell's duration increases to 1 hour, and you can also change the tone, quality, and other aspects of your voice. Before a creature can attempt to disbelieve your illusion, it must actively attempt a Perception check or otherwise use actions to interact with the sound.

Charm.name: 魅惑 Charm
Charm.description:
对目标而言，你的话语甜如蜜糖，你的面容仿佛笼罩在梦幻般的薄雾中。它必须尝试一次意志豁免；如果你或你的盟友最近威胁过它或对它使用了敌对动作，则该豁免获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。若你对目标使用敌对动作，该法术结束。当法术结束时，目标未必会意识到自己被魅惑了，除非它与你的友谊，或你说服它采取的动作，与它的预期相冲突；这意味着你有可能通过世俗手段说服目标继续做你的朋友。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你试图魅惑它。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害的东西而非魅惑，除非它辨识出该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly}。若它原本为Friendly，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}。它不能对你使用敌对动作。

大成功或大失败 失败 目标对你的态度变为Helpful，且它不能对你使用敌对动作。

升阶（4环） 持续时间持续至你下次进行每日准备为止。

升阶（8环） 持续时间持续至你下次进行每日准备为止，并且你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Ghost Sound.name: 幽灵之声 Ghost Sound
Ghost Sound.description:
你创造一个由简单声音构成的听觉幻象，其最大音量相当于四个正常人同时喊叫。声音从你在射程内指定的一个方格中发出。你无法创造可理解的词语或其他复杂的声音（例如音乐）。

强化（3环） 射程增加至60英尺。

强化（5环） 射程增加至120英尺。

You create an auditory illusion of simple sounds that has a maximum volume equal to four normal humans shouting. The sounds emanate from a square you designate within range. You can't create intelligible words or other intricate sounds (such as music).

Heightened (3rd) The range increases to 60 feet.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 120 feet.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
朱红巨龙以两种方式之一喷吐。巨龙在 [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4轮} 内无法再次使用吐息武器。

  • 易燃香料（奥术、塑能、火）；巨龙在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:40] 内打喷嚏喷出一团易燃香料云，造成 @Damage[14d6[fire]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:33|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,fire] 豁免）。在大失败时，香料进入其眼睛，使其暂时失明；该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 状态，持续1轮。
  • 刺激性香料（奥术、塑能、毒素）；巨龙在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:40] 内打喷嚏喷出一团刺激性香料云，造成 @Damage[14d6[poison]] 伤害（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:33|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,poison] 豁免）。在大失败时，香料钻进其鼻子，以强烈的灼烧感将其淹没；该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

The vermilion dragon breathes in one of two ways. The dragon can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

  • Flammable Spice (arcane, evocation, fire); The dragon sneezes a cloud of flammable spice in a @Template[type:cone|distance:40] that deals @Damage[14d6[fire]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:33|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,fire] save). On a critical failure, the spice gets in their eyes, temporarily blinding them; the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.
  • Irritating Spice (arcane, evocation, poison); The dragon sneezes a cloud of irritating spice in a @Template[type:cone|distance:40] that deals @Damage[14d6[poison]] damage (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:33|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,poison] save). On a critical failure, the spice gets up their nose, overwhelming them with a powerful burning sensation; the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Arcane Prepared Spells.name: 奥术备战法术 Arcane Prepared Spells

Freedom of Movement.name: 行动自如 Freedom of Movement
Freedom of Movement.description:
你可以排斥那些会妨碍生物或减缓其移动的效果。在此法术效果影响下，目标无视任何会使其速度承受环境减值的效果。当其尝试以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱} 来摆脱使其处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚} 的效果时，除非该效果是魔法且其等级高于「行动自如」法术，否则他们自动成功。

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher level than the freedom of movement spell.

Hypnotic Pattern.name: 催眠图纹 Hypnotic Pattern
Hypnotic Pattern.description:
你创造一个不断变换颜色的图案，它以几何形状的云团形式悬浮在空气中。生物在图案内时处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}状态。此外，若生物在你施放该法术时位于图案内、进入图案、在图案内结束其回合，或对图案使用“搜索”或交互动作，则其必须尝试一次意志豁免。当前因该图案而处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷}状态的生物无需尝试新的豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标被该图案所着迷。

大失败 目标被该图案所着迷。只要其仍处于着迷状态，就无法使用反应动作。

You create a pattern of shifting colors that hovers in the air in a geometric cloud. Creatures are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} while inside the pattern. In addition, a creature must attempt a Will saving throw if it is inside the pattern when you cast it, when it enters the pattern, when it ends its turn within the pattern, or if it uses a Seek or Interact action on the pattern. A creature currently @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by the pattern doesn't attempt new saves.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target is Fascinated by the pattern.

Critical Failure The target is Fascinated by the pattern. While it remains Fascinated, it can't use reactions.

Phantom Prison.name: 魅影监牢 Phantom Prison
Phantom Prison.description:
你用无法移动的幻象墙完全包围一名大型或更小的生物，将其困在一个无法逃脱的虚假牢狱中。其他生物既看不见也感觉不到这些墙，而目标也无法看见幻象墙外的任何事物。目标可以在法术施放时、每次尝试与墙进行交互或试图逃离墙时，以及每次有来自墙外的事物影响目标时，尝试一次意志豁免。若成功，它将识破该幻象且法术结束。

升阶（8环） 你最多可以选择5个目标。

You completely surround a Large or smaller creature in immobile illusory walls, trapping it inside a false prison it can't escape. No other creatures see or feel these walls, and the target can't see anything outside of the illusory walls. The target can attempt a Will save when the spell is cast, each time it attempts to interact with or escape the walls, and each time something from outside the walls affects the target. On a success, it disbelieves the illusion and the spell ends.

Heightened (8th) You can target up to 5 creatures.

Blur.name: 朦胧 Blur
Blur.description:
目标的形态看起来模糊不清。它变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。由于该效果的性质仍使目标的位置显而易见，目标无法使用此隐蔽来躲藏或潜行。

The target's form appears blurry. It becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}. As the nature of this effect still leaves the target's location obvious, the target can't use this concealment to Hide or Sneak.

Color Spray.name: 万彩喷射 Color Spray
Color Spray.description:
旋转的色彩会根据观察者的意志豁免影响他们。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 状态，持续1轮。

失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲} 状态，持续1轮，并获得目眩状态，持续1分钟。

大失败 该生物获得震慑状态，持续1轮，并获得目盲状态，持续1分钟。

Swirling colors affect viewers based on their Will saves.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round, and Dazzled for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature is Stunned for 1 round and Blinded for 1 minute.

Unseen Servant.name: 隐形仆役 Unseen Servant
Unseen Servant.description:
你召唤一个隐形仆役，你可以在维持法术的一部分中对其下达命令。它为你服务，直到其生命值降至0（此时法术结束），或直到你停止维持法术。该隐形仆役获得被召唤（特征）特征。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.j7NNPfZwD19BwSEZ]{隐形仆役}（无阵营）

You summon an unseen servant, which you can command as part of Sustaining the Spell. It serves you until its Hit Points are reduced to 0, at which point the spell ends, or until you stop Sustaining the Spell. The unseen servant gains the summoned trait.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.j7NNPfZwD19BwSEZ]{Unseen Servant} (No Alignment)

Bullhorn.name: 牛角喇叭 Bullhorn
Bullhorn.description:
你放大自己的声音，响亮到足以让你在极远处也能被轻松听见。在持续时间内，你的声音能被500英尺内的所有听众清晰且响亮地听到，即使周遭环境噪音本应遮蔽该声音也无妨。尽管音量很大，你的声音也不会刺耳或令人分心。这不会增加其他听觉或语言效果的射程或区域，而诸如墙壁与门等物理障碍仍会如常阻挡或削弱你的声音。

你洪亮的声音使你更容易胁迫他人，而良好的声学效果也有助于你在大型场地进行表演。你在进行胁迫的检定，以及在大型场地进行表演的听觉表演检定时，获得+1状态加值。你可以解消该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.9yzlmYUdvdQshTDF]{法术效果：扩音喇叭}

升阶（5环） 你的声音最远可在1,200英尺外被清晰听见。

升阶（7环） 你的声音最远可在1英里外被清晰听见。

You amplify your voice, loud enough for you to be heard easily at a great distance. For the duration, your voice can be heard loudly and clearly by all listeners within 500 feet, even if other ambient noise would otherwise block the sound. Despite the volume, this doesn't make your voice jarring or distracting. This doesn't increase the range or area of other auditory or linguistic effects, and physical barriers such as walls and doors still block or muffle your voice as normal.

Your loud voice makes it easier to Coerce others, and the acoustics assist in Performing at a large venue. You gain a +1 status bonus to checks to Coerce and auditory Performance checks to Perform at a large venue. You can Dismiss the spell.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.9yzlmYUdvdQshTDF]{Spell Effect: Bullhorn}

Heightened (5th) Your voice can be heard clearly up to 1,200 feet away.

Heightened (7th) Your voice can be heard clearly up to 1 mile away.

Dancing Lights.name: 舞光 Dancing Lights
Dancing Lights.description:
你创造至多四个漂浮的光，且任意两者之间相距不超过10英尺。每个都像火把一样散发光。当你维持该法术时，你可以将任意数量的光移动至多60英尺。每个光必须保持在你120英尺以内，并且与所有其他光保持在10英尺以内，否则它会熄灭。

You create up to four floating lights, no two of which are more than 10 feet apart. Each sheds light like a torch. When you Sustain the Spell, you can move any number of lights up to 60 feet. Each light must remain within 120 feet of you and within 10 feet of all others, or it winks out.

Telekinetic Hand.name: 念动力之手 Telekinetic Hand
Telekinetic Hand.description:
你创造一只漂浮的魔法手，它可以是隐形的或幽灵般的，它抓住目标物体并使其以缓慢的速度向任意方向漂浮移动，最多20尺。当你维持该法术时，你可以使该物体额外移动20尺。如果该法术结束时物体在空气中，物体会坠落。

增幅（3环） 你可以以负载为1或更低的无人持用物体为目标。

增幅（5环） 射程增加至60尺，并且你可以以负载为1或更低的无人持用物体为目标。

增幅（7环） 射程增加至60尺，并且你可以以负载为2或更低的无人持用物体为目标。

You create a floating, magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and levitates it slowly up to 20 feet in any direction. When you Sustain the spell, you can move the object an additional 20 feet. If the object is in the air when the spell ends, the object falls.

Heightened (3rd) You can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (7th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 2 or less.

Prestidigitation.name: 戏法 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法会听从你的吩咐。只要你维持该法术，你就能施展简单的魔法效果。每次你维持该法术时，你可以从四个选项中选择一个。

  • 烹调 冷却、加热或为 1 磅非生物材料调味。
  • 提起 缓慢地 将一个无人看管且负载为轻或更低的物体从地面抬起 1 英尺。
  • 制作 创造一个临时物体，其负载可忽略不计，由凝结的魔法物质制成。该物体看起来粗糙且不自然，并且极其脆弱——不能用作工具、武器或法术成分。
  • 整理 为一个负载为轻或更低的物体上色、清洁或弄脏。你可以用 10 轮专注影响一个负载为 1 的物体，而更大的物体则每点负载需要 1 分钟。

戏法小把戏无法造成伤害或导致不利状态。对物体的任何实际改变（除以上注明者外）仅在你维持该法术期间持续。

The simplest magic does your bidding. You can perform simple magical effects for as long as you Sustain the Spell. Each time you Sustain the Spell, you can choose one of four options.

  • Cook Cool, warm, or flavor 1 pound of nonliving material.
  • Lift Slowly lift an unattended object of light Bulk or less 1 foot off the ground.
  • Make Create a temporary object of negligible Bulk, made of congealed magical substance. The object looks crude and artificial and is extremely fragile-it can't be used as a tool, weapon, or spell component.
  • Tidy Color, clean, or soil an object of light Bulk or less. You can affect an object of 1 Bulk with 10 rounds of concentration, and a larger object a 1 minute per Bulk.

Prestidigitation can't deal damage or cause adverse conditions. Any actual change to an object (beyond what is noted above) persists only as long as you Sustain the Spell.

Chromatic Image.name: 虹彩幻影 Chromatic Image
Chromatic Image.description:
你召唤出三个自己的幻象，而你们四个各自呈现不同的颜色，每当有人攻击你时，你们的颜色都会改变。此法术具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.j8vIoIEWElvpwkcI]{镜像术}的效果，但不同之处在于：每当一名敌人摧毁其中一个幻象时，掷骰 [[/r 1d4]]{1d4} 以确定该幻象被摧毁时的颜色。攻击者承受对应的效果。

  1. 红色 @Damage[5[fire]] 伤害和 @Damage[5[mental]] 伤害。
  2. 橙色 @Damage[5[acid]] 伤害和 @Damage[5[mental]] 伤害。
  3. 黄色 @Damage[5[electricity]] 伤害和 @Damage[5[mental]] 伤害。
  4. 绿色 @Damage[5[poison]] 伤害和 @Damage[5[mental]] 伤害，并且其获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 1}。

You call forth three illusory images of yourself, and each of the four of you takes on a different color, your colors all shifting each time someone attacks you. This has the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.j8vIoIEWElvpwkcI]{Mirror Image}, except that whenever a foe destroys one of the images, roll [[/r 1d4]]{1d4} to see which color the image was when it was destroyed. The attacker takes the corresponding effect.

  1. Red @Damage[5[fire]] damage and @Damage[5[mental]] damage.
  2. Orange @Damage[5[acid]] damage and @Damage[5[mental]] damage.
  3. Yellow @Damage[5[electricity]] damage and @Damage[5[mental]] damage.
  4. Green @Damage[5[poison]] damage and @Damage[5[mental]] damage, plus it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Hallucinatory Terrain.name: 幻觉地形 Hallucinatory Terrain
Hallucinatory Terrain.description:
你创造一个幻觉，使自然地形看起来、听起来、摸起来并闻起来像另一种地形。这不会伪装区域内的任何建筑物或生物。任何触碰该幻觉或使用探索动作检查它的生物都可以尝试识破你的幻觉。

强化（5环） 你的影像也可以伪装建筑物或创造虚幻的建筑物（但仍不会伪装生物）。

You create an illusion that causes natural terrain to look, sound, feel, and smell like a different kind of terrain. This doesn't disguise any structures or creatures in the area. Any creature that touches the illusion or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (5th) Your image can also disguise structures or create illusory structures (but still doesn't disguise creatures).

Illusory Scene.name: 幻景场景 Illusory Scene
Illusory Scene.description:
你塑造一幕虚构的场景，其中包含至多10个彼此独立的生物或物体，体型可各不相同，且它们都必须位于该法术的区域内。这些元素会产生恰当的声音与气味，并且在接触时触感逼真。幻觉场景的元素无法进行言语交流。不同于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.f8SBoXiXQjlCKqly]{Illusory Creature}法术，你场景中的生物缺乏战斗能力与数据。你的场景不包含对其周围环境的改变，不过你可以将该场景置于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HBJPsonQnWcC3qdX]{Hallucinatory Terrain}法术所制造的幻觉环境之中。

当你创造该场景时，你可以选择让其保持静态或遵循一段程序。尽管静态场景是固定不动的，它仍包含基础的自然移动。例如，风吹动一张幻觉纸片时，会使其沙沙作响。一段程序最长可达1分钟，并在结束时重复。例如，你可以创造两名兽人互相搏斗的场景，而每次重复时战斗都会以同样的方式进行。若你创造的是一个循环，那么两名战士会在场景开始与结束时处于同一位置，不过你可以将程序衔接得更平滑，使人难以分辨循环何时结束与开始。任何观察该场景超过几分钟的人几乎总会注意到它在循环。你在创造该幻觉后无法改变该程序。

任何生物只要接触影像的任意部分，或使用“搜寻”动作检视它，就能尝试识破你的幻觉。若他们与幻觉的某一部分进行交互，则他们只会识破那一部分。只有在大成功或大失败时，他们才会识破整个场景。

升阶（6环）你场景中的生物或物体可以说话。你在创造程序时必须为每位演员说出其特定台词。该法术会为每位演员伪装你的声音。

升阶（8环）如6环版本，且持续时间为无限。

You form an imaginary scene that includes up to 10 discrete creatures or objects of various sizes, all of which must be within the spell's area. These elements generate appropriate sounds and smells, and they feel right to the touch. Elements of an illusory scene are incapable of speech. Unlike with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.f8SBoXiXQjlCKqly]{Illusory Creature} spell, creatures in your scene lack combat abilities and statistics. Your scene doesn't include changes to the environment around it, though you can place your scene within the illusory environment of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HBJPsonQnWcC3qdX]{Hallucinatory Terrain} spell.

When you create the scene, you can choose to have it be static or follow a program. Though a static scene is stationary, it includes basic natural movement. For example, wind blowing on an illusory piece of paper would rustle it. A program can be up to 1 minute long and repeats when finished. For instance, you could create a scene of two orcs fighting each other, and the fight would go the same way for each repetition. If you create a loop, the two fighters end up in the same place at the start of the scene and at the end of it, but you can smooth the program so it's hard to tell when the loop ends and begins. Anyone observing the scene for more than a few minutes almost always notices it looping. You're unable to alter the program after you create the illusion.

Any creature that touches any part of the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion. If they interact with a portion of the illusion, they disbelieve only that portion. They disbelieve the entire scene only on a critical success.

Heightened (6th) Creatures or objects in your scene can speak. You must speak the specific lines for each actor when creating your program. The spell disguises your voice for each actor.

Heightened (8th) As the 6th-level version, and the duration is unlimited.

Veil.name: 帷幕 Veil
Veil.description:
你将各个目标伪装成其他具有相同体型且身高（相差不超过6英寸）与体重（相差不超过50磅）大致相近的生物。此伪装可以隐藏目标的身份，或让其看起来像是另一个族裔，但不够精确，无法冒充特定个体。该法术不会改变声音、嗅觉或举止。你为每个目标选择伪装；例如，你可以让一个目标看起来像矮人，而另一个看起来像精灵。施放veil在进行Impersonate动作时，视为已为伪装做了准备。它使目标可以忽略因伪装成不相似生物而可能承受的任何环境减值，并使目标在进行欺瞒检定以防止他人看穿其伪装时获得+4状态加值，且即使未受训也可以将其等级加入检定。你可以解消这些伪装中的任意一个或全部。

升阶（5环） 该法术也会伪装目标的声音与嗅觉；它获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）。

升阶（7环） 目标可以呈现为任意与其体型相同的生物，甚至是特定个体。你必须见过某个个体才能复现其外貌。该法术也会伪装目标的声音与嗅觉；它获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）。

You disguise the targets as other creatures of the same body shape and roughly similar height (within 6 inches) and weight (within 50 pounds). The disguise can hide the targets' identities or let them appear to be of another ancestry, but it's not precise enough to impersonate specific individuals. The spell doesn't change voice, scent, or mannerisms. You choose the disguise for each target; for example, you could make one target appear to be a dwarf and another an elf. Casting veil counts as setting up a disguise for the purpose of the Impersonate action. It allows the target to ignore any circumstance penalties they might take for being disguised as dissimilar creatures, and it gives the targets a +4 status bonus to Deception checks to prevent others from seeing through their disguises, and add their level even if untrained. You can Dismiss any or all of these disguises.

Heightened (5th) The spell also disguises the targets' voices and scents; it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

Heightened (7th) The targets can appear as any creature of the same size, even specific individuals. You must have seen an individual to reproduce their appearance. The spell also disguises the targets' voices and scents; it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

Phantom Crowd.name: 魅影人群 Phantom Crowd
Phantom Crowd.description:
一群与所在区域相称、拥挤紧凑的人形生物出现，面向你，并对你说的任何话都大声表示赞同。触碰人群成员的生物，或以探索动作检查人群的生物，可以尝试识破你的幻觉。对任何尚未识破该幻觉者而言，这群人属于困难地形。

当你花费1个或更多动作来施放一个作曲法术，或执行一个包含表演检定的行动时，你也可以将维持该法术作为该动作的一部分。

升阶（+1） 人群在射程内额外占据一个10尺方格。这个额外方格不需要与该法术创造的任何其他方格相邻。它可以重叠，但在重叠的方格中没有额外效果。

A tightly packed crowd of humanoids appropriate to the area appear, facing you and agreeing loudly with anything you say. A creature that touches a member of the crowd or makes a Seek action to examine the crowd can attempt to disbelieve your illusion. The crowd is difficult terrain for anyone who hasn't disbelieved the illusion.

When you spend 1 or more actions to cast a composition spell or to perform an activity that includes a Performance check, you can also Sustain this Spell as part of that action.

Heightened (+1) The crowd occupies an additional 10-foot square in range. The additional square doesn't need to be adjacent to any other square created by the spell. It can overlap, but there's no additional effect in the overlapped squares.

Phantasmal Killer.name: 幻影杀手 Phantasmal Killer
Phantasmal Killer.description:
你为目标创造出一个其所能想象的最恐怖生物的幻象。只有该法术的目标能看见这名杀手，不过你也能看到这道幻觉那模糊的轮廓，它疾驰向前发动攻击。杀手的效果取决于目标的意志豁免结果。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到4d6点精神伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 1}。

失败 目标受到8d6点精神伤害，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 2}。

大失败 目标恐惧到可能会死去。它必须尝试一次强韧豁免；若目标失败，则其死亡。若强韧豁免成功，目标受到12d6点精神伤害，获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃窜}直到其下个回合结束，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 4}。该效果具有失能（特征）。

升阶（+1） 在失败时伤害增加2d6，在大失败时伤害增加3d6。

You create a phantasmal image of the most fearsome creature imaginable to the target. Only the spell's target can see the killer, though you can see the vague shape of the illusion as it races forth to attack. The effect of the killer is based on the outcome of the target's Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes 4d6 mental damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target takes 8d6 mental damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target is so afraid it might die. It must attempt a Fortitude save; if the target fails, it dies. On a successful Fortitude save, the target takes 12d6 mental damage, is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} until the end of its next turn, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4}. This effect has the incapacitation trait.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6 on a failure and by 3d6 on a critical failure.

Exaggerate Weakness.name: 夸大弱点 Exaggerate Weakness
Exaggerate Weakness.description:
触发 朱红巨龙在对抗敌人效果的豁免中大成功或大失败，或敌人对朱红巨龙造成大成功或大失败

效果 朱红巨龙顺势将失败演得淋漓尽致，夸大自己有多么无助与被击败，并可能用对巨龙可怜处境的逗乐来分散敌人的注意力。触发的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:33] 豁免，具有以下效果。之后，该敌人对“夸大弱点”在24小时内暂时免疫。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该敌人分心，在1轮内其察觉检定与意志豁免承受–1状态减值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.gMDEdKAvFv85yXiJ]{效果：夸大弱点}

失败 该敌人被逗乐所压倒，并在1轮内陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}。

大成功或大失败 该敌人沉浸于对巨龙凄惨失败的逗乐之中，并在1轮内陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}，且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

Trigger The vermilion dragon critically fails a saving throw against a foe's effect or a foe critically hits the vermilion dragon

Effect The vermilion dragon leans into its failure, playing up how helpless and defeated they are and potentially distracting their foe with their amusement at the dragon's piteousness. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:33] save with the following effects. Afterwards, the foe is temporarily immune to Exaggerate Weakness for 24 hours.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The foe is distracted, taking a –1 status penalty on Perception checks and Will saves for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.gMDEdKAvFv85yXiJ]{Effect: Exaggerate Weakness}

Failure The foe is overcome with amusement and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The foe is lost in its amusement at the dragon's miserable failure and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Adult Vermilion Dragon (Spellcaster).publicNotes:
朱红巨龙是出色的讲故事者，比起真相更在乎故事本身与自己的技艺。他们以夸大其词与撒谎闻名，总觉得任何故事或事件都有改进空间——那样才更有趣！许多朱红巨龙在讲述与编造方面技艺高超，以至于他们荒诞离奇的故事与离谱的谎言都会显得莫名引人入胜。即便现实与更符合事实的叙述明显与朱红巨龙的故事相矛盾，仍有许多人相信他们。当他们的谎言、矛盾与大量情节漏洞被人当面指出时，大多数朱红巨龙都会顺着指控继续发挥，把它当成段子接着编，继续捏造夸张到不可思议的离奇故事。

朱红巨龙酷爱收集各种不同的传闻与故事，并将它们编织成广为流传、能跨越数百年乃至数千年的流行传奇。朱红巨龙的故事无论看起来多么荒唐、杜撰，其中总会在虚构之中保留一枚真相的核心。找出这份隐藏的真相可能是一项重大挑战——尤其当时代的脚步不断前进，原始故事被越传越夸张，最终被包围其周遭的谎言淹没而失落时更是如此。有些学者建议听众忽略朱红巨龙故事里所有描述性的内容；另一些则鼓励读者将朱红巨龙的故事拆解为最基础的情节要点，并忽略故事中其他一切。朱红巨龙认为这荒谬至极，因为这种狭隘的审查抹杀了他们故事的意义——朱红巨龙的故事关乎娱乐，而非真相。简而言之，讲离奇夸张的故事很有趣，无论对讲述者还是观众都是如此。重复令人厌烦，而乏味的故事注定走向灭绝。对朱红巨龙而言，没有什么比自己的故事或事迹被遗忘更糟。

朱红巨龙最喜欢的故事几乎总是围绕他们自己。毕竟他们喧闹张扬、骄傲自负，又以自夸闻名，因此他们最爱编织自己冒险、英勇事迹与壮举的传说也就不足为奇。为了收集更多关于自身壮举的故事，也为了刺激与奖励，朱红巨龙常常扮演野心勃勃的亡命之徒，沉迷于危险与未知带来的快感。然而，即便是最自我中心的朱红巨龙也愿意承认：由他们自己那些疯狂胡闹所造就的史诗成就，还可以再多加几笔润色。事实上，在他们的故事目录里，他们往往是最具传奇色彩、也最被夸大的英雄。

尽管朱红巨龙确实相对以自我为中心，他们也并非总把自己塑造成夸张故事的核心主角。他们同样喜欢讲述各种被添油加醋的故事——关于他们认识或见过的人、他们亲眼见到或观察到的事件，以及更广阔世界的消息。他们通常更愿意分享自己参与过或目睹过的事情，而不是与自身经验完全无关、遥远陌生的传闻——不过他们也很爱聆听这类远方且不熟悉的故事！有时，一则激昂的故事被反复讲述后，朱红巨龙会觉得自己仿佛亲身经历过一般，于是便选择把这故事“收为己有”——当然，还会加上些“非常必要”的改进。

朱红巨龙的胡闹已经够狂野了，可他们的故事不知为何更为狂野。

Pentheravix

Pentheravix，“见证者”，作为一条朱红巨龙却显得古怪，因为她从不在自己的故事里把自己塑造成英雄。相反，她只讲述那些她声称亲眼见证过的重要事件。她对时事与历史的版本极具煽动力，以至于很快就会取代真相——即便在事件实际发生过的地区也是如此。她的话就是真相——即便明显不是。

急切的受骗者

朱红巨龙是天赋异禀的幻术师，能像呼吸与讲故事一样轻易织就奇幻的幻觉。按理说，这应使他们极擅长辨识幻觉，但事实恰恰相反。朱红巨龙如此享受体验幻觉、欣赏其艺术性，以至于他们宁愿受骗也不愿识破。

亡命行径的危险

朱红巨龙是追逐刺激的肾上腺素瘾君子；尽管他们喜欢沉醉的观众，却几乎不在乎构成这些观众的个体性命。因此，他们的胡闹经常给附近的聚居地带来麻烦。为被激怒的怪物、蒙羞的军队与环境性灾变付出价格的总是人们——从来不是朱红巨龙。

Vermilion dragons are fabulous storytellers who care more for the tale and their craft than they do for the truth. They're notorious exaggerators and liars who always believe a story or event has room for improvement—it's far more entertaining that way! Many vermilion dragons are such expert storytellers and confabulators that their outlandish tales and outrageous lies can seem strangely compelling. Many people believe them, even when reality and more factual accounts clearly contradict the vermilion dragon's stories. When called out on their lies, contradictions, and numerous plot holes, most vermilion dragons roll with the accusations, riff off them, and just keep making up extraordinarily tall tales.

Vermilion dragons adore collecting all sorts of different tales and stories and spinning them into popular legends that will endure across centuries and millennia. A vermilion dragon's stories, no matter how outrageous and fabricated they might seem, always maintain a central core of truth amid the fiction. Finding this hidden truth can be a significant challenge—particularly as the march of time passes and the original tale becomes grander and grander, lost amid the lies that surround it. Some scholars recommend that listeners ignore everything descriptive contained in a vermilion dragon's tale, while others encourage the reader to break a vermilion dragon's tale down to its most basic plot points and ignore everything else in the story. Vermilion dragons believe this is absurd, for such close-minded censorship removes the point of their stories—a vermilion dragon's stories aren't about truth but about entertainment. Put simply, telling tall tales is fun, both for the teller and the audience. Repetition is boring, and a boring tale is primed for extinction. To a vermilion dragon, nothing is worse than having one's stories or deeds forgotten.

A vermilion dragon's favorite stories nearly always revolve around themselves. After all, they're boisterous, proud, and notorious braggarts, so it should come as no surprise that they most enjoy weaving tales of their own adventures, daring deeds, and exploits. Both for the purpose of collecting more stories of their exploits and for the excitement and rewards, vermilion dragons often play the part of ambitious daredevils who love the thrill of danger and the unknown. Yet, even the most egoistic vermilion dragon is willing to admit that the epic accomplishments arising from their own wild antics could use some extra embellishment. In fact, they're often the most legendary and exaggerated heroes in their storytelling catalog.

Although vermilion dragons are admittedly relatively self-centered, they don't always cast themselves as the central core of their own exaggerated tales. They also enjoy telling all sorts of embellished stories about people they know or have met, events they've seen or observed, and news of the wider world around them. They usually prefer to share something they had a hand in or witnessed as opposed to a completely distant tale far outside their experience—although they love listening to such far-flung and unfamiliar stories! Sometimes, after hearing a rousing tale told repeatedly, a vermilion dragon has experienced it enough that they feel they were practically there, and they then choose to adopt the tale as their own—complete with some much- needed improvements.

As wild as the antics of a vermilion dragon are, their stories are somehow even wilder.

Pentheravix

Pentheravix, "the Witness," is odd for a vermilion dragon since she never casts herself as the hero of her own tales. Instead, she solely tells tales of important events she claims to have witnessed. So compelling are her versions of current events and history that they quickly supplant the truth, even in regions where the events occurred. Her word is truth—even when it clearly isn't.

Eager Dupes

Vermilion dragons are talented illusionists who weave fantastical illusions as easily as they breathe and spin tales. While this should make them excellent at identifying illusions, this couldn't be further from the truth. Vermilion dragons so enjoy experiencing illusions and admiring their artistry that they'd rather be duped than disbelieve.

The Dangers Of Daredevilry

Vermilion dragons are thrill-seeking adrenaline junkies, and while they enjoy an enthralled audience, they care little for the lives of the individuals who compose such audiences. Thus, their antics regularly cause trouble for nearby settlements. It's people who pay the price for riled-up monsters, embarrassed armies, and environmental cataclysms—never the vermilion dragon.
