Burrower.description:
它获得5尺的掘地速度，使其能够挖掘微小的洞穴。

It gains a burrow Speed of 5 feet, allowing it to dig Tiny holes.

Bloodless.name: 无血 Bloodless
Bloodless.description:
页岩幼体没有血液，因此它们免疫流血伤害。

Shale hatchlings lack blood, so they are immune to bleed damage.

Crystal Generation.name: 水晶生成 Crystal Generation
Crystal Generation.description:
如果你的页岩孵化魔宠意识清醒且健康，你可以使用自然技能来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{挣取收入}，方法是花费你的时代小心地喂养你的魔宠并收集它珍贵的晶体排泄物。

If your shale hatching familiar is conscious and healthy, you can use Nature to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{Earn Income}, by spending your time carefully feeding your familiar and harvesting its precious crystalline waste.

Rock Stride.name: 岩石行步 Rock Stride
Rock Stride.description:
页岩幼龙无视洞穴和岩石山脉中的困难地形。

Shale hatchlings ignore difficult terrain in caves and rocky mountains.

Boss Belk.name: 首领贝尔克 Boss Belk
Boss Belk.publicNotes:
在白天，尼尔博格的民选领袖是贝尔克老板（男性 hardriggan 矿工），著名的尼布洛格铁矿的干脆利落的工头。他会仔细称量尼尔博格每位矿工开采出的所有矿石，确保没人取走超过其被分配的份额。贝尔克老板粗鲁且脾气暴，但也清廉且诚实得近乎迂腐，这通常能让矿场的交易安全而稳定。然而最近，他的工作因自己时不时会突然消失、化为虚无长达数分钟而变得复杂——他声称这是一晚在梦境市集吃了块坏蛋糕所导致的状态。他愤怒时这些消失发作会加剧，因此他一直在其夜间对应者、梦境市集的实际领袖“先知”永斯（无性别 bannog 祭司）的指导下练习深呼吸与放松技巧，以帮助自己在清醒世界里保持稳固不动。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.2p0FEYfKak7uy9oZ]{尼尔博格：双城记}

By day, Nilbog's elected leader is Boss Belk (male hardriggan miner), the no-nonsense foreman of the famed Niblog iron mine. He carefully weighs all the ore extracted by each of Nilbog's miners, ensuring that no one withdraws more than their assigned allotment. Gruff and rude, Boss Belk is also incorruptible and honest to a fault, which normally keeps the mine's dealings safe and stable. Lately, however, his job has been complicated by his tendency to vanish into nothingness for minutes at a time, a condition he says stems from a bad cake he ate one night at the Dream Market. The vanishing episodes worsen when he's angry, so he's been practicing deep breathing and relaxation techniques under the tutelage of his nightly counterpart and de facto leader of the Dream Market, Yonce the Seer (nonbinary bannog priest), in order to help keep himself steady in place here in the waking world.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.2p0FEYfKak7uy9oZ]{Nilbog: A Tale of Two Towns}
Boss Belk.blurb:
铁矿的男性哈德里根工头
male hardriggan foreman of the iron mine

Cholpekka.name: 乔尔佩卡 Cholpekka
Cholpekka.publicNotes:
另一个传说围绕凡人试图违抗自身命运，或伸手去抓取超过他们应得之物展开。吉里加提的后裔低声谈论一位名叫乔尔佩卡（男性硬里根发明家）的硬里根发明家，他试图驾驭Eld，为裂喙带来降雨。他搜遍全岛，寻找水元素强盛之地，并试图说服那里的艾达蒙迁往沙漠，把他们的生命力一同带过去。艾达蒙无法帮忙，因为他们追随世界的变化，而非直接影响它们。

在艾达蒙之事遭遇失败后，乔尔佩卡决定亲自化身为水元素，直接成为他所追求的变化。他设计了一场仪式，意在淹死自己的凡躯，并将自己的灵体复活为水艾达蒙。这场仪式在溺亡丛林的核心处进行，那里水元素强盛；仪式确实改变了他，却也使他受制于同样的限制，将他永远困在丛林之中。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.KrL7DouyEot3CIGZ]{溺亡丛林}

Another tale revolves around mortals attempts to defy their fate or reach out to grasp more than they deserve. Jirigati descendants whisper about a hardriggan inventor named Cholpekka (male hardriggan inventor) who sought to harness the Eld to bring rain to Crackbeak. He scoured the island for places where water elements were strong and tried to convince the eldamon there to relocate to the desert, bringing their vitality with them. The eldamon couldn't help, for they followed the changes in the world instead of directly influencing them.

After his failure with the eldamon, Cholpekka decided to embody the water element himself and directly become the change he sought. He devised a ritual to drown his mortal body and resurrect his spirit as a water eldamon. Performed in the heart of the Drowned Jungle, where the element of water was strong, the ritual transformed him but subjected him to the same restrictions, trapping him in the jungle forever.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.KrL7DouyEot3CIGZ]{Drowned Jungle}
Cholpekka.blurb:
男性哈德里根发明家
male hardriggan inventor

Captain Hemlock.name: 赫姆洛克队长 Captain Hemlock
Captain Hemlock.publicNotes:
财团中最执着的成员之一是海盗铁杉船长（女性 g'mayun 船长）。她声称自己是波比·冯·藤壶的直系后裔，也是她财富的合法继承人，尽管从未发现任何确凿证据来支援这一主张。铁杉船长不在港口或追逐商船时，就在鹿弹群岛之间航行……寻找某样东西。也许她在寻找波比的某件遗物，或许只是一些随机的宝藏，但不管她在找什么，别挡她的路。若你在鹿弹群岛一带看见她的旗帜——一面绘着两根绿色羽毛的蓝色三角旗——立刻逃离那里！她把鹿弹群岛里每一个寻宝者都视为竞争者与入侵者。若她发现了你而你够走运，她只会搜查你的船；若你不走运，她会当场把你击沉。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.1zsqhp6q0BXoExH4]{Farlight: 活幽灵镇}

One of the most persistent members of the Consortium is the pirate Captain Hemlock (female g'mayun captain). She claims to be Poppy von Barnacle's direct descendant and the rightful inheritor of her riches, although no particular evidence has ever been discovered in support of this claim. When Captain Hemlock isn't in the harbor or chasing merchant ships, she's sailing among the Buckshot Islands… searching for something. Perhaps she's searching for a relic of Poppy's or maybe just some random treasure, but whatever she's looking for, stay out of her way. If you're among the Buckshots and see her flag, a blue pennon bearing two green feathers, hightail it out of there! She considers every treasure hunter in the Buckshot Isles to be a competitor and a trespasser. If she finds you and you're lucky, she'll merely search your ship; if you're unlucky, she'll sink you out of hand.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.1zsqhp6q0BXoExH4]{Farlight: The Living Ghost Town}
Captain Hemlock.blurb:
女性格梅云海盗船长
female g’mayun pirate captain

Ancient Harlequin Dragon (Spellcaster).tokenName: 远古小丑巨龙 Ancient Harlequin Dragon

Jester's Jeer.name: 小丑的嘲弄 Jester's Jeer
Jester's Jeer.description:
触发 一名敌人的一次打击对巨龙造成重度失败。

效果 巨龙嘲弄触发生物的无能，让触发生物充满恐惧，直到其对巨龙造成一次打击命中。巨龙尝试对触发生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize}。若成功，则在触发生物的回合结束时，其惊惧（状态）无法降低到1以下，直到其成功打击巨龙，或直到其至少1轮未观察到或未通过感官感知到巨龙。

Trigger A foe critically fails a Strike against the dragon.

Effect The dragon pokes fun at the triggering creature's incompetence, filling the triggering creature with dread until they land a blow against the dragon. The dragon attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} the triggering creature. On a success, the triggering creature's frightened condition can't decrease to less than 1 at the end of its turn until it either successfully Strikes the dragon or until it doesn't observe or sense the dragon for at least 1 round.

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术先天法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Mirror Image (At Will).name: 镜像术（意志） Mirror Image (At Will)
Mirror Image (At Will).description:
三个你的幻影在你的空间中盘旋，可能导致那些对你进行攻击的生物击中其中一个幻影而非你本人。任何本应命中你的攻击都有一定的随机几率改为命中你的一个幻影而非你本人。若三个幻影都仍在，则有 1/4 的几率命中你（在 [[/r 1d4]] 中掷出 1）。若剩下两个幻影，则有 1/3 的几率命中你（在 [[/r 1d6]] 中掷出 1-2）。若只剩一个幻影，则几率为 1/2（在 [[/r 1d6]] 中掷出 1-3）。

一旦某个幻影被命中，它就会被摧毁。若一次攻击掷骰未能命中你的 AC 但未大失败，它会摧毁一个幻影，但没有额外效果（即使该攻击通常会在失败时也产生效果）。若一次攻击掷骰为大成功且本应命中某个幻影，则摧毁其中一个幻影，并且该次攻击掷骰改为对你成功。一旦所有幻影都被摧毁，该法术结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.0PO5mFRhh9HxGAtv]{法术效果：镜像术}

Three illusory images of you swirl about your space, potentially causing those who attack you to hit one of the images instead of you. Any attack that would hit you has a random chance of hitting one of your images instead of you. If all three images remain, there is a 1 in 4 chance of hitting you (1 on [[/r 1d4]]). With two images remaining, there is a 1 in 3 chance of hitting you (1-2 on [[/r 1d6]]). With only one image, the chances are 1 in 2 (1-3 on [[/r 1d6]]).

Once an image is hit, it is destroyed. If an attack roll fails to hit your AC but doesn't critically fail, it destroys an image but has no additional effect (even if the attack would normally have an effect on a failure). If an attack roll is a critical success and would hit one of the images, one of the images is destroyed and the attack roll becomes a success against you. Once all the images are destroyed, the spell ends.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.0PO5mFRhh9HxGAtv]{Spell Effect: Mirror Image}

Prestidigitation.name: 戏法 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法会听从你的命令。只要你维持法术，你就可以施展简单的魔法效果。每次你维持法术时，你可以从四个选项中选择一个。

  • 烹调 冷却、加热，或为1磅非生物材料调味。
  • 举起 缓慢地 将一件无人看管、负载为轻或更低的物体缓慢抬离地面1英尺。
  • 制作 创造一个临时物体，负载可忽略，由凝结的魔法物质制成。该物体看起来粗糙且不自然，并且极其脆弱——不能用作工具、武器或法术材料。
  • 整理 为一件负载为轻或更低的物体上色、清洁或弄脏。你可以用10轮专注影响一件负载为1的物体，而更大的物体则每点负载需要1分钟。

戏法不能造成伤害或导致不利状态。对物体的任何实际改变（超出以上所述者）仅在你维持法术期间持续。

The simplest magic does your bidding. You can perform simple magical effects for as long as you Sustain the Spell. Each time you Sustain the Spell, you can choose one of four options.

  • Cook Cool, warm, or flavor 1 pound of nonliving material.
  • Lift Slowly lift an unattended object of light Bulk or less 1 foot off the ground.
  • Make Create a temporary object of negligible Bulk, made of congealed magical substance. The object looks crude and artificial and is extremely fragile-it can't be used as a tool, weapon, or spell component.
  • Tidy Color, clean, or soil an object of light Bulk or less. You can affect an object of 1 Bulk with 10 rounds of concentration, and a larger object a 1 minute per Bulk.

Prestidigitation can't deal damage or cause adverse conditions. Any actual change to an object (beyond what is noted above) persists only as long as you Sustain the Spell.

Arcane Prepared Spells.name: 奥术备妥法术 Arcane Prepared Spells

Befitting Attire.name: 得体装束 Befitting Attire
Befitting Attire.description:
你用幻术为目标披上一层斗篷，将他们的衣着与穿戴物品塑造成适合某个特定场合的样式。你在心中想象该场合，而法术会为每个目标创造量身定制的虚幻装束。例如，如果你想象的是一场贵族舞会，护甲看起来会像精致的衣服。这不会改变目标外貌中除衣物之外的任何可识别细节。

任何触摸这身装束、使用“搜寻”动作来检查它，或以其他方式与之交互的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻术。

升阶（4环） 你可以以至多20个生物为目标。

升阶（5环） 你可以以至多100个生物为目标。

You cloak the targets in an illusion, shaping their clothing and worn items into ones suitable for a particular occasion. You visualize the occasion, and the spell creates illusory attire customized to each target. For instance, if you visualized a noble ball, armor would appear to be fine clothing. This doesn't change identifying details of the targets' appearances other than their clothes.

Any creature that touches the attire, uses the Seek action to examine it, or otherwise interacts with it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 20 creatures.

Heightened (5th) You can target up to 100 creatures.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你解开法术或效果背后的魔法。尝试一次针对目标的反制检定。若你成功反制一个魔法物品，该物品在10分钟内变为其类型的普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。若目标是一件神器或类似物品，你自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Glitterdust.name: 闪光尘 Glitterdust
Glitterdust.description:
区域内的生物会被闪耀的尘埃勾勒出轮廓。每个生物都必须尝试一次反射豁免。如果某个生物的隐形被此法术抵消，它获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 而非 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}。若该生物原本就处于 Invisible 状态，或在此法术抵消隐形效果结束前从新的隐形效果中受益，以上规则均适用。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标的隐形被抵消 2 轮。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} 状态 1 分钟，且其隐形被抵消 1 分钟。

大成功或大失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} 状态 1 轮，且 Dazzled 10 分钟。其隐形被抵消 10 分钟。

Creatures in the area are outlined by glittering dust. Each creature must attempt a Reflex save. If a creature has its invisibility negated by this spell, it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} instead of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. This applies both if the creature was already Invisible and if it benefits from new invisibility effects before the end of the invisibility negation effect from this spell.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target's invisibility is negated for 2 rounds.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 minute and its invisibility is negated for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round and Dazzled for 10 minutes. Its invisibility is negated for 10 minutes.

Color Spray.name: 色彩喷射 Color Spray
Color Spray.description:
旋转的色彩会根据观者的意志豁免影响他们。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 状态，持续 1 轮。

失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1} 状态、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲} 状态，持续 1 轮，并且目眩持续 1 分钟。

大失败 该生物获得震慑状态，持续 1 轮，并且目盲持续 1 分钟。

Swirling colors affect viewers based on their Will saves.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round, and Dazzled for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature is Stunned for 1 round and Blinded for 1 minute.

Grease.name: 油腻术 Grease
Grease.description:
你召唤出油脂，其效果取决于你选择区域或目标。

  • 区域 [4个相邻的5尺方格] 区域内所有坚实地面都被油脂覆盖。每个站在油滑表面上的生物都必须进行一次反射豁免或一次体操检定，对抗你的法术DC，否则就会倒下并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。在法术持续时间内，使用一个动作移动到油滑表面上的生物必须尝试进行一次反射豁免或一次体操检定以维持平衡。进行“迈步”或“爬行”的生物无需尝试检定或豁免。
  • 目标 [1个负载为1或更低的物体] 如果你将法术施放在一个无人看管的物体上，任何试图拾起该物体的人都必须成功通过一次体操检定或反射豁免，对抗你的法术DC，才能做到。如果你的目标是一个被持用的物体，持有该物体的生物必须尝试一次体操检定或反射豁免。失败时，持有者或使用者在所有涉及使用该物体的检定上承受-2环境减值；大失败时，持有者或使用者会松开该物品。该物体落在GM选择的一个相邻方格中。如果你将此法术施放在一个穿戴的物体上，穿戴者在对抗试图擒抱他们的强韧豁免上获得+2环境加值。

You conjure grease, with effects based on choosing area or target.

  • Area [4 contiguous 5-foot squares] All solid ground in the area is covered with grease. Each creature standing on the greasy surface must succeed at a Reflex save or an Acrobatics check against your spell DC or fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. Creatures using an action to move onto the greasy surface during the spell's duration must attempt either a Reflex save or an Acrobatics check to Balance. A creature that Steps or Crawls doesn't have to attempt a check or save.
  • Target [1 object of Bulk 1 or less] If you cast the spell on an unattended object, anyone trying to pick up the object must succeed at an Acrobatics check or Reflex save against your spell DC to do so. If you target an attended object, the creature that has the object must attempt an Acrobatics check or Reflex save. On a failure, the holder or wielder takes a -2 circumstance penalty to all checks that involve using the object; on a critical failure, the holder or wielder releases the item. The object lands in an adjacent square of the GM's choice. If you cast this spell on a worn object, the wearer gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Fortitude saves against attempts to grapple them.

Ventriloquism.name: 腹语术 Ventriloquism
Ventriloquism.description:
每当你说话或以发声方式发出任何其他声音时，你可以让你的发声看起来源自60英尺内的其他位置，并且在你发声时可以自由改变该表观位置。任何听到该声音的生物都可以尝试识破你的幻觉。

升阶（2环） 该法术的持续时间增加至1小时，并且你还可以改变你声音的音调、质感以及其他性相。在生物能够尝试识破你的幻觉之前，它必须主动尝试一次察觉检定，或以其他方式使用动作来与该声音进行交互。

Whenever you speak or make any other sound vocally, you can make your vocalization seem to originate from somewhere else within 60 feet, and you can change that apparent location freely as you vocalize. Any creature that hears the sound can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (2nd) The spell's duration increases to 1 hour, and you can also change the tone, quality, and other aspects of your voice. Before a creature can attempt to disbelieve your illusion, it must actively attempt a Perception check or otherwise use actions to interact with the sound.

Bullhorn.name: 扩音器 Bullhorn
Bullhorn.description:
你增强自己的嗓音，使其响亮到足以在极远距离也能轻松被听见。在持续时间内，500英尺内的所有听众都能清晰响亮地听到你的声音，即使环境噪音原本会阻挡声音传播。尽管音量很大，但你的声音不会刺耳或令人分心。这不会增加其他听觉或语言效果的射程或区域，并且诸如墙壁与门之类的实体障碍物仍会如常阻挡或削弱你的声音。

你响亮的嗓音使胁迫他人变得更容易，而声学效果也有助于在大型场所进行表演。你获得+1状态加值，用于胁迫的检定，以及在大型场所进行表演时的听觉表演检定。你可以解消该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.9yzlmYUdvdQshTDF]{法术效果：扩音器}

升阶（5环） 你的声音最远可在1,200英尺外被清晰听见。

升阶（7环） 你的声音最远可在1英里外被清晰听见。

You amplify your voice, loud enough for you to be heard easily at a great distance. For the duration, your voice can be heard loudly and clearly by all listeners within 500 feet, even if other ambient noise would otherwise block the sound. Despite the volume, this doesn't make your voice jarring or distracting. This doesn't increase the range or area of other auditory or linguistic effects, and physical barriers such as walls and doors still block or muffle your voice as normal.

Your loud voice makes it easier to Coerce others, and the acoustics assist in Performing at a large venue. You gain a +1 status bonus to checks to Coerce and auditory Performance checks to Perform at a large venue. You can Dismiss the spell.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.9yzlmYUdvdQshTDF]{Spell Effect: Bullhorn}

Heightened (5th) Your voice can be heard clearly up to 1,200 feet away.

Heightened (7th) Your voice can be heard clearly up to 1 mile away.

Daze.name: 目眩 Daze
Daze.description:
你使目标的心智陷入混沌，并以一次精神冲击使其恍惚。该冲击造成等同于你的施法能力调整值的精神伤害；目标必须尝试一次基础意志豁免。若目标在该豁免中大失败，它还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 伤害增加 1d6。

You cloud the target's mind and daze it with a mental jolt. The jolt deals mental damage equal to your spellcasting ability modifier; the target must attempt a basic Will save. If the target critically fails the save, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你释放出一道脉冲，记录周围是否存在魔法。除是否存在魔法之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友的魔法物品与持续中的法术。你仅在幻术魔法的效果阶位低于你的侦测魔法法术阶位时，才能侦测到幻术魔法。然而，带有幻术灵光但外观并不具欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（第3）你得知该法术所侦测到的最强魔法效果的阶位或等级，由GM决定。

升阶（第4）同第3阶位，但你还会定位最高阶位魔法的来源。与模糊感官类似，你不会得知确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个5尺立方体之内（若目标比这更大，则为最接近的范围）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Message.name: 信息 Message
Message.description:
你轻声用口型说出话语，但这些话并不会从你口中发出，而是直接传到目标的耳中。其他人听不清你的话，和你平常只用口型说话时一样，但目标能听到你的话，就如同他们正站在你身旁。

如果目标愿意，他们可以用反应动作给出简短回应，或在他们下个回合以自由动作（）回应，但他们必须能看见你且在射程内才能这样做。若他们回应，他们的回应也会直接传到你的耳中，就像最初的信息一样。

升阶（3环） 该法术的射程增加至500英尺。

You mouth words quietly, but instead of coming out of your mouth, they're transferred directly to the ears of the target. While others can't hear your words any better than if you normally mouthed them, the target can hear your words as if they were standing next to you.

The target can give a brief response as a reaction, or as a free action on their next turn if they wish, but they must be able to see you and be within range to do so. If they respond, their response is delivered directly to your ear, just like the original message.

Heightened (3rd) The spell's range increases to 500 feet.

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你将注意力集中在目标物体上，敞开心智以感知魔法灵光。施放完成后，你会知道该物品是否具有魔法。你或任何你就该灵光给予建议的人，在该物品上进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{识别魔法} 时获得 +2 环境加值。若该物体为幻象，你只有在该效果的环阶低于你的阅读灵光法术的环阶时才能侦测到这一点。

升阶（3环） 你可以以最多10个物体为目标。

升阶（6环） 你可以以任意数量的物体为目标。

You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras. When the casting is complete, you know whether that item is magical. You or anyone you advise about the aura gains a +2 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic} on the item. If the object is illusory, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your read aura spell.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to 10 objects.

Heightened (6th) You can target any number of objects.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
丑角巨龙以两种方式之一吐息。巨龙在[[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用吐息武器。

  • 笑气（奥术，情绪，魅惑，精神）；巨龙呼出一团笑气云，形成一个@Template[type:cone|distance:50]。区域内每个生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:will|dc:36|traits:arcane,emotion,enchantment,mental]意志豁免，具有以下效果。

    大成功 该生物不受影响。

    成功 该生物会在不合时宜的时候咯咯发笑，使其在1轮内进行作为反应动作（）一部分的所有检定时承受–2状态减值。

    失败 该生物被无法控制的笑声折磨。它在2轮内无法使用反应动作（）。

    大失败 该生物完全被笑声压倒。它在2轮内无法使用反应动作（），并在2轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}。

  • 毒气（奥术，塑能，毒素）；巨龙呼出一团毒气云，形成一个@Template[type:cone|distance:50]，造成@Damage[16d6[poison]]伤害（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:36|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,poison]强韧基础豁免）。

The harlequin dragon breathes in one of two ways. The dragon can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

  • Laughing Gas (arcane, emotion, enchantment, mental); The dragon exhales a cloud of laughing gas in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50]. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:36|traits:arcane,emotion,enchantment,mental] save with the following effects.

    Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

    Success The creature chuckles at inopportune moments, giving it a –2 status penalty on all checks made as part of a reaction for 1 round.

    Failure The creature is plagued with uncontrollable laughter. It can't use reactions for 2 rounds.

    Critical Failure The creature is completely overcome by laughter. It can't use reactions for 2 rounds and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 2 rounds.

  • Poison Gas (arcane, evocation, poison); The dragon exhales a cloud of poisonous gas in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50] that deals @Damage[16d6[poison]] damage (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:36|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,poison] save).

Fool's Insight.name: 愚者洞见 Fool's Insight
Fool's Insight.description:
巨龙尝试快速评估一名敌人，洞悉其内心、心智与动机。巨龙进行一次察觉检定，对抗100尺内一个目标的 @Check[type:perception|defense:deception]{欺骗} 或 @Check[type:perception|defense:stealth]{潜行} DC，并产生以下效果。

大成功 巨龙对该生物的动机获得极其深刻的洞见，在1分钟内，对该生物进行的所有欺骗、交涉与威吓检定获得+2环境加值。

成功 巨龙对该生物的动机获得一些洞见，在1分钟内，对该生物进行的所有欺骗、交涉与威吓检定获得+1环境加值。

失败 巨龙未能洞悉该生物的动机。该生物在1天内暂时免疫于愚者洞见。

大失败 巨龙对该生物的动机做出错误的假设。巨龙在1小时内，对该生物进行的所有欺骗、交涉与威吓检定承受–2环境减值。该生物在1天内暂时免疫于愚者洞见。

The dragon attempts to quickly assess a foe, gaining insight into their heart, mind, and motivations. The dragon attempts a Perception check against the @Check[type:perception|defense:deception]{Deception} or @Check[type:perception|defense:stealth]{Stealth} DC of one target within 100 feet with the following effects.

Critical Success The dragon gains tremendous insight into the creature's motivations, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to all Deception, Diplomacy, and Intimidation checks attempted against the creature for 1 minute.

Success The dragon gains some insight into the creature's motivations, gaining a +1 circumstance bonus to all Deception, Diplomacy, and Intimidation checks attempted against the creature for 1 minute.

Failure The dragon gains no insight into the creature's motivations. The creature is temporarily immune to Fool's Insight for 1 day.

Critical Failure The dragon makes false assumptions about the creature's motivations. The dragon takes a –2 circumstance penalty on all Deception, Diplomacy, and Intimidation checks attempted against the creature for 1 hour. The creature is temporarily immune to Fool's Insight for 1 day.

Glitterdust (At Will).name: 闪光尘（意志） Glitterdust (At Will)
Glitterdust (At Will).description:
区域内的生物被闪烁的尘埃勾勒出轮廓。每个生物必须尝试一次反射豁免。若某个生物的隐形被该法术抵消，则它处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}而非@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}。这既适用于该生物原本就处于Invisible的情况，也适用于在该法术所造成的隐形抵消效果结束前该生物从新的隐形效果中获益的情况。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标的隐形被抵消2轮。

失败 目标在1分钟内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}，且其隐形被抵消1分钟。

大成功或大失败 目标在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}并在10分钟内处于Dazzled。其隐形被抵消10分钟。

Creatures in the area are outlined by glittering dust. Each creature must attempt a Reflex save. If a creature has its invisibility negated by this spell, it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} instead of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. This applies both if the creature was already Invisible and if it benefits from new invisibility effects before the end of the invisibility negation effect from this spell.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target's invisibility is negated for 2 rounds.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 minute and its invisibility is negated for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round and Dazzled for 10 minutes. Its invisibility is negated for 10 minutes.

Chromatic Armor.name: 彩色护甲 Chromatic Armor
Chromatic Armor.description:
你将由彩色光片制成的护甲包裹在目标身上。该护甲在20尺范围内散发明亮光照（并在接下来的20尺范围内提供昏暗光照）。每当一名生物攻击目标且与其相邻时，攻击者必须在其动作结束时尝试一次意志豁免。若失败，它将获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}，持续至其下个回合结束。无论豁免结果如何，攻击者在其下个回合结束前获得暂时免疫。该致盲效果具有光与视觉（特征）。

当你施放该法术时，在下表中掷骰 [[/r 2d8]]{1d8 twice} 以决定护甲的颜色（重掷任何重复结果）。每种颜色给予对所示伤害类型的抗力5。若你花费三个动作来施放法术，则改为掷骰 [[/r 3d8]]{three} 次。

  1. 红色 火
  2. 橙色 酸
  3. 黄色 电击
  4. 绿色 毒素
  5. 蓝色 音波
  6. 靛色 心灵
  7. 紫色 力场
  8. 匹配颜色 护甲变为与目标在过去1分钟内最近一次受到的伤害类型相匹配的颜色。若其未受到上述七种伤害类型中的任何一种伤害，或护甲已是该颜色，则再次掷骰，并重掷任何结果为8的掷骰。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.DHYWmMGmKOpRSqza]{法术效果：虹彩护甲}

升阶（+3） 抗力增加5。

You wrap the target in armor made of sheets of colored light. The armor sheds bright light for 20 feet (and dim light for the next 20 feet). Whenever a creature attacks the target and is adjacent to it, the attacker must attempt a Will save at the end of its action. On a failure, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the end of its next turn. Regardless of the result of the save, the attacker is temporarily immune until the end of its next turn. The dazzling effect has the light and visual traits.

When you cast the spell, roll [[/r 2d8]]{1d8 twice} on the table below to see the armor's colors (rerolling any duplicates). Each color grants resistance 5 to the indicated damage type. If you spend three actions to Cast the Spell, roll [[/r 3d8]]{three} times instead.

  1. Red fire
  2. Orange acid
  3. Yellow electricity
  4. Green poison
  5. Blue sonic
  6. Indigo mental
  7. Violet force
  8. Matching Color The armor becomes the color matching the type of damage the target took most recently in the past minute. If it didn't take any of those seven types of damage or the armor is already that color, roll again, rerolling any results of 8.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.DHYWmMGmKOpRSqza]{Spell Effect: Chromatic Armor}

Heightened (+3) The resistance is increased by 5.

Chromatic Ray.name: 虹彩射线 Chromatic Ray
Chromatic Ray.description:
你发出一道彩色的光线射向敌人，光线的颜色决定其魔法效果。进行一次法术攻击掷骰。若命中，掷[[/r 1d4]]{1d4}以决定你施放的是哪一道光束。若光线造成伤害，则在大成功或大失败命中时该伤害加倍。任何适用于光线的额外特性会在颜色名称后以括号列出。

  1. 红色（火）光线对目标造成 @Damage[30[fire]] 伤害。
  2. 橙色（酸）光线对目标造成 @Damage[40[acid]] 伤害。
  3. 黄色（电击）光线对目标造成 @Damage[50[electricity]] 伤害。
  4. 绿色（毒素）光线对目标造成 @Damage[25[poison]] 伤害，且目标必须强韧豁免成功，否则为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} 持续1分钟（大成功或大失败失败时为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}）。

升阶（6环） @Damage[40[fire]]{红色}、@Damage[50[acid]]{橙色}、@Damage[60[electricity]]{黄色}与@Damage[35[poison]]{绿色}的伤害各增加10。掷[[/r 1d8]]{1d8}以决定光线的颜色，使用上方1–4的结果，以及下方5–8的结果。

  1. 蓝色 光线具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.znv4ECL7ZtuiagtA]{Petrify}法术的效果。在大成功或大失败命中时，只要目标仍因flesh to stone效果而处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed}，它便处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}。
  2. 靛色（emotion, incapacitation, mental）光线具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY]{Confusion}法术的效果。在大成功或大失败命中时，改为具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs]{Warp Mind}的效果。
  3. 紫色 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed}，持续1分钟。它还必须意志豁免成功，否则被传送到距你正后方120尺处（若该处没有足够空间使其出现，则它出现在最近的开放空间）；这是一个传送效果。
  4. 强烈色彩 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}直到你下一回合结束，若你的攻击掷骰为大成功或大失败命中则改为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}。再次掷骰并叠加另一种颜色的效果（结果为8时重掷）。

You send out a ray of colored light streaming toward your enemy, with a magical effect depending on the ray's color. Make a spell attack roll. If you hit, roll [[/r 1d4]]{1d4} to see which beam you cast. If the ray deals damage, that damage is doubled on a critical hit. Any additional traits that apply to a ray are listed in parentheses just after the name of the color.

  1. Red (fire) The ray deals @Damage[30[fire]] damage to the target.
  2. Orange (acid) The ray deals @Damage[40[acid]] damage to the target.
  3. Yellow (electricity) The ray deals @Damage[50[electricity]] damage to the target.
  4. Green (poison) The ray deals @Damage[25[poison]] damage to the target, and the target must succeed at a Fortitude save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 minute (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} on a critical failure).

Heightened (6th) The damage for @Damage[40[fire]]{Red}, @Damage[50[acid]]{Orange}, @Damage[60[electricity]]{Yellow}, and @Damage[35[poison]]{Green} each increase by 10. Roll [[/r 1d8]]{1d8} to determine the ray's color, using the results for 1-4 above and the results for 5-8 below.

  1. Blue The ray has the effect of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.znv4ECL7ZtuiagtA]{Petrify} spell. On a critical hit, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} as long as it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed} by the flesh to stone effect.
  2. Indigo (emotion, incapacitation, mental) The ray has the effect of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY]{Confusion} spell. On a critical hit, it has the effect of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs]{Warp Mind} instead.
  3. Violet The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed} for 1 minute. It must also succeed at a will save or be teleported 120 feet directly away from you (if there isn't room for it to appear there, it appears in the nearest open space); this is a teleportation effect.
  4. Intense Color The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the end of your next turn, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} if your attack roll was a critical hit. Roll again and add the effects of another color (rerolling results of 8).

Clairvoyance.name: 千里眼 Clairvoyance
Clairvoyance.description:
你在射程内的一个位置创造一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的漂浮之眼（即使该位置在你的视觉线或效果线之外）。这只眼睛无法移动，但你可以如同使用你正常的视觉感官一般，从该点向所有方向视物。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} floating eye at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect). The eye can't move, but you can see in all directions from that point as if using your normal visual senses.

Clairaudience.name: 千里耳 Clairaudience
Clairaudience.description:
你在射程内的一个位置创造一个漂浮的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}耳朵（即使它在你的视觉线或效果线之外）。它无法移动，但你可以通过这个耳朵聆听，如同使用你正常的听觉感官一般。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} floating ear at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect). It can't move, but you can hear through the ear as if using your normal auditory senses.

Haste.name: 加速 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法赋予目标更快行动的能力。它获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{迅捷（状态）} 状态，并且每轮只能将该额外动作用于打击和疾行动作。

升阶（7环） 你可以以最多6个生物为目标。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{法术效果：加速}

Magic empowers the target to act faster. It gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} condition and can use the extra action each round only for Strike and Stride actions.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 6 creatures.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{Spell Effect: Haste}

Translate.name: 请提供需要翻译的英文原文内容（可直接粘贴文本或上传图片）。 Translate
Translate.description:
你施放该法术时，目标能够理解它正在听到或阅读的一种语言的含义。这不会让它理解密码、以隐喻方式表达的语言等（由GM酌情裁定）。如果目标能听到多种语言并且知道这一点，它可以选择要理解的语言；否则，随机从这些语言中选择一种。

强化（3环） 目标也能说该语言。

强化（4环） 你可以以最多10个生物为目标，且目标也能说该语言。

The target can understand the meaning of a single language it is hearing or reading when you cast the spell. This doesn't let it understand codes, language couched in metaphor, and the like (subject to GM discretion). If the target can hear multiple languages and knows that, it can choose which language to understand; otherwise, choose one of the languages randomly.

Heightened (3rd) The target can also speak the language.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures, and targets can also speak the language.

Comedic Gold.name: 喜剧黄金 Comedic Gold
Comedic Gold.description:
巨龙表演一段滑稽的喜剧节目，用机智的俏皮话和尖刻的笑料迷住观众。每个非巨龙生物，若位于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:100] 内，必须成功通过一次 @Check[type:will|dc:36] 意志豁免，以避免变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{迷魂（状态）}。该效果持续时间为1轮，但巨龙可以在后续轮使用一个带有专注（特征）的动作，将所有受影响生物的持续时间延长1轮，无需进行豁免。当生物因“喜剧黄金”而处于迷魂（状态）时，该生物不能因敌对动作而结束其迷魂（状态）。一旦某生物成功通过对抗“喜剧黄金”的豁免，该生物在24小时内暂时免疫“喜剧黄金”。

The dragon performs a hilarious comedy routine, enthralling their audience with witty quips and pointed jests. Each non-dragon creature with a @Template[type:emanation|distance:100] must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:36] save to avoid becoming @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated}. The effect lasts for 1 round, but the dragon can use an action on subsequent rounds, which has the concentrate trait, to extend the duration by 1 round for all affected creatures without a save. While fascinated by Comedic Gold, a creature can't end its fascinated condition due to hostile actions. Once a creature succeeds at a save against Comedic Gold, that creature is temporarily immune to Comedic Gold for 24 hours.

Translate (Self Only).name: （仅自身） Translate (Self Only)
Translate (Self Only).description:
当你施放该法术时，目标可以理解其正在听到或阅读的一种语言的含义。这不会让其理解暗号、以隐喻方式表达的语言等（由GM酌情决定）。如果目标能够听到多种语言并且知道这一点，它可以选择要理解哪种语言；否则，从这些语言中随机选择一种。

升阶（3环） 目标也可以说该语言。

升阶（4环） 你可以以最多10个生物为目标，且目标也可以说该语言。

The target can understand the meaning of a single language it is hearing or reading when you cast the spell. This doesn't let it understand codes, language couched in metaphor, and the like (subject to GM discretion). If the target can hear multiple languages and knows that, it can choose which language to understand; otherwise, choose one of the languages randomly.

Heightened (3rd) The target can also speak the language.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures, and targets can also speak the language.

Mislead.name: 误导 Mislead
Mislead.description:
你使自己变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}，并创造一个自己的幻象分身。当你维持法术时，你可以用心灵指示你的分身在该轮要遵循的行动路线。你的分身如同拥有你完整数量的动作一般行动，但它实际上无法影响环境中的任何事物。分身与你的隐形都会持续到法术的持续时间结束。执行敌对动作不会终止“误导”的隐形，就像4环隐形法术一样。识破分身是幻术的生物不一定知道你是隐形的，而能看见你隐形形态的生物也不一定知道你的分身是幻术。

如果你施放法术、攻击，或以其他方式与另一名生物交互，作为该动作的一部分，你可以尝试进行一次欺瞒检定，对抗观察者的察觉DC，以使他们相信是你的分身使用了该动作。这无法欺骗任何知晓你的分身是幻术的人；若该次攻击显然不可能来自分身，也同样无效。例如，如果你发射一道射线，你可以让它看起来像是从分身发出的，只要分身的位置合适；但如果你用剑攻击，而你的分身在房间另一侧远离目标，你的欺瞒检定将自动失败。

You turn yourself @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} and create an illusory duplicate of yourself. When you Sustain the Spell, you can mentally dictate a course of action for your duplicate to follow that round. Your duplicate acts as though it had your full number of actions, though it can't actually affect anything in the environment. Both the duplicate and your invisibility persist for the spell's duration. Performing a hostile action doesn't end mislead's invisibility, just like a 4th-level invisibility spell. A creature that determines the duplicate is an illusion doesn't necessarily know you're invisible, and one that can see your invisible form doesn't necessarily know your duplicate is an illusion.

If you Cast a Spell, attack, or otherwise interact with another creature, as a part of that action you can attempt a Deception check against observers' Perception DCs to convince them your duplicate used that action. This doesn't fool anyone who's aware your duplicate is an illusion, nor does it work if the attack obviously couldn't have come from the duplicate. For instance, if you fired a ray, you could make it look like it came from the duplicate as long as the duplicate was positioned appropriately, but if you attacked with a sword and your duplicate was across the room from the target, your Deception check would automatically fail.

Chromatic Wall.name: 虹彩墙 Chromatic Wall
Chromatic Wall.description:
你在单一的鲜艳颜色中创造一面不透明的光之墙。墙壁笔直且垂直，延伸60英尺长、30英尺高。若墙壁将穿过一个生物，则该法术失效。墙壁在其两侧各散发20英尺的明亮光照，之后再延伸20英尺的昏暗光照。你可以忽略该墙的效果。

掷骰[[/r 1d4]]以决定墙壁的颜色。每种颜色对试图穿过的物品、效果或生物都有特定效果。虹彩墙无法以通常方式被反制；取而代之的是，当以特定法术为目标时，每种颜色都会被自动反制，即使该法术的等级低于虹彩墙。

  1. 红色 该墙会摧毁将穿过的远程武器弹药（例如箭矢与弩矢），并对任何穿过者造成@Damage[20[fire]]伤害，进行一次@Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)|basic:true]豁免。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.3puDanGfpEt6jK5k]{冰锥术}可以反制一面红色虹彩墙。
  2. 橙色 该墙会摧毁将穿过的投掷武器，并对任何穿过者造成@Damage[25[acid]]伤害，进行一次@Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)|basic:true]豁免。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.g8QqHpv2CWDwmIm1]{风之疾袭}可以反制一面橙色虹彩墙。
  3. 黄色 该墙阻止酸、寒冷、电击、火、力场、负能量、正能量与音波效果穿过，并对任何穿过者造成@Damage[30[electricity]]伤害，进行一次@Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)|basic:true]豁免。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{解离术}可以反制一面黄色虹彩墙。
  4. 绿色 该墙阻止毒素、气体与吐息武器穿过。它对任何穿过者造成@Damage[10[poison]]伤害，并使其成为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭（状态） 1}持续1分钟。一次@Check[type:fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)|basic:true]豁免会减少伤害，并在成功时抵消力竭状态。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.115Xp9E38CJENhNS]{穿墙术}可以反制一面绿色虹彩墙。

升阶（7环） 该法术的持续时间增加至1小时。掷骰[[/r 1d8]]以决定墙壁的颜色；5-8的结果如下。一面@Damage[30[fire]]{红色}、@Damage[35[acid]]{橙色}、@Damage[40[electricity]]{黄色}或@Damage[20[poison]]{绿色}的墙会额外造成10点伤害。

  1. 蓝色 该墙阻止听觉、石化、音波与视觉效果穿过，并使穿过的生物受到@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.znv4ECL7ZtuiagtA]{石化术}的效果影响。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{魔法飞弹}可以反制一面蓝色虹彩墙。
  2. 靛色 该墙阻止预言与精神效果穿过，并使穿过者受到@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs]{扭曲心智}的效果影响。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.DyiD239dNS7RIxZE]{灼目之光}可以反制一面靛色虹彩墙。
  3. 紫色 该墙阻止法术以另一侧为目标（区域效果仍如常跨越）。穿过的生物必须在一次@Check[type:will|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)]意志豁免中成功，否则其成为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}持续1分钟；在大失败时，该生物改为被送往另一个位面，效果如同@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{异界传送}。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{解除魔法}可以反制一面紫色虹彩墙。
  4. 重骰，且穿过该墙的生物在其豁免上承受-2环境减值。

You create an opaque wall of light in a single vibrant color. The wall is straight and vertical, stretching 60 feet long and 30 feet high. If the wall would pass through a creature, the spell is lost. The wall sheds bright light for 20 feet on each side, and dim light for the next 20 feet. You can ignore the wall's effects.

Roll [[/r 1d4]] to determine the color of the wall. Each color has a particular effect on items, effects, or creatures that attempt to pass through. Chromatic wall can't be counteracted normally; rather, each color is automatically counteracted when targeted by a specific spell, even if that spell's level is lower than that of chromatic wall.

  1. Red The wall destroys ranged weapon ammunition (such as arrows and crossbow bolts) that would pass through, and it deals @Damage[20[fire]] damage to anyone passing through, with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)|basic:true] save. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.3puDanGfpEt6jK5k]{Cone of Cold} can counteract a red chromatic wall.
  2. Orange The wall destroys thrown weapons that would pass through, and it deals @Damage[25[acid]] damage to anyone passing through, with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)|basic:true] save. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.g8QqHpv2CWDwmIm1]{Gust of Wind} can counteract an orange chromatic wall.
  3. Yellow The wall stops acid, cold, electricity, fire, force, negative, positive, and sonic effects from passing through, and it deals @Damage[30[electricity]] damage to anyone passing through, with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)|basic:true] save. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{Disintegrate} can counteract a yellow chromatic wall.
  4. Green The wall stops toxins, gases, and breath weapons from passing through. It deals @Damage[10[poison]] damage to anyone passing through and makes them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 minute. A @Check[type:fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)|basic:true] save reduces the damage and negates the Enfeebled condition on a success. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.115Xp9E38CJENhNS]{Passwall} can counteract a green chromatic wall.

Heightened (7th) The spell's duration increases to 1 hour. Roll [[/r 1d8]] to determine the wall's color; the results for 5-8 are below. A @Damage[30[fire]]{red}, @Damage[35[acid]]{orange}, @Damage[40[electricity]]{yellow}, or @Damage[20[poison]]{green} wall deals an extra 10 damage.

  1. Blue The wall stops auditory, petrification, sonic and visual effects from passing through, and creatures passing through are subject to the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.znv4ECL7ZtuiagtA]{Petrify}. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{Magic Missile} can counteract a blue chromatic wall.
  2. Indigo The wall stops divination and mental effects from passing through, and those passing through are subject to the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs]{Warp Mind}. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.DyiD239dNS7RIxZE]{Searing Light} can counteract an indigo chromatic wall.
  3. Violet The wall prevents spells from targeting the other side (area effects still cross as normal). Creatures passing through must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)] save or they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 minute; on a critical failure, the creature is instead sent to another plane, with the effect of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{Plane Shift}. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} can counteract a violet chromatic wall.
  4. Reroll, and creatures that pass through the wall take a -2 circumstance penalty to their saves.

Prismatic Spray.name: 虹彩喷射 Prismatic Spray
Prismatic Spray.description:
一道彩虹般的光束喷流自你张开的手掌倾泻而出。区域内的每个生物必须在下表中掷1d8，以确定哪一道光束影响它，然后尝试进行所示类型的豁免。该表注明了适用于每种射线的任何额外特征。如果一个生物被多道光束击中，它所有豁免都使用相同的d20结果。对于所有射线，豁免成功会使该生物免受该效果影响。

虹光喷射

1d8 颜色 豁免 效果（特征）
1 红色 反射 50 火伤害（火）
2 橙色 反射 60 酸伤害（酸）
3 黄色 反射 70 电击伤害（电击）
4 绿色 强韧 30 毒素伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}，持续1分钟（毒素）
5 蓝色 强韧 如同受到 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.znv4ECL7ZtuiagtA]{石化术} 的影响
6 靛色 意志 困惑，如同 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs]{扭曲心智} 法术（心智）
7 紫色 意志 迟缓1分钟；若大失败，则被送往另一个位面，如同 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{异界传送}（传送）
8 强力光束 - 受到两道光束影响——掷两次，对任何重复结果或结果为8的掷骰重掷

@Check[type:fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)] @Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)] @Check[type:will|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)]

A spray of rainbow light beams cascades from your open hand. Each creature in the area must roll 1d8 on the table below to see which beam affects it, then attempt a saving throw of the indicated type. The table notes any additional traits that apply to each type of ray. If a creature is struck by multiple beams, it uses the same d20 result for all its saving throws. For all rays, a successful saving throw negates the effect for that creature.

Prismatic Spray

1d8 Color Save Effects (Traits)
1 Red Reflex 50 fire damage (fire)
2 Orange Reflex 60 acid damage (acid)
3 Yellow Reflex 70 electricity damage (electricity)
4 Green Fortitude 30 poison damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 minute (poison)
5 Blue Fortitude Affected as if by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.znv4ECL7ZtuiagtA]{Petrify}
6 Indigo Will Confused, as the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs]{Warp Mind} spell (mental)
7 Violet Will Slowed for 1 minute; if a critical failure, sent to another plane, as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{Plane Shift} (teleportation)
8 Potent beam - Affected by two beams - roll twice, rerolling any duplicates or results of 8

@Check[type:fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)] @Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)] @Check[type:will|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.spellDC.value)]

Chromatic Image.name: 虹彩幻影 Chromatic Image
Chromatic Image.description:
你唤出3个自己的幻象影像，而你们4个各自呈现不同的颜色；每当有人攻击你时，你们的颜色都会变化。这具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.j8vIoIEWElvpwkcI]{镜像术}的效果，但不同之处在于：每当一名敌人摧毁其中一个影像时，掷骰 [[/r 1d4]]{1d4} 来确定该影像在被摧毁时是哪种颜色。攻击者承受对应的效果。

  1. 红色 @Damage[5[fire]] 伤害 和 @Damage[5[mental]] 伤害。
  2. 橙色 @Damage[5[acid]] 伤害 和 @Damage[5[mental]] 伤害。
  3. 黄色 @Damage[5[electricity]] 伤害 和 @Damage[5[mental]] 伤害。
  4. 绿色 @Damage[5[poison]] 伤害 和 @Damage[5[mental]] 伤害，此外其获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 1}。

You call forth three illusory images of yourself, and each of the four of you takes on a different color, your colors all shifting each time someone attacks you. This has the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.j8vIoIEWElvpwkcI]{Mirror Image}, except that whenever a foe destroys one of the images, roll [[/r 1d4]]{1d4} to see which color the image was when it was destroyed. The attacker takes the corresponding effect.

  1. Red @Damage[5[fire]] damage and @Damage[5[mental]] damage.
  2. Orange @Damage[5[acid]] damage and @Damage[5[mental]] damage.
  3. Yellow @Damage[5[electricity]] damage and @Damage[5[mental]] damage.
  4. Green @Damage[5[poison]] damage and @Damage[5[mental]] damage, plus it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Cloak of Colors.name: 彩色斗篷 Cloak of Colors
Cloak of Colors.description:
一件色彩翻涌的斗篷笼罩着目标。生物在与其相邻时会 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}，而攻击目标会引发一道炫目的光闪。以近战攻击命中目标的生物必须尝试一次意志豁免。该生物在其回合结束前暂时免疫；此效果具有失能（特征）。

成功 攻击者不受影响。

失败 攻击者 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} 持续 1 轮。

大失败 攻击者 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} 持续 1 轮。

A cloak of swirling colors shrouds the target. Creatures are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} while adjacent to it, and attacking the target causes a brilliant flash of light. A creature that hits the target with a melee attack must attempt a Will save.The creature is temporarily immune until the end of its turn; this effect has the incapacitation trait.

Success The attacker is unaffected.

Failure The attacker is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The attacker is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} for 1 round.

Illusory Scene.name: 幻象场景 Illusory Scene
Illusory Scene.description:
你构成一个虚构的场景，其中包含至多10个彼此独立的生物或物体，体型各不相同，且它们都必须位于该法术的区域内。这些元素会产生恰当的声音与气味，并且接触时手感也正确。幻觉场景中的元素无法说话。与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.f8SBoXiXQjlCKqly]{Illusory Creature}法术不同，你场景中的生物缺乏战斗能力与数据。你的场景不包含对其周围环境的改变，不过你可以将场景置于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HBJPsonQnWcC3qdX]{Hallucinatory Terrain}法术的幻觉环境之中。

当你创造场景时，你可以选择让它保持静态，或遵循一段程序。尽管静态场景是固定不动的，它仍包含基础的自然移动。例如，风吹动一张幻觉纸片会让它沙沙作响。一段程序最长可达1分钟，结束后会重复。例如，你可以创造两名兽人互相战斗的场景，并且每次重复时战斗都会以相同方式进行。如果你创造了一个循环，这两名战斗者会在场景开始与结束时处于相同位置，不过你可以将程序衔接得更平滑，从而使循环何时结束与开始难以分辨。任何人若观察该场景超过几分钟，几乎总会注意到它在循环。你无法在创造幻觉后改变这段程序。

任何接触图像任意部分的生物，或使用“搜索”动作检视它的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻觉。若他们与幻觉的某一部分互动，他们只会识破那一部分。只有在大成功或大失败时，他们才会识破整个场景。

升阶（6环）你场景中的生物或物体可以说话。你必须在创造你的程序时，为每个演员说出特定台词。该法术会为每个演员伪装你的声音。

升阶（8环）同6环版本，且持续时间为无限。

You form an imaginary scene that includes up to 10 discrete creatures or objects of various sizes, all of which must be within the spell's area. These elements generate appropriate sounds and smells, and they feel right to the touch. Elements of an illusory scene are incapable of speech. Unlike with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.f8SBoXiXQjlCKqly]{Illusory Creature} spell, creatures in your scene lack combat abilities and statistics. Your scene doesn't include changes to the environment around it, though you can place your scene within the illusory environment of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HBJPsonQnWcC3qdX]{Hallucinatory Terrain} spell.

When you create the scene, you can choose to have it be static or follow a program. Though a static scene is stationary, it includes basic natural movement. For example, wind blowing on an illusory piece of paper would rustle it. A program can be up to 1 minute long and repeats when finished. For instance, you could create a scene of two orcs fighting each other, and the fight would go the same way for each repetition. If you create a loop, the two fighters end up in the same place at the start of the scene and at the end of it, but you can smooth the program so it's hard to tell when the loop ends and begins. Anyone observing the scene for more than a few minutes almost always notices it looping. You're unable to alter the program after you create the illusion.

Any creature that touches any part of the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion. If they interact with a portion of the illusion, they disbelieve only that portion. They disbelieve the entire scene only on a critical success.

Heightened (6th) Creatures or objects in your scene can speak. You must speak the specific lines for each actor when creating your program. The spell disguises your voice for each actor.

Heightened (8th) As the 6th-level version, and the duration is unlimited.

See the Unseen.name: 看见隐形者 See the Unseen
See the Unseen.description:
你的凝视能穿透幻象，发现@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的生物与灵体。你能看见隐形生物，如同它们并未隐形一般，不过它们的特性会变得模糊，使其处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}并且难以辨认。你也能看见非实体生物，例如幽灵（特征），它们会在距离某个物体表面10尺内从该物体内部穿过；你会透过这些物体看见它们呈现为模糊的形状。更细微的线索也使你在进行识破幻象的检定时获得+2状态加值。

升阶（5环） 此法术的持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：看见不可见者}

Your gaze pierces through illusions and finds @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} creatures and spirits. You can see invisible creatures as though they weren't invisible, although their features are blurred, making them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} and difficult to identify. You can also see incorporeal creatures, like ghosts, phased through an object from within 10 feet of an object's surface as blurry shapes seen through those objects. Subtler clues also grant you a +2 status bonus to checks you make to disbelieve illusions.

Heightened (5th) This spell has a duration of 8 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{Spell Effect: See the Unseen}

Confounding Truths.name: 令人困惑的真相 Confounding Truths
Confounding Truths.description:
巨龙说出一句盘根错节的俏皮话，暗示着60尺内一个目标的深层内在真相。该生物尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:36] 豁免。若为大成功，该生物经历一次个人启示，在1分钟内获得+2状态加值于攻击掷骰、伤害掷骰，以及对抗恐惧效果的豁免。若为失败，该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} 状态5轮（大失败则为1分钟）。无论豁免结果如何，该生物随后在24小时内暂时免疫「混淆真相」。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.vjl2gfhvEs1K5uey]{效果：混淆真相（大成功）}

The dragon utters a convoluted quip that teases at deep inner truths about one target within 60 feet. The creature attempts a @Check[type:will|dc:36] save. On a critical success, the creature experiences a personal revelation, gaining a +2 status bonus to attack rolls, damage rolls, and saves against fear effects for 1 minute. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 5 rounds (1 minute on a critical failure). Regardless of the result of the save, the creature then becomes temporarily immune to Confounding Truths for 24 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.vjl2gfhvEs1K5uey]{Effect: Confounding Truths (Critical Success)}

Ancient Harlequin Dragon (Spellcaster).publicNotes:
丑角巨龙是终极的喜剧家，是聪明而富有洞察力的弄臣，能与世界斗智，一边施展轻松的恶作剧，一边喷吐狡黠的侮辱、机智的俏皮话与令人捧腹的笑话。尽管它们看起来显而易见地轻浮，丑角巨龙的戏谑却蕴含更深层的含义，常常将聚光灯打在社会的怪癖、逻辑谬误与个人真相之上。

丑角巨龙极具洞察力，并以能在一瞥之间评估人、局势，甚至社会风尚为傲。它们擅长从对象的外在行为中辨识隐藏的动机、情绪与偏见，常常得知连对象自己都尚未发现的秘密。随后，丑角巨龙会以幽默的方式向对象揭示这些洞见：用机智的笑话、嘲弄与恶作剧来掩藏更深的意义，而那意义会在自省与经历中逐步显露。多数丑角巨龙希望对象能解开并理解它们所传达的感知，从而带来有意义的个人启示与积极改变。借由这些手段，它们希望自己不请自来的忠告能够扎根，影响哪怕最沉默、最顽固、最停滞的对象，使其踏上自我启示与成长之路。就这样，丑角巨龙的幽默是一面镜子，将对象的动机与缺陷反照回去。对象是否接受并从所见的映照中学习，仍取决于他们自己。丑角巨龙可以提供启示与引导，但真正的改变必须发自内心。

丑角巨龙认为自己极其聪慧、机敏而睿智。它们尖刻且爱讽刺（但很少怀有恶意），这可能会让与它们交互的人感到恼火。和多数巨龙一样，它们很骄傲。它们希望他人欣赏自己、欣赏自己的机智与感知；当它们的戏谑遭遇冷淡或漠视时，这会刺痛它们的自尊。被冷落的丑角巨龙通常会用“认知”来安慰自己：不欣赏它们笑话的人只是没那么聪明，无法领会更深的含义，于是丑角巨龙会把这类蠢货当作浪费吐息。更糟的是那些能够理解丑角巨龙戏谑中隐藏的教训，却要么未能从中学习，要么将这些启示斥为谬误、将忠告视为不可靠的对象。此类侮辱与顽固的傲慢很少能让丑角巨龙消沉太久。

丑角巨龙总在狩猎新鲜的观众——这一习惯让它们一直在路上。它们热爱旅行，几乎不会长期保有巢穴（如果它们真的住在某处的话）。它们偏好城市区域或能与聪慧生物交谈并表演的地区；它们讨厌孤独，也很容易感到无聊。当丑角巨龙相遇时，往往会演变为一场弄臣决斗：这是一种令人愉悦、节奏迅疾的交锋，由犀利的俏皮话与爆笑的妙语构成，来来回回甚至能持续好几天。

丑角巨龙知道，绝不该以封面评断一本书，也不该以外表或环境评断一个生物。它们以不仅能看见生物当下的状态，也能看见其未来潜力为傲，并自认是卓越的角色评鉴者。丑角巨龙不会把精力浪费在拒绝倾听之人身上，也不会把精力花在会利用巨龙赐予的洞见为世界带来邪恶之人身上；相反，它们旨在为自己取悦的对象提供引导与帮助，让世界比它们初见时更美好。

Tavalavat

在所有丑角巨龙中最具传奇色彩的之一是塔瓦拉瓦特（Tavalavat）。她是一位洞察力与娱乐性兼具的弄臣，甚至引起了异界存在的注意，并由此踏上穿行外环的旅程。据说塔瓦拉瓦特居住在涅槃天，引导阿伽西翁与天使通过愉悦的嘲弄与发自真心的喜乐迈向自我开悟。

丑角的宝库

与大多数巨龙不同，许多丑角巨龙并不在乎黄金、珠宝或无价的宝藏，而更在乎聪明的俏皮话、幽默的笑话、某个尤其难以捉摸的魔法戏法的秘密，以及所有之中最珍贵的宝藏：笑声。

嘲弄的凄厉者

邪恶的丑角巨龙亦被称为“嘲弄的凄厉者”，它们利用自身能力塑造狂热的爪牙，以操纵、揭露秘密、摧毁人生并颠覆社会。它们的笑话残忍而沉重，总是将对象狠狠踩进尘埃，或把他们更深地推入悲伤与绝望之中。

Harlequin dragons are the ultimate comedians, clever and insightful jesters who match wits with the world, playing light-hearted pranks while spouting cunning insults, witty quips, and hilarious jokes. Despite their obvious frivolity, a harlequin dragon's jests contain deeper meaning, often shining a spotlight on societal idiosyncrasies, logical fallacies, and personal truths.

Harlequin dragons are incredibly insightful, and they pride themselves on being able to assess people, situations, and even social mores at a glance. They're adept at discerning hidden motivations, feelings, and biases from a subject's outer behavior, often learning secrets that their subjects have yet to discover about themselves. Harlequin dragons then reveal these insights to their subjects through humor, with witty jokes, mockeries, and pranks crafted to hide deeper meaning that's revealed through introspection and experience. Most harlequin dragons hope that their subjects can unravel and understand the wisdom they impart, leading to meaningful personal revelations and positive change. Through their methods, they hope their unsolicited advice can take root and influence even the most reticent, stubborn, and stagnant subjects, placing them on a path to self-revelation and growth. In this way, a harlequin dragon's humor is a mirror that reflects a subject's motivations and flaws back at them. Whether the subject accepts and learns from what they see reflected remains in their own hands. While a harlequin dragon can offer revelation and guidance, true change must come from within.

Harlequin dragons consider themselves incredibly brilliant, witty, and wise. They're snarky and sarcastic (though rarely maliciously so), which can grate on the nerves of those with whom they interact. Like most dragons, they're proud. They want others to appreciate them, their wit, and their wisdom, and it wounds their pride when their jests are met with disinterest or disregard. A jilted harlequin dragon typically consoles themselves with the "knowledge" that anyone who doesn't appreciate their jokes simply isn't clever enough to grasp the deeper meaning, and so harlequin dragons treat such fools as a waste of breath. Worse are those subjects who understand the lessons hidden in a harlequin dragon's jests and either fail to learn from them or reject the revelations as faulty or the advice as unsound. Such insults and stubborn insolence rarely keep a harlequin dragon down for long.

Harlequin dragons are always on the hunt for fresh audiences—a habit that keeps them on the road. They love to travel and rarely keep a lair for long (if they reside in one at all). They prefer urban areas or regions where they can converse and perform for intelligent creatures, and they dislike solitude and bore easily. When harlequin dragons meet, it often results in a jester's duel, an entertaining and fast-paced war of cutting quips and hilarious witticisms that can go back and forth for days.

Harlequin dragons know that one should never judge a book by its cover or a creature by its appearance or circumstances. They pride themselves on seeing not only a creature's present status but also their future potential, and they consider themselves excellent judges of character. Harlequin dragons won't waste their efforts on those who refuse to listen or those who would use their dragon-given insights to bring evil into the world; rather, they aim to offer guidance and help to those they entertain, leaving the world a better place than they found it.

Tavalavat

Among the most legendary of all harlequin dragons is Tavalavat, a jester so insightful and entertaining that she caught the attention of otherworldly beings and embarked upon a journey through the Outer Spheres. It's believed that Tavalavat resides in Nirvana, guiding agathions and angels to self-enlightenment through pleasant mockery and heartfelt joy.

A Harlequin's Hoard

Unlike most dragons, many harlequin dragons care not for gold, jewels, or priceless treasures but for clever quips, humorous jokes, the secret of a particularly elusive magic trick, and the most prized treasure of all: laughter.

The Mocking Grim

Evil harlequin dragons, also referred to as the "Mocking Grim," use their abilities to shape devoted minions to manipulate, reveal secrets, ruin lives, and upend societies. Their jokes are cruel and crushing, always driving their subjects to the dirt or deeper into sadness and desperation.
Ancient Harlequin Dragon (Spellcaster).prototypeToken: 远古丑角巨龙 Ancient Harlequin Dragon

Grand Garley.name: 加利大公 Grand Garley
Grand Garley.publicNotes:
加利老爹（男性食客奥尔波克）以体魄上的赋礼而非精神上的赋礼而闻名（尽管他本身也是一位狡猾的战略家与博弈高手）。作为常驻的食量冠军，这位惊人的奥尔波克是辛特那支传奇竞食队的队长。体重达四分之一吨，他被广泛认为是岛上最伟大的运动员。虽然任何人都欢迎在喂食树下的比赛表参与竞赛，但只有少数人能闯过加利的队友，并有机会挑战他本人——“大碗”。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.lAghqMX21tcEzpqi]{辛特：风铃草的粮仓}

Grand Garley (male orpok eater) is known for his physical rather than mental gifts (although he is a cunning strategist and gamesman in his own right). The resident eating champion, this prodigious orpok is the captain of Hinter's storied competitive eating team. Weighing in at a quarter ton, he's widely considered to be the island's greatest athlete. While all comers are welcome to compete at the contest tables under the Feeding Tree, only a few advance past Garley's teammates and get a chance to take on "the Big Bowl" himself.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.lAghqMX21tcEzpqi]{Hinter: Breadbasket of Bluebell}
Grand Garley.blurb:
男性奥波克食人者
male orpok eater

Young Harlequin Dragon.name: 年轻的丑角巨龙 Young Harlequin Dragon
Young Harlequin Dragon.tokenName: 年轻的丑角巨龙 Young Harlequin Dragon

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60英尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Jester's Jeer.name: 小丑的嘲弄 Jester's Jeer
Jester's Jeer.description:
触发 一名敌人对巨龙的打击造成危急失败。

效果 巨龙嘲弄触发生物的无能，使触发生物充满恐惧，直到其对巨龙命中一击为止。巨龙尝试对触发生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize}。若成功，则触发生物的惊惧（状态）在其回合结束时不能降低至1以下，直到其成功以打击命中巨龙，或其至少有1轮未观察到或通过感官感知到巨龙为止。

Trigger A foe critically fails a Strike against the dragon.

Effect The dragon pokes fun at the triggering creature's incompetence, filling the triggering creature with dread until they land a blow against the dragon. The dragon attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} the triggering creature. On a success, the triggering creature's frightened condition can't decrease to less than 1 at the end of its turn until it either successfully Strikes the dragon or until it doesn't observe or sense the dragon for at least 1 round.

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术先天法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Mirror Image.name: 镜像术 Mirror Image
Mirror Image.description:
三个你的幻象在你的空间内盘旋，可能使攻击你的人击中其中一个幻象而不是你。任何本应命中你的攻击都有一定的随机概率改为命中你的某个幻象而不是你。若三个幻象都仍在，则命中你的概率为 1/4（在 [[/r 1d4]] 中掷出 1）。若剩余两个幻象，则命中你的概率为 1/3（在 [[/r 1d6]] 中掷出 1-2）。若只剩一个幻象，则命中你的概率为 1/2（在 [[/r 1d6]] 中掷出 1-3）。

一旦某个幻象被命中，它就会被摧毁。若一次攻击掷骰未能命中你的 AC 但没有大失败，它会摧毁一个幻象，但不会产生额外效果（即使该攻击在失败时通常也会有某种效果）。若一次攻击掷骰为大成功且本应命中某个幻象，则其中一个幻象被摧毁，并且该次攻击掷骰改为对你获得成功。一旦所有幻象都被摧毁，该法术结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.0PO5mFRhh9HxGAtv]{法术效果: 镜像术}

Three illusory images of you swirl about your space, potentially causing those who attack you to hit one of the images instead of you. Any attack that would hit you has a random chance of hitting one of your images instead of you. If all three images remain, there is a 1 in 4 chance of hitting you (1 on [[/r 1d4]]). With two images remaining, there is a 1 in 3 chance of hitting you (1-2 on [[/r 1d6]]). With only one image, the chances are 1 in 2 (1-3 on [[/r 1d6]]).

Once an image is hit, it is destroyed. If an attack roll fails to hit your AC but doesn't critically fail, it destroys an image but has no additional effect (even if the attack would normally have an effect on a failure). If an attack roll is a critical success and would hit one of the images, one of the images is destroyed and the attack roll becomes a success against you. Once all the images are destroyed, the spell ends.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.0PO5mFRhh9HxGAtv]{Spell Effect: Mirror Image}

Prestidigitation.name: 戏法 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法会听从你的命令。只要你维持法术，你就可以施展简单的魔法效果。每次你维持法术时，你可以从四个选项中选择一个。

  • 烹饪 冷却、加热或调味 1 磅的非生命材料。
  • 提起 缓慢地 将一个无人看管且为轻负载或更低的物体缓慢抬离地面 1 英尺。
  • 制作 创造一个临时物体，其负载可忽略不计，由凝结的魔法物质构成。该物体看起来粗糙而不自然，并且极其脆弱——不能用作工具、武器或法术材料。
  • 整理 为一个轻负载或更低的物体上色、清洁或弄脏。你可以用 10 轮的专注影响一个 1 负载的物体，而更大的物体则需要每负载 1 分钟。

戏法不能造成伤害或导致不利状态。对物体的任何实际改变（除上述所注明者之外）都只会在你维持法术期间持续。

The simplest magic does your bidding. You can perform simple magical effects for as long as you Sustain the Spell. Each time you Sustain the Spell, you can choose one of four options.

  • Cook Cool, warm, or flavor 1 pound of nonliving material.
  • Lift Slowly lift an unattended object of light Bulk or less 1 foot off the ground.
  • Make Create a temporary object of negligible Bulk, made of congealed magical substance. The object looks crude and artificial and is extremely fragile-it can't be used as a tool, weapon, or spell component.
  • Tidy Color, clean, or soil an object of light Bulk or less. You can affect an object of 1 Bulk with 10 rounds of concentration, and a larger object a 1 minute per Bulk.

Prestidigitation can't deal damage or cause adverse conditions. Any actual change to an object (beyond what is noted above) persists only as long as you Sustain the Spell.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
丑角巨龙以两种方式之一进行吐息。巨龙在[[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用吐息武器。

  • 狂笑气体（奥术，情绪，惑控，心灵）；巨龙在一个@Template[type:cone|distance:30]内呼出一团狂笑气体。区域内的每个生物都必须尝试一次@Check[type:will|dc:24|traits:arcane,emotion,enchantment,mental]豁免，产生以下效果。

    大成功该生物不受影响。

    成功该生物会在不合时宜的时刻咯咯发笑，使其在接下来1轮内，所有作为反应动作（）一部分所进行的检定都承受–2状态减值。

    失败该生物被无法控制的笑声折磨。它在接下来2轮内不能使用反应动作。

    大失败该生物完全被笑声压倒。它在接下来2轮内不能使用反应动作，并在接下来2轮内获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓1}。

  • 毒气（奥术，塑能，毒素）；巨龙在一个@Template[type:cone|distance:30]内呼出一团毒气，造成@Damage[7d6[poison]]伤害（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:24|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,poison]豁免）。

The harlequin dragon breathes in one of two ways. The dragon can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

  • Laughing Gas (arcane, emotion, enchantment, mental); The dragon exhales a cloud of laughing gas in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30]. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:24|traits:arcane,emotion,enchantment,mental] save with the following effects.

    Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

    Success The creature chuckles at inopportune moments, giving it a –2 status penalty on all checks made as part of a reaction for 1 round.

    Failure The creature is plagued with uncontrollable laughter. It can't use reactions for 2 rounds.

    Critical Failure The creature is completely overcome by laughter. It can't use reactions for 2 rounds and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 2 rounds.

  • Poison Gas (arcane, evocation, poison); The dragon exhales a cloud of poisonous gas in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] that deals @Damage[7d6[poison]] damage (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:24|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,poison] save).

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙狂乱 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
巨龙进行两次爪击打击和一次翼打击，顺序不限。

The dragon makes two claw Strikes and one wing Strike in any order.

Draconic Momentum.name: 巨龙动势 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
当巨龙用一次打击造成大成功或大失败时，他们会为其吐息武器充能。

When the dragon scores a critical hit with a Strike, they recharge their Breath Weapon.

Fool's Insight.name: 愚者洞见 Fool's Insight
Fool's Insight.description:
巨龙试图快速评估一名敌人，洞悉其内心、心智与动机。巨龙尝试进行一次察觉检定，对抗30尺内一个目标的 @Check[type:perception|defense:deception]{欺瞒} 或 @Check[type:perception|defense:stealth]{潜行} DC，并产生以下效果。

大成功或大失败 巨龙对该生物的动机获得极其深刻的洞察，在1分钟内，对该生物进行的所有欺瞒、交涉与威吓检定获得+2环境加值。

成功 巨龙对该生物的动机获得一定的洞察，在1分钟内，对该生物进行的所有欺瞒、交涉与威吓检定获得+1环境加值。

失败 巨龙未能洞悉该生物的动机。该生物在1天内暂时免疫「愚者洞察」。

大成功或大失败 巨龙对该生物的动机做出错误假设。巨龙在1小时内，对该生物进行的所有欺瞒、交涉与威吓检定承受–2环境减值。该生物在1天内暂时免疫「愚者洞察」。

The dragon attempts to quickly assess a foe, gaining insight into their heart, mind, and motivations. The dragon attempts a Perception check against the @Check[type:perception|defense:deception]{Deception} or @Check[type:perception|defense:stealth]{Stealth} DC of one target within 30 feet with the following effects.

Critical Success The dragon gains tremendous insight into the creature's motivations, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to all Deception, Diplomacy, and Intimidation checks attempted against the creature for 1 minute.

Success The dragon gains some insight into the creature's motivations, gaining a +1 circumstance bonus to all Deception, Diplomacy, and Intimidation checks attempted against the creature for 1 minute.

Failure The dragon gains no insight into the creature's motivations. The creature is temporarily immune to Fool's Insight for 1 day.

Critical Failure The dragon makes false assumptions about the creature's motivations. The dragon takes a –2 circumstance penalty on all Deception, Diplomacy, and Intimidation checks attempted against the creature for 1 hour. The creature is temporarily immune to Fool's Insight for 1 day.

Young Harlequin Dragon.publicNotes:
丑角巨龙是终极的喜剧演员，是聪慧而富有洞察力的弄臣，他们以机智与世界过招，一边玩着轻松的恶作剧，一边抛出狡黠的侮辱、机敏的俏皮话与爆笑的笑话。尽管他们的轻浮显而易见，丑角巨龙的戏谑却蕴含更深的意义，往往将聚光灯打在社会怪癖、逻辑谬误与个人真相之上。

丑角巨龙极具洞察力，并以能够一眼评估他人、局势，甚至社会习俗为傲。他们擅长从对象的外在行为中辨别隐藏的动机、情绪与偏见，常常探知连对象自己都尚未发现的秘密。随后，丑角巨龙会通过幽默将这些洞见揭示给对象：用机智的笑话、嘲弄与恶作剧来掩藏更深层的含义，而这些含义会在自省与经历中显露出来。大多数丑角巨龙希望对象能解开并理解他们传达的感知，从而引向有意义的个人启示与积极的改变。通过这些手段，他们希望自己不请自来的忠告能够生根发芽，影响哪怕最沉默寡言、最顽固、最停滞不前的对象，将其置于自我启示与成长之路上。就这样，丑角巨龙的幽默是一面镜子，把对象的动机与缺陷映回给他们。对象是否愿意接受并从所见之中学习，仍掌握在对象自己手里。丑角巨龙可以提供启示与引导，但真正的改变必须发自内心。

丑角巨龙自认为无比聪明、风趣且睿智。他们尖刻又爱讽刺（但很少带着恶意），这可能会让与他们交互的人感到恼火。和大多数巨龙一样，他们很骄傲。他们希望别人欣赏他们、他们的机智与他们的感知；当他们的戏谑遭到冷淡或无视时，这会伤到他们的自尊。遭到冷落的丑角巨龙通常会用“认知”来安慰自己：不欣赏他们笑话的人只是没聪明到能领会更深的含义，因此丑角巨龙把这种蠢人视为浪费吐息。更糟的是那些能够理解丑角巨龙戏谑中暗藏的教训，却要么未能从中学习，要么将启示斥为谬误、将忠告视为不可靠的对象。这类侮辱与顽固的傲慢很少能让丑角巨龙低落太久。

丑角巨龙总在狩猎新观众——这一习惯让他们始终在路上。他们热爱旅行，很少长期维持巢穴（如果他们真的住在某处的话）。他们偏好城市区域或能够与聪明生物交谈并表演的地区，讨厌孤独，也很容易觉得无聊。当丑角巨龙相遇时，往往会演变成一场弄臣决斗：一场令人愉快、节奏飞快的唇枪舌剑之战，充满犀利的俏皮话与爆笑的妙语，来来回回甚至能持续好几天。

丑角巨龙知道，永远不要以封面评断一本书，也不要以外表或环境评断一个生物。他们以能看见生物不仅是当下的状态，还有其未来潜力为傲，并自认是评断角色的行家。丑角巨龙不会把力气浪费在拒绝倾听的人身上，也不会浪费在那些会利用他们与生俱来的巨龙洞见把邪恶带入世界的人身上；相反，他们的目标是为自己娱乐到的人提供引导与帮助，让世界比他们初见时更美好。

Tavalavat

在所有丑角巨龙中最富传奇色彩的之一，便是塔瓦拉瓦特（Tavalavat）：一位洞察力与娱乐性都非凡的弄臣，以至于引起了异界存在的注意，并踏上穿越外环的旅程。据说塔瓦拉瓦特居住在涅槃（Nirvana），以愉快的嘲弄与发自内心的喜悦，引导阿加西翁与天使走向自我开悟。

丑角的宝库

与大多数巨龙不同，许多丑角巨龙并不在意黄金、珠宝或无价宝藏，而在意机智的俏皮话、幽默的笑话、某个尤其难以捉摸的魔法戏法的秘密，以及所有之中最珍贵的宝藏：笑声。

嘲弄之凶灵

邪恶的丑角巨龙也被称为“嘲弄之凶灵”，他们用自己的能力塑造狂热的爪牙，以操纵、揭露秘密、毁掉人生并颠覆社会。他们的笑话残忍而沉重，总是把对象踩进泥里，或把他们推得更深地坠入悲伤与绝望。

Harlequin dragons are the ultimate comedians, clever and insightful jesters who match wits with the world, playing light-hearted pranks while spouting cunning insults, witty quips, and hilarious jokes. Despite their obvious frivolity, a harlequin dragon's jests contain deeper meaning, often shining a spotlight on societal idiosyncrasies, logical fallacies, and personal truths.

Harlequin dragons are incredibly insightful, and they pride themselves on being able to assess people, situations, and even social mores at a glance. They're adept at discerning hidden motivations, feelings, and biases from a subject's outer behavior, often learning secrets that their subjects have yet to discover about themselves. Harlequin dragons then reveal these insights to their subjects through humor, with witty jokes, mockeries, and pranks crafted to hide deeper meaning that's revealed through introspection and experience. Most harlequin dragons hope that their subjects can unravel and understand the wisdom they impart, leading to meaningful personal revelations and positive change. Through their methods, they hope their unsolicited advice can take root and influence even the most reticent, stubborn, and stagnant subjects, placing them on a path to self-revelation and growth. In this way, a harlequin dragon's humor is a mirror that reflects a subject's motivations and flaws back at them. Whether the subject accepts and learns from what they see reflected remains in their own hands. While a harlequin dragon can offer revelation and guidance, true change must come from within.

Harlequin dragons consider themselves incredibly brilliant, witty, and wise. They're snarky and sarcastic (though rarely maliciously so), which can grate on the nerves of those with whom they interact. Like most dragons, they're proud. They want others to appreciate them, their wit, and their wisdom, and it wounds their pride when their jests are met with disinterest or disregard. A jilted harlequin dragon typically consoles themselves with the "knowledge" that anyone who doesn't appreciate their jokes simply isn't clever enough to grasp the deeper meaning, and so harlequin dragons treat such fools as a waste of breath. Worse are those subjects who understand the lessons hidden in a harlequin dragon's jests and either fail to learn from them or reject the revelations as faulty or the advice as unsound. Such insults and stubborn insolence rarely keep a harlequin dragon down for long.

Harlequin dragons are always on the hunt for fresh audiences—a habit that keeps them on the road. They love to travel and rarely keep a lair for long (if they reside in one at all). They prefer urban areas or regions where they can converse and perform for intelligent creatures, and they dislike solitude and bore easily. When harlequin dragons meet, it often results in a jester's duel, an entertaining and fast-paced war of cutting quips and hilarious witticisms that can go back and forth for days.

Harlequin dragons know that one should never judge a book by its cover or a creature by its appearance or circumstances. They pride themselves on seeing not only a creature's present status but also their future potential, and they consider themselves excellent judges of character. Harlequin dragons won't waste their efforts on those who refuse to listen or those who would use their dragon-given insights to bring evil into the world; rather, they aim to offer guidance and help to those they entertain, leaving the world a better place than they found it.

Tavalavat

Among the most legendary of all harlequin dragons is Tavalavat, a jester so insightful and entertaining that she caught the attention of otherworldly beings and embarked upon a journey through the Outer Spheres. It's believed that Tavalavat resides in Nirvana, guiding agathions and angels to self-enlightenment through pleasant mockery and heartfelt joy.

A Harlequin's Hoard

Unlike most dragons, many harlequin dragons care not for gold, jewels, or priceless treasures but for clever quips, humorous jokes, the secret of a particularly elusive magic trick, and the most prized treasure of all: laughter.

The Mocking Grim

Evil harlequin dragons, also referred to as the "Mocking Grim," use their abilities to shape devoted minions to manipulate, reveal secrets, ruin lives, and upend societies. Their jokes are cruel and crushing, always driving their subjects to the dirt or deeper into sadness and desperation.
Young Harlequin Dragon.prototypeToken: 年轻的丑角巨龙 Young Harlequin Dragon

Young Amber Dragon.name: 幼年琥珀巨龙 Young Amber Dragon
Young Amber Dragon.tokenName: 幼年琥珀巨龙 Young Amber Dragon

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Sand Vision.name: 沙漠视野 Sand Vision
Sand Vision.description:
沙尘不会妨碍琥珀巨龙的视野；他们无视由沙尘造成的隐蔽（状态）。

Sand doesn't impair an amber dragon's vision; they ignore the concealed condition from sand.

Electric Shock.name: 电击 Electric Shock
Electric Shock.description:
触发 一个相邻生物以一次近战攻击对琥珀巨龙造成伤害，或一个生物以一次近战徒手攻击对琥珀巨龙造成伤害。

效果 覆盖琥珀巨龙的薄层压电沙被压缩，使触发生物触电。触发生物受到 @Damage[1d12[electricity]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|basic:true] 豁免）。如果触发的攻击使用金属武器，则触发生物在其豁免上承受–1 环境减值；而如果该生物由金属构成（如铁魔像），则其在豁免上承受–2 环境减值。在大成功或大失败中的大失败时，其还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 1 轮，因为电击使其身体痉挛。

Trigger An adjacent creature deals damage to an amber dragon with a melee attack, or a creature deals damage to an amber dragon with a melee unarmed attack.

Effect The thin layer of piezoelectric sand coating the amber dragon is compressed, electrocuting the triggering creature. The triggering creature takes @Damage[1d12[electricity]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|basic:true] save). If the triggering attack was with a metal weapon, the triggering creature takes a –1 circumstance penalty on their saving throw, and if the creature is made of metal (like an iron golem), they take a –2 circumstance penalty on their saving throw. On a critical failure, they're also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round, as their body seizes from the electric shock.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
巨龙喷吐一股压电沙尘吐息，在@Template[type:cone|distance:30]内造成 @Damage[8d6[electricity]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|basic:true] 豁免）。它在[[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用吐息武器。

The dragon breathes a blast of piezoelectric sand that deals @Damage[8d6[electricity]] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] (@Check[type:reflex|dc:25|basic:true] save). It can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

Compelling Rumor.name: 引人注目的传闻 Compelling Rumor
Compelling Rumor.description:
琥珀巨龙用关于某个生物的流言蜚语与传闻轰炸30尺内的一个生物。目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]。此外，其中一条传闻会在目标身上生根，使其可能在下个回合被迫执行以下之一：靠近你、逃离（如同其具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑（状态）}状态）、放开它正持有的东西、倒下并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}、或原地不动。在完成该任务前，它不能延迟或采取任何反应动作（）。该生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:will|dc:25]豁免，效果如下。

大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物在1轮内措手不及，且不执行该命令。

失败 该生物在2轮内措手不及，且在其下个回合的第一个动作中，该生物必须使用一个单动作来服从该传闻。

大成功或大失败 失败 该生物在3轮内措手不及，且必须在其下个回合使用其所有动作来服从该传闻。

The amber dragon bombards a creature within 30 feet with gossip and rumors circulating about them. The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]. Additionally, one of these rumors takes hold of the target, potentially forcing them to do one of the following on their next turn: approach you, run away (as if it had the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} condition), release what it's holding, drop @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, or stand in place. It can't delay or take any reactions until it has completed this task. The creature must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:25] save with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is off-guard for 1 round and doesn't follow the command.

Failure The creature is off-guard for 2 rounds and for the first action on its next turn, the creature must use a single action to obey the rumor.

Critical Failure The creature is off-guard for 3 rounds and must use all its actions on its next turn to obey the rumor.

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙狂乱 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
巨龙以任意顺序进行两次爪击打击和一次翼打击。

The dragon makes two claw Strikes and one wing Strike in any order.

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙之动势 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
当巨龙以一次打击取得大成功或大失败时，他们为其吐息武器充能。

When the dragon scores a critical hit with a Strike, they recharge their Breath Weapon.

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Clairaudience.name: 千里耳闻 Clairaudience
Clairaudience.description:
你在射程内的一处位置创造一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的漂浮耳朵（即使该位置在你的视觉线或效果线之外）。它无法移动，但你可以通过这只耳朵听见声音，如同使用你正常的听觉感官。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} floating ear at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect). It can't move, but you can hear through the ear as if using your normal auditory senses.

Message.name: 信息 Message
Message.description:
你轻声默念词句，但它们不会从你口中发出，而是直接传到目标的耳中。其他人听不见你的话，效果并不比你平常只动嘴唇好多少；但目标能听见你的话，就仿佛他们正站在你身旁。

若目标愿意，他们可以用反应动作给出简短回应，或在他们的下一个回合以自由动作（）回应，但他们必须能看见你且在射程内才能这样做。若他们回应，回应会像原始信息一样，直接传到你的耳中。

升阶（3环） 该法术的射程增加至500英尺。
