You mouth words quietly, but instead of coming out of your mouth, they're transferred directly to the ears of the target. While others can't hear your words any better than if you normally mouthed them, the target can hear your words as if they were standing next to you.

The target can give a brief response as a reaction, or as a free action on their next turn if they wish, but they must be able to see you and be within range to do so. If they respond, their response is delivered directly to your ear, just like the original message.

Heightened (3rd) The spell's range increases to 500 feet.

Translate (Self Only).name: （仅限自身） Translate (Self Only)
Translate (Self Only).description:
当你施放该法术时，目标能够理解它正在听到或阅读的一种语言的含义。这不会让它理解密码、以隐喻方式表达的语言等（由GM酌情决定）。如果目标能听到多种语言并且知道这一点，它可以选择要理解哪一种语言；否则，随机选择其中一种语言。

升阶（3环） 目标也可以说这种语言。

升阶（4环） 你最多可以以10个生物为目标，且目标也可以说这种语言。

The target can understand the meaning of a single language it is hearing or reading when you cast the spell. This doesn't let it understand codes, language couched in metaphor, and the like (subject to GM discretion). If the target can hear multiple languages and knows that, it can choose which language to understand; otherwise, choose one of the languages randomly.

Heightened (3rd) The target can also speak the language.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures, and targets can also speak the language.

Young Amber Dragon.publicNotes:
琥珀巨龙是巨龙之中最友善、最平易近人的一种。它们富有魅力、热情好客，并且热衷于结交朋友。它们喜欢聊天，精通众多语言，而且总能知道些有用的事情。它们是出色的倾听者，总是准备好耐心聆听并给予善意的鼓励，促使它们来往的对象把任何觉得有必要分享的事情说出来。琥珀巨龙常被视为无害的八卦精，但它们远比人们给予的鸣谢所暗示的更加狡猾、善于操纵。

琥珀巨龙不只是爱说闲话的多管闲事者；它们还是善于操纵的谣言贩子，最喜欢的事情莫过于打探并传播流言。它们对自己选择散布的八卦是否真实毫无兴趣。事实上，传闻越离奇，它们就越可能去传播。它们只在乎自己的娱乐，并且总愿意给变得有点陈旧的流言加上一点润色或转折。它们是不屈不挠的搅局者，完全不在乎自己的话可能毁掉的生活。

琥珀巨龙偏好居住在生物众多的环境中。通常这意味着城市环境，但它们住在人类城市或矮人要塞的可能性，并不比住在妖精飞地或一片爱说话的动物树林里更低。它们不在乎自己的周围环境，只在乎身边有多少聪明、而且最重要的是健谈的生物。许多个体会在很长一段time里久居不动。它们喜欢在某个地区安顿下来，尽可能吸收那里的文化、人群与时事。只要还能从家园里摘取更多流言，它们就会留下；等到厌倦了，便会离开，去寻找一个新的地区以便将自己悄然渗入其中。要吸引一条琥珀巨龙的注意，一个地区必须人口稠密，而其居民也必须容易被操纵。小村庄与小镇不足以让琥珀巨龙长期感到有趣；同样，那些政府施行过多禁令、可能导致市民讳莫如深或过度多疑的地方，也无法让它们久留。

琥珀巨龙理解言语的力量，而且大多偏爱文字。与多数巨龙相比，它们更可能收集并囤积稀有书籍、卷轴与文本；它们对古老羊皮纸与刻文的重视甚至超过黄金与宝石。它们往往会用守护符文与其他防护性印记来保护自己珍贵的私人藏书。

尽管很少有琥珀巨龙愿意承认，它们其实是耐心而聪明的间谍，会观察、倾听，并操纵周围环境中的事件，以收集最劲爆的故事与八卦来传播。最年轻的琥珀巨龙最在意八卦、新闻、时事，以及短命种族的生活——这些总在不断变化。年长的琥珀巨龙则偏好更持久的传闻、黑暗而古老的历史、禁忌文本、神话与传奇，以及那些足以推翻君主、引发社会革命、并制造其他重大事件或动荡的流言。

Inguistial

Inguistial，“活的圣书”，是一条隐居的琥珀巨龙，维持着物质位面上规模最大的图书馆之一。在其中，古代文本与禁忌巨著被远离窥探的目光——并置于巨龙的守护凝视之下。Inguistial允许外来者向他请愿以求进入；那些失败者将再也无人见到。

秘密宝藏

一条琥珀巨龙最珍爱的财物，是它们只对自己保留的秘密。大多数会把这些秘密牢记在心，但它们对文本的偏爱意味着许多会将其写下，作为文本或加密账册保存。有些则会保留一件与该秘密相关联的物体，用作可触摸的记忆触发。

信息掮客

有些琥珀巨龙会担任信息掮客。它们会免费散布简单而有趣的流言来诱使客户上钩，然后对更敏感的信息与传闻收费。大多数只接受以秘密与个人信息作为报酬——正好可以卖给其他客户！

Amber dragons are among the friendliest and most approachable of dragons. They're charismatic, welcoming, and adore making friends. They love to chat, are fluent in numerous languages, and always know something useful. They're excellent listeners, always ready with a patient ear and kind encouragement, prodding those they socialize with to share whatever they feel the need to. Often seen as harmless gossips, amber dragons are far more cunning and manipulative than they're given credit for.

Amber dragons are more than chatty busybodies; they're manipulative rumormongers who adore nothing more than learning and spreading rumors. They have no interest in whether the gossip they choose to spread is true. In fact, the more outlandish a rumor, the more likely they are to spread it. They care for their own entertainment and are always willing to add a bit of embellishment or a twist to rumors that are getting a little stale. They're persistent meddlers who care not for the lives their words could ruin.

Amber dragons prefer to live in populous environments. Usually, this means urban environments, but they're just as likely to live within a human city or a dwarven fortress as they are in a fey enclave or a grove of talkative animals. They care not for their surroundings but for the number of intelligent and, most importantly, talkative creatures around them. Many are sedentary for large portions of time. They love to settle in a region and absorb all they can of its culture, people, and current events. So long as there are more rumors to pluck from their home, they stay, moving on when they grow bored to find a new region into which to insinuate themselves. To hold an amber dragon's attention, a region must be densely populated, and its inhabitants must be susceptible to manipulation. Hamlets and towns aren't big enough to keep an amber dragon amused for long, nor are places whose government enforces too many prohibitions that could cause its citizens to clam up or be overly suspicious.

Amber dragons understand the power of words, and most have a fondness for the written word. They're more likely to collect and hoard rare books, scrolls, and texts than most dragons, placing a higher value on old parchment and carvings than they do on gold and gemstones. They're prone to protecting their valuable personal libraries with glyphs of warding and other protective sigils.

While few amber dragons would admit it, they're patient and clever spies who watch, listen, and manipulate events around them to collect the juiciest tales and gossip to spread. The youngest amber dragons care most for gossip, news, current events, and the lives of the short-lived, which are constantly changing. Older amber dragons favor more lasting rumors, dark and ancient history, forbidden texts, myths, and legends, as well as rumors that could topple monarchs, cause a social revolution, and produce other major events or upheavals.

Inguistial

Inguistial, the "Living Libram," is a reclusive amber dragon who maintains one of the largest libraries on the Material Plane. Within, ancient texts and forbidden tomes are kept far from prying eyes—and under the dragon's protective gaze. Inguistial allows outsiders to petition him for entry; those who fail are never seen again.

Secret Hoards

An amber dragon's most prized possessions are the secrets they keep to themselves. Most keep these secrets memorized, but their fondness for texts means many write them down, keeping them as texts or coded ledgers. Some instead keep an object tied to the secret, which functions as a tactile memory trigger.

Information Brokers

Some amber dragons work as information brokers. They spread simple and entertaining rumors for free to tempt clients, then charge for more sensitive information and rumors. Most accept payment only in secrets and personal information— perfect for selling to other clients!
Young Amber Dragon.prototypeToken: 幼年琥珀巨龙 Young Amber Dragon

Adult Cerulean Dragon.name: 成年蔚蓝巨龙 Adult Cerulean Dragon
Adult Cerulean Dragon.tokenName: 成年蔚蓝巨龙 Adult Cerulean Dragon

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Wavesense (Imprecise) 40 feet.name: 波感（不精确）40 尺 Wavesense (Imprecise) 40 feet

Experienced Traveler.name: 经验丰富的旅人 Experienced Traveler
Experienced Traveler.description:
蔚蓝巨龙是经验丰富的生存专家，不会被大多数环境所带来的寻常危险所阻碍。它们无视非魔法的困难地形。

Cerulean dragons are experienced survivalists and are unhindered by the mundane dangers posed by most environments. They ignore non-magical difficult terrain.

Peregrinate.name: 游历 Peregrinate
Peregrinate.description:
触发 一名敌人的回合结束，且在该回合中该敌人用近战打击命中了蔚蓝巨龙

效果 蔚蓝巨龙从危险中游走离开，使自己保持在更安全的距离并重新调整位置以便打击。蔚蓝巨龙疾走、游泳或飞行至多其速度的一半，且其移动不会触发由移动所触发的反应动作（例如借机攻击）。

Trigger A foe's turn ends, during which that foe hit the cerulean dragon with a melee Strike

Effect The cerulean dragon wanders away from danger, putting themselves at a safer distance and repositioning to strike. The cerulean dragon Strides, Swims, or Flies up to half their Speed, and their movement doesn't trigger reactions triggered by movement (such as Attacks of Opportunity).

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Translate.name: 请提供需要翻译的英文原文（或上传图片/粘贴文本）。 Translate
Translate.description:
当你施放该法术时，目标可以理解其正在听到或阅读的一种语言的含义。这不会让其理解密码、以隐喻方式表达的语言等（由GM酌情裁定）。如果目标能听懂多种语言并且知道这一点，它可以选择要理解的语言；否则，随机选择一种语言。

升阶（3环） 目标也可以说这种语言。

升阶（4环） 你可以以最多10个生物为目标，且目标也可以说这种语言。

The target can understand the meaning of a single language it is hearing or reading when you cast the spell. This doesn't let it understand codes, language couched in metaphor, and the like (subject to GM discretion). If the target can hear multiple languages and knows that, it can choose which language to understand; otherwise, choose one of the languages randomly.

Heightened (3rd) The target can also speak the language.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures, and targets can also speak the language.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你解构一个法术或效果背后的魔法。对目标进行一次反制检定。若你成功反制一个魔法物品，该物品在10分钟内成为其类型的普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。若目标为神器或类似物品，你自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Humanoid Form.name: 类人形态 Humanoid Form
Humanoid Form.description:
你将自己的外表变形为一个小型或中型的类人生物，例如矮人、精灵、地精、半身人、人类、兽人或蜥蜴人。当你处于此形态时，除了你原有的其他特征外，你还获得类人生物（特征），以及任何与该生物种类相关的特征（例如地精或人类）。如果该变形使你的体型减小，它也会相应降低你的触及（如同 shrink 法术）。该变形不会以任何方式改变你的数据，你也不会获得你所采取的类人形态的任何特殊能力。你仍然可以穿戴和使用你的道具；它们会改变体型（如有必要）以匹配你的新形态。如果物品离开你的身上，它们会恢复为其通常的体型。

类人形态使你在进行欺瞒检定以伪装成所选族裔的一般成员时获得+4状态加值，并且即使你未受训，你也会加入你的等级，但你无法让自己看起来像某个特定的人。如果你想冒充某个个体，你仍然需要创造一次伪装，不过GM在决定你的欺瞒检定DC时不会将族裔差异纳入考量。你可以解消此法术。

升阶（3环） 如果你所采取的形态具有该能力，你获得黑暗视觉或弱光视野。

升阶（5环） 你可以采取大型类人生物的外表。如果这会使你的体型增大，你获得 enlarge 法术的效果。

You transform your appearance to that of a Small or Medium humanoid, such as a dwarf, elf, goblin, halfling, human, orc, or lizardfolk. You gain the humanoid trait in addition to your other traits while in this form, as well as any trait related to the creature's kind (such as goblin or human). If this transformation reduces your size, it reduces your reach accordingly (as the shrink spell). This transformation doesn't change your statistics in any way, and you don't gain any special abilities of the humanoid form you assume. You can still wear and use your gear, which changes size (if necessary) to match your new form. If items leave your person, they return to their usual size.

Humanoid form grants you a +4 status bonus to Deception checks to pass as a generic member of the chosen ancestry, and you add your level even if you're untrained, but you can't make yourself look like a specific person. If you want to Impersonate an individual, you still need to create a disguise, though the GM won't factor in the difference in ancestry when determining the DC of your Deception check. You can Dismiss this spell.

Heightened (3rd) You gain darkvision or low-light vision if the form you assume has that ability.

Heightened (5th) You can take on the appearance of a Large humanoid. If this increases your size, you gain the effects of the enlarge spell.

Create Water (At Will).name: 创造 水（随意） Create Water (At Will)
Create Water (At Will).description:
当你将双手捧起时，水开始从中流出。你创造2加仑的水。如果无人饮用，它会在1天后蒸发。

As you cup your hands, water begins to flow forth from them. You create 2 gallons of water. If no one drinks it, it evaporates after 1 day.

True Strike.name: 真实打击 True Strike
True Strike.description:
对未来的一瞥确保你的下一击精准命中。在你的回合结束前，下次你进行一次攻击掷骰时，将该次攻击掷骰掷两次并取较好的结果。该次攻击无视对攻击掷骰的环境减值，以及因目标处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐藏}而需要进行的任何纯骰检定。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{法术效果：真实打击}

A glimpse into the future ensures your next blow strikes true. The next time you make an attack roll before the end of your turn, roll the attack twice and use the better result. The attack ignores circumstance penalties to the attack roll and any flat check required due to the target being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{Spell Effect: True Strike}

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你放出一道脉冲，以感知魔法的存在。除魔法是否存在之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友的魔法物品以及持续中的法术。你仅在幻术魔法的效果位阶低于你的侦测魔法法术位阶时，才能侦测到幻术魔法。然而，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环）由GM决定，你得知该法术侦测到的最强大魔法效果的位阶或等级。

升阶（4环）同3环，但你还会精确定位最高位阶魔法的来源。与模糊感官类似，你不会得知确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个5尺立方体范围内（若来源大于该范围，则缩小到最近的等效范围）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你将注意力集中在目标物体上，敞开心智以感知魔法灵光。施放完成后，你会知道该物品是否具有魔法。你或任何你就灵光提供建议的人，在该物品上进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{识别魔法} 时获得+2环境加值。若该物体为幻象，只有当该效果的阶位低于你的解读灵光法术的阶位时，你才会侦测到这一点。

升阶（3环）你可以以最多10个物体为目标。

升阶（6环）你可以以任意数量的物体为目标。

You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras. When the casting is complete, you know whether that item is magical. You or anyone you advise about the aura gains a +2 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic} on the item. If the object is illusory, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your read aura spell.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to 10 objects.

Heightened (6th) You can target any number of objects.

Spout.name: 喷吐 Spout
Spout.description:
区域 5英尺立方体或5英尺爆发

水向上喷涌，可能从地面涌出、从水池中升起，甚至从稀薄的空气中显现。区域内的任何生物受到等同于1d4加上你的施法能力调整值的钝击伤害，并进行一次基础反射豁免。

你可以将此法术的区域改为5英尺爆发，前提是你将爆发的中心设在一片水域中。这片水域可以小到池塘或小溪，但不能小到水坑或浴缸。

升阶 (+1) 伤害增加1d4。

Area 5-foot cube or 5-foot burst

Water blasts upward, coming out of the ground, rising from a pool, or even manifesting from thin air. Any creatures in the area take bludgeoning damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier, with a basic Reflex saving throw.

You can change this spell's area to a 5-foot burst, provided you center the burst in a body of water. This body of water can be as small as a pond or creek, but not as small as a puddle or bathtub.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
苍蓝巨龙以两种方式之一吐息。其巨龙吐息区域内的所有非魔法火焰都会被熄灭。巨龙在 [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4轮} 内不能再次使用吐息武器。

  • 冲击巨浪 巨龙在 @Template[type:cone|distance:40] 内吐出一道强力的、猛击般的波浪。区域内每个生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:34] 强韧豁免，并产生以下效果。

    大成功 该生物不受影响。

    成功 该生物沿锥形同方向被推离 5 英尺。

    失败 该生物沿锥形同方向被推离 15 英尺。若其在被完全推动前会撞上坚固物体，则其每剩余将被推动的 5 英尺会受到 @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害。

    大失败 该生物沿锥形同方向被推离 25 英尺。若其在被完全推动前会撞上坚固物体，则其每剩余将被推动的 5 英尺会受到 @Damage[3d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害。

  • 加压水流 巨龙在 @Template[type:cone|distance:40] 内吐出一股加压的水爆流，造成 @Damage[15d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:34|basic:true] 基础豁免）。

The cerulean dragon breathes in one of two ways. All non-magical fires within the area of their Dragon Breath are extinguished. The dragon can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

  • Battering Wave The dragon breathes a powerful, pummeling wave in a @Template[type:cone|distance:40]. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:34] save with the following effects.

    Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

    Success The creature is pushed 5 feet away in the same direction as the cone.

    Failure The creature is pushed 15 feet away in the same direction as the cone. If it would hit a solid object before being completely pushed, it takes @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]] damage for every remaining 5 feet it would be pushed.

    Critical Failure The creature is pushed 25 feet away in the same direction as the cone. If it would hit a solid object before being completely pushed, it takes @Damage[3d6[bludgeoning]] damage for every remaining 5 feet it would be pushed.

  • Pressurized Water The dragon breathes a blast of pressurized water in a @Template[type:cone|distance:40] that deals @Damage[15d6[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:34|basic:true] save).

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙狂乱 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
该巨龙以任意顺序进行两次爪击打击和一次翼打击。

The dragon makes two claw Strikes and one wing Strike in any order.

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙族动量 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
当巨龙用一次打击造成大成功或大失败时，他们会为其吐息武器充能。

When the dragon scores a critical hit with a Strike, they recharge their Breath Weapon.

Deny Advantage.name: 拒绝优势 Deny Advantage
Deny Advantage.description:
苍蓝巨龙不会因14级或更低等级的生物进行夹击、或因14级或更低等级的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}生物而陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]，也不会因14级或更低等级的生物使用突袭攻击而陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]。

The cerulean dragon isn't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] to flanking, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} creatures of 14th level or lower, or to creatures of 14th level or lower using surprise attack.

Hazard Sense.name: 危害 感官 Hazard Sense
Hazard Sense.description:
苍蓝巨龙具有一种直觉性的感官，会提醒它们危险与陷阱的存在。它们获得+1环境加值，用于进行察觉检定以寻找陷阱与危害、对抗由陷阱与危害进行的攻击时的AC，以及对抗陷阱与危害时的豁免。即使苍蓝巨龙没有进行搜索，它们仍然可以进行检定来发现通常需要它们处于搜索状态才能发现的陷阱与危害。

The cerulean dragon has an intuitive sense that alerts them to dangers and the presence of traps. They gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to find traps and hazards, to AC against attacks made by traps and hazards, and to save against traps and hazards. Even if the cerulean dragon isn't searching, they still get a check to find traps and hazards that normally require them to be Searching.

Freedom of Movement.name: 行动自由 Freedom of Movement
Freedom of Movement.description:
你排斥会妨碍生物或减缓其移动的效果。在此法术效果持续期间，目标无视任何会使其速度受到环境减值的效果。当其尝试 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} 一个使其处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} 的效果时，除非该效果是魔法且其等级高于行动自如法术，否则其自动成功。

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher level than the freedom of movement spell.

Wall of Water.name: 水墙 Wall of Water
Wall of Water.description:
你将手举向空中，召来一道巨浪席卷战场。这道墙以一条60英尺长、10英尺高、5英尺厚的直线直立不倒。

水墙区域内任何非魔法的、体型与水墙相同或更小的火焰都会立刻熄灭。它也会尝试反制其区域内的任何魔法火焰。这两种效果会在施放法术时发生，并且每当有火焰进入水墙的区域时也会发生。若水墙未能反制某一特定火焰，则在该法术的持续时间内它无法反制那团火焰。

钝击或挥砍的投射物无法穿过水墙，而穿刺投射物若穿过水墙，其射程增量减半。穿越水墙的生物需要以游泳方式通过。水中战斗的规则适用于穿越水墙的生物、以水墙内的生物为目标的行动，或穿过水墙的行动。例如，一次以墙内生物为目标的钝击或挥砍近战攻击将承受-2环境减值。

Raising your hand in the air, you call a massive wave onto the battlefield. The wall stays upright in a straight line that is 60 feet long, 10 feet high, and 5 feet thick.

Any non-magical fires within the wall of water's area that are its size or smaller are put out instantly. It also attempts to counteract any magical fires in its area. Both of these effects happen when the spell is cast and whenever a fire enters the wall's area. If the wall fails to counteract a given fire, it can't counteract that fire for the duration of the spell.

Bludgeoning or slashing projectiles can't pass through the wall, and piercing projectiles have their range increments halved if they pass through the wall. A creature traversing the wall of water needs to Swim through. The rules of aquatic combat apply to creatures traversing the wall of water, targeting creatures within the wall, or passing through the wall. For instance, a bludgeoning or slashing melee attack targeting a creature in the wall would take a -2 circumstance penalty.

At-Will Spells.name: 随意施放法术 At-Will Spells

Adult Cerulean Dragon.publicNotes:
蔚蓝巨龙是巨龙世界的开拓者、探掘者、地城冒险者与探索者，为了满足永无止境的好奇心，它们在自己未知的土地上开辟道路、踏出新径。蔚蓝巨龙为冒险而活，总是推动自己比以往更快、更远、更深、更高。它们决心看看下一个走廊尽头有什么、紧闭的门后藏着什么、地平线之外有什么，并发现其他世界、位面与其他次元中存在着什么。它们探索不寻常的地点与神秘的奇观，从不满足于闲散或安逸，也从不畏惧命运可能为它们准备的惊喜或未来可能带来的危险。

蔚蓝巨龙满怀永恒的漂泊欲望与不减的旅行热情。它们生活节奏极快，因此更喜欢始终在路上。大多数蔚蓝巨龙不保有传统巢穴，更偏好在荒野中、在千变万化的天空之下生活，而非被奢华生活束缚在同一处地方。有些蔚蓝巨龙更喜欢魔法居所与异位面领域——当它们足够强大且足够年长、能够创造这些时——让它们同时拥有舒适生活与冒险生活。

蔚蓝巨龙对周遭世界及其所包含的一切都极其好奇。它们喜欢把鼻子伸到不该伸的地方，跨越界限，打破各种禁忌。它们爱打探，不过与其深挖他人的隐秘过往与家族秘密，它们更可能去撬开上锁的门、闯入禁止进入的地点。与琥珀巨龙不同，它们对人们生活的细节或散落在城市街头的流言与尴尬并不怎么感兴趣。这并不表示它们排斥交友——恰恰相反，蔚蓝巨龙乐于结识新朋友并缔结友谊，尤其是与其他志同道合的探索者与冒险者建立合作关系，以便共同协作。

尽管蔚蓝巨龙喜欢结识新朋友、发现稀有宝藏并学习失落的秘密，但对它们来说，没有什么比前往某个新地点旅行更令人兴奋。探索一个对它们而言完全崭新且未知的地方最能让蔚蓝巨龙兴奋，无论该地点对社会、历史，或为壮大其收藏而获取财富而言是否具有强效重要性（或根本不重要）。

在幼年时期，许多蔚蓝巨龙主要专注于普通的旅行形式。它们造访从未见过的城市与聚居地，闯入金库，蹚过下水道，开启坟墓。它们探索大片荒野，攀登高山，钻探洞穴，游过沼泽，潜入湖泊与海洋之下。等到成年时，大多数蔚蓝巨龙更偏好探索更危险的地点，例如闹鬼的庄园、沉没的船只、偏远的神殿、远古遗迹，以及——一个常见的最爱——地城。

随着时代推移，大多数蔚蓝巨龙必须走得越来越远，才能找到从未去过的地方并满足其漂泊欲望。在这段时期，多数会走向极端：探入最深的深渊与最遥远、最难抵达的地区，前往其他位面与星球，甚至去往其他时代与次元。这是深入怪诞、狂野与完全难以置信之物的时代。

Zemedrilon

“永寻者”泽梅德里隆或许是异位面探索方面最伟大的专家，亲自探索过23个位面，其中包括两个其存在目前仍未被证实的位面。多数人相信泽梅德里隆在30年之前试图开启一扇通往遥远未来的传送门时被汽化了——蔚蓝巨龙认为这则故事可笑至极。它们坚称这条远古巨龙成功抵达了未来，并将在经过足够长的时间后再度现身。

冒险队伍

蔚蓝巨龙常为了探索而结成紧密的团队，每条巨龙都专精于某一研究领域或某种探索方向。一些学者认为，传统“冒险队伍”的概念正是源自蔚蓝巨龙——这一主张毫无根据也无法证实，却令大多数短命凡人感到恼火。

移动收藏

如同大多数冒险者一样，蔚蓝巨龙会将它们的财富以贵重的魔法物品、远古器物、昂贵的珠宝与其他可穿戴财富的形式随身携带。因此，尽管蔚蓝巨龙缺少真正的收藏，它们往往会佩戴（或挥使！）一笔巨富。

Cerulean dragons are the trailblazers of the dragon world, the delvers, the dungeoneers, and the explorers, charting paths and blazing trails through lands unknown to them to sate their neverending curiosity. Cerulean dragons live for adventure and are always pushing themselves faster, further, deeper, and higher than they've ever gone before. They're determined to see what's down the next hall, behind the closed door, beyond the horizon, and discover what lies on other worlds, planes, and other dimensions. They explore unusual sites and mysterious wonders, never content to be idle or sedentary, and never afraid of what surprises fate might have in store for them or what dangers the future may hold.

Cerulean dragons are filled with an eternal wanderlust and an unabating passion for travel. They live a fast-paced life, and thus they prefer to stay on the move at all times. Most cerulean dragons don't keep traditional lairs, preferring a life lived in the wilderness and under a thousand different skies rather than a life of luxury shackled to the same place. Some cerulean dragons prefer magical homes and extraplanar domains—when they're powerful and old enough to create them—which allow them a life of comfort and a life of adventure all at once.

Cerulean dragons are incredibly curious about the world around them and all it contains. They enjoy sticking their noses where they don't belong, treading beyond boundaries, and breaking taboos of all sorts. They're snoops, though they're far more likely to pry behind locked doors and into off-limit locations than they are to delve into people's hidden pasts and family secrets. They're not overly interested in the details of people's lives or the gossip and embarrassments scattered down city streets, unlike amber dragons. It's not that they're averse to making friends—on the contrary, cerulean dragons are interested in meeting new people and forging friendships, particularly working relationships with other like-minded explorers and adventurers with whom they can collaborate.

While cerulean dragons enjoy meeting new people, discovering rare treasures, and learning lost secrets, nothing is more exciting to them than traveling somewhere new. Exploring a place that's completely new and unknown to them excites cerulean dragons the most, regardless of that location's greater importance (or lack thereof) to society, history, or the acquisition of wealth to grow their hoard.

In their youth, many cerulean dragons focus primarily on ordinary forms of travel. They visit cities and settlements they've never seen before, breaking into vaults, trudging through sewers, and opening tombs. They explore tracts of wilderness, climbing mountains, spelunking through caves, swimming through swamps, and diving beneath lakes and oceans. By the time they're grown, most cerulean dragons prefer to explore more dangerous locations, such as haunted manors, sunken ships, remote temples, ancient ruins, and—a common favorite—dungeons.

As time passes, most cerulean dragons must go further and further to find places they've never been and fulfill their wanderlust. During this time, most go to extremes, plumbing the deepest depths and the most distant and inaccessible regions, traveling to other planes and planets, or even to other times and dimensions. It's a time to delve into the weird, the wild, and the utterly unbelievable.

Zemedrilon

Zemedrilon the Ever-Seeking is perhaps the greatest expert on extraplanar exploration, having personally explored 23 planes, including two whose existence is currently unconfirmed. Most believe Zemedrilon was vaporized 30 years ago while attempting to open a portal to the distant future—a tale cerulean dragons consider laughable. They insist the ancient dragon successfully arrived in the future and, after a long enough time has passed, will reemerge.

Adventuring Parties

Cerulean dragons often band together into tightly knit teams for the purpose of exploration, with each dragon specializing in a field of study or exploratory focus. Some scholars believe it's from cerulean dragons that the concept of the traditional "adventuring party" was born—a completely unsubstantiated and unprovable claim that irks most short- lived mortals.

Mobile Hoards

Like most adventurers, cerulean dragons carry their wealth on them in the form of valuable magic items, ancient artifacts, valuable jewelry, and other wearable wealth. Thus, while a cerulean dragon lacks a true hoard, they often wear (or wield!) a fortune.
Adult Cerulean Dragon.prototypeToken: 成年天蓝巨龙 Adult Cerulean Dragon

N'toyen Fusia.name: N'toyen 富西亚 N'toyen Fusia
N'toyen Fusia.tokenName: 恩托延·福西亚 N'toyen Fusia
N'toyen Fusia.publicNotes:
贸易站是为沿触手河的远征整备道具的绝佳地点。商人出售各式各样的冒险道具。赌徒可以试试运气，购买从河里捞起、看似毫无价值的破烂，并测试哪些物品是魔法物品！镇上住着许多鉴定师，可雇用来鉴定物品、核验许可的有效性，并为契约作见证。我个人推荐为这些需求及更多事项找N'toyen Fusia。此外，当她工作时，你还可以在她的店“Bird's Eye Renew”里浏览修复后的古董来打发时代。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.9CoutgFvImSjZ3kc#tradepost]{贸易站}

Tradepost is an excellent place to gear up for expeditions up the Tentacle River. Merchants sell all manner of adventuring gear. Gamblers can try their luck buying seemingly worthless junk pulled from the river and testing which items are magic items! Many authenticators live in town and are available for hire to identify items, verify the validity of licenses, and bear witness to contracts. I personally recommend N'toyen Fusia for these needs and more. Plus, you can fill the time while she works by browsing restored antiques in her shop, Bird's Eye Renew.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.9CoutgFvImSjZ3kc#tradepost]{Tradepost}
N'toyen Fusia.blurb:
女性g’mayun认证员、古董店店主，物品鉴定专家
female g’mayun authenticator antiques shopkeeper, item identification expert
N'toyen Fusia.prototypeToken: 恩托延·富西亚 N'toyen Fusia

Diog.name: 迪奥格 Diog
Diog.publicNotes:
除了游客为寻求放松而造访的多个港口与海湾之外，还有许多私人地点隐匿在远离海文居民与来访游客警惕目光之处，由某个团体或船队占据。造访这些地方的是另一类游客，他们可以在此进行秘密交易。愤世者是这些团体中最知名——也最强大——的一支：一群由名叫迪奥格的年轻库诺马格洛斯指挥的赏金猎人船队。对迪奥格而言，愤世者与他们的赏金不过是一个借口，用来狩猎强大的敌人，因此他们会拒绝任何看起来不够困难或不够危险的赏金。这支船队主要由技艺高超的狼人类组成，不过偶尔，迪奥格会在对手值得尊敬的情况下饶其一命，条件是对方加入船队。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.9T0ckPDL1v6Tg9dM.JournalEntryPage.jFZHR52Cqz33A9um]{地狱乐园}

In addition to the multiple ports and coves visited by tourists seeking relaxation, numerous private places are hidden far from the watchful eye of the people of Haven and the visiting tourists, held by a group or crews. A different kind of tourist visits these places, where they can conduct clandestine business. The Cynics are the most well-known—and powerful—of these groups, a crew of bounty hunters under the command of a young cunomaglos named Diog. To Diog, the Cynics and their bounties are little more than an excuse to hunt challenging foes, so they refuse any bounties that don't seem difficult or dangerous enough. The crew is mainly composed of accomplished werecreatures, though every once in a while, Diog spares a worthy adversary on the condition that they join the crew.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.9T0ckPDL1v6Tg9dM.JournalEntryPage.jFZHR52Cqz33A9um]{Hell's Paradise}

Adult Cerulean Dragon (Spellcaster).name: 成年蔚蓝巨龙（施法者） Adult Cerulean Dragon (Spellcaster)
Adult Cerulean Dragon (Spellcaster).tokenName: 成年蔚蓝巨龙 Adult Cerulean Dragon

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60 尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Wavesense (Imprecise) 40 feet.name: 波感知（不精确）40尺 Wavesense (Imprecise) 40 feet

Experienced Traveler.name: 经验丰富的旅行者 Experienced Traveler
Experienced Traveler.description:
天蓝巨龙是经验丰富的生存专家，不会被大多数环境带来的世俗危险所阻碍。它们无视非魔法的困难地形。

Cerulean dragons are experienced survivalists and are unhindered by the mundane dangers posed by most environments. They ignore non-magical difficult terrain.

Peregrinate.name: 远行 Peregrinate
Peregrinate.description:
触发 一名敌人的回合结束，且在该回合中该敌人以近战打击命中了苍蓝巨龙

效果 苍蓝巨龙远离危险游走，使自己保持在更安全的距离并重新调整位置以进行打击。苍蓝巨龙疾走、游泳或飞行至多其速度的一半，且其移动不会触发由移动触发的反应动作（例如藉机攻击）。

Trigger A foe's turn ends, during which that foe hit the cerulean dragon with a melee Strike

Effect The cerulean dragon wanders away from danger, putting themselves at a safer distance and repositioning to strike. The cerulean dragon Strides, Swims, or Flies up to half their Speed, and their movement doesn't trigger reactions triggered by movement (such as Attacks of Opportunity).

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Translate.name: 请提供要翻译的英文原文（粘贴文本或上传图片）。 Translate
Translate.description:
当你施放该法术时，目标能够理解其正在听到或读到的一种语言的含义。这不会让它理解密码、以隐喻表达的语言等（由GM酌情决定）。如果目标能听到多种语言并且知道这一点，它可以选择要理解的语言；否则，随机从这些语言中选择一种。

升阶（3环） 目标也可以说该语言。

升阶（4环） 你可以以最多10个生物为目标，且目标也可以说该语言。

The target can understand the meaning of a single language it is hearing or reading when you cast the spell. This doesn't let it understand codes, language couched in metaphor, and the like (subject to GM discretion). If the target can hear multiple languages and knows that, it can choose which language to understand; otherwise, choose one of the languages randomly.

Heightened (3rd) The target can also speak the language.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures, and targets can also speak the language.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你解构法术或效果背后的魔法。对目标尝试一次反制检定。如果你成功反制一件魔法物品，该物品在10分钟内变为同类型的普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。如果目标是神器或类似物品，你自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Humanoid Form.name: 类人形态 Humanoid Form
Humanoid Form.description:
你将自己的外貌变为一个小型或中型类人生物，例如矮人、精灵、地精、半身人、人类、兽人或蜥蜴人。当你处于该形态时，除你原有的其他特征之外，你获得类人生物（特征），以及任何与该生物种类相关的特征（例如地精或人类）。如果该变形使你的体型变小，它会相应减少你的触及（如同缩小法术）。该变形不会以任何方式改变你的数据，你也不会获得你所采取的类人生物形态的任何特殊能力。你仍然可以穿戴并使用你的道具，它们会（如有必要）改变体型以匹配你的新形态。如果物品离开你的身上，它们会恢复到其通常的体型。

类人生物形态使你在进行欺瞒检定以伪装成所选族裔的普通成员时获得+4状态加值，并且即使你未受训也要加上你的等级，但你无法让自己看起来像某个特定的人。如果你想冒充某个个体，你仍需要创造一个伪装，不过GM在决定你的欺瞒检定DC时不会把族裔差异纳入考量。你可以解消该法术。

升阶（3环）如果你所采取的形态具有该能力，你获得黑暗视觉或弱光视野。

升阶（5环）你可以呈现一个大型类人生物的外貌。如果这使你的体型增大，你获得变巨法术的效果。

You transform your appearance to that of a Small or Medium humanoid, such as a dwarf, elf, goblin, halfling, human, orc, or lizardfolk. You gain the humanoid trait in addition to your other traits while in this form, as well as any trait related to the creature's kind (such as goblin or human). If this transformation reduces your size, it reduces your reach accordingly (as the shrink spell). This transformation doesn't change your statistics in any way, and you don't gain any special abilities of the humanoid form you assume. You can still wear and use your gear, which changes size (if necessary) to match your new form. If items leave your person, they return to their usual size.

Humanoid form grants you a +4 status bonus to Deception checks to pass as a generic member of the chosen ancestry, and you add your level even if you're untrained, but you can't make yourself look like a specific person. If you want to Impersonate an individual, you still need to create a disguise, though the GM won't factor in the difference in ancestry when determining the DC of your Deception check. You can Dismiss this spell.

Heightened (3rd) You gain darkvision or low-light vision if the form you assume has that ability.

Heightened (5th) You can take on the appearance of a Large humanoid. If this increases your size, you gain the effects of the enlarge spell.

Create Water (At Will).name: 创造 水（随意） Create Water (At Will)
Create Water (At Will).description:
当你把双手拢成杯状时，水开始从中流出。你创造2加仑的水。如果没有人饮用，它会在1天后蒸发。

As you cup your hands, water begins to flow forth from them. You create 2 gallons of water. If no one drinks it, it evaporates after 1 day.

True Strike.name: 真实打击 True Strike
True Strike.description:
对未来的一瞥确保你的下一次打击精准命中。在你的回合结束前，你下一次进行攻击掷骰时，将该攻击掷骰掷两次并取较好的结果。该攻击无视攻击掷骰的环境减值，以及因目标处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} 而需要进行的任何纯骰检定。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{法术效果：真知打击}

A glimpse into the future ensures your next blow strikes true. The next time you make an attack roll before the end of your turn, roll the attack twice and use the better result. The attack ignores circumstance penalties to the attack roll and any flat check required due to the target being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{Spell Effect: True Strike}

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你释放出一次脉冲，以探知魔法的存在。除魔法是否存在外，你不会获得任何其他信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你与盟友的魔法物品以及持续中的法术。你只有在该魔法的效果阶位低于你的侦测魔法法术阶位时，才能侦测到幻术魔法。然而，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具欺骗性的物品（例如@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环） 你得知该法术所侦测到的最强魔法效果的阶位或等级，由GM决定。

升阶（4环） 同3环，但你还会精确锁定最高阶魔法的来源。与模糊感官类似，你不会得知确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个5尺立方体范围内（或若目标大于该范围，则缩小到最近的等效范围）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你将注意力集中在目标物体上，敞开心智以感知魔法灵光。当施法完成时，你会知道该物品是否具有魔法。你或任何你向其建议该灵光相关信息的人，在该物品上进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{辨识魔法} 时获得 +2 环境加值。若该物体为幻象，只有当该效果的环位低于你的阅读灵光法术的环位时，你才能侦测到这一点。

升阶（3环）你最多可以以 10 个物体为目标。

升阶（6环）你可以以任意数量的物体为目标。

You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras. When the casting is complete, you know whether that item is magical. You or anyone you advise about the aura gains a +2 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic} on the item. If the object is illusory, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your read aura spell.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to 10 objects.

Heightened (6th) You can target any number of objects.

Spout.name: 喷涌 Spout
Spout.description:
区域 5英尺立方体或5英尺爆发

水向上喷涌，从地面涌出、从水池中升起，甚至从稀薄空气中显现。区域内的任何生物受到等同于1d4加上你的施法能力调整值的钝击伤害，并进行一次基础反射豁免。

你可以将此法术的区域改为5英尺爆发，但前提是你将爆发的中心设在一片水域中。这片水域可以小到池塘或小溪，但不能小到水坑或浴缸。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

Area 5-foot cube or 5-foot burst

Water blasts upward, coming out of the ground, rising from a pool, or even manifesting from thin air. Any creatures in the area take bludgeoning damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier, with a basic Reflex saving throw.

You can change this spell's area to a 5-foot burst, provided you center the burst in a body of water. This body of water can be as small as a pond or creek, but not as small as a puddle or bathtub.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Arcane Prepared Spells.name: 奥术备妥法术 Arcane Prepared Spells

Freedom of Movement.name: 行动自如 Freedom of Movement
Freedom of Movement.description:
你排斥会妨碍生物或减缓其移动的效果。在此法术效果持续期间，目标忽略会使其速度受到环境减值的效果。当其尝试@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}使其处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚}的效果时，其自动成功，除非该效果为魔法且其等级高于行动自如法术。

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher level than the freedom of movement spell.

Vapor Form.name: 蒸汽形态 Vapor Form
Vapor Form.description:
目标变形为蒸汽状态。在此状态下，目标为无定形。它失去任何给予AC的物品加值，以及护甲提供的所有其他效果与加值，并使用其无甲防御的熟练度调整值。它获得对物理伤害的抗力8，并免疫精确伤害。它不能施放法术、启动物品，或使用带有攻击或操作（特征）的动作。它获得10英尺的飞行速度，并能滑过细小裂缝。目标可以解消该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.sILRkGTwoBywy0BU]{法术效果：蒸汽形态}

The target transforms into a vaporous state. In this state, the target is amorphous. It loses any item bonus to AC and all other effects and bonuses from armor, and it uses its proficiency modifier for unarmored defense. It gains resistance 8 to physical damage and is immune to precision damage. It can't cast spells, activate items, or use actions that have the attack or manipulate trait. It gains a fly Speed of 10 feet and can slip through tiny cracks. The target can Dismiss the spell.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.sILRkGTwoBywy0BU]{Spell Effect: Vapor Form}

Hydraulic Push.name: 液压冲击 Hydraulic Push
Hydraulic Push.description:
你唤起一阵强力的高压水爆冲击目标并将其击退。进行一次远程法术攻击掷骰。

大成功或大失败 目标受到 6d6 钝击伤害，并被击退 10 英尺。

成功 目标受到 3d6 钝击伤害，并被击退 5 英尺。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 2d6。

You call forth a powerful blast of pressurized water that bludgeons the target and knocks it back. Make a ranged spell attack roll.

Critical Success The target takes 6d6 bludgeoning damage and is knocked back 10 feet.

Success The target takes 3d6 bludgeoning damage and is knocked back 5 feet.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Aqueous Orb.name: 水之宝珠 Aqueous Orb
Aqueous Orb.description:
一个直径10英尺的水球在射程内一个未被占据的空间中形成，位置可以在地面上或液态表面上。

当你@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{施放法术}以及每次你@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3f5DMFu8fPiqHpRg]{维持法术}时，你都可以推动宝珠滚动，使其沿着地面或液态表面移动至多10英尺。你可以在同一轮内通过多次维持法术来多次获得此效果。

宝珠可以穿过任何不会阻止水流动的生物空间或障碍物空间。它会熄灭其穿过的、体型不大于宝珠的非魔法火焰，并会尝试反制其穿过的任何魔法火焰。如果它未能反制某个特定火焰，则在该法术的持续时间内它无法反制该火焰。

宝珠也可以收集其穿过的生物。任何体型为大型或更小、其空间被宝珠尝试穿过的生物，都可以针对你的法术DC尝试一次反射豁免以避免被吞没。若生物在该豁免中成功，它可以选择让宝珠通过（留在其空间中，或移出宝珠路径进入该生物选择的一个空间），或选择让自己被推到宝珠前方，直到宝珠本次移动的终点。即使你让宝珠多次滚到同一生物的空间上，宝珠每回合也只能尝试吞没同一个生物一次。

豁免失败的生物会被拉入宝珠之中。它变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被擒抱}，随宝珠一起移动，并必须屏住吐息，否则开始窒息（除非它能在水中呼吸）。被吞没的中型或更小生物，以及任何试图影响该生物者，都遵循水栖战斗的正常规则。被吞没的大型生物通常足够大，其部分身体会伸出水面，并且它可以触及水外。被吞没的生物可以通过以下任一方式脱困：以成功的@Check[type:athletics|dc:10|traits:action:swim]检定进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.c8TGiZ48ygoSPofx]{游泳}，或针对你的法术DC进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}。在其反射豁免大失败的生物会被卡得更紧，必须尝试逃脱而非游泳。脱困的生物会离开宝珠的空间并能立即呼吸。宝珠可以容纳其空间中能装下的任意数量生物。当法术结束时，宝珠吞没的所有生物都会自动被释放。

A sphere of water 10 feet in diameter forms in an unoccupied space in range, either on the ground or on the surface of a liquid.

When you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{Cast the Spell} and each time you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3f5DMFu8fPiqHpRg]{Sustain the Spell}, you can roll the orb, moving it up to 10 feet along the ground or the surface of a liquid. You can gain this effect multiple times in the same round by Sustaining the Spell multiple times.

The orb can move through the spaces of any creatures or obstacles that wouldn't stop the flow of water. It extinguishes non-magical fires it moves through of its size or smaller, and it attempts to counteract any magical fires it moves through. If it fails to counteract a given fire, it can't counteract that fire for the duration of the spell.

The orb can also collect creatures it moves through. Any Large or smaller creature whose space the orb tries to move through can attempt a Reflex save against your spell DC to avoid being engulfed. If a creature succeeds at this save, it can either let the orb pass (remaining in its space or moving out of the orb's path into a space of the creature's choice) or allow itself to be pushed in front of the orb to the end of the orb's movement. The orb can try to Engulf the same creature only once per turn, even if you roll it onto a creature's space more than once.

A creature that fails its save is pulled into the orb. It becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, moves along with the orb, and must hold its breath or begin suffocating (unless it can breathe in water). An engulfed Medium or smaller creature and anyone trying to affect that creature follow the normal rules for aquatic battles. An engulfed Large creature is usually big enough that parts of it stick out from the water, and it can reach out of the water. An engulfed creature can get free either by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.c8TGiZ48ygoSPofx]{Swimming} with a successful @Check[type:athletics|dc:10|traits:action:swim] check or by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escaping} against your spell DC. A creature that critically failed its Reflex save is further stuck and must attempt to Escape instead of Swim. A freed creature exits the orb's space and can immediately breathe. The orb can contain as many creatures as can fit in its space. When the spell ends, all creatures the orb has engulfed are automatically released.

Haste.name: 加速 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法使目标能够更快地行动。它获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{迅捷（状态）} 状态，并且每轮只能将额外的动作用于打击和疾行动作。

升阶（7环） 你最多可以以6个生物为目标。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{法术效果：加速术}

Magic empowers the target to act faster. It gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} condition and can use the extra action each round only for Strike and Stride actions.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 6 creatures.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{Spell Effect: Haste}

Wall of Water.name: 水墙 Wall of Water
Wall of Water.description:
你将手举向空中，召唤一道巨浪涌入战场。这道墙以一条长 60 英尺、高 10 英尺、厚 5 英尺的直线保持直立。

水墙区域内所有与其体型相同或更小的非魔法火焰都会立刻熄灭。它也会尝试反制其区域内的任何魔法火焰。这两种效果会在施放法术时以及每当有火焰进入水墙区域时发生。若水墙未能反制某一特定火焰，则在该法术的持续时间内它无法反制该火焰。

钝击或挥砍的投射物无法穿过水墙，而穿刺的投射物若穿过水墙，其射程增量减半。穿越水墙的生物需要通过游泳来穿过。水中战斗的规则适用于穿越水墙的生物、以水墙内的生物为目标，或穿过水墙的情况。例如，以水墙内的生物为目标的钝击或挥砍近战攻击将承受 -2 环境减值。

Raising your hand in the air, you call a massive wave onto the battlefield. The wall stays upright in a straight line that is 60 feet long, 10 feet high, and 5 feet thick.

Any non-magical fires within the wall of water's area that are its size or smaller are put out instantly. It also attempts to counteract any magical fires in its area. Both of these effects happen when the spell is cast and whenever a fire enters the wall's area. If the wall fails to counteract a given fire, it can't counteract that fire for the duration of the spell.

Bludgeoning or slashing projectiles can't pass through the wall, and piercing projectiles have their range increments halved if they pass through the wall. A creature traversing the wall of water needs to Swim through. The rules of aquatic combat apply to creatures traversing the wall of water, targeting creatures within the wall, or passing through the wall. For instance, a bludgeoning or slashing melee attack targeting a creature in the wall would take a -2 circumstance penalty.

Mirror Image.name: 镜影术 Mirror Image
Mirror Image.description:
三个你的幻象影像在你的空间中旋转游走，可能导致那些对你进行攻击的生物击中其中一个影像而非你本人。任何本应命中你的攻击都有随机几率改为命中你的一个影像而非你本人。若三个影像都仍然存在，则有 1/4 的几率命中你（在 [[/r 1d4]] 中掷出 1）。若剩下两个影像，则有 1/3 的几率命中你（在 [[/r 1d6]] 中掷出 1-2）。若只剩一个影像，则几率为 1/2（在 [[/r 1d6]] 中掷出 1-3）。

一旦某个影像被命中，它就会被摧毁。若一次攻击掷骰未能命中你的 AC 但未大失败，则它会摧毁一个影像，但没有额外效果（即使该攻击通常在失败时也会产生效果）。若一次攻击掷骰为大成功，且本应命中其中一个影像，则摧毁其中一个影像，并且该次攻击掷骰改为对你为成功。所有影像都被摧毁后，法术结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.0PO5mFRhh9HxGAtv]{法术效果：镜影术}

Three illusory images of you swirl about your space, potentially causing those who attack you to hit one of the images instead of you. Any attack that would hit you has a random chance of hitting one of your images instead of you. If all three images remain, there is a 1 in 4 chance of hitting you (1 on [[/r 1d4]]). With two images remaining, there is a 1 in 3 chance of hitting you (1-2 on [[/r 1d6]]). With only one image, the chances are 1 in 2 (1-3 on [[/r 1d6]]).

Once an image is hit, it is destroyed. If an attack roll fails to hit your AC but doesn't critically fail, it destroys an image but has no additional effect (even if the attack would normally have an effect on a failure). If an attack roll is a critical success and would hit one of the images, one of the images is destroyed and the attack roll becomes a success against you. Once all the images are destroyed, the spell ends.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.0PO5mFRhh9HxGAtv]{Spell Effect: Mirror Image}

See the Unseen.name: 看见隐形之物 See the Unseen
See the Unseen.description:
你的凝视能穿透幻象，并发现@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}的生物与灵体。你能看见隐形生物，如同它们并未隐形一般，尽管其特性会显得模糊，使其处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态且难以辨识。你也能看见虚体生物，例如带有幽灵（特征）的生物，它们会在距离某个物体表面10英尺内、从物体内部相位穿出时，呈现为透过这些物体所见的模糊形状。更细微的线索也使你进行的用于识破幻象的检定获得+2状态加值。

升阶（5环）该法术的持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：看见不可见}

Your gaze pierces through illusions and finds @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} creatures and spirits. You can see invisible creatures as though they weren't invisible, although their features are blurred, making them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} and difficult to identify. You can also see incorporeal creatures, like ghosts, phased through an object from within 10 feet of an object's surface as blurry shapes seen through those objects. Subtler clues also grant you a +2 status bonus to checks you make to disbelieve illusions.

Heightened (5th) This spell has a duration of 8 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{Spell Effect: See the Unseen}

Alarm.name: 警报 Alarm
Alarm.description:
你守护一个区域，以在生物未经你许可进入时提醒你。当你施放alarm时，选择一个口令。每当一个小型或更大的有形生物在未说出口令的情况下进入该法术的区域时，alarm会按你的选择发出心灵警报（此时该法术获得心灵（特征））或发出音量与手铃相当的可闻警报（此时该法术获得听觉（特征））。任一选项都会自动唤醒你，而铃声会让区域内每个生物都可以尝试一次DC 15 察觉检定来醒来。一个知晓alarm的生物在移动进入该区域时，必须成功通过一次隐匿检定对抗该法术DC，否则将触发该法术。

升阶（3环） 你可以指定哪些生物会触发alarm法术的警报——例如，兽人或戴面具的人。

You ward an area to alert you when creatures enter without your permission. When you cast alarm, select a password. Whenever a Small or larger corporeal creature enters the spell's area without speaking the password, alarm sends your choice of a mental alert (in which case the spell gains the mental trait) or an audible alarm with the sound and volume of a hand bell (in which case the spell gains the auditory trait). Either option automatically awakens you, and the bell allows each creature in the area to attempt a DC 15 Perception check to wake up. A creature aware of the alarm must succeed at a Stealth check against the spell's DC or trigger the spell when moving into the area.

Heightened (3rd) You can specify criteria for which creatures sound the alarm spell-for instance, orcs or masked people.

Unseen Servant.name: 隐形仆役 Unseen Servant
Unseen Servant.description:
你召唤一个隐形仆从，你可以在维持法术的一部分中指挥它。它为你服务，直到其生命值降至 0（此时法术结束），或直到你停止维持法术为止。该隐形仆从获得被召唤（特征）特征。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.j7NNPfZwD19BwSEZ]{隐形仆从}（无阵营）

You summon an unseen servant, which you can command as part of Sustaining the Spell. It serves you until its Hit Points are reduced to 0, at which point the spell ends, or until you stop Sustaining the Spell. The unseen servant gains the summoned trait.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.j7NNPfZwD19BwSEZ]{Unseen Servant} (No Alignment)

Telekinetic Hand.name: 念动力之手 Telekinetic Hand
Telekinetic Hand.description:
你创造一只漂浮的魔法之手，它要么隐形，要么呈幽灵般的形态，抓住目标物体并使其缓慢悬浮，向任意方向移动至多20尺。当你维持该法术时，你可以使该物体额外移动20尺。若法术结束时该物体在空气中，该物体会坠落。

强化（3环） 你可以以一件无人持用且负载为1或更低的物体为目标。

强化（5环） 射程增加至60尺，且你可以以一件无人持用且负载为1或更低的物体为目标。

强化（7环） 射程增加至60尺，且你可以以一件无人持用且负载为2或更低的物体为目标。

You create a floating, magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and levitates it slowly up to 20 feet in any direction. When you Sustain the spell, you can move the object an additional 20 feet. If the object is in the air when the spell ends, the object falls.

Heightened (3rd) You can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (7th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 2 or less.

Ray of Frost.name: 霜冻射线 Ray of Frost
Ray of Frost.description:
你发射一道冰寒射线。进行一次法术攻击掷骰。该射线造成等于 1d4 + 你的施法能力调整值 的寒冷伤害。

大成功 目标受到双倍伤害，并在 1 轮内其各项速度承受 -10 尺状态减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.I4PsUAaYSUJ8pwKC]{法术效果：霜寒射线}

成功 目标受到正常伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d4。

You blast an icy ray. Make a spell attack roll. The ray deals cold damage equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

Critical Success The target takes double damage and takes a -10-foot status penalty to its Speeds for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.I4PsUAaYSUJ8pwKC]{Spell Effect: Ray of Frost}

Success The target takes normal damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
蔚蓝巨龙以两种方式之一吐息。在其巨龙吐息的区域内，所有非魔法的火焰都会被熄灭。巨龙在[[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4轮}内不能再次使用吐息武器。

  • 冲击波 巨龙在一个@Template[type:cone|distance:40]中吐出强力、猛烈的波浪。区域内每个生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:fortitude|dc:34]豁免，具有以下效果。

    大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

    成功 该生物被沿锥形同方向推离5尺。

    失败 该生物被沿锥形同方向推离15尺。若其在被完全推离前会撞到坚固的物体，则其每剩余应被推动的5尺会受到@Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]]伤害。

    大成功或大失败 该生物被沿锥形同方向推离25尺。若其在被完全推离前会撞到坚固的物体，则其每剩余应被推动的5尺会受到@Damage[3d6[bludgeoning]]伤害。

  • 加压水流 巨龙在一个@Template[type:cone|distance:40]中吐出一股加压水流的爆喷，造成@Damage[15d6[bludgeoning]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:34|basic:true]豁免）。

The cerulean dragon breathes in one of two ways. All non-magical fires within the area of their Dragon Breath are extinguished. The dragon can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

  • Battering Wave The dragon breathes a powerful, pummeling wave in a @Template[type:cone|distance:40]. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:34] save with the following effects.

    Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

    Success The creature is pushed 5 feet away in the same direction as the cone.

    Failure The creature is pushed 15 feet away in the same direction as the cone. If it would hit a solid object before being completely pushed, it takes @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]] damage for every remaining 5 feet it would be pushed.

    Critical Failure The creature is pushed 25 feet away in the same direction as the cone. If it would hit a solid object before being completely pushed, it takes @Damage[3d6[bludgeoning]] damage for every remaining 5 feet it would be pushed.

  • Pressurized Water The dragon breathes a blast of pressurized water in a @Template[type:cone|distance:40] that deals @Damage[15d6[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:34|basic:true] save).

Deny Advantage.name: 拒绝优势 Deny Advantage
Deny Advantage.description:
苍蓝巨龙不会对14级或更低等级的生物因夹击而@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]，也不会对14级或更低等级的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐蔽}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未探知}生物如此；同样也不会对使用奇袭攻击的14级或更低等级的生物如此。

The cerulean dragon isn't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] to flanking, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} creatures of 14th level or lower, or to creatures of 14th level or lower using surprise attack.

Hazard Sense.name: 危害感官 Hazard Sense
Hazard Sense.description:
蔚蓝巨龙拥有一种直觉感官，会提醒他们危险以及陷阱的存在。他们在用于发现陷阱和危害的察觉检定上获得+1环境加值；在对抗由陷阱和危害发动的攻击时的AC上获得+1环境加值；并在对抗陷阱和危害的豁免上获得+1环境加值。即使蔚蓝巨龙未在搜索，他们仍会进行一次检定以发现那些通常要求他们处于搜索状态的陷阱和危害。

The cerulean dragon has an intuitive sense that alerts them to dangers and the presence of traps. They gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to find traps and hazards, to AC against attacks made by traps and hazards, and to save against traps and hazards. Even if the cerulean dragon isn't searching, they still get a check to find traps and hazards that normally require them to be Searching.

Geyser.name: 间歇泉 Geyser
Geyser.description:
区域 10英尺半径、50英尺高的圆柱

一股强力的间歇泉从地面猛烈喷发而出，可能将位于其上方的生物推入空气中。此法术的区域底部必须位于坚实地面上。区域内的每个生物受到3d6钝击伤害与4d6火伤害，需进行一次反射豁免。被间歇泉推入空气中的生物不能被推到间歇泉顶端以上。被推入空气后，生物会坠落，除非它正在飞行或具有其他方式保持悬空，并承受坠落伤害（通常等于其坠落距离的一半）。间歇泉喷发后，其区域在1轮内充满一团蒸汽云。蒸汽中的所有生物均为隐蔽，且蒸汽外的所有生物对蒸汽内的生物而言为隐蔽。

大成功或大失败 生物不受影响。

成功 生物受到一半伤害且不会被推入空气中。

失败 生物受到全额伤害并被推入空气中20英尺。(@Damage[10[bludgeoning]] damage)

大成功或大失败 生物受到双倍伤害并被推入空气中40英尺。(@Damage[20[bludgeoning]] damage)

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d6钝击与1d6火。

Area 10-foot radius, 50-foot-tall cylinder

A powerful geyser blasts up from the ground, potentially pushing creatures on top of it into the air. The bottom of this spell's area must be on solid ground. Each creature in the area takes 3d6 bludgeoning damage and 4d6 fire damage, with a Reflex save. A creature pushed into the air by the geyser can't be pushed beyond the top of the geyser. After being pushed into the air, a creature falls unless it's flying or has some other means of staying aloft, taking falling damage (normally equal to half the distance it fell). After the geyser erupts, its area is filled with a cloud of steam for 1 round. All creatures in the steam are concealed, and all creatures outside the steam are concealed to creatures within it.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and isn't pushed into the air.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is pushed 20 feet into the air. (@Damage[10[bludgeoning]] damage)

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is pushed 40 feet into the air. (@Damage[20[bludgeoning]] damage)

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6 bludgeoning and 1d6 fire.

Repulsion.name: 排斥 Repulsion
Repulsion.description:
你显现出一道灵光，阻止生物接近你。施放法术时，你可以将区域设为你选择的任意半径，最大为40英尺。若生物在你施放法术时位于区域内，或在法术效果持续期间一进入区域，它就必须尝试一次意志豁免。一旦某个生物尝试过该豁免，它在该次施放的排斥中使用相同的结果。对生物的移动的任何限制仅在其自愿朝你移动时适用。例如，如果你移动得更靠近某个生物，它不需要因此移动远离。

大成功 该生物的移动不受限制。

成功 该生物在朝你移动时，将区域内的每一格视为困难地形。

失败 该生物在区域内无法移动得更靠近你。

You manifest an aura that prevents creatures from approaching you. When casting the spell, you can make the area any radius you choose, up to 40 feet. A creature must attempt a Will save if it's within the area when you cast the spell or as soon as it enters the area while the spell is in effect. Once a creature has attempted the save, it uses the same result for that casting of repulsion. Any restrictions on a creature's movement apply only if it voluntarily moves toward you. For example, if you move closer to a creature, it doesn't then need to move away.

Critical Success The creature's movement is not restricted.

Success The creature treats each square in the area as difficult terrain when moving closer to you.

Failure The creature can't move closer to you within the area.

True Seeing.name: 真知术 True Seeing
True Seeing.description:
你能看见60英尺内的事物如其真实样貌。GM会针对区域内的任何幻术或变化系效果进行一次秘密的反制检定，但仅用于决定你是否能看穿它（例如，若该检定成功反制一个变形法术，你可以看见该生物的真实形态，但你不会终止该变形法术）。

You see things within 60 feet as they actually are. The GM rolls a secret counteract check against any illusion or transmutation in the area, but only for the purpose of determining whether you see through it (for instance, if the check succeeds against a polymorph spell, you can see the creature's true form, but you don't end the polymorph spell).

Control Water.name: 操控水 Control Water
Control Water.description:
通过将你的意志施加于水，你可以使所选区域内的水面等级上升或下降10英尺。区域内的水生生物将受到@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow}的效果影响。

区域 50英尺长×50英尺宽

By imposing your will upon the water, you can raise or lower the level of water in the chosen area by 10 feet. Water creatures in the area are subjected to the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow}.

Area 50 ft long by 50 ft wide

Sending.name: 发送 Sending
Sending.description:
你向该生物发送一条不超过25个词的心灵信息，它可以立刻用自己不超过25个词的信息进行回应。

You send the creature a mental message of 25 words or fewer, and it can respond immediately with its own message of 25 words or fewer.

Truespeech.name: 真言 Truespeech
Truespeech.description:
目标可以理解所有词语，不受语言限制，并且还能说出其他生物的语言。在由不同生物组成的混合群体中，每当目标说话时，它都可以选择一个生物，并用该生物能理解的语言交谈，即使目标并不知道那是什么语言。

强化（7环） 持续时间为8小时。

The target can understand all words regardless of language and also speak the languages of other creatures. When in a mixed group of creatures, each time the target speaks, it can choose a creature and speak in a language that creature understands, even if the target doesn't know what language that is.

Heightened (7th) The duration is 8 hours.

Adult Cerulean Dragon (Spellcaster).publicNotes:
蔚蓝巨龙是巨龙世界的开路先锋，是探险者、地城探索者与探索者；它们为永无止境的好奇心所驱使，在对它们而言未知的土地上开辟道路、踏出新径。蔚蓝巨龙为冒险而活，总是逼迫自己比以往更快、更远、更深、更高。它们决心看看下一个走廊尽头有什么、紧闭的门后有什么、地平线之外有什么，并发现其他世界、位面与其他次元中究竟有什么。它们探索不寻常的地点与神秘的奇观，从不满足于无所事事或久坐不动，也从不畏惧命运可能为它们准备的惊喜或未来可能带来的危险。

蔚蓝巨龙充满永恒的漂泊渴望与不息的旅行热情。它们过着快节奏的生活，因此偏好始终保持移动。多数蔚蓝巨龙不保有传统巢穴，更愿意在荒野中、在千变万化的天空之下生活，而不是被奢华束缚在同一个地方。有些蔚蓝巨龙偏好魔法居所与异位面领域——当它们足够强大且足够年长，能够创造这些时——这让它们得以同时享有舒适的生活与冒险的生活。

蔚蓝巨龙对周遭世界及其中所包含的一切都抱有惊人的好奇心。它们喜欢把鼻子伸到不该去的地方，越过边界，打破各种禁忌。它们爱窥探，不过比起深挖他人隐秘的过去与家族秘密，它们更可能撬开上锁的门、潜入禁入之地。与琥珀巨龙不同，它们对人们生活的细枝末节，或散落在城市街头的流言与尴尬并不太感兴趣。这并不代表它们排斥交友——恰恰相反，蔚蓝巨龙乐于结识新朋友并建立友谊，尤其喜欢与志同道合的探索者与冒险者建立合作关系，以便携手同行。

尽管蔚蓝巨龙喜欢结识新朋友、发现稀有宝藏、学习失落的秘密，但对它们而言，没有什么比前往一个全新的地方更令人兴奋。探索一个对它们来说完全新奇且未知的地点最能让蔚蓝巨龙兴奋，无论该地点对社会、历史的重要性（或毫无重要性），或对获取财富以壮大它们的囤藏是否有助益。

在幼年时期，许多蔚蓝巨龙主要专注于普通的旅行形态。它们造访从未见过的城市与聚居地，闯入金库，跋涉穿过下水道，开启坟墓。它们探索大片荒野，攀登群山，钻入洞穴探险，游过沼泽，并潜入湖泊与海洋之下。待到成年，多数蔚蓝巨龙更偏好探索更危险的地点，例如闹鬼的庄园、沉没的船只、偏远的神殿、古老的遗迹，以及——最常见的心头好——地城。

随着时代推移，多数蔚蓝巨龙必须走得越来越远，才能找到自己从未到过的地方并满足漂泊渴望。在这段时期，多数会走向极端，探入最幽深的深处与最遥远、最难以抵达的地区，旅行到其他位面与星球，甚至前往其他时代与次元。这是一段深入怪诞、狂野与全然不可思议之物的时代。

Zemedrilon

“永寻者”泽梅德里隆或许是异位面探索方面最伟大的专家，曾亲自探索过23个位面，其中包括两个其存在目前尚未被证实的位面。多数人相信泽梅德里隆在30 之年前试图开启通往遥远未来的传送门时被汽化——而蔚蓝巨龙认为这故事可笑至极。它们坚称这条古老的巨龙已成功抵达未来，并将在足够长的时代过去之后再度现身。

冒险者小队

蔚蓝巨龙常为探索目的而结成紧密团队，每条巨龙都专精于某个研究领域或探索重点。有些学者认为，传统“冒险者小队”的概念正是源自蔚蓝巨龙——这是一项毫无根据且无法证实的主张，令多数短命的凡人颇为恼火。

移动囤藏

如同多数冒险者，蔚蓝巨龙会将财富以贵重的魔法物品、远古遗物、珍贵珠宝以及其他可佩戴的财富形式带在身上。因此，尽管蔚蓝巨龙缺乏真正的囤藏，它们往往会穿戴（或挥舞！）一笔巨额财富。

Cerulean dragons are the trailblazers of the dragon world, the delvers, the dungeoneers, and the explorers, charting paths and blazing trails through lands unknown to them to sate their neverending curiosity. Cerulean dragons live for adventure and are always pushing themselves faster, further, deeper, and higher than they've ever gone before. They're determined to see what's down the next hall, behind the closed door, beyond the horizon, and discover what lies on other worlds, planes, and other dimensions. They explore unusual sites and mysterious wonders, never content to be idle or sedentary, and never afraid of what surprises fate might have in store for them or what dangers the future may hold.

Cerulean dragons are filled with an eternal wanderlust and an unabating passion for travel. They live a fast-paced life, and thus they prefer to stay on the move at all times. Most cerulean dragons don't keep traditional lairs, preferring a life lived in the wilderness and under a thousand different skies rather than a life of luxury shackled to the same place. Some cerulean dragons prefer magical homes and extraplanar domains—when they're powerful and old enough to create them—which allow them a life of comfort and a life of adventure all at once.

Cerulean dragons are incredibly curious about the world around them and all it contains. They enjoy sticking their noses where they don't belong, treading beyond boundaries, and breaking taboos of all sorts. They're snoops, though they're far more likely to pry behind locked doors and into off-limit locations than they are to delve into people's hidden pasts and family secrets. They're not overly interested in the details of people's lives or the gossip and embarrassments scattered down city streets, unlike amber dragons. It's not that they're averse to making friends—on the contrary, cerulean dragons are interested in meeting new people and forging friendships, particularly working relationships with other like-minded explorers and adventurers with whom they can collaborate.

While cerulean dragons enjoy meeting new people, discovering rare treasures, and learning lost secrets, nothing is more exciting to them than traveling somewhere new. Exploring a place that's completely new and unknown to them excites cerulean dragons the most, regardless of that location's greater importance (or lack thereof) to society, history, or the acquisition of wealth to grow their hoard.

In their youth, many cerulean dragons focus primarily on ordinary forms of travel. They visit cities and settlements they've never seen before, breaking into vaults, trudging through sewers, and opening tombs. They explore tracts of wilderness, climbing mountains, spelunking through caves, swimming through swamps, and diving beneath lakes and oceans. By the time they're grown, most cerulean dragons prefer to explore more dangerous locations, such as haunted manors, sunken ships, remote temples, ancient ruins, and—a common favorite—dungeons.

As time passes, most cerulean dragons must go further and further to find places they've never been and fulfill their wanderlust. During this time, most go to extremes, plumbing the deepest depths and the most distant and inaccessible regions, traveling to other planes and planets, or even to other times and dimensions. It's a time to delve into the weird, the wild, and the utterly unbelievable.

Zemedrilon

Zemedrilon the Ever-Seeking is perhaps the greatest expert on extraplanar exploration, having personally explored 23 planes, including two whose existence is currently unconfirmed. Most believe Zemedrilon was vaporized 30 years ago while attempting to open a portal to the distant future—a tale cerulean dragons consider laughable. They insist the ancient dragon successfully arrived in the future and, after a long enough time has passed, will reemerge.

Adventuring Parties

Cerulean dragons often band together into tightly knit teams for the purpose of exploration, with each dragon specializing in a field of study or exploratory focus. Some scholars believe it's from cerulean dragons that the concept of the traditional "adventuring party" was born—a completely unsubstantiated and unprovable claim that irks most short- lived mortals.

Mobile Hoards

Like most adventurers, cerulean dragons carry their wealth on them in the form of valuable magic items, ancient artifacts, valuable jewelry, and other wearable wealth. Thus, while a cerulean dragon lacks a true hoard, they often wear (or wield!) a fortune.
Adult Cerulean Dragon (Spellcaster).prototypeToken: 成年蔚蓝巨龙 Adult Cerulean Dragon

Ancient Cerulean Dragon (Spellcaster).name: 远古天青巨龙（施法者） Ancient Cerulean Dragon (Spellcaster)
Ancient Cerulean Dragon (Spellcaster).tokenName: 远古天蓝巨龙 Ancient Cerulean Dragon

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60英尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Wavesense (Imprecise) 40 feet.name: 波感知（不精确）40尺 Wavesense (Imprecise) 40 feet

Experienced Traveler.name: 老练的旅行者 Experienced Traveler
Experienced Traveler.description:
蔚蓝巨龙是经验丰富的生存专家，不会被大多数环境所带来的寻常危险所阻碍。它们无视非魔法的困难地形。

Cerulean dragons are experienced survivalists and are unhindered by the mundane dangers posed by most environments. They ignore non-magical difficult terrain.

Peregrinate.name: 行旅 Peregrinate
Peregrinate.description:
触发 一名敌人的回合结束，且在该回合中该敌人以近战打击命中了蔚蓝巨龙

效果 蔚蓝巨龙远离危险游走，使自己处于更安全的距离并重新定位以便打击。蔚蓝巨龙疾行、游泳或飞行，移动距离至多为其速度的一半，且其移动不会触发由移动触发的反应动作（例如借机攻击）。

Trigger A foe's turn ends, during which that foe hit the cerulean dragon with a melee Strike

Effect The cerulean dragon wanders away from danger, putting themselves at a safer distance and repositioning to strike. The cerulean dragon Strides, Swims, or Flies up to half their Speed, and their movement doesn't trigger reactions triggered by movement (such as Attacks of Opportunity).

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术先天法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Translate.name: 请提供要翻译的英文文本（或图片/截图），以及任何需要遵循的术语表（glossary）。 Translate
Translate.description:
当你施放该法术时，目标可以理解它正在听到或阅读的一种语言的含义。这不会让它理解密码、以隐喻方式表达的语言等（由GM酌情决定）。如果目标能听到多种语言并且知道这一点，它可以选择要理解哪种语言；否则，从这些语言中随机选择一种。

升阶（3环） 目标也可以说该语言。

升阶（4环） 你最多可以以10个生物为目标，且目标也可以说该语言。

The target can understand the meaning of a single language it is hearing or reading when you cast the spell. This doesn't let it understand codes, language couched in metaphor, and the like (subject to GM discretion). If the target can hear multiple languages and knows that, it can choose which language to understand; otherwise, choose one of the languages randomly.

Heightened (3rd) The target can also speak the language.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures, and targets can also speak the language.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你解构某个法术或效果背后的魔法。尝试对该目标进行一次反制检定。如果你成功反制一件魔法物品，该物品在10分钟内变为其类型的普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。如果目标是一件神器或类似物品，你自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Humanoid Form.name: 类人形态 Humanoid Form
Humanoid Form.description:
你将自己的外貌变形为一个小型或中型的类人生物（特征），例如矮人、精灵、地精、半身人、人类、兽人或蜥蜴人。当你处于此形态时，除了你原本的其他特征外，你获得类人生物（特征），以及任何与该生物种类相关的特征（例如地精或人类）。若此变形使你的体型变小，它会相应减少你的触及（如同 shrink 法术）。此变形不会以任何方式改变你的数据，你也不会获得你所采取的类人生物形态的任何特殊能力。你仍可穿戴并使用你的道具；这些道具会（如有必要）改变体型以匹配你的新形态。若物品离开你的身上，它们会恢复为其通常的体型。

类人生物形态使你在进行以冒充所选族裔的一般成员为目的的欺瞒检定时获得+4状态加值，并且即使你未受训也要加上你的等级，但你不能让自己看起来像某个特定的人。若你想要冒充某个个体，你仍需要创造一套伪装，不过 GM 在决定你欺瞒检定的 DC 时不会将族裔差异纳入考量。你可以解消此法术。

升阶（3环） 若你采取的形态具备该能力，你获得黑暗视觉或弱光视野。

升阶（5环） 你可以呈现大型类人生物（特征）的外貌。若这使你的体型变大，你获得 enlarge 法术的效果。

You transform your appearance to that of a Small or Medium humanoid, such as a dwarf, elf, goblin, halfling, human, orc, or lizardfolk. You gain the humanoid trait in addition to your other traits while in this form, as well as any trait related to the creature's kind (such as goblin or human). If this transformation reduces your size, it reduces your reach accordingly (as the shrink spell). This transformation doesn't change your statistics in any way, and you don't gain any special abilities of the humanoid form you assume. You can still wear and use your gear, which changes size (if necessary) to match your new form. If items leave your person, they return to their usual size.

Humanoid form grants you a +4 status bonus to Deception checks to pass as a generic member of the chosen ancestry, and you add your level even if you're untrained, but you can't make yourself look like a specific person. If you want to Impersonate an individual, you still need to create a disguise, though the GM won't factor in the difference in ancestry when determining the DC of your Deception check. You can Dismiss this spell.

Heightened (3rd) You gain darkvision or low-light vision if the form you assume has that ability.

Heightened (5th) You can take on the appearance of a Large humanoid. If this increases your size, you gain the effects of the enlarge spell.

Create Water (At Will).name: 创造 水（随意） Create Water (At Will)
Create Water (At Will).description:
当你把双手捧起时，水开始从中流出。你创造2加仑的水。若无人饮用，它会在1天后蒸发。

As you cup your hands, water begins to flow forth from them. You create 2 gallons of water. If no one drinks it, it evaporates after 1 day.

True Strike.name: 真实打击 True Strike
True Strike.description:
对未来的一瞥确保你的下一击命中无误。在你的回合结束前，你下一次进行攻击掷骰时，将该次攻击掷骰掷两次并取较高结果。该次攻击无视对该次攻击掷骰的环境减值，以及因目标处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐藏}而需要进行的任何纯骰检定。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{法术效果：真实打击}

A glimpse into the future ensures your next blow strikes true. The next time you make an attack roll before the end of your turn, roll the attack twice and use the better result. The attack ignores circumstance penalties to the attack roll and any flat check required due to the target being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{Spell Effect: True Strike}

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你释放出一道脉冲，用以探知魔法的存在。你获得的信息仅限于魔法是否存在，而不包含其他内容。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你与盟友的魔法物品以及持续中的法术。你只有在幻术魔法的效果位阶低于你的侦测魔法法术位阶时，才能侦测到幻术魔法。然而，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环）你得知该法术所侦测到的最强大魔法效果的位阶或等级，由GM判定。

升阶（4环）同3环，但你还会锁定最高位阶魔法的来源。与模糊感官相同，你不会得知确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个5英尺立方体之内（若来源大于该范围，则缩小到最近的等效范围）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你将注意力集中在作为目标的物体上，敞开心智以感知魔法灵光。施法完成后，你知道该物品是否为魔法。你或任何你告知该灵光信息的人，在该物品上进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{辨识魔法} 时获得 +2 环境加值。若该物体为幻觉，只有当该效果的阶位低于你的阅读灵光法术的阶位时，你才能侦测到这一点。

升阶（3环）你可以以最多 10 个物体为目标。

升阶（6环）你可以以任意数量的物体为目标。

You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras. When the casting is complete, you know whether that item is magical. You or anyone you advise about the aura gains a +2 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic} on the item. If the object is illusory, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your read aura spell.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to 10 objects.

Heightened (6th) You can target any number of objects.

Spout.name: 喷涌 Spout
Spout.description:
区域 5英尺立方体或5英尺爆发

水向上喷涌而出，从地面涌出、从水池中升起，甚至从稀薄空气中显现。区域内的任意生物受到等同于1d4加上你的施法能力调整值的钝击伤害，并进行一次基础反射豁免。

你可以将此法术的区域改为5英尺爆发，前提是你将爆发的中心置于一片水体中。该水体可以小到池塘或小溪，但不能小到水洼或浴缸。

强化（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

Area 5-foot cube or 5-foot burst

Water blasts upward, coming out of the ground, rising from a pool, or even manifesting from thin air. Any creatures in the area take bludgeoning damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier, with a basic Reflex saving throw.

You can change this spell's area to a 5-foot burst, provided you center the burst in a body of water. This body of water can be as small as a pond or creek, but not as small as a puddle or bathtub.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Arcane Prepared Spells.name: 奥术备妥法术 Arcane Prepared Spells

Freedom of Movement.name: 行动自如 Freedom of Movement
Freedom of Movement.description:
你会排斥那些会阻碍生物或减缓其移动的效果。在此法术效果持续期间，目标无视那些会使其速度受到环境减值的效果。当其尝试以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} 摆脱使其处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} 的效果时，除非该效果具有魔法性质且其等级高于自由移动法术，否则其自动成功。

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher level than the freedom of movement spell.

Vapor Form.name: 蒸气形态 Vapor Form
Vapor Form.description:
目标变形为蒸气状态。在此状态下，目标为无定形。它失去任何对AC的物品加值，以及护甲提供的所有其他效果与加值，并使用其无甲防御的熟练度调整值。它获得对物理伤害的抗力8，并免疫精准伤害。它不能施放法术、启动物品，或使用带有攻击或操作（特征）的动作。它获得10英尺的飞行速度，并能滑过微小的裂缝。目标可以解消该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.sILRkGTwoBywy0BU]{法术效果：蒸气形态}

The target transforms into a vaporous state. In this state, the target is amorphous. It loses any item bonus to AC and all other effects and bonuses from armor, and it uses its proficiency modifier for unarmored defense. It gains resistance 8 to physical damage and is immune to precision damage. It can't cast spells, activate items, or use actions that have the attack or manipulate trait. It gains a fly Speed of 10 feet and can slip through tiny cracks. The target can Dismiss the spell.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.sILRkGTwoBywy0BU]{Spell Effect: Vapor Form}

Hydraulic Push.name: 液压冲击 Hydraulic Push
Hydraulic Push.description:
你召唤出一股强力的加压水爆冲击目标，使其受到钝击并将其击退。进行一次远程法术攻击掷骰。

大成功或大失败 目标受到6d6钝击伤害并被击退10英尺。

成功 目标受到3d6钝击伤害并被击退5英尺。

升阶（+1） 伤害提高2d6。

You call forth a powerful blast of pressurized water that bludgeons the target and knocks it back. Make a ranged spell attack roll.

Critical Success The target takes 6d6 bludgeoning damage and is knocked back 10 feet.

Success The target takes 3d6 bludgeoning damage and is knocked back 5 feet.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Aqueous Orb.name: 水之宝珠 Aqueous Orb
Aqueous Orb.description:
一个直径10英尺的水球在射程内一处未被占据的空间中形成，可以在地面上或液态表面上。

当你@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{施放法术}以及每次你@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3f5DMFu8fPiqHpRg]{维持法术}时，你可以滚动这颗宝珠，使其沿地面或液态表面移动至多10英尺。你可以在同一轮内通过多次维持法术来多次获得该效果。

宝珠可以穿过任何不会阻止水流动的生物或障碍物所占据的空间。它会熄灭其移动路径上体型不大于它的非魔法火焰，并会尝试反制其移动路径上的任何魔法火焰。若它未能反制某个特定火焰，则在法术的持续时间内它无法再反制该火焰。

宝珠也可以收集它穿过的生物。任何体型为大型或更小、其空间被宝珠试图穿过的生物，都可以针对你的法术DC尝试一次反射豁免以避免被吞没。若生物在该豁免中成功，它可以选择让宝珠通过（留在其空间内，或移出宝珠路径进入该生物选择的一处空间），或允许自己被推到宝珠前方，直至宝珠移动的终点。即使你将宝珠滚到同一个生物的空间上多次，宝珠也只能在每回合对同一生物尝试吞没一次。

豁免失败的生物会被拉入宝珠。它将变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被擒抱}，随宝珠一同移动，并必须屏住呼吸否则开始窒息（除非它能在水中呼吸）。被吞没的中型或更小生物，以及任何试图影响该生物者，遵循水栖战斗的通常规则。被吞没的大型生物通常大到其部分身体会伸出水面，并且它可以触及水面外。被吞没的生物可以通过以成功的@Check[type:athletics|dc:10|traits:action:swim]检定进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.c8TGiZ48ygoSPofx]{游泳}来脱身，或以对抗你的法术DC进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}来脱身。在其反射豁免大失败的生物会被卡得更紧，必须尝试逃脱而非游泳。脱身的生物离开宝珠的空间并可立即呼吸。宝珠可容纳其空间内所能容纳的任意数量的生物。当法术结束时，所有被宝珠吞没的生物都会自动被释放。

A sphere of water 10 feet in diameter forms in an unoccupied space in range, either on the ground or on the surface of a liquid.

When you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{Cast the Spell} and each time you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3f5DMFu8fPiqHpRg]{Sustain the Spell}, you can roll the orb, moving it up to 10 feet along the ground or the surface of a liquid. You can gain this effect multiple times in the same round by Sustaining the Spell multiple times.

The orb can move through the spaces of any creatures or obstacles that wouldn't stop the flow of water. It extinguishes non-magical fires it moves through of its size or smaller, and it attempts to counteract any magical fires it moves through. If it fails to counteract a given fire, it can't counteract that fire for the duration of the spell.

The orb can also collect creatures it moves through. Any Large or smaller creature whose space the orb tries to move through can attempt a Reflex save against your spell DC to avoid being engulfed. If a creature succeeds at this save, it can either let the orb pass (remaining in its space or moving out of the orb's path into a space of the creature's choice) or allow itself to be pushed in front of the orb to the end of the orb's movement. The orb can try to Engulf the same creature only once per turn, even if you roll it onto a creature's space more than once.

A creature that fails its save is pulled into the orb. It becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, moves along with the orb, and must hold its breath or begin suffocating (unless it can breathe in water).
