An engulfed Medium or smaller creature and anyone trying to affect that creature follow the normal rules for aquatic battles. An engulfed Large creature is usually big enough that parts of it stick out from the water, and it can reach out of the water. An engulfed creature can get free either by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.c8TGiZ48ygoSPofx]{Swimming} with a successful @Check[type:athletics|dc:10|traits:action:swim] check or by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escaping} against your spell DC. A creature that critically failed its Reflex save is further stuck and must attempt to Escape instead of Swim. A freed creature exits the orb's space and can immediately breathe. The orb can contain as many creatures as can fit in its space. When the spell ends, all creatures the orb has engulfed are automatically released.

Haste.name: 加速 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法赋予目标更快行动的能力。它获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{迅捷（状态）}状态，并且每轮只能将这额外的动作用于打击和迈步动作。

升阶（7环） 你最多可以以6个生物为目标。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{法术效果：加速术}

Magic empowers the target to act faster. It gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} condition and can use the extra action each round only for Strike and Stride actions.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 6 creatures.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{Spell Effect: Haste}

Wall of Water.name: 水墙 Wall of Water
Wall of Water.description:
你将手举向空中，召唤一道巨浪降临战场。墙体以一条笔直的线保持竖立，长60英尺，高10英尺，厚5英尺。

水墙区域内任何不具魔法的火焰，只要其体型不大于水墙的体型，都会立刻熄灭。它也会尝试反制其区域内任何具魔法的火焰。这两个效果会在施放法术时发生，并且每当火焰进入水墙区域时也会发生。若水墙未能反制某个特定火焰，则在该法术的持续时间内，它无法反制该火焰。

钝击或挥砍投射物无法穿过水墙，而穿刺投射物若穿过水墙，其射程增量减半。穿越水墙的生物需要游泳通过。水中战斗规则适用于穿越水墙的生物、以水墙内的生物为目标，或穿过水墙的情况。例如，一次以墙内生物为目标的钝击或挥砍近战攻击会承受-2环境减值。

Raising your hand in the air, you call a massive wave onto the battlefield. The wall stays upright in a straight line that is 60 feet long, 10 feet high, and 5 feet thick.

Any non-magical fires within the wall of water's area that are its size or smaller are put out instantly. It also attempts to counteract any magical fires in its area. Both of these effects happen when the spell is cast and whenever a fire enters the wall's area. If the wall fails to counteract a given fire, it can't counteract that fire for the duration of the spell.

Bludgeoning or slashing projectiles can't pass through the wall, and piercing projectiles have their range increments halved if they pass through the wall. A creature traversing the wall of water needs to Swim through. The rules of aquatic combat apply to creatures traversing the wall of water, targeting creatures within the wall, or passing through the wall. For instance, a bludgeoning or slashing melee attack targeting a creature in the wall would take a -2 circumstance penalty.

Mirror Image.name: 镜像术 Mirror Image
Mirror Image.description:
三个你的幻象影像在你的空间周围盘旋，可能使那些对你进行攻击的人打中其中一个影像而不是你。任何本应命中你的攻击都有一个随机几率改为命中你的一个影像而不是你。若三个影像都还在，则命中你的概率为 1/4（在 [[/r 1d4]] 掷出 1）。若剩余两个影像，则命中你的概率为 1/3（在 [[/r 1d6]] 掷出 1-2）。若只剩一个影像，则命中你的概率为 1/2（在 [[/r 1d6]] 掷出 1-3）。

一旦某个影像被命中，它就会被摧毁。若一次攻击掷骰未能命中你的 AC 但未大失败，它会摧毁一个影像但没有额外效果（即使该攻击通常在失败时也会产生效果）。若一次攻击掷骰为大成功且本应命中某个影像，则摧毁其中一个影像，并且该次攻击掷骰改为对你成功。一旦所有影像都被摧毁，该法术结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.0PO5mFRhh9HxGAtv]{法术效果：镜像术}

Three illusory images of you swirl about your space, potentially causing those who attack you to hit one of the images instead of you. Any attack that would hit you has a random chance of hitting one of your images instead of you. If all three images remain, there is a 1 in 4 chance of hitting you (1 on [[/r 1d4]]). With two images remaining, there is a 1 in 3 chance of hitting you (1-2 on [[/r 1d6]]). With only one image, the chances are 1 in 2 (1-3 on [[/r 1d6]]).

Once an image is hit, it is destroyed. If an attack roll fails to hit your AC but doesn't critically fail, it destroys an image but has no additional effect (even if the attack would normally have an effect on a failure). If an attack roll is a critical success and would hit one of the images, one of the images is destroyed and the attack roll becomes a success against you. Once all the images are destroyed, the spell ends.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.0PO5mFRhh9HxGAtv]{Spell Effect: Mirror Image}

See the Unseen.name: 目睹无形 See the Unseen
See the Unseen.description:
你的目光可刺穿幻觉，并发现@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的生物与灵体。你可以看见隐形的生物，如同它们并未隐形一般，尽管它们的特征会变得模糊，使其处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态且难以辨认。你也可以看见无形体的生物，如同幽灵（特征），它们会以模糊的形状显现在物体中，仿佛穿过这些物体一般；前提是它们位于距离该物体表面10英尺以内。更细微的线索也会使你进行识破幻觉的检定时获得+2状态加值。

强化（5环） 该法术的持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：看见不可见者}

Your gaze pierces through illusions and finds @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} creatures and spirits. You can see invisible creatures as though they weren't invisible, although their features are blurred, making them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} and difficult to identify. You can also see incorporeal creatures, like ghosts, phased through an object from within 10 feet of an object's surface as blurry shapes seen through those objects. Subtler clues also grant you a +2 status bonus to checks you make to disbelieve illusions.

Heightened (5th) This spell has a duration of 8 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{Spell Effect: See the Unseen}

Alarm.name: 警报 Alarm
Alarm.description:
你为一个区域设下警戒，以在生物未经你许可进入时提醒你。当你施放alarm时，选择一个口令。每当一个小型或更大的有形生物在未说出口令的情况下进入该法术的区域时，alarm会按你的选择发出心灵警报（此时该法术获得心灵（特征））或发出可听警报，其声音与音量如同手铃（此时该法术获得听觉（特征））。任一选项都会自动唤醒你，而铃声会允许区域内的每个生物尝试一次DC 15 察觉检定以醒来。知晓该alarm的生物在移动进入该区域时，必须在对抗该法术DC的隐匿检定中成功，否则会触发该法术。

升阶（3环） 你可以指定哪些生物会使alarm法术响起的判定条件——例如，兽人或戴面具的人。

You ward an area to alert you when creatures enter without your permission. When you cast alarm, select a password. Whenever a Small or larger corporeal creature enters the spell's area without speaking the password, alarm sends your choice of a mental alert (in which case the spell gains the mental trait) or an audible alarm with the sound and volume of a hand bell (in which case the spell gains the auditory trait). Either option automatically awakens you, and the bell allows each creature in the area to attempt a DC 15 Perception check to wake up. A creature aware of the alarm must succeed at a Stealth check against the spell's DC or trigger the spell when moving into the area.

Heightened (3rd) You can specify criteria for which creatures sound the alarm spell-for instance, orcs or masked people.

Unseen Servant.name: 隐形仆役 Unseen Servant
Unseen Servant.description:
你召唤一名隐形仆役，你可以在维持法术的一部分中对其下达命令。它为你效劳，直到其生命值降至 0（此时该法术结束），或直到你停止维持法术。隐形仆役获得被召唤特征。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.j7NNPfZwD19BwSEZ]{隐形仆役}（无阵营）

You summon an unseen servant, which you can command as part of Sustaining the Spell. It serves you until its Hit Points are reduced to 0, at which point the spell ends, or until you stop Sustaining the Spell. The unseen servant gains the summoned trait.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.j7NNPfZwD19BwSEZ]{Unseen Servant} (No Alignment)

Telekinetic Hand.name: 念动力之手 Telekinetic Hand
Telekinetic Hand.description:
你创造一只漂浮的魔法之手，它可以是隐形的或幽灵般的，抓住目标物体并使其缓慢悬浮，朝任意方向移动最多 20 尺。当你维持该法术时，你可以使该物体额外移动 20 尺。如果该法术结束时物体在空气中，则该物体坠落。

升阶（3环） 你可以以一件无人持用且负载为 1 或更低的物体为目标。

升阶（5环） 射程增加至 60 尺，且你可以以一件无人持用且负载为 1 或更低的物体为目标。

升阶（7环） 射程增加至 60 尺，且你可以以一件无人持用且负载为 2 或更低的物体为目标。

You create a floating, magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and levitates it slowly up to 20 feet in any direction. When you Sustain the spell, you can move the object an additional 20 feet. If the object is in the air when the spell ends, the object falls.

Heightened (3rd) You can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (7th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 2 or less.

Ray of Frost.name: 冷霜射线 Ray of Frost
Ray of Frost.description:
你发射一道冰寒射线。进行一次法术攻击掷骰。该射线造成等同于1d4 + 你的施法能力调整值的寒冷伤害。

大成功 目标承受双倍伤害，并在1轮内其速度受到-10英尺的状态减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.I4PsUAaYSUJ8pwKC]{法术效果：寒霜射线}

成功 目标承受正常伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

You blast an icy ray. Make a spell attack roll. The ray deals cold damage equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

Critical Success The target takes double damage and takes a -10-foot status penalty to its Speeds for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.I4PsUAaYSUJ8pwKC]{Spell Effect: Ray of Frost}

Success The target takes normal damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
天蓝巨龙以两种方式之一吐息。其巨龙吐息的区域内所有非魔法火焰都会被熄灭。巨龙无法再次使用吐息武器，直到[[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4轮}后。

  • 冲击波 巨龙在一个@Template[type:cone|distance:50]内吐出一股强力、猛烈的波浪。区域内每个生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:fortitude|dc:41]强韧豁免，并产生以下效果。

    大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响。

    成功 该生物被推离10尺，方向与锥形区域的方向相同。

    失败 该生物被推离20尺，方向与锥形区域的方向相同。若其在被完全推动前会撞到坚固的物体，则其每剩余5尺将受到@Damage[3d6[bludgeoning]]伤害。

    大成功或大失败 失败 该生物被推离30尺，方向与锥形区域的方向相同。若其在被完全推动前会撞到坚固的物体，则其每剩余5尺将受到@Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]]伤害。

  • 加压水流 巨龙在一个@Template[type:cone|distance:50]内吐出一股加压水流的爆发，造成@Damage[20d6[bludgeoning]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:41|basic:true]基础豁免）。

The cerulean dragon breathes in one of two ways. All non-magical fires within the area of their Dragon Breath are extinguished. The dragon can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

  • Battering Wave The dragon breathes a powerful, pummeling wave in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50]. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:41] save with the following effects.

    Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

    Success The creature is pushed 10 feet away in the same direction as the cone.

    Failure The creature is pushed 20 feet away in the same direction as the cone. If it would hit a solid object before being completely pushed, it takes @Damage[3d6[bludgeoning]] damage for every remaining 5 feet it would be pushed.

    Critical Failure The creature is pushed 30 feet away in the same direction as the cone. If it would hit a solid object before being completely pushed, it takes @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]] damage for every remaining 5 feet it would be pushed.

  • Pressurized Water The dragon breathes a blast of pressurized water in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50] that deals @Damage[20d6[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:41|basic:true] save).

Deny Advantage.name: 否定优势 Deny Advantage
Deny Advantage.description:
这只天蓝色巨龙不会对19级或更低的生物（处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}状态）或对使用奇袭攻击的18级或更低的生物陷入夹击。

The cerulean dragon isn't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] to flanking, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} creatures of 19th level or lower, or to creatures of 18th level or lower using surprise attack.

Hazard Sense.name: 危害 感官 Hazard Sense
Hazard Sense.description:
蔚蓝巨龙拥有一种直觉感官，会提醒他们危险与陷阱的存在。他们获得+2环境加值，用于察觉检定以发现陷阱与危害；对抗由陷阱与危害进行的攻击时的AC；以及对抗陷阱与危害的豁免。即使蔚蓝巨龙没有进行搜索，他们仍然可以进行检定以发现那些通常需要他们处于搜索状态才能发现的陷阱与危害。

The cerulean dragon has an intuitive sense that alerts them to dangers and the presence of traps. They gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to find traps and hazards, to AC against attacks made by traps and hazards, and to save against traps and hazards. Even if the cerulean dragon isn't searching, they still get a check to find traps and hazards that normally require them to be Searching.

Geyser.name: 间歇泉 Geyser
Geyser.description:
区域 10英尺半径、50英尺高的圆柱体

一道强力间歇泉从地面喷涌而出，可能将位于其上的生物推入空气中。此法术的区域底部必须位于坚实地面上。区域内每个生物受到3d6钝击伤害和4d6火伤害，并进行一次反射豁免。被间歇泉推入空气的生物不会被推到超过间歇泉顶部的高度。被推入空气后，该生物会坠落，除非它正在飞行或有其他保持滞空的手段，并承受坠落伤害（通常等于其坠落距离的一半）。间歇泉喷发后，其区域会被一团蒸汽云充满，持续1轮。蒸汽中的所有生物处于隐蔽状态，且蒸汽外的所有生物对蒸汽内的生物而言处于隐蔽状态。

大成功或大失败：成功 生物不受影响。

成功 生物受到一半伤害，且不会被推入空气中。

失败 生物受到全部伤害，并被推入空气中20英尺。（@Damage[10[bludgeoning]] 伤害）

大成功或大失败：失败 生物受到双倍伤害，并被推入空气中40英尺。（@Damage[20[bludgeoning]] 伤害）

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d6钝击与1d6火。

Area 10-foot radius, 50-foot-tall cylinder

A powerful geyser blasts up from the ground, potentially pushing creatures on top of it into the air. The bottom of this spell's area must be on solid ground. Each creature in the area takes 3d6 bludgeoning damage and 4d6 fire damage, with a Reflex save. A creature pushed into the air by the geyser can't be pushed beyond the top of the geyser. After being pushed into the air, a creature falls unless it's flying or has some other means of staying aloft, taking falling damage (normally equal to half the distance it fell). After the geyser erupts, its area is filled with a cloud of steam for 1 round. All creatures in the steam are concealed, and all creatures outside the steam are concealed to creatures within it.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and isn't pushed into the air.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is pushed 20 feet into the air. (@Damage[10[bludgeoning]] damage)

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is pushed 40 feet into the air. (@Damage[20[bludgeoning]] damage)

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6 bludgeoning and 1d6 fire.

Repulsion.name: 排斥 Repulsion
Repulsion.description:
你显现出一道灵光，阻止生物接近你。施放该法术时，你可以将区域设定为你选择的任意半径，最大40英尺。若生物在你施放该法术时位于该区域内，或在法术效果持续期间一进入该区域，就必须尝试一次意志豁免。一旦某个生物尝试过该豁免，它在此次排斥的施放中都使用相同的结果。对生物移动的任何限制仅在其自愿向你移动时适用。例如，如果你向某个生物移动得更近，它随后不需要远离。

大成功或大失败 该生物的移动不受限制。

成功 该生物在向你移动得更近时，将区域内的每个方格都视为困难地形。

失败 该生物无法在区域内向你移动得更近。

You manifest an aura that prevents creatures from approaching you. When casting the spell, you can make the area any radius you choose, up to 40 feet. A creature must attempt a Will save if it's within the area when you cast the spell or as soon as it enters the area while the spell is in effect. Once a creature has attempted the save, it uses the same result for that casting of repulsion. Any restrictions on a creature's movement apply only if it voluntarily moves toward you. For example, if you move closer to a creature, it doesn't then need to move away.

Critical Success The creature's movement is not restricted.

Success The creature treats each square in the area as difficult terrain when moving closer to you.

Failure The creature can't move closer to you within the area.

True Seeing.name: 真知术 True Seeing
True Seeing.description:
你能看清60英尺内的事物真实面貌。GM会对区域内任何幻术或变化系效果进行一次秘密的反制检定，但仅用于判定你是否能看穿它（例如，若该检定成功反制了一个变形法术，你能看见该生物的真实形态，但你不会终止该变形法术）。

You see things within 60 feet as they actually are. The GM rolls a secret counteract check against any illusion or transmutation in the area, but only for the purpose of determining whether you see through it (for instance, if the check succeeds against a polymorph spell, you can see the creature's true form, but you don't end the polymorph spell).

Control Water.name: 操控水 Control Water
Control Water.description:
通过将你的意志施加于水之上，你可以将所选区域内的水位升高或降低10英尺。区域内的水生物会受到@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow}的效果影响。

区域 50英尺长，50英尺宽

By imposing your will upon the water, you can raise or lower the level of water in the chosen area by 10 feet. Water creatures in the area are subjected to the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow}.

Area 50 ft long by 50 ft wide

Sending.name: 发送 Sending
Sending.description:
你向该生物发送一条不超过25个词的心灵信息，它可以立即用自己的一条不超过25个词的信息回应。

You send the creature a mental message of 25 words or fewer, and it can respond immediately with its own message of 25 words or fewer.

Truespeech.name: 真言 Truespeech
Truespeech.description:
目标可以理解所有词语，无论语言如何，并且也能说出其他生物的语言。当身处由不同生物组成的混合群体中时，每次目标说话时，它都可以选择一个生物，并用该生物能理解的语言说话，即使目标不知道那是什么语言。

升阶（第7环） 持续时间为8小时。

The target can understand all words regardless of language and also speak the languages of other creatures. When in a mixed group of creatures, each time the target speaks, it can choose a creature and speak in a language that creature understands, even if the target doesn't know what language that is.

Heightened (7th) The duration is 8 hours.

Extra Reaction.name: 额外反应动作 Extra Reaction
Extra Reaction.description:
这只巨龙在每轮开始其回合时获得2个反应动作。

The dragon gets 2 reactions at the start of its turn each round.

Attack of Opportunity (Jaws Only).name: 借机攻击（仅颌骨） Attack of Opportunity (Jaws Only)

Disjunction.name: 解离 Disjunction
Disjunction.description:
噼啪作响的能量使目标瓦解。你尝试反制它。若你成功，它会被停用1周。若大成功，它会被摧毁。若它是神器或类似物品，你会自动失败。

Crackling energy disjoins the target. You attempt to counteract it. If you succeed, it's deactivated for 1 week. On a critical success, it's destroyed. If it's an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Energy Aegis.name: 能量护盾 Energy Aegis
Energy Aegis.description:
你用强大且持久的能量屏障保护目标。目标获得抗力5，对抗酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火、力场、负能量、正能量以及音波伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.4Lo2qb5PmavSsLNk]{法术效果：能量护盾}

升阶（9环） 这些抗力提升至10。

You protect the target with a powerful, long-lasting energy barrier. The target gains resistance 5 to acid, cold, electricity, fire, force, negative, positive, and sonic damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.4Lo2qb5PmavSsLNk]{Spell Effect: Energy Aegis}

Heightened (9th) The resistances increase to 10.

Contingency.name: 应急预案 Contingency
Contingency.description:
你准备一个稍后才会触发的法术。在施放应急预案时，你还会施放另一个4环或更低、施法时间不超过3个动作的法术。这个伴生法术必须是能够影响你的法术。你必须在施放应急预案时就为该法术做出所有决定，例如为 resist energy 选择一种伤害类型。在施法过程中，选择一个该法术将被施放的触发，使用与预备动作的触发相同的限制。一旦应急预案施放完成，当该触发发生时，你可以以反应动作（）使伴生法术生效。它只影响你，即使它原本会影响更多生物。如果你定义了复杂的状态（由GM判定），该触发可能会失败。如果你再次施放应急预案，较新的施放会取代较旧的。

升阶（8环） 你可以选择一个5环或更低的法术。

升阶（9环） 你可以选择一个6环或更低的法术。

升阶（10环） 你可以选择一个7环或更低的法术。

You prepare a spell that will trigger later. While casting contingency, you also cast another spell of 4th level or lower with a casting time of no more than 3 actions. This companion spell must be one that can affect you. You must make any decisions for the spell when you cast contingency, such as choosing a damage type for resist energy. During the casting, choose a trigger under which the spell will be cast, using the same restrictions as for the trigger of a Ready action. Once contingency is cast, you can cause the companion spell to come into effect as a reaction with that trigger. It affects only you, even if it would affect more creatures. If you define complicated conditions, as determined by the GM, the trigger might fail. If you cast contingency again, the newer casting supersedes the older.

Heightened (8th) You can choose a spell of 5th level or lower.

Heightened (9th) You can choose a spell of 6th level or lower.

Heightened (10th) You can choose a spell of 7th level or lower.

Discern Location.name: 辨识位置 Discern Location
Discern Location.description:
你得知目标精确位置的名称（包括建筑物、社区和国家）以及其存在的位面。你只能以你亲眼见过的生物、拥有其重要随身物品之一的生物，或拥有其身体一部分的生物为目标。若要以某个物体为目标，你必须触碰过它或拥有它的一块碎片。即使这些防护通常有几率阻挡，你的「辨识位置」也会自动克服任何低于此法术等级的反侦测与反占卜防护。

You learn the name of the target's exact location (including the building, community, and country) and plane of existence. You can target a creature only if you've seen it in person, have one of its significant belongings, or have a piece of its body. To target an object, you must have touched it or have a fragment of it. Discern location automatically overcomes protections against detection and divination of lower level than this spell, even if they would normally have a chance to block it.

Horrid Wilting.name: 枯萎凋零 Horrid Wilting
Horrid Wilting.description:
你从目标的身体中抽取水分，造成10d10负能量伤害。由水构成的生物（例如水元素）和植物生物使用比其豁免结果差一级的结果来决定结果。身体中不含显著水分的生物（例如大地元素）免疫于恐怖枯萎。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d10。

You pull the moisture from the targets' bodies, dealing 10d10 negative damage. Creatures made of water (such as water elementals) and plant creatures use the outcome for one degree of success worse than the result of their saving throw. Creatures whose bodies contain no significant moisture (such as earth elementals) are immune to horrid wilting.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d10.

Planar Palace.name: 位面宫殿 Planar Palace
Planar Palace.description:
你培育出一个异次元半位面，由一处宽敞的居所构成，并且只有一个入口。该入口连接到你施放该法术的位面，在法术射程内的任何位置显现为一个隐约闪烁的垂直矩形，宽5英尺、高10英尺。你在施放该法术时指定哪些人可以进入。进入后，你可以关闭入口，使其成为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}。你和你指定的生物可以随意重新打开这扇门。

在内部，这个半位面看起来是一座宅邸，拥有宏伟的门厅与众多奢华的房间。只要能容纳在一个宽40英尺、深40英尺、高30英尺的空间内，你在施放该法术时可以让宅邸拥有任何你想象的平面布局。当宅邸入口关闭时，来自宅邸外部的效果无法穿透它，反之亦然；唯有跨位面传送例外，它可被用来进入宅邸。你只有在占卜魔法及类似效果具备跨越位面的能力时，才能用它们观察外界。

最多24名仆从会服侍宅邸内的任何人。这些仆从类似于幻影仆从法术所创造的仆从，不过他们是可见的，并且外观由你在施放时决定。宅邸内储备了足以为150人提供九道菜宴席的食物。

You grow an extradimensional demiplane consisting of a spacious dwelling with a single entrance. The entrance connects to the plane where you Cast the Spell, appearing anywhere within the spell's range as a faint, shimmering, vertical rectangle 5 feet wide and 10 feet high. You designate who can enter when you Cast the Spell. Once inside, you can shut the entrance, making it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. You and the creatures you designated can reopen the door at will.

Inside, the demiplane appears to be a mansion featuring a magnificent foyer and numerous opulent chambers. The mansion can have any floor plan you imagine as you Cast the Spell, provided it fits within a space 40 feet wide, 40 feet deep, and 30 feet tall. While the entrance to the mansion is closed, effects from outside the mansion fail to penetrate it, and vice versa, except for interplanar teleport, which can be used to enter the mansion. You can use scrying magic and similar effects to observe the outside only if they're capable of crossing planes.

A staff of up to 24 servants attends to anyone within the mansion. These are like the servant created by the phantasmal minion spell, though they're visible, with an appearance you determine during casting. The mansion is stocked with enough food to serve a nine-course banquet to 150 people.

Plane Shift.name: 位面转移 Plane Shift
Plane Shift.description:
你与盟友穿越存在于各个位面之间的屏障。各个目标移动到另一个位面，例如火位面、暗影位面或深渊。你必须对目的地位面有特定的了解，并使用一把由该位面的材料制成的魔法调谐音叉作为该法术的施法媒介。尽管大多数显赫位面的调谐音叉都较为罕见，正如法术位面转移一样，更为晦涩的位面与半位面往往拥有稀有的调谐音叉。该法术极其不精确，你会出现在距离各个目标之一（由你选择）上一次该目标旅行至该位面时所在的最后地点1d20x25英里处。若对所有目标而言这都是第一次旅行到某个特定的位面，你会出现在该位面的一个随机地点。位面转移并不提供返回旅行的手段，不过再次施放位面转移可让你返回你先前所在的位面，除非存在特殊的环境。

You and your allies traverse the barriers between planes of existence. The targets move to another plane, such as the Plane of Fire, the Shadow Plane, or the Abyss. You must have specific knowledge of the destination plane and use a magic tuning fork created from material from that plane as a focus for the spell. While the tuning forks for most prominent planes are uncommon, just like the spell plane shift, more obscure planes and demiplanes often have rare tuning forks. The spell is highly imprecise, and you appear 1d20x25 miles from the last place one of the targets (of your choice) was located the last time that target traveled to the plane. If it's the first time traveling to a particular plane for all targets, you appear at a random location on the plane. Plane shift doesn't provide a means of return travel, though casting plane shift again allows you to return to your previous plane unless there are extenuating circumstances.

Teleport.name: 传送 Teleport
Teleport.description:
你与这些目标会瞬间被传送到射程内的任意地点，只要你能够同时根据其相对于你起始位置的位置以及其外观（或其他识别特性）精确辨识该地点。对地点外观的错误认知通常会导致该法术失败，但也可能改为传送到一个不希望的地点，或发生其他由GM决定的异常意外。传送在极远距离上并不精确。这些目标会出现在距离预定目的地一段距离处，该距离约等于总旅行距离的1%，方向由GM决定。对于短途旅行，这种不精确无关紧要，但对于长距离而言，这可能高达1英里。

升阶（第7环）你与其他目标可以旅行到1,000英里内的任意地点。

升阶（第8环）你与其他目标可以旅行到同一颗行星上的任意地点。若你旅行超过1,000英里，你会在距离目标仅10英里的地方抵达。

升阶（第9环）你与其他目标可以旅行到同一太阳系内另一颗行星上的任意地点。只要你对该地点的位置与外观有准确认知，你会在新行星上距离目标100英里的地方抵达。

升阶（第10环）如第9环版本，但你与其他目标可以旅行到同一星系内的任意行星。

You and the targets are instantly transported to any location within range, as long as you can identify the location precisely both by its position relative to your starting position and by its appearance (or other identifying features). Incorrect knowledge of the location's appearance usually causes the spell to fail, but it could instead lead to teleporting to an unwanted location or some other unusual mishap determined by the GM. Teleport is not precise over great distances. The targets appear at a distance from the intended destination equal to roughly 1 percent of the total distance traveled, in a direction determined by the GM. For short journeys, this lack of precision is irrelevant, but for long distances this could be up to 1 mile.

Heightened (7th) You and the other targets can travel to any location within 1,000 miles.

Heightened (8th) You and the other targets can travel to any location on the same planet. If you travel more than 1,000 miles, you arrive only 10 miles off target.

Heightened (9th) You and the other targets can travel to any location on another planet within the same solar system. Assuming you have accurate knowledge of the location's position and appearance, you arrive on the new planet 100 miles off target.

Heightened (10th) As the 9th-level version, but you and the other targets can travel to any planet within the same galaxy.

Ancient Cerulean Dragon (Spellcaster).publicNotes:
苍蓝巨龙是巨龙世界的开拓者——深入者、地城探险家与探索者，为了满足永无止境的好奇心，他们在未知之地勘绘路径、开辟新径。苍蓝巨龙为冒险而生，总是推动自己比以往更快、更远、更深、更高。他们决心看看下一条走廊尽头有什么、紧闭的门后有什么、地平线之外有什么，并发现其他世界、位面与其他次元中蕴藏着什么。他们探索奇异的地点与神秘的奇观，从不满足于无所事事或安于定居，也从不害怕命运可能为他们准备的惊喜或未来可能带来的危险。

苍蓝巨龙心中充满永恒的漂泊欲与不减的旅行热情。他们生活节奏极快，因此偏好随时保持移动。大多数苍蓝巨龙不维持传统巢穴，宁愿在荒野中、在千种不同的天空下生活，也不愿被奢华生活束缚在同一个地方。有些苍蓝巨龙更偏好魔法居所与异位面领域——当他们足够强大且足够年长，能够创造它们之时——使他们得以同时享受舒适生活与冒险生活。

苍蓝巨龙对周遭世界及其所含的一切都极其好奇。他们喜欢把鼻子伸到不该伸的地方，越界而行，打破各种禁忌。他们爱打探，但与其翻找他人隐秘的过往与家族秘密，不如说他们更可能撬开上锁的门、闯入禁止进入的地点。与琥珀巨龙不同，他们对人们生活的细枝末节、或散落在城市街头的流言与尴尬并不过分感兴趣。这并不意味着他们排斥交友——恰恰相反，苍蓝巨龙乐于结识新朋友并缔结友谊，尤其是与其他志同道合的探索者与冒险者建立合作关系，以便一同协作。

尽管苍蓝巨龙喜欢结识新朋友、发现稀有宝藏并学习失落的秘密，但对他们而言，没有什么比前往某个新地方旅行更令人兴奋。探索一个对他们而言完全崭新且未知的地方最能令苍蓝巨龙心潮澎湃，不论该地点对社会、历史，或为壮大其收藏而获取财富而言是否具有强效重要性（或压根不重要）。

在年幼时，许多苍蓝巨龙主要专注于普通的旅行形式。他们造访从未见过的城市与聚居地，闯入金库，跋涉穿过下水道，并开启坟墓。他们探索一片片荒野地带，攀登群山，钻探洞穴，游过沼泽，并潜入湖泊与海洋之下。等到他们成年时，大多数苍蓝巨龙更偏好探索更危险的地点，例如闹鬼的庄园、沉没的船只、偏远的神殿、古老的遗迹，以及——一个常见的最爱——地城。

随着时代流逝，大多数苍蓝巨龙必须走得越来越远，才能找到自己从未去过的地方并满足漂泊欲。在这段时期，多数会走向极端：探入最深的深渊与最遥远、最难抵达的地区，前往其他位面与星球，甚至去往其他时代与次元。这是深入怪诞、狂野与完全难以置信之物的时代。

Zemedrilon

“永寻者”泽梅德里隆或许是异位面探索方面最强效的专家，他亲自探索过23个位面，其中包括两个其存在目前仍未得到确认的位面。多数人相信泽梅德里隆在30年之前试图开启通往遥远未来的传送门时被汽化了——而苍蓝巨龙认为这故事可笑至极。他们坚持认为这条古老的巨龙成功抵达了未来，并将在足够长的时代过去之后再度现身。

冒险者队伍

苍蓝巨龙常为探索之目的结成紧密的团队，每条巨龙各自专精于某个研究领域或探索重点。有些学者认为，传统的“冒险者队伍”这一概念正是源自苍蓝巨龙——一个完全缺乏依据且无法证实的主张，让大多数短命的凡人颇为恼火。

移动的收藏

与大多数冒险者一样，苍蓝巨龙将自己的财富以贵重魔法物品、远古遗物、昂贵珠宝以及其他可穿戴财富的形式随身携带。因此，尽管苍蓝巨龙缺乏真正的收藏，他们往往穿戴（或挥舞！）着一笔巨富。

Cerulean dragons are the trailblazers of the dragon world, the delvers, the dungeoneers, and the explorers, charting paths and blazing trails through lands unknown to them to sate their neverending curiosity. Cerulean dragons live for adventure and are always pushing themselves faster, further, deeper, and higher than they've ever gone before. They're determined to see what's down the next hall, behind the closed door, beyond the horizon, and discover what lies on other worlds, planes, and other dimensions. They explore unusual sites and mysterious wonders, never content to be idle or sedentary, and never afraid of what surprises fate might have in store for them or what dangers the future may hold.

Cerulean dragons are filled with an eternal wanderlust and an unabating passion for travel. They live a fast-paced life, and thus they prefer to stay on the move at all times. Most cerulean dragons don't keep traditional lairs, preferring a life lived in the wilderness and under a thousand different skies rather than a life of luxury shackled to the same place. Some cerulean dragons prefer magical homes and extraplanar domains—when they're powerful and old enough to create them—which allow them a life of comfort and a life of adventure all at once.

Cerulean dragons are incredibly curious about the world around them and all it contains. They enjoy sticking their noses where they don't belong, treading beyond boundaries, and breaking taboos of all sorts. They're snoops, though they're far more likely to pry behind locked doors and into off-limit locations than they are to delve into people's hidden pasts and family secrets. They're not overly interested in the details of people's lives or the gossip and embarrassments scattered down city streets, unlike amber dragons. It's not that they're averse to making friends—on the contrary, cerulean dragons are interested in meeting new people and forging friendships, particularly working relationships with other like-minded explorers and adventurers with whom they can collaborate.

While cerulean dragons enjoy meeting new people, discovering rare treasures, and learning lost secrets, nothing is more exciting to them than traveling somewhere new. Exploring a place that's completely new and unknown to them excites cerulean dragons the most, regardless of that location's greater importance (or lack thereof) to society, history, or the acquisition of wealth to grow their hoard.

In their youth, many cerulean dragons focus primarily on ordinary forms of travel. They visit cities and settlements they've never seen before, breaking into vaults, trudging through sewers, and opening tombs. They explore tracts of wilderness, climbing mountains, spelunking through caves, swimming through swamps, and diving beneath lakes and oceans. By the time they're grown, most cerulean dragons prefer to explore more dangerous locations, such as haunted manors, sunken ships, remote temples, ancient ruins, and—a common favorite—dungeons.

As time passes, most cerulean dragons must go further and further to find places they've never been and fulfill their wanderlust. During this time, most go to extremes, plumbing the deepest depths and the most distant and inaccessible regions, traveling to other planes and planets, or even to other times and dimensions. It's a time to delve into the weird, the wild, and the utterly unbelievable.

Zemedrilon

Zemedrilon the Ever-Seeking is perhaps the greatest expert on extraplanar exploration, having personally explored 23 planes, including two whose existence is currently unconfirmed. Most believe Zemedrilon was vaporized 30 years ago while attempting to open a portal to the distant future—a tale cerulean dragons consider laughable. They insist the ancient dragon successfully arrived in the future and, after a long enough time has passed, will reemerge.

Adventuring Parties

Cerulean dragons often band together into tightly knit teams for the purpose of exploration, with each dragon specializing in a field of study or exploratory focus. Some scholars believe it's from cerulean dragons that the concept of the traditional "adventuring party" was born—a completely unsubstantiated and unprovable claim that irks most short- lived mortals.

Mobile Hoards

Like most adventurers, cerulean dragons carry their wealth on them in the form of valuable magic items, ancient artifacts, valuable jewelry, and other wearable wealth. Thus, while a cerulean dragon lacks a true hoard, they often wear (or wield!) a fortune.
Ancient Cerulean Dragon (Spellcaster).prototypeToken: 远古天蓝巨龙 Ancient Cerulean Dragon

Ancient Vermilion Dragon.name: 远古朱红巨龙 Ancient Vermilion Dragon
Ancient Vermilion Dragon.tokenName: 远古朱红巨龙 Ancient Vermilion Dragon

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60英尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Effortless Linguist.name: 轻松语言学家 Effortless Linguist
Effortless Linguist.description:
一条朱红巨龙在聆听某种语言1分钟后，便能说并理解他们听到的任何语言。这些语言会在24小时后从他们的心智中淡去

A vermilion dragon can speak and understand any language they hear spoken after listening to the language for 1 minute. These languages fade from their mind after 24 hours

Exaggerate Strength.name: 夸大力量 Exaggerate Strength
Exaggerate Strength.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 朱红巨龙即将再次尝试对一个无力化效果进行一次豁免

效果 朱红巨龙膨胀自己的自我，把自己塑造成一个比实际更强能的高谈阔论版自己。虽然这不会让它变得更强大，但其效果足以扰乱无力化魔法。触发的无力化效果将朱红巨龙视为其等级高2级。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger The vermilion dragon is about to attempt a saving throw again an incapacitation effect

Effect The vermilion dragon inflates their own ego, building themself up into a tall tale version of themself more capable than they actually are. While this doesn't make them more powerful, the effect is enough to bedevil incapacitating magic. The triggering incapacitation effect treats the vermilion dragon as if they were two levels higher.

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Illusory Creature.name: 幻象生物 Illusory Creature
Illusory Creature.description:
你创造一个大型或更小体型的生物的幻象影像。它会产生相应的声音与气味，并且接触时感觉可信。若你与影像之间的距离曾经超过500英尺，该法术结束。

该影像不能说话，但你可以用你的动作通过该生物说话，法术会将你的声音适当地伪装。你可能需要进行一次欺骗或表演检定来模仿该生物，具体由GM决定。尤其当你试图模仿某个特定人物并与认识那个人的对象互动时，很可能需要这么做。

在战斗中，该幻象每回合可以使用2个动作，这些动作在你维持法术时由它使用。它的攻击掷骰使用你的法术攻击掷骰，它的AC使用你的法术DC。它的豁免调整值等于你的法术DC - 10。它足够真实，以至于可以夹击其他生物。若影像被一次攻击命中或一次豁免失败，该法术结束。

该幻象可以通过让目标相信幻象的攻击是真实的来造成伤害，但除此之外无法直接影响物质世界。若该幻象生物的打击命中，目标受到等于1d4加上你的施法关键属性调整值的精神伤害。这是一个精神效果。该幻象的打击为非致命。若伤害与怪物影像不相符——例如，一个幻象的大型巨龙只造成5点伤害——GM可能允许目标立即进行一次察觉检定来识破该法术。任何相关的抗力与弱点会在目标认为它们适用时生效，由GM裁定。例如，若幻象挥舞战锤并攻击一个对钝击伤害有抗力的生物，该生物会受到更少的精神伤害。然而，幻象伤害不会使再生失效，也不会触发其他需要特定伤害类型的效果。GM应追踪该幻象造成的幻象伤害。

任何接触该影像的生物，或使用搜寻动作来检查它的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻象。当一个生物识破该幻象时，它会从此前受到的该幻象伤害中恢复一半（若有），并且不会再受到它的任何进一步伤害。

升阶（+1） 影像打击的伤害增加1d4，并且你能创造的生物最大体型提高一级（至多为巨型）。

You create an illusory image of a Large or smaller creature. It generates the appropriate sounds, smells, and feels believable to the touch. If you and the image are ever farther than 500 feet apart, the spell ends.

The image can't speak, but you can use your actions to speak through the creature, with the spell disguising your voice as appropriate. You might need to attempt a Deception or Performance check to mimic the creature, as determined by the GM. This is especially likely if you're trying to imitate a specific person and engage with someone that person knows.

In combat, the illusion can use 2 actions per turn, which it uses when you Sustain the Spell. It uses your spell attack roll for attack rolls and your spell DC for its AC. Its saving throw modifiers are equal to your spell DC - 10. It is substantial enough that it can flank other creatures. If the image is hit by an attack or fails a save, the spell ends.

The illusion can cause damage by making the target believe the illusion's attacks are real, but it cannot otherwise directly affect the physical world. If the illusory creature hits with a Strike, the target takes mental damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. This is a mental effect. The illusion's Strikes are nonlethal. If the damage doesn't correspond to the image of the monster-for example, if an illusory Large dragon deals only 5 damage-the GM might allow the target to attempt an immediate Perception check to disbelieve the spell. Any relevant resistances and weaknesses apply if the target thinks they do, as judged by the GM. For example, if the illusion wields a warhammer and attacks a creature resistant to bludgeoning damage, the creature would take less mental damage. However, illusory damage does not deactivate regeneration or trigger other effects that require a certain damage type. The GM should track illusory damage dealt by the illusion.

Any creature that touches the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion. When a creature disbelieves the illusion, it recovers from half the damage it had taken from it (if any) and doesn't take any further damage from it.

Heightened (+1) The damage of the image's Strikes increases by 1d4, and the maximum size of creature you can create increases by one (to a maximum of Gargantuan).

Illusory Disguise.name: 幻象伪装 Illusory Disguise
Illusory Disguise.description:
你创造出一个幻象，使你看起来像另一个具有相同身体轮廓的生物，并且与自身身高（相差不超过6英寸）和体重（相差不超过50磅）大致相近。该伪装通常足以隐藏你的身份，但不足以冒充某个特定个体。该法术不会改变你的声音、嗅觉或举止。你可以改变你的衣物与穿戴物品的外观，例如让你的护甲看起来像一件连衣裙。手持物品不受影响，而你取下的任何穿戴物品都会恢复其真实外观。

施放幻影伪装视为为以欺骗进行的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.action-macros.Macro.k5nW4jGyXD0Oq9LR]{冒充} 用途进行伪装设置；它无视你因将自己伪装成不相似生物而可能承受的任何环境减值；它使你在进行欺骗检定以防止他人看穿你的伪装时获得+4状态加值；并且即使你未受训，你也将你的等级加入其中。你可以解消该法术。

升阶（2环） 该法术也会伪装你的声音与嗅觉，并获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）特征。

升阶（3环） 你可以看起来像任何同体型的生物，甚至是某个特定个体。你必须见过该个体才能呈现其外貌。该法术也会伪装你的声音与嗅觉，并获得听觉与嗅觉（特征）特征。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3Ktyd5F9lOPo4myk]{法术效果：幻影伪装}

You create an illusion that causes you to appear as another creature of the same body shape, and with roughly similar height (within 6 inches) and weight (within 50 pounds), as yourself. The disguise is typically good enough to hide your identity, but not to impersonate a specific individual. The spell doesn't change your voice, scent, or mannerisms. You can change the appearance of your clothing and worn items, such as making your armor look like a dress. Held items are unaffected, and any worn item you remove returns to its true appearance.

Casting illusory disguise counts as setting up a disguise for the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.action-macros.Macro.k5nW4jGyXD0Oq9LR]{Impersonate} use of Deception; it ignores any circumstance penalties you might take for disguising yourself as a dissimilar creature, it gives you a +4 status bonus to Deception checks to prevent others from seeing through your disguise, and you add your level even if you're untrained. You can Dismiss this spell.

Heightened (2nd) The spell also disguises your voice and scent, and it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

Heightened (3rd) You can appear as any creature of the same size, even a specific individual. You must have seen an individual to take on their appearance. The spell also disguises your voice and scent, and it gains the auditory and olfactory traits.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3Ktyd5F9lOPo4myk]{Spell Effect: Illusory Disguise}

Illusory Object.name: 幻象物体 Illusory Object
Illusory Object.description:
你创造一个静止物体的虚假视觉影像。整个影像必须容纳在该法术的区域内。该物体看起来会自然地活动，但它不会发出声音或产生气味。例如，水会看起来从虚假的瀑布倾泻而下，但它将是无声的。

任何接触该影像的生物，或使用“搜索”动作来检查它的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻觉。

强化（2环）你的影像会发出恰当的声音，产生正常的气味，并且接触起来手感正确。该法术获得听觉（特征）。持续时间增加至1小时。

强化（5环）同2环版本，但持续时间为无限。

You create an illusory visual image of a stationary object. The entire image must fit within the spell's area. The object appears to animate naturally, but it doesn't make sounds or generate smells. For example, water would appear to pour down an illusory waterfall, but it would be silent.

Any creature that touches the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (2nd) Your image makes appropriate sounds, generates normal smells, and feels right to the touch. The spell gains the auditory trait. The duration increases to 1 hour.

Heightened (5th) As the 2nd-level version, but the duration is unlimited.

Ventriloquism.name: 腹语术 Ventriloquism
Ventriloquism.description:
每当你说话或用声音发出任何其他声响时，你都可以让你的发声看起来像是从60英尺内的其他某处传来，并且在你发声时可以自由改变这一表观位置。任何听到该声音的生物都可以尝试识破你的幻觉。

强化（2环） 该法术的持续时间增加至1小时，并且你还可以改变你声音的语调、音质以及其他性相。在生物能够尝试识破你的幻觉之前，它必须主动尝试一次察觉检定，或以其他方式使用动作与该声音进行交互。

Whenever you speak or make any other sound vocally, you can make your vocalization seem to originate from somewhere else within 60 feet, and you can change that apparent location freely as you vocalize. Any creature that hears the sound can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (2nd) The spell's duration increases to 1 hour, and you can also change the tone, quality, and other aspects of your voice. Before a creature can attempt to disbelieve your illusion, it must actively attempt a Perception check or otherwise use actions to interact with the sound.

Charm (At Will).name: 魅惑（意志） Charm (At Will)
Charm (At Will).description:
对目标而言，你的话语甜如蜜糖，你的容貌仿佛笼罩在梦幻薄雾之中。它必须尝试一次意志豁免；若你或你的盟友近期曾威胁它或对其使用过敌对动作，则该豁免获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。若你对目标使用敌对动作，则该法术结束。法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己曾被魅惑，除非它与您的友谊或你说服它采取的动作与它的预期相冲突；这意味着你可能通过世俗手段说服目标继续把你当朋友。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你试图魅惑它。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害的东西而非魅惑，除非它识别了该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友善}。若它原本为友善，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于助人}。它不能对你使用敌对动作。

大失败 目标对你的态度变为乐于助人，并且它不能对你使用敌对动作。

升阶（4环） 持续时间延长至你下次进行每日准备为止。

升阶（8环） 持续时间延长至你下次进行每日准备为止，且你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Ghost Sound.name: 幽灵（特征）之声 Ghost Sound
Ghost Sound.description:
你创造一个简单声音的听觉幻象，其最大音量相当于四个正常人同时喊叫。声音从你在射程内指定的一个方格中发出。你无法创造可理解的词语或其他复杂的声音（例如音乐）。

升阶（3环） 射程增加至60英尺。

升阶（5环） 射程增加至120英尺。

You create an auditory illusion of simple sounds that has a maximum volume equal to four normal humans shouting. The sounds emanate from a square you designate within range. You can't create intelligible words or other intricate sounds (such as music).

Heightened (3rd) The range increases to 60 feet.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 120 feet.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
朱红巨龙以两种方式之一喷吐。巨龙在 [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4轮} 内无法再次使用吐息武器。

  • 易燃香料（奥术，塑能，火）；巨龙在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:50] 内打喷嚏喷出一团易燃香料云，造成 @Damage[19d6[fire]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:40|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,fire] 豁免）。在大失败时，香料进入其眼睛，使其暂时失明；该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲} 1轮。
  • 刺激性香料（奥术，塑能，毒素）；巨龙在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:50] 内打喷嚏喷出一团刺激性香料云，造成 @Damage[19d6[poison]] 伤害（@Check[type:fortitude|dc:40|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,poison] 强韧豁免）。在大失败时，香料钻入其鼻子，以强烈的灼烧感淹没它；该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 2}。

The vermilion dragon breathes in one of two ways. The dragon can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

  • Flammable Spice (arcane, evocation, fire); The dragon sneezes a cloud of flammable spice in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50] that deals @Damage[19d6[fire]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:40|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,fire] save). On a critical failure, the spice gets in their eyes, temporarily blinding them; the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round.
  • Irritating Spice (arcane, evocation, poison); The dragon sneezes a cloud of irritating spice in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50] that deals @Damage[19d6[poison]] damage (@Check[type:fortitude|dc:40|basic:true|traits:arcane,evocation,poison] save). On a critical failure, the spice gets up their nose, overwhelming them with a powerful burning sensation; the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙狂乱 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
巨龙以任意顺序进行两次爪击打击和一次翼打击。

The dragon makes two claw Strikes and one wing Strike in any order.

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙之动能 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
当巨龙以一次打击造成大成功或大失败时，他们会为其吐息武器充能。

When the dragon scores a critical hit with a Strike, they recharge their Breath Weapon.

Exaggerate Weakness.name: 夸大弱点 Exaggerate Weakness
Exaggerate Weakness.description:
触发 朱红巨龙在对抗敌人效果的豁免中大失败，或敌人大成功重击朱红巨龙

效果 朱红巨龙将失败顺势夸张化，表现得无助且被彻底击败，且可能因敌人被巨龙的可怜相逗乐而分心。触发生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:33] 意志豁免，并产生以下效果。之后，敌人在24小时内暂时免疫“夸张弱点”。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 敌人被分心，在1轮内其察觉检定与意志豁免承受–1状态减值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.gMDEdKAvFv85yXiJ]{效果：夸张弱点}

失败 敌人被逗得不行，并在1轮内处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}。

大失败 敌人沉浸于对巨龙凄惨失败的笑意之中，并在1轮内处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

Trigger The vermilion dragon critically fails a saving throw against a foe's effect or a foe critically hits the vermilion dragon

Effect The vermilion dragon leans into its failure, playing up how helpless and defeated they are and potentially distracting their foe with their amusement at the dragon's piteousness. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:33] save with the following effects. Afterwards, the foe is temporarily immune to Exaggerate Weakness for 24 hours.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The foe is distracted, taking a –1 status penalty on Perception checks and Will saves for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.gMDEdKAvFv85yXiJ]{Effect: Exaggerate Weakness}

Failure The foe is overcome with amusement and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The foe is lost in its amusement at the dragon's miserable failure and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Inscrutable.name: 高深莫测 Inscrutable
Inscrutable.description:
一条朱红巨龙会自动尝试反制任何会强迫巨龙说出真相或判断其何时在说谎的效果，使用其 @Check[type:deception] 调整值进行反制检定，反制等级为9。反制检定成功使其能够无视该效果，而非将其完全移除

A vermilion dragon automatically tries to counteract any effects that would force the dragon to tell the truth or determine when they are lying, using its @Check[type:deception] modifier for the counteract check, with a counteract level of 9. Success on the counteract check allows them to ignore the effect, rather than removing it entirely

Hallucinatory Terrain.name: 幻觉地形 Hallucinatory Terrain
Hallucinatory Terrain.description:
你创造一个幻觉，使自然地形看起来、听起来、摸起来并闻起来像另一种地形。这不会伪装区域内的任何建筑或生物。任何触碰该幻觉或使用搜索动作来检查它的生物都可以尝试识破你的幻觉。

强化（5环） 你的影像也可以伪装建筑或创造虚幻的建筑（但仍不会伪装生物）。

You create an illusion that causes natural terrain to look, sound, feel, and smell like a different kind of terrain. This doesn't disguise any structures or creatures in the area. Any creature that touches the illusion or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (5th) Your image can also disguise structures or create illusory structures (but still doesn't disguise creatures).

Fantastical Tale.name: 奇幻传说 Fantastical Tale
Fantastical Tale.description:
朱红巨龙绘声绘色地编造一段关于其敌人的夸张且难以置信的故事，充满激情，以至于仍然很难识破。所有60尺内的生物必须在一次@Check[type:will|dc:44]意志豁免中成功，否则将因试图将故事与现实相协调而陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑}状态1分钟。在大失败时，处于困惑状态的生物在受到伤害时不会获得用于结束该状态的纯骰检定。之后，目标对奇幻故事获得24小时的暂时免疫。

The vermilion dragon spins an over-the-top and unbelievable tale about their foes with so much passion it's nonetheless hard to disbelieve. All creatures with 60 feet must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:44] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 minute as they attempt to reconcile the story with their reality. On a critical failure, a confused creature doesn't receive a flat check when damaged to end the condition. Afterwards, the targets are temporarily immune to Fantastical Tale for 24 hours.

Ancient Vermilion Dragon.publicNotes:
朱红巨龙是奇妙的说书人，比起真相更在意故事与技艺本身。他们以夸大其词与满口谎言而臭名昭著，总觉得任何故事或事件都有改进空间——那样才更有趣！许多朱红巨龙都是讲古与胡编乱造的高手，以至于他们那些离奇的故事与荒唐的谎言竟会显得异常引人入胜。许多人会相信他们，即便现实与更确凿的记述明明白白地与朱红巨龙的故事相矛盾。当他们的谎言、矛盾以及大量剧情漏洞被当场指出时，多数朱红巨龙会顺势接下这些指控，借题发挥，然后继续编造夸张到离谱的传奇故事。

朱红巨龙痴迷于收集各种各样的传闻与故事，并将其编织成能跨越数百年乃至数千年的流行传奇。朱红巨龙的故事无论看起来多么荒诞、虚构，总会在虚构之中保有一枚真相的核心。找出这份隐藏的真相可能极具挑战——尤其当时代的脚步不断向前，原始故事变得越来越宏大，最终被包裹其外的谎言所淹没。一些学者建议听众忽略朱红巨龙故事中所有描写性的内容；另一些则鼓励读者将朱红巨龙的故事拆解为最基础的剧情要点，其余一概不理。朱红巨龙认为这十分荒谬，因为这种狭隘的审查抹杀了他们故事的意义——朱红巨龙的故事不关乎真相，而关乎娱乐。说到底，编讲夸张的传奇故事对讲述者与听众都很有趣。重复是乏味的，而乏味的故事注定走向消亡。对朱红巨龙而言，没有什么比自己的故事或功业被遗忘更糟。

朱红巨龙最喜欢的故事几乎总是围绕他们自己。毕竟他们喧闹自负，又是出名的吹牛大王，所以他们最享受编织自己冒险、英勇事迹与壮举的故事也就不足为奇。为了收集更多关于自身壮举的故事，同时也为了刺激与奖励，朱红巨龙常常扮演雄心勃勃的亡命之徒，热爱危险与未知带来的快感。然而，即便是最自我中心的朱红巨龙也愿意承认：由他们那些疯狂行径所引发的史诗成就，还可以再多加些修饰。事实上，在他们的说书目录里，他们往往正是最具传奇色彩、也最被夸大的英雄。

尽管朱红巨龙确实相对以自我为中心，但他们并不总把自己塑造成夸张故事的核心。他们也喜欢讲述各种添油加醋的故事——关于他们认识或见过的人、他们目睹或观察到的事件，以及更广阔世界的消息。他们通常更愿意分享自己参与过或亲眼见证过的内容，而不是与自身经验毫不相干、遥远到不可及的传闻——尽管他们也爱听这种远方而陌生的故事！有时，当一则激昂的故事被反复讲述后，朱红巨龙会觉得自己仿佛亲历其境，于是选择把这则故事据为己有——当然还会加上些“迫切需要”的改进。

朱红巨龙的行径已经够狂野了，但他们的故事不知怎的还要更狂野。

Pentheravix

Pentheravix，“见证者”，对朱红巨龙而言相当古怪，因为她从不在自己的故事里把自己塑造成英雄。相反，她只讲述那些她声称亲眼见证过的重要事件。她对时事与历史的版本极具说服力，以至于即便在事件发生的地区，她的说法也会迅速取代真相。她的话就是真相——即便显然不是。

热切的受骗者

朱红巨龙是天赋卓绝的幻术师，编织奇幻幻象如同呼吸与讲故事一样轻松。按理说，这应让他们极擅长辨识幻象，但事实恰恰相反。朱红巨龙太享受体验幻象并欣赏其艺术性，以至于他们宁愿受骗也不愿识破。

亡命之举的危险

朱红巨龙是追逐刺激的肾上腺素狂，他们固然享受被迷住的观众，却几乎不在乎构成这些观众之人的性命。因此，他们的胡闹经常给附近的聚居地带来麻烦。为被激怒的怪物、蒙羞的军队与环境灾变付出价格的永远是人们——从来不是朱红巨龙。

Vermilion dragons are fabulous storytellers who care more for the tale and their craft than they do for the truth. They're notorious exaggerators and liars who always believe a story or event has room for improvement—it's far more entertaining that way! Many vermilion dragons are such expert storytellers and confabulators that their outlandish tales and outrageous lies can seem strangely compelling. Many people believe them, even when reality and more factual accounts clearly contradict the vermilion dragon's stories. When called out on their lies, contradictions, and numerous plot holes, most vermilion dragons roll with the accusations, riff off them, and just keep making up extraordinarily tall tales.

Vermilion dragons adore collecting all sorts of different tales and stories and spinning them into popular legends that will endure across centuries and millennia. A vermilion dragon's stories, no matter how outrageous and fabricated they might seem, always maintain a central core of truth amid the fiction. Finding this hidden truth can be a significant challenge—particularly as the march of time passes and the original tale becomes grander and grander, lost amid the lies that surround it. Some scholars recommend that listeners ignore everything descriptive contained in a vermilion dragon's tale, while others encourage the reader to break a vermilion dragon's tale down to its most basic plot points and ignore everything else in the story. Vermilion dragons believe this is absurd, for such close-minded censorship removes the point of their stories—a vermilion dragon's stories aren't about truth but about entertainment. Put simply, telling tall tales is fun, both for the teller and the audience. Repetition is boring, and a boring tale is primed for extinction. To a vermilion dragon, nothing is worse than having one's stories or deeds forgotten.

A vermilion dragon's favorite stories nearly always revolve around themselves. After all, they're boisterous, proud, and notorious braggarts, so it should come as no surprise that they most enjoy weaving tales of their own adventures, daring deeds, and exploits. Both for the purpose of collecting more stories of their exploits and for the excitement and rewards, vermilion dragons often play the part of ambitious daredevils who love the thrill of danger and the unknown. Yet, even the most egoistic vermilion dragon is willing to admit that the epic accomplishments arising from their own wild antics could use some extra embellishment. In fact, they're often the most legendary and exaggerated heroes in their storytelling catalog.

Although vermilion dragons are admittedly relatively self-centered, they don't always cast themselves as the central core of their own exaggerated tales. They also enjoy telling all sorts of embellished stories about people they know or have met, events they've seen or observed, and news of the wider world around them. They usually prefer to share something they had a hand in or witnessed as opposed to a completely distant tale far outside their experience—although they love listening to such far-flung and unfamiliar stories! Sometimes, after hearing a rousing tale told repeatedly, a vermilion dragon has experienced it enough that they feel they were practically there, and they then choose to adopt the tale as their own—complete with some much- needed improvements.

As wild as the antics of a vermilion dragon are, their stories are somehow even wilder.

Pentheravix

Pentheravix, "the Witness," is odd for a vermilion dragon since she never casts herself as the hero of her own tales. Instead, she solely tells tales of important events she claims to have witnessed. So compelling are her versions of current events and history that they quickly supplant the truth, even in regions where the events occurred. Her word is truth—even when it clearly isn't.

Eager Dupes

Vermilion dragons are talented illusionists who weave fantastical illusions as easily as they breathe and spin tales. While this should make them excellent at identifying illusions, this couldn't be further from the truth. Vermilion dragons so enjoy experiencing illusions and admiring their artistry that they'd rather be duped than disbelieve.

The Dangers Of Daredevilry

Vermilion dragons are thrill-seeking adrenaline junkies, and while they enjoy an enthralled audience, they care little for the lives of the individuals who compose such audiences. Thus, their antics regularly cause trouble for nearby settlements. It's people who pay the price for riled-up monsters, embarrassed armies, and environmental cataclysms—never the vermilion dragon.
Ancient Vermilion Dragon.prototypeToken: 远古朱红巨龙 Ancient Vermilion Dragon

Willerm's Ghost.name: 威勒姆的幽灵（特征） Willerm's Ghost
Willerm's Ghost.tokenName: 威勒姆的幽灵（特征） Willerm's Ghost
Willerm's Ghost.publicNotes:
在法光的众多灵体之中，威勒姆的幽灵（特征）最为著名。许多人都有与法光的建筑师不期而遇的故事，许多访客也会不辞辛劳地去寻找他。与其说是威胁，不如说是个令人厌烦的家伙；他能在城里的任何地方显现，只要那里能找到听众。他最喜欢的话题就是这座城市本身，并会对任何吸引他目光的建筑特性滔滔不绝——人行道、排水沟、灯塔。而且由于他是不死生物，他甚至不必停下来吸一口吐息！在威勒姆眼中，这座城市依然生机勃勃，人口有数万之众。试图说服他并非如此既不礼貌也不安全。你最好的动作是听威勒姆说上几分钟，然后声称你有一场紧急约会。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.1zsqhp6q0BXoExH4]{法光：活的幽灵（特征）城镇}

Among Farlight's many spirits, Willerm's ghost is the most famous. Many people have a story of a run-in with Farlight's architect, and many visitors go out of their way to find him. More of a bore than a threat, he can manifest in any part of the city, wherever an audience can be found. His favorite subject is the city itself, and he gushes about the magnificence of whatever architectural feature catches his eye—the sidewalks, the drains, the lighthouse. And since he's undead, he doesn't even have to stop to take a breath! In Willerm's eyes, the city is a vibrant city with a population in the tens of thousands. Attempting to convince him otherwise is neither polite nor safe. Your best course of action is to listen to Willerm for a few minutes and then claim you have a pressing engagement.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.1zsqhp6q0BXoExH4]{Farlight: The Living Ghost Town}
Willerm's Ghost.blurb:
雄性朱红巨龙幽灵（特征）建筑师
male vermilion dragon ghost architect
Willerm's Ghost.prototypeToken: 威勒姆的幽灵（特征） Willerm's Ghost

Chochori Carbor Envoy.name: 乔科里·卡伯尔使者 Chochori Carbor Envoy
Chochori Carbor Envoy.tokenName: 乔科里·卡博尔使者 Chochori Carbor Envoy
Chochori Carbor Envoy.prototypeToken: 乔科里·卡博尔使节 Chochori Carbor Envoy

Port Captain Zargek.name: 港务长扎尔格克 Port Captain Zargek
Port Captain Zargek.tokenName: 港务长札尔戈克 Port Captain Zargek
Port Captain Zargek.publicNotes:
港口船长扎尔盖克是铁工厂船坞的沉默寡言的老板，船坞位于克拉肯北岸，他是个令人望而生畏的人物——七英尺高的石头巨躯，肩上栖着一只潘吉奥利尔，一种岩穿山甲埃尔达蒙。他会在沙拉克或奥兹米斯之间投票，取决于谁给他的条件更好。作为其投票的交换，扎尔盖克对长牙木的出口施加了严苛的规定。河流北岸的所有工人都尊敬（或畏惧）扎尔盖克，那里没有人在未经他许可的情况下工作。尤其是，克拉肯以北的长牙木伐木营地对除扎尔盖克亲自挑选的同伙之外的任何人都禁止进入。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.y25DHBxDhLKgnZuA]{克拉肯：河之宝石}

Port Captain Zargek, the taciturn boss of the Ironworks shipyard along Kraken's north shore, is an imposing figure—seven feet of stone, with a pangeolil, a rock pangolin eldamon, perched on his shoulder. He votes with either Sharrak or Ozmis, depending on who cuts him a better deal. In exchange for his votes, Zargek imposes stringent rules on the export of tuskwood. Zargek is respected (or feared) by everyone who works on the north side of the river, and no one works there without his approval. In particular, the tuskwood lumber camps to the north of Kraken are off-limits to anyone but Zargek's hand-picked associates.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.y25DHBxDhLKgnZuA]{Kraken: The River Jewel}
Port Captain Zargek.blurb:
男性克拉格拉克管理员
male kragrak administrator
Port Captain Zargek.prototypeToken: 港务队长扎尔格克 Port Captain Zargek

Young Cerulean Dragon (Spellcaster).name: 幼年天蓝巨龙（施法者） Young Cerulean Dragon (Spellcaster)
Young Cerulean Dragon (Spellcaster).tokenName: 幼年天青巨龙 Young Cerulean Dragon

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60 尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Wavesense (Imprecise) 30 feet.name: 波感（非精确）30英尺 Wavesense (Imprecise) 30 feet

Experienced Traveler.name: 经验丰富的旅者 Experienced Traveler
Experienced Traveler.description:
蔚蓝巨龙是经验丰富的生存专家，不会被大多数环境带来的世俗危险所阻碍。它们无视非魔法的困难地形。

Cerulean dragons are experienced survivalists and are unhindered by the mundane dangers posed by most environments. They ignore non-magical difficult terrain.

Peregrinate.name: 巡游 Peregrinate
Peregrinate.description:
触发 一名敌人的回合结束，且在该回合中该敌人用近战打击命中了蔚蓝巨龙

效果 蔚蓝巨龙远离危险游走，使自己处于更安全的距离并重新调整位置以便打击。蔚蓝巨龙以至多其速度的一半进行疾走、游泳或飞行，且其移动不会触发由移动触发的反应动作（例如借机攻击）。

Trigger A foe's turn ends, during which that foe hit the cerulean dragon with a melee Strike

Effect The cerulean dragon wanders away from danger, putting themselves at a safer distance and repositioning to strike. The cerulean dragon Strides, Swims, or Flies up to half their Speed, and their movement doesn't trigger reactions triggered by movement (such as Attacks of Opportunity).

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Translate.name: 请提供需要翻译的英文文本（或上传图片/粘贴内容）。 Translate
Translate.description:
当你施放该法术时，目标可以理解它正在听到或阅读的一种语言的含义。这并不会让它理解密码、用隐喻包装的语言等（由GM酌情裁定）。如果目标能听到多种语言并且知道这一点，它可以选择要理解哪种语言；否则，从这些语言中随机选择一种。

升阶（3环） 目标也可以说该语言。

升阶（4环） 你最多可以以10个生物为目标，且目标也可以说该语言。

The target can understand the meaning of a single language it is hearing or reading when you cast the spell. This doesn't let it understand codes, language couched in metaphor, and the like (subject to GM discretion). If the target can hear multiple languages and knows that, it can choose which language to understand; otherwise, choose one of the languages randomly.

Heightened (3rd) The target can also speak the language.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures, and targets can also speak the language.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你解开法术或效果背后的魔法。对目标进行一次反制检定。若你成功反制一件魔法物品，该物品在10分钟内变为同类的普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。若目标为神器或类似物品，你将自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Humanoid Form.name: 人形生物形态 Humanoid Form
Humanoid Form.description:
你将自己的外貌变形为一个小型或中型的类人生物（特征），例如矮人、精灵、地精、半身人、人类、兽人或蜥蜴人。当你处于此形态时，除你原本的其他特征外，你还获得类人生物（特征），以及任何与该生物种类相关的特征（例如地精或人类）。如果此次变形使你的体型缩小，它会相应降低你的触及（如同 shrink 法术）。此次变形不会以任何方式改变你的数据，你也不会获得你所采取的类人生物形态的任何特殊能力。你仍然可以穿戴并使用你的道具；这些道具会（如有必要）改变体型以匹配你的新形态。如果物品离开你的身上，它们会恢复为通常的体型。

类人生物形态使你在进行欺瞒检定以伪装成所选族裔的一名泛泛成员时获得+4状态加值，并且即使你未受训，你也将你的等级加入该检定，但你无法让自己看起来像某个特定的人。如果你想要冒充某个个体，你仍然需要创造一份伪装，不过GM在决定你的欺瞒检定DC时不会把族裔差异纳入考量。你可以解消此法术。

升阶（3环） 如果你所采取的形态具有该能力，你获得黑暗视觉或弱光视野。

升阶（5环） 你可以呈现为一个大型类人生物的外貌。如果这使你的体型增大，你获得 enlarge 法术的效果。

You transform your appearance to that of a Small or Medium humanoid, such as a dwarf, elf, goblin, halfling, human, orc, or lizardfolk. You gain the humanoid trait in addition to your other traits while in this form, as well as any trait related to the creature's kind (such as goblin or human). If this transformation reduces your size, it reduces your reach accordingly (as the shrink spell). This transformation doesn't change your statistics in any way, and you don't gain any special abilities of the humanoid form you assume. You can still wear and use your gear, which changes size (if necessary) to match your new form. If items leave your person, they return to their usual size.

Humanoid form grants you a +4 status bonus to Deception checks to pass as a generic member of the chosen ancestry, and you add your level even if you're untrained, but you can't make yourself look like a specific person. If you want to Impersonate an individual, you still need to create a disguise, though the GM won't factor in the difference in ancestry when determining the DC of your Deception check. You can Dismiss this spell.

Heightened (3rd) You gain darkvision or low-light vision if the form you assume has that ability.

Heightened (5th) You can take on the appearance of a Large humanoid. If this increases your size, you gain the effects of the enlarge spell.

Create Water (At Will).name: 创造 水（随意） Create Water (At Will)
Create Water (At Will).description:
当你将双手捧起时，水开始从中流出。你创造 2 加仑的水。若无人饮用，它会在 1 天后蒸发。

As you cup your hands, water begins to flow forth from them. You create 2 gallons of water. If no one drinks it, it evaporates after 1 day.

True Strike.name: 精准打击 True Strike
True Strike.description:
对未来的一瞥确保你的下一击精准命中。在你的回合结束前，你下一次进行攻击掷骰时，将该次攻击掷骰掷两次并采用较好的结果。该次攻击忽略攻击掷骰所受的环境减值，以及因目标处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐匿}而需要进行的任何纯骰检定。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{法术效果：精准打击}

A glimpse into the future ensures your next blow strikes true. The next time you make an attack roll before the end of your turn, roll the attack twice and use the better result. The attack ignores circumstance penalties to the attack roll and any flat check required due to the target being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{Spell Effect: True Strike}

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你放出一道脉冲，以感知周围是否存在魔法。除了魔法的存在或不存在之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你已完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友的魔法物品与持续中的法术。你只有在幻术魔法的效果位阶低于你的侦测魔法法术位阶时，才能侦测到幻术魔法。然而，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环） 你会得知该法术所侦测到的最强魔法效果的位阶或等级，由GM判定。

升阶（4环） 同3环，但你还会锁定最高位阶魔法的来源。与模糊感官类似，你不会得知确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个5英尺立方体范围内（若来源大于此范围，则为距离最近的一个）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你将注意力集中在目标物体上，敞开心智以感知魔法灵光。当施放完成时，你会知道该物品是否具有魔法。你或任何你就该灵光给予建议的人，在该物品上进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{识别魔法} 时获得+2环境加值。若该物体是幻象，只有当该效果的环阶低于你的阅读灵光法术的环阶时，你才会侦测到这一点。

升阶（3环）你可以以最多10个物体为目标。

升阶（6环）你可以以任意数量的物体为目标。

You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras. When the casting is complete, you know whether that item is magical. You or anyone you advise about the aura gains a +2 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic} on the item. If the object is illusory, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your read aura spell.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to 10 objects.

Heightened (6th) You can target any number of objects.

Spout.name: 喷涌 Spout
Spout.description:
区域 5英尺立方体或5英尺爆发

水向上喷涌，从地面涌出、从水池中升起，甚至从稀薄的空气中显现。区域内的任何生物受到等同于1d4加上你的施法能力调整值的钝击伤害，并进行一次基础反射豁免。

你可以将此法术的区域改为5英尺爆发，前提是你将爆发的中心置于一片水域中。这片水域可以小至池塘或小溪，但不能小至水洼或浴缸。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

Area 5-foot cube or 5-foot burst

Water blasts upward, coming out of the ground, rising from a pool, or even manifesting from thin air. Any creatures in the area take bludgeoning damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier, with a basic Reflex saving throw.

You can change this spell's area to a 5-foot burst, provided you center the burst in a body of water. This body of water can be as small as a pond or creek, but not as small as a puddle or bathtub.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Arcane Prepared Spells.name: 奥术预备法术 Arcane Prepared Spells

Freedom of Movement.name: 行动自如 Freedom of Movement
Freedom of Movement.description:
你排斥那些会妨碍生物或减缓其移动的效果。在此法术效果影响下，目标无视会给予其速度环境减值的效果。当他们尝试 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱} 使其处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{无法移动}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被抓住} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{被束缚} 的效果时，他们自动成功，除非该效果是魔法且其等级高于移动自如法术。

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher level than the freedom of movement spell.

Vapor Form.name: 蒸汽形态 Vapor Form
Vapor Form.description:
目标变形为蒸气状态。在该状态下，目标为无定形。它失去任何对AC的物品加值，以及来自护甲的所有其他效果和加值，并且它使用其无甲防御的熟练度调整值。它获得对物理伤害的抗力8，并免疫精准伤害。它不能施放法术、启动物品，或使用具有攻击或操作（特征）的动作。它获得10英尺的飞行速度，并能穿过微小的裂缝。目标可以解消该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.sILRkGTwoBywy0BU]{法术效果：蒸气形态}

The target transforms into a vaporous state. In this state, the target is amorphous. It loses any item bonus to AC and all other effects and bonuses from armor, and it uses its proficiency modifier for unarmored defense. It gains resistance 8 to physical damage and is immune to precision damage. It can't cast spells, activate items, or use actions that have the attack or manipulate trait. It gains a fly Speed of 10 feet and can slip through tiny cracks. The target can Dismiss the spell.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.sILRkGTwoBywy0BU]{Spell Effect: Vapor Form}

Hydraulic Push.name: 液压冲击 Hydraulic Push
Hydraulic Push.description:
你召唤出一股强力的加压水爆冲击目标，并将其击退。进行一次远程法术攻击掷骰。

大成功或大失败 目标承受6d6钝击伤害，并被击退10英尺。

成功 目标承受3d6钝击伤害，并被击退5英尺。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加2d6。

You call forth a powerful blast of pressurized water that bludgeons the target and knocks it back. Make a ranged spell attack roll.

Critical Success The target takes 6d6 bludgeoning damage and is knocked back 10 feet.

Success The target takes 3d6 bludgeoning damage and is knocked back 5 feet.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Aqueous Orb.name: 水之宝珠 Aqueous Orb
Aqueous Orb.description:
一个直径10尺的水球体在射程内一处未被占据的空间中形成，可以在地面上或在液态表面上。

当你@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{施放法术}以及每次你@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3f5DMFu8fPiqHpRg]{维持法术}时，你都可以滚动该宝珠，使其沿地面或液态表面移动至多10尺。你可以在同一轮内通过多次维持法术来多次获得此效果。

该宝珠可以穿过任何不会阻止水流动的生物或障碍物的空间。它会熄灭其穿过的、体型与其相同或更小的非魔法火焰，并会尝试反制其穿过的任何魔法火焰。若它未能反制某一团火焰，则在法术的持续时间内它不能反制那团火焰。

该宝珠也可以收集它穿过的生物。任何体型为大型或更小、其空间被宝珠试图穿过的生物，都可以针对你的法术DC尝试一次反射豁免以避免被吞没。若生物在此豁免中成功，它可以选择让宝珠通过（保持在其空间内，或离开宝珠的路径进入该生物选择的一个空间），或允许自己被推到宝珠前方，并被推至宝珠移动的终点。即使你把它滚到某个生物的空间上超过一次，宝珠在每回合也只能尝试吞没同一个生物一次。

豁免失败的生物会被拉入宝珠之中。它会变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被擒抱}，随宝珠一同移动，并且必须屏住吐息，否则开始窒息（除非它能在水中呼吸）。被吞没的中型或更小生物，以及任何试图影响该生物者，遵循水栖战斗的通常规则。被吞没的大型生物通常大到身体部分会伸出水面，并且它可以触及到水面外。被吞没的生物可以通过以成功的@Check[type:athletics|dc:10|traits:action:swim]检定进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.c8TGiZ48ygoSPofx]{游泳}来脱困，或以对抗你的法术DC进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}来脱困。反射豁免大失败的生物会被卡得更紧，必须尝试逃脱而非游泳。脱困的生物会离开宝珠的空间并可立即呼吸。该宝珠可以容纳其空间内所能容纳的任意数量生物。当法术结束时，宝珠吞没的所有生物都会自动被释放。

A sphere of water 10 feet in diameter forms in an unoccupied space in range, either on the ground or on the surface of a liquid.

When you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{Cast the Spell} and each time you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3f5DMFu8fPiqHpRg]{Sustain the Spell}, you can roll the orb, moving it up to 10 feet along the ground or the surface of a liquid. You can gain this effect multiple times in the same round by Sustaining the Spell multiple times.

The orb can move through the spaces of any creatures or obstacles that wouldn't stop the flow of water. It extinguishes non-magical fires it moves through of its size or smaller, and it attempts to counteract any magical fires it moves through. If it fails to counteract a given fire, it can't counteract that fire for the duration of the spell.

The orb can also collect creatures it moves through. Any Large or smaller creature whose space the orb tries to move through can attempt a Reflex save against your spell DC to avoid being engulfed. If a creature succeeds at this save, it can either let the orb pass (remaining in its space or moving out of the orb's path into a space of the creature's choice) or allow itself to be pushed in front of the orb to the end of the orb's movement. The orb can try to Engulf the same creature only once per turn, even if you roll it onto a creature's space more than once.

A creature that fails its save is pulled into the orb. It becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, moves along with the orb, and must hold its breath or begin suffocating (unless it can breathe in water). An engulfed Medium or smaller creature and anyone trying to affect that creature follow the normal rules for aquatic battles. An engulfed Large creature is usually big enough that parts of it stick out from the water, and it can reach out of the water. An engulfed creature can get free either by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.c8TGiZ48ygoSPofx]{Swimming} with a successful @Check[type:athletics|dc:10|traits:action:swim] check or by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escaping} against your spell DC. A creature that critically failed its Reflex save is further stuck and must attempt to Escape instead of Swim. A freed creature exits the orb's space and can immediately breathe. The orb can contain as many creatures as can fit in its space. When the spell ends, all creatures the orb has engulfed are automatically released.

Haste.name: 加速 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法赋予目标更快行动的能力。它获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{迅捷（状态）}状态，并且每轮只能将额外的动作用于打击与疾走动作。

升阶（7环） 你可以指定至多6个生物作为目标。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{法术效果：加速}

Magic empowers the target to act faster. It gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} condition and can use the extra action each round only for Strike and Stride actions.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 6 creatures.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{Spell Effect: Haste}

Wall of Water.name: 水墙 Wall of Water
Wall of Water.description:
你将手高举向空中，召唤一道巨浪降临战场。这道墙以直线直立存在，长60尺、高10尺、厚5尺。

水墙区域内任何非魔法的火焰，只要其体型不大于水墙，都会立刻熄灭。它也会尝试反制其区域内的任何魔法火焰。这两种效果会在施放该法术时发生，并且在任何火焰进入水墙区域时再次发生。若水墙未能反制某个特定火焰，则在该法术的持续时间内无法再反制该火焰。

钝击或挥砍的投射物无法穿过水墙，而穿刺投射物若穿过水墙，其射程增量减半。穿越水墙的生物必须通过游泳穿过。对穿越水墙的生物、以水墙内的生物为目标、或穿过水墙的行为，适用水中战斗规则。例如，以水墙中的生物为目标的钝击或挥砍近战攻击会承受-2环境减值。

Raising your hand in the air, you call a massive wave onto the battlefield. The wall stays upright in a straight line that is 60 feet long, 10 feet high, and 5 feet thick.

Any non-magical fires within the wall of water's area that are its size or smaller are put out instantly. It also attempts to counteract any magical fires in its area. Both of these effects happen when the spell is cast and whenever a fire enters the wall's area. If the wall fails to counteract a given fire, it can't counteract that fire for the duration of the spell.

Bludgeoning or slashing projectiles can't pass through the wall, and piercing projectiles have their range increments halved if they pass through the wall. A creature traversing the wall of water needs to Swim through. The rules of aquatic combat apply to creatures traversing the wall of water, targeting creatures within the wall, or passing through the wall. For instance, a bludgeoning or slashing melee attack targeting a creature in the wall would take a -2 circumstance penalty.

Mirror Image.name: 镜像术 Mirror Image
Mirror Image.description:
三个你的幻象在你的空间内盘旋，可能导致攻击你的人打中其中一个幻象而非你本人。任何本应命中你的攻击都有一个随机几率改为命中你的某个幻象而非你。若三个幻象都仍在，则有 1/4 的几率命中你（在 [[/r 1d4]] 中掷出 1）。若剩余两个幻象，则有 1/3 的几率命中你（在 [[/r 1d6]] 中掷出 1-2）。若只剩一个幻象，则几率为 1/2（在 [[/r 1d6]] 中掷出 1-3）。

一旦某个幻象被命中，它就会被摧毁。若一次攻击掷骰未能命中你的 AC 但未大失败，它会摧毁一个幻象，但没有额外效果（即使该攻击通常在失败时也会产生效果）。若一次攻击掷骰为大成功且本会命中某个幻象，则摧毁一个幻象，并且该攻击掷骰改为对你为成功。所有幻象一旦都被摧毁，法术结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.0PO5mFRhh9HxGAtv]{法术效果：镜像术}

Three illusory images of you swirl about your space, potentially causing those who attack you to hit one of the images instead of you. Any attack that would hit you has a random chance of hitting one of your images instead of you. If all three images remain, there is a 1 in 4 chance of hitting you (1 on [[/r 1d4]]). With two images remaining, there is a 1 in 3 chance of hitting you (1-2 on [[/r 1d6]]). With only one image, the chances are 1 in 2 (1-3 on [[/r 1d6]]).

Once an image is hit, it is destroyed. If an attack roll fails to hit your AC but doesn't critically fail, it destroys an image but has no additional effect (even if the attack would normally have an effect on a failure). If an attack roll is a critical success and would hit one of the images, one of the images is destroyed and the attack roll becomes a success against you. Once all the images are destroyed, the spell ends.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.0PO5mFRhh9HxGAtv]{Spell Effect: Mirror Image}

See the Unseen.name: 看见隐形者 See the Unseen
See the Unseen.description:
你的凝视能穿透幻觉，并找到@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的生物与灵体。你可以看见隐形生物，如同它们并未隐形一般，但它们的特性会显得模糊，使其处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态且难以辨认。你也能看见虚体生物，例如幽灵（特征），它们在距离某个物体表面10尺范围内，从物体内部穿过该物体时，会以透过这些物体可见的模糊形状呈现。更细微的线索也会使你在进行识破幻觉的检定时获得+2状态加值。

升阶（5环） 此法术的持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：看见不可见者}

Your gaze pierces through illusions and finds @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} creatures and spirits. You can see invisible creatures as though they weren't invisible, although their features are blurred, making them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} and difficult to identify. You can also see incorporeal creatures, like ghosts, phased through an object from within 10 feet of an object's surface as blurry shapes seen through those objects. Subtler clues also grant you a +2 status bonus to checks you make to disbelieve illusions.

Heightened (5th) This spell has a duration of 8 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{Spell Effect: See the Unseen}

Alarm.name: 警报 Alarm
Alarm.description:
你结界一个区域，以在生物未经你许可进入时提醒你。当你施放alarm时，选择一个口令。每当一只小型或更大且有实体的生物在不说出口令的情况下进入该法术的区域时，alarm会发送你选择的一种心灵警报（此时该法术获得心灵（特征））或一种可听警报，其声音与音量如同手铃（此时该法术获得听觉（特征））。任一选项都会自动唤醒你，而铃声会让区域内的每个生物都可以尝试一次DC 15 察觉检定来醒来。一只知晓alarm的生物在移动进入该区域时，必须在一次潜行检定中对抗该法术的法术DC并成功，否则将触发该法术。

升阶（3环） 你可以指定哪些生物会触发alarm法术的条件——例如，兽人或戴面具的人。

You ward an area to alert you when creatures enter without your permission. When you cast alarm, select a password. Whenever a Small or larger corporeal creature enters the spell's area without speaking the password, alarm sends your choice of a mental alert (in which case the spell gains the mental trait) or an audible alarm with the sound and volume of a hand bell (in which case the spell gains the auditory trait). Either option automatically awakens you, and the bell allows each creature in the area to attempt a DC 15 Perception check to wake up. A creature aware of the alarm must succeed at a Stealth check against the spell's DC or trigger the spell when moving into the area.

Heightened (3rd) You can specify criteria for which creatures sound the alarm spell-for instance, orcs or masked people.

Unseen Servant.name: 隐形仆役 Unseen Servant
Unseen Servant.description:
你召唤一个隐形仆役，你可以将其指令作为维持法术的一部分下达。它为你服务，直到其生命值降至0，此时法术结束，或直到你停止维持法术。隐形仆役获得被召唤（特征）。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.j7NNPfZwD19BwSEZ]{隐形仆役}（无阵营）

You summon an unseen servant, which you can command as part of Sustaining the Spell. It serves you until its Hit Points are reduced to 0, at which point the spell ends, or until you stop Sustaining the Spell. The unseen servant gains the summoned trait.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.j7NNPfZwD19BwSEZ]{Unseen Servant} (No Alignment)

Telekinetic Hand.name: 念动力之手 Telekinetic Hand
Telekinetic Hand.description:
你创造一只漂浮的魔法之手，它可以是隐形的或幽灵般的，抓住目标物体并使其缓慢悬浮，向任意方向移动至多20英尺。当你维持该法术时，你可以使该物体额外移动20英尺。如果法术结束时该物体仍在空气中，则该物体坠落。

升阶（3环）你可以以一件无人持用且负载为1或更低的物体为目标。

升阶（5环）射程增加至60英尺，并且你可以以一件无人持用且负载为1或更低的物体为目标。

升阶（7环）射程增加至60英尺，并且你可以以一件无人持用且负载为2或更低的物体为目标。

You create a floating, magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and levitates it slowly up to 20 feet in any direction. When you Sustain the spell, you can move the object an additional 20 feet. If the object is in the air when the spell ends, the object falls.

Heightened (3rd) You can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (7th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 2 or less.

Ray of Frost.name: 寒霜射线 Ray of Frost
Ray of Frost.description:
你发射一道冰冷射线。进行一次法术攻击掷骰。该射线造成等于1d4 + 你的施法能力调整值的寒冷伤害。

大成功 目标受到双倍伤害，并在1轮内其速度获得-10英尺的状态减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.I4PsUAaYSUJ8pwKC]{法术效果：冰霜射线}

成功 目标受到正常伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

You blast an icy ray. Make a spell attack roll. The ray deals cold damage equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

Critical Success The target takes double damage and takes a -10-foot status penalty to its Speeds for 1 round.
