@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.I4PsUAaYSUJ8pwKC]{Spell Effect: Ray of Frost}

Success The target takes normal damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
天蓝色巨龙会以两种方式之一吐息。其巨龙吐息的区域内所有非魔法火焰都会被熄灭。该巨龙在 [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 轮}内无法再次使用吐息武器。

  • 猛击波涛 巨龙在 @Template[type:cone|distance:30] 内吐出一道强力、猛烈拍击的波浪。区域内每个生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:29] 豁免，具有以下效果。

    大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

    成功 该生物沿圆锥相同方向被推开5尺。

    失败 该生物沿圆锥相同方向被推开10尺。若其在被完全推开前会撞上坚固的物体，则其每剩余应被推开的5尺便承受 @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害。

    大成功或大失败 该生物沿圆锥相同方向被推开20尺。若其在被完全推开前会撞上坚固的物体，则其每剩余应被推开的5尺便承受 @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害。

  • 加压水流 巨龙在 @Template[type:cone|distance:30] 内吐出一股加压水流爆发，造成 @Damage[11d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:29|basic:true] 豁免）。

The cerulean dragon breathes in one of two ways. All non-magical fires within the area of their Dragon Breath are extinguished. The dragon can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

  • Battering Wave The dragon breathes a powerful, pummeling wave in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30]. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:29] save with the following effects.

    Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

    Success The creature is pushed 5 feet away in the same direction as the cone.

    Failure The creature is pushed 10 feet away in the same direction as the cone. If it would hit a solid object before being completely pushed, it takes @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage for every remaining 5 feet it would be pushed.

    Critical Failure The creature is pushed 20 feet away in the same direction as the cone. If it would hit a solid object before being completely pushed, it takes @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]] damage for every remaining 5 feet it would be pushed.

  • Pressurized Water The dragon breathes a blast of pressurized water in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] that deals @Damage[11d6[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:29|basic:true] save).

Young Cerulean Dragon (Spellcaster).publicNotes:
蔚蓝巨龙是巨龙世界的开拓者、发掘者、地城探险者与探索者，为了满足他们永无止境的好奇心，绘制路径并在对他们而言未知的土地上开辟道路。蔚蓝巨龙为冒险而活，总在推动自己比以往更快、更远、更深、更高。他们决心看看下一条走廊尽头有什么、紧闭的门后藏着什么、地平线之外是什么，并发现其他世界、位面以及其他次元中有什么。他们探索非同寻常的地点与神秘的奇观，从不满足于无所事事或安于静止，也从不害怕命运可能为他们准备的惊喜或未来可能潜藏的危险。

蔚蓝巨龙充满永恒的漂泊渴望与不减的旅行热情。他们过着快节奏的生活，因此更喜欢始终在路上。大多数蔚蓝巨龙不保有传统巢穴，而更偏好在荒野中、在千百种不同的天空下度过一生，而不是被奢华生活束缚在同一个地方。有些蔚蓝巨龙偏好魔法居所与异位面领域——当他们足够强大且足够年长、能够创造它们时——使他们得以同时享有舒适生活与冒险生活。

蔚蓝巨龙对周遭世界及其中万物怀有极强的好奇心。他们喜欢把鼻子伸到不该伸的地方，踏越界限，打破各种禁忌。他们是爱打探的人，不过与其挖掘人们隐秘的过去与家族秘密，他们更可能撬开上锁的门、闯入禁止进入的地点。与琥珀巨龙不同，他们对人们生活的细节或散落在城市街道上的流言与尴尬并不太感兴趣。这并不意味着他们排斥交友——恰恰相反，蔚蓝巨龙乐于结识新朋友并缔结友谊，尤其是与其他志同道合的探索者与冒险者建立合作关系，以便共同协作。

尽管蔚蓝巨龙喜欢结识新朋友、发现稀有宝藏并学习失落的秘密，但对他们而言没有什么比前往一处新地方更令人兴奋。探索一个对他们而言完全崭新且未知的地点最能让蔚蓝巨龙兴奋，而不论该地点对社会、历史，或对获取财富以扩充他们的收藏堆而言是否具有强效的重要性（或毫无重要性）。

在年少时，许多蔚蓝巨龙主要专注于普通的旅行形态。他们造访从未见过的城市与聚居地，闯入金库，跋涉下水道，并开启坟墓。他们探索荒野地带，攀登群山，钻探洞穴，游过沼泽，并潜入湖泊与海洋之下。待到成年时，大多数蔚蓝巨龙更偏好探索更危险的地点，例如闹鬼的庄园、沉没的船只、偏远的神殿、古代遗迹，以及——一个常见的最爱——地城。

随着时代流逝，大多数蔚蓝巨龙必须走得越来越远，才能找到他们从未到过的地方并满足他们的漂泊渴望。在这段时期里，多数会走向极端，探入最深的深渊与最遥远且难以抵达的地区，旅行至其他位面与星球，甚至前往其他时代与次元。这是一个深入怪异、狂野与完全不可置信之物的时代。

Zemedrilon

“永寻者”泽梅德里隆或许是异位面探索方面最强效的专家，亲自探索过23个位面，其中包括两个其存在目前尚未被证实的位面。多数人相信泽梅德里隆在30年之前试图开启通往遥远未来的传送门时被蒸发了——蔚蓝巨龙认为这故事可笑至极。他们坚持这头古老的巨龙已成功抵达未来，并将在足够长的时间过去后再度现身。

Adventuring Parties

蔚蓝巨龙常为探索目的而结成紧密的团队，每头巨龙都专精于某一研究领域或某一探索重点。有些学者认为，传统“冒险小队”的概念正是源自蔚蓝巨龙——这一完全缺乏依据且无法证实的说法令大多数短命的凡人感到恼火。

Mobile Hoards

如同大多数冒险者，蔚蓝巨龙会将他们的财富以贵重的魔法物品、古代遗物、贵重珠宝以及其他可穿戴财富的形式随身携带。因此，尽管蔚蓝巨龙并没有真正的收藏堆，他们往往会穿戴（或挥舞！）着一笔巨额财富。

Cerulean dragons are the trailblazers of the dragon world, the delvers, the dungeoneers, and the explorers, charting paths and blazing trails through lands unknown to them to sate their neverending curiosity. Cerulean dragons live for adventure and are always pushing themselves faster, further, deeper, and higher than they've ever gone before. They're determined to see what's down the next hall, behind the closed door, beyond the horizon, and discover what lies on other worlds, planes, and other dimensions. They explore unusual sites and mysterious wonders, never content to be idle or sedentary, and never afraid of what surprises fate might have in store for them or what dangers the future may hold.

Cerulean dragons are filled with an eternal wanderlust and an unabating passion for travel. They live a fast-paced life, and thus they prefer to stay on the move at all times. Most cerulean dragons don't keep traditional lairs, preferring a life lived in the wilderness and under a thousand different skies rather than a life of luxury shackled to the same place. Some cerulean dragons prefer magical homes and extraplanar domains—when they're powerful and old enough to create them—which allow them a life of comfort and a life of adventure all at once.

Cerulean dragons are incredibly curious about the world around them and all it contains. They enjoy sticking their noses where they don't belong, treading beyond boundaries, and breaking taboos of all sorts. They're snoops, though they're far more likely to pry behind locked doors and into off-limit locations than they are to delve into people's hidden pasts and family secrets. They're not overly interested in the details of people's lives or the gossip and embarrassments scattered down city streets, unlike amber dragons. It's not that they're averse to making friends—on the contrary, cerulean dragons are interested in meeting new people and forging friendships, particularly working relationships with other like-minded explorers and adventurers with whom they can collaborate.

While cerulean dragons enjoy meeting new people, discovering rare treasures, and learning lost secrets, nothing is more exciting to them than traveling somewhere new. Exploring a place that's completely new and unknown to them excites cerulean dragons the most, regardless of that location's greater importance (or lack thereof) to society, history, or the acquisition of wealth to grow their hoard.

In their youth, many cerulean dragons focus primarily on ordinary forms of travel. They visit cities and settlements they've never seen before, breaking into vaults, trudging through sewers, and opening tombs. They explore tracts of wilderness, climbing mountains, spelunking through caves, swimming through swamps, and diving beneath lakes and oceans. By the time they're grown, most cerulean dragons prefer to explore more dangerous locations, such as haunted manors, sunken ships, remote temples, ancient ruins, and—a common favorite—dungeons.

As time passes, most cerulean dragons must go further and further to find places they've never been and fulfill their wanderlust. During this time, most go to extremes, plumbing the deepest depths and the most distant and inaccessible regions, traveling to other planes and planets, or even to other times and dimensions. It's a time to delve into the weird, the wild, and the utterly unbelievable.

Zemedrilon

Zemedrilon the Ever-Seeking is perhaps the greatest expert on extraplanar exploration, having personally explored 23 planes, including two whose existence is currently unconfirmed. Most believe Zemedrilon was vaporized 30 years ago while attempting to open a portal to the distant future—a tale cerulean dragons consider laughable. They insist the ancient dragon successfully arrived in the future and, after a long enough time has passed, will reemerge.

Adventuring Parties

Cerulean dragons often band together into tightly knit teams for the purpose of exploration, with each dragon specializing in a field of study or exploratory focus. Some scholars believe it's from cerulean dragons that the concept of the traditional "adventuring party" was born—a completely unsubstantiated and unprovable claim that irks most short- lived mortals.

Mobile Hoards

Like most adventurers, cerulean dragons carry their wealth on them in the form of valuable magic items, ancient artifacts, valuable jewelry, and other wearable wealth. Thus, while a cerulean dragon lacks a true hoard, they often wear (or wield!) a fortune.
Young Cerulean Dragon (Spellcaster).prototypeToken: 幼年天蓝巨龙 Young Cerulean Dragon

Adult Indigo Dragon.name: 成年靛蓝巨龙 Adult Indigo Dragon
Adult Indigo Dragon.tokenName: 成年靛蓝巨龙 Adult Indigo Dragon

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Celebratory Cheer.name: 庆祝欢呼 Celebratory Cheer
Celebratory Cheer.description:
触发 靛蓝巨龙30尺内的一名盟友对一名敌人造成重击

效果 靛蓝巨龙以一阵令人振奋、富有感染力的热情冲动来庆祝其盟友的成功。靛蓝巨龙在接下来2轮内，对其触发的盟友重击的那名敌人的攻击掷骰获得+1状态加值。若靛蓝巨龙在因“庆贺欢呼”获得该加值期间对该敌人造成重击，则触发“庆贺欢呼”的盟友可以使用其反应动作，使其在接下来2轮内对该敌人的攻击掷骰获得+1状态加值。

Trigger An ally within 30 feet of the indigo dragon critically hits a foe

Effect The indigo dragon celebrates their ally's success with a heady rush of contagious ardor. The indigo dragon gains a +1 status bonus on attack rolls against the foe that their triggering ally critically hit for 2 rounds. If the indigo dragon critically hits that foe while they have the bonus from Celebratory Cheer, the ally who triggered Celebratory Cheer can use their reaction to gain a +1 status bonus on attack rolls against that foe for 2 rounds.

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术先天法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Hideous Laughter.name: 骇人狂笑 Hideous Laughter
Hideous Laughter.description:
目标被无法控制的笑声所淹没。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标被无法控制的笑声所折磨。它不能使用反应动作。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} 且不能使用反应动作。

大成功或大失败 目标倒地 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} 且在1轮内不能使用动作或反应动作。随后它承受失败的效果。

The target is overtaken with uncontrollable laughter. It must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is plagued with uncontrollable laugher. It can't use reactions.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and can't use reactions.

Critical Failure The target falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and can't use actions or reactions for 1 round. It then suffers the failure effects.

Charm.name: 魅惑 Charm
Charm.description:
对目标而言，你的话语如蜜糖般甜美，你的面容仿佛沐浴在梦幻的薄雾之中。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免；若你或你的盟友最近威胁过它或对它使用过敌对动作，则该豁免获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。若你对目标使用敌对动作，则该法术结束。当法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己曾被魅惑，除非它对你的友谊或你说服它采取的动作与它的预期相冲突；这意味着你有可能通过世俗手段说服目标继续做你的朋友。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知晓你试图魅惑它。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害效果而非魅惑，除非它辨识该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友善}。若其已为友善，则变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于助人}。它无法对你使用敌对动作。

大失败 目标对你的态度变为乐于助人，并且它无法对你使用敌对动作。

增幅（4环） 持续时间持续至你下次进行每日准备。

增幅（8环） 持续时间持续至你下次进行每日准备，并且你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Infectious Enthusiasm.name: 感染性热情 Infectious Enthusiasm
Infectious Enthusiasm.description:
带着附魔的热忱，你鼓励自己把事情做完，并与盟友分享你的动力。你获得你所选择的攻击掷骰、意志豁免或基于魅力的技能检定之一的+1状态加值。在该法术的持续时间内，一名在你施放该法术时观察到你且当时位于30英尺内的盟友可以花费一个单动作（具有专注（特征））来获得你所选择的同样加值，直到其下个回合开始。

在社交场合使用该法术来影响他人通常被视为失礼之举；若检定的对象观察到你施放该法术，则该法术在基于魅力的技能上的益处会被抵消。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.nU4SxAk6XreHUi5h]{法术效果: 传染性热情}

With enchanted gusto, you encourage yourself to get things done and share your motivation with your allies. You gain a +1 status bonus to your choice of attack rolls, Will saves, or Charisma-based skill checks. During the spell's duration, an ally who observed you Casting this Spell and was within 30 feet when you did so can take a single action, which has the concentrate trait, to gain the same bonus you chose until the start of its next turn.

Using this spell to influence someone in a social situation is typically considered a faux pas, negating the benefit on Charisma-based skills if the subject of the check observed you casting the spell.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.nU4SxAk6XreHUi5h]{Spell Effect: Infectious Enthusiasm}

Tangle Vine.name: 缠绕藤蔓 Tangle Vine
Tangle Vine.description:
一条藤蔓凭空出现，从你手中甩出并抽向目标，将自身缠绕在目标身上。对目标进行一次法术攻击掷骰。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{法术效果：缠结藤蔓}

大成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）}，并在1轮内其速度承受–10尺的环境减值。它可以尝试进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}，对抗你的法术DC，以移除该减值与禁足（状态）。

成功 目标在1轮内其速度承受–10尺的环境减值。它可以尝试进行逃脱，对抗你的法术DC，以移除该减值。

失败 目标不受影响。

升阶（2环） 效果持续2轮。

升阶（4环） 效果持续1分钟。

A vine appears from thin air, flicking from your hand and lashing itself to the target. Attempt a spell attack roll against the target.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{Spell Effect: Tangle Vine}

Critical Success The target gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} condition and takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} against your spell DC to remove the penalty and the immobilized condition.

Success The target takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape against your spell DC to remove the penalty.

Failure The target is unaffected.

Heightened (2nd) The effects last for 2 rounds.

Heightened (4th) The effects last for 1 minute.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
靛蓝巨龙吐出旋转扩散的荆棘与靛蓝花朵爆发，在一个@Template[type:cone|distance:40]内造成@Damage[13d6[piercing]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:32|basic:true]豁免）。它无法再次使用吐息武器，直到[[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4轮}后。

The indigo dragon breathes a swirling and spreading blast of thorns and indigo flowers that deals @Damage[13d6[piercing]] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:40] (@Check[type:reflex|dc:32|basic:true] save). It can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙狂乱 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
靛蓝巨龙以任意顺序进行两次爪击打击和一次翼打击。

The indigo dragon makes two claw Strikes and one wing Strike in any order.

Ride the High.name: 乘上高空 Ride the High
Ride the High.description:
频率 每轮一次

触发 靛蓝巨龙正处于一个持续时间至少为2轮的有益情绪效果的效果之下，且该效果的持续时间将会结束

需求 靛蓝巨龙尚未在该触发的情绪效果上使用过 Ride the High

效果 靛蓝巨龙将情绪的涌动发挥到极致，将感受在心中再多保留片刻，以防随该情绪而来的益处消散。巨龙将该触发的情绪效果在自身（但不包括任何其他生物）上的持续时间延长1轮。若该效果因除其正常持续时间届满以外的任何原因而结束，例如被驱散或被反制，巨龙不能使用 Ride the High 来继续该效果。

Frequency once per round

Trigger The indigo dragon is under the effect of a beneficial emotion effect with a duration of at least 2 rounds, and the effect's duration would end

Requirements The indigo dragon hasn't used Ride the High on the triggering emotion effect

Effect The indigo dragon rides the rush of emotion to its fullest, holding the feelings in their heart for just a little while longer in order to keep the benefits that come with that emotion from fading away. The dragon extends the duration of the triggering emotion effect on themself (though not any other creatures) by 1 round. The dragon can't use Ride the High to continue the effect if it ends for any reason other than its normal duration expiring, such as if it is dispelled or counteracted.

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙族动能 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
当靛蓝巨龙以一次打击造成大成功或大失败时，其吐息武器充能恢复。

When the indigo dragon scores a critical hit with a Strike, they recharge their Breath Weapon.

Enthrall.name: 蛊惑 Enthrall
Enthrall.description:
你的言辞令你的目标着迷。你在施放与持续时间内不间断地说话或唱歌。注意到你说话或歌唱的目标可能会全神贯注；每个目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。若目标属于对立的宗教、族裔或政治立场，或因其他原因不太可能同意你所说的内容，GM可能会给予一个环境加值（最高+4）。

每个进入射程的生物在你维持法术时都必须尝试一次豁免。若你在说话，en thrall获得语言（特征）。

大成功 目标不受影响，并注意到你试图使用魔法。

成功 目标不必注意，但不会注意到你试图使用魔法（它可能注意到其他目标被迷住了）。

失败 目标对你处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated}。若它目睹了其不同意的动作或言辞，它可以再尝试一次意志豁免。若其成功，则不再处于Fascinated，并在1小时内暂时免疫。若目标遭受敌对行为，或若另一个生物对其进行一次交涉或威吓检定并成功，则该着迷效果立即结束。

大失败 同失败，但若它不同意你所说的内容，目标无法尝试豁免来结束该着迷效果。

Your words fascinate your targets. You speak or sing without interruption throughout the casting and duration. Targets who notice your speech or song might give their undivided attention; each target must attempt a Will save. The GM might grant a circumstance bonus (to a maximum of +4) if the target is of an opposing religion, ancestry, or political leaning, or is otherwise unlikely to agree with what you're saying.

Each creature that comes within range has to attempt a save when you Sustain the Spell. If you're speaking, enthrall gains the linguistic trait.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and notices that you tried to use magic.

Success The target needn't pay attention but doesn't notice you tried to use magic (it might notice others are enthralled).

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} with you. It can attempt another Will save if it witnesses actions or speech with which it disagrees. If it succeeds, it's no longer Fascinated and is temporarily immune for 1 hour. If the target is subject to a hostile act, or if another creature succeeds at a Diplomacy or Intimidation check against it, the fascination ends immediately.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target can't attempt a save to end the fascination if it disagrees with you.

Roaring Applause.name: 雷鸣般的掌声 Roaring Applause
Roaring Applause.description:
你浮夸的亮相引发观众如此强烈的情绪，以至于你煽动起欢呼与掌声。本法术的目标必须能够看见、听见或以其他方式理解你。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标被你的表演轻微分心，并在未被完全占据时鼓掌。它不能使用反应动作（）。

失败 目标为你用力鼓掌，以至于它不能使用反应动作（）并且为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}。鼓掌如此投入，以至于它具有操作（特征）。这会在目标回合开始时触发基于操作（特征）的反应动作（）。

大失败 同失败，此外目标因对你用力鼓掌而极度分心，以至于它对你为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated}。

升阶（6环） 你可以以最多10个生物为目标。

Your flamboyant flourish invokes such powerful feelings in your audience that you incite cheers and applause. Targets of this spell must be able to see, hear, or otherwise understand you. The targets must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target becomes mildly distracted by your display and applauds while it isn't fully occupied. It can't use reactions.

Failure The target applauds you so vigorously that it can't use reactions and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}. The applause is so involved that it has the manipulate trait. This triggers reactions based on the manipulate trait at the start of the target's turn.

Critical Failure As failure, plus the target is so distracted by its vigorous applauding of you that it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} with you.

Heightened (6th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened Emotions.name: 强化情绪 Heightened Emotions
Heightened Emotions.description:
每当一条成年的靛蓝巨龙施放一个情绪法术或使用一个持续时间为2轮或更长的情绪效果时，该法术或效果的持续时间增加1轮。

Whenever an adult indigo dragon casts an emotion spell or uses an emotion effect with a duration of 2 rounds or more, the duration of that spell or effect is increased by 1 round.

Adult Indigo Dragon.publicNotes:
靛蓝巨龙是社交达人，热爱庆祝与派对。他们喧闹、热情、有趣，总是充满能量与灵体。他们浮夸而大胆，无论在动作还是情感上皆是如此。他们体验着超乎寻常的强烈情绪，毫不羞怯或犹豫地表达自我，并鼓励周围的人同样坦率与自由地表达。靛蓝巨龙富有魅力、善良且好客，令人愉悦并能迅速结交朋友；他们常在所遇见的形形色色之人心中留下正面印象，哪怕只是擦肩而过。

靛蓝巨龙冲动、热烈且赤子之心；他们尽情取乐，只为快乐本身，并毫无私心、也不指望回报或人情地，把同样的幸福与兴奋传递给周围的人。靛蓝巨龙相信享乐不该有门槛，因此派对应当是安全、包容的空间：对所有人开放、免费入场、无需邀请。他们到处都有联系——有时是朋友，有时是朋友的朋友，有时只是他们在派对上结识、并给对方留下好印象的人。他们能混进任何派对，而有他们在场，派对总会更精彩。

靛蓝巨龙非常认真地对待狂欢——不是在语气上，而是在重要性上。他们派对开得又猛又勤，但总是以让派对延续为目标，而非为了短期尽兴而将其搅黄。他们努力创造奇观、活动与消遣，让快乐在派对进行的过程中不断扩散，让整场活动的强度逐步累积，而不是一次性爆发。他们鼓励、烘托并影响派对，就像他们影响派对参与者一样，但绝不越界。他们不会哄骗、操纵或施压其他狂欢者或旁观者。事实上，他们认为那种行为极其没品，并相信这种不当举止会毁掉派对——他们既不使用这种粗鄙手段，也不允许在场的其他人这么做。他们明白不是所有人都喜欢派对，或都能在公开的采集场合里感到自在；他们会努力让这类来客放松并感到受欢迎，但不会强迫他们参与；快乐与同意必须并行。靛蓝巨龙尊重同伴的界限，哪怕他们并不理解那些界限。

尽管他们热爱那种传统老派的狂欢，派对并不是靛蓝巨龙所做的一切。他们白天努力工作，然后用轰轰烈烈的方式庆祝当天的成功。对一条靛蓝巨龙而言，一天最好的收尾，就是喧腾的喜悦与好同伴。

靛蓝巨龙偏爱人群、城市以及城市环境——任何大量人群聚集之处。他们喜欢朋友与邻里的多样性，因为观点与信念的差异能带来各种全新而美妙的庆祝与体验。靛蓝巨龙更愿意合作与协作，而不是独自做事；一旦久坐不动便会坐立不安、浑身不舒服。他们在大多数聚居地都很合群，虽然常因对近邻造成打扰而惹人不快，但也经常在更广泛的社群中留下好印象。作为友善且乐于助人的社群成员，他们几乎每晚都会举办派对并主持采集。这种排场与喧闹并不总是受欢迎。即便如此，也无法否认靛蓝巨龙的存在对社群有益。他们常担任深度参与的社群代表；总是第一个自愿组织社群活动，而他们的庆祝有助于强化社群羁绊并促进当地经济发展。

Celegrateia

Celegrateia 因其保持着举办最长持续庆祝活动的记录，而在其他靛蓝巨龙之中备受敬重。他们那场臭名昭著的“无尽盛宴”已经持续了令人震惊的 157 之年——而且还在继续！这场令人印象深刻的派对至今仍未触及高潮。

Dealing With Troublemakers

大多数靛蓝巨龙不喜欢暴力，也很少诉诸暴力——没有什么比一场血腥斗殴更能迅速毁掉庆祝了！他们更倾向于用三寸不烂之舌与友谊之手去面对捣乱者；当善意失效、无辜的生命受到威胁时，他们才会升级为以魔法手段进行操控与维持和平。

Lavish Lairs

大多数靛蓝巨龙过着富丽生活，居住在富庶城镇与城市中宏伟、广阔的庄园里。他们的家宅为举办奢华舞会、派对与其他活动而建，能够容纳大量来访人群。许多还拥有辽阔的庭园，并雇用成群的厨师、清洁工、乐师与艺人。

Indigo dragons are social butterflies who love to celebrate and party. They're boisterous, exuberant, fun, and always full of energy and spirit. They're bombastic and bold, both in action and in emotion. They experience larger-than-life emotions, express themselves without shame or hesitation, and encourage the same openness and freedom of expression in those around them. Charismatic, kind, and welcoming, indigo dragons are charming and make friends quickly, often leaving a positive impression on the various people they meet, even if only in passing.

Indigo dragons are impulsive, passionate, and pure-hearted, making merry for the joy of it and spreading that same happiness and excitement to those around them with no ulterior motives or favors expected in return. Indigo dragons believe there should be no barriers to fun, and thus parties should be safe, inclusive spaces open to all free of charge and without invitation. They have contacts everywhere—sometimes friends, sometimes friends of friends, and sometimes someone they simply met at a party upon whom they made a good impression. They can get into any party, and parties are always better for their presence.

Indigo dragons take revelry very seriously—not in tone but in importance. They party hard and often but always aim to make a party endure rather than disrupt it for short-term enjoyment. They endeavor to create spectacles, events, and diversions that spread joy over the course of the party, building intensity over an entire event rather than all at once. They encourage, build up, and influence a party, just as they do partygoers, but never cross the line. They don't cajole, manipulate, or pressure fellow revelers or bystanders. In fact, they consider such acts in incredibly bad taste and believe such misbehavior spoils a party—they don't utilize such crass methods and don't allow others present to do so either. They know that not everyone likes to party or is comfortable in public gatherings, and while they aim to make such visitors feel at ease and welcome, they don't force them to participate; fun and consent go hand in hand. Indigo dragons respect the boundaries of their fellows, even if they don't understand them.

Despite their love of a good old-fashioned revel, partying isn't all indigo dragons ever do. They work hard throughout the day, then celebrate the day's successes with a bang. To an indigo dragon, a day is best ended with riotous joy and good company.

Indigo dragons prefer crowds, cities, and urban environments—anywhere lots of people gather. They favor variety in their friends and neighbors since diversity in perspectives and beliefs leads to all sorts of new and wonderful celebrations and experiences. Indigo dragons prefer to cooperate and collaborate rather than work alone, and they get fidgety and uncomfortable whenever they are sedentary. They fit in well in most settlements, often making a good impression on their wider communities despite causing disruptions for their close neighbors. While friendly and helpful community members, they throw frequent parties and host gatherings nearly every night. This spectacle and ruckus aren't always welcome. Even so, there's no denying that the presence of an indigo dragon is good for the community. They often serve as deeply involved community representatives; they're always the first to volunteer to organize community events, and their celebrations are good for strengthening community bonds and growing the local economy.

Celegrateia

Celegrateia is deeply respected among their fellow indigo dragons thanks to the fact that they hold the record for hosting the longest- running celebration. Their infamous "Fathomless Fete" has lasted an astonishing 157 years—and counting! The impressive party has yet to reach its climax.

Dealing With Troublemakers

Most indigo dragons dislike violence and resort to it rarely—nothing ruins a celebration faster than a bloody fight! They prefer to confront troublemakers with a silver tongue and the hand of friendship, escalating to magical methods of manipulation and peacekeeping when kindness fails and innocent lives are threatened.

Lavish Lairs

Most indigo dragons live in splendor, residing in magnificent, sprawling manors in prosperous towns and cities. Their homes are built to host lavish galas, parties, and other events and accommodate large crowds of visitors. Many have expansive grounds and employ legions of cooks, cleaners, musicians, and entertainers.

D'marti Tixima.name: 德玛蒂·提西玛 D'marti Tixima
D'marti Tixima.tokenName: 德马蒂·提西玛 D'marti Tixima
D'marti Tixima.publicNotes:
欢迎！你可能光看我还看不出来，但我游历过群岛各处：从触手河的源头一路到最远的霰弹岛，再返回。我以冒险者为业，在我的时代里也曾赚过、也曾失去过一两笔财富。你运气不错：我眼下正处在财富的间隙，这就是为什么我能为你提供这趟精彩的旅行——造访金穗的所有聚居地，并由一位老练探险家奉上无价的评述相伴。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.y25DHBxDhLKgnZuA]{海妖：河之宝石} 的导游

Welcome! You might not be able to tell just by looking at me, but I've traveled all over the Isles: from the source of the Tentacle River all the way to the farthest Buckshot Isle and back. I'm an adventurer by trade, and I've made and lost a fortune or two in my time. You're in luck: I'm between fortunes at the moment, which is why I'm able to offer you this amazing tour—a visit to all of Goldcrop's settlements, accompanied by the invaluable commentary of a seasoned explorer.

Tour guide for @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.y25DHBxDhLKgnZuA]{Kraken: The River Jewel}
