Ancient Amber Dragon (Spellcaster).name: 远古琥珀巨龙（施法者） Ancient Amber Dragon (Spellcaster)
Ancient Amber Dragon (Spellcaster).tokenName: 远古琥珀巨龙 Ancient Amber Dragon

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60英尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Sand Vision.name: 沙之视野 Sand Vision
Sand Vision.description:
沙子不会妨碍琥珀巨龙的视野；它们会无视沙子造成的隐蔽（状态）。

Sand doesn't impair an amber dragon's vision; they ignore the concealed condition from sand.

Electric Shock.name: 电击 Electric Shock
Electric Shock.description:
触发 一个相邻的生物以近战攻击对一只琥珀巨龙造成伤害，或一个生物以近战徒手攻击对一只琥珀巨龙造成伤害。

效果 覆盖在琥珀巨龙身上的薄层压电沙被压缩，对触发的生物施以电击。触发的生物受到 @Damage[3d12[electricity]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:37|basic:true] 豁免）。若触发的攻击使用金属武器，则触发的生物在其豁免上承受–1环境减值；若该生物由金属制成（如铁魔像），则其豁免承受–2环境减值。在大成功或大失败的失败时，他们还会成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 持续1轮，因为电击使他们的身体痉挛。

Trigger An adjacent creature deals damage to an amber dragon with a melee attack, or a creature deals damage to an amber dragon with a melee unarmed attack.

Effect The thin layer of piezoelectric sand coating the amber dragon is compressed, electrocuting the triggering creature. The triggering creature takes @Damage[3d12[electricity]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:37|basic:true] save). If the triggering attack was with a metal weapon, the triggering creature takes a –1 circumstance penalty on their saving throw, and if the creature is made of metal (like an iron golem), they take a –2 circumstance penalty on their saving throw. On a critical failure, they're also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round, as their body seizes from the electric shock.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
巨龙吐息出一阵压电沙暴，在一个@Template[type:cone|distance:50]内造成@Damage[17d6[electricity]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:37|basic:true] 豁免）。它无法再次使用吐息武器，直到[[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 轮}后。

The dragon breathes a blast of piezoelectric sand that deals @Damage[17d6[electricity]] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50] (@Check[type:reflex|dc:37|basic:true] save). It can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

Compelling Rumor.name: 引人注目的谣言 Compelling Rumor
Compelling Rumor.description:
琥珀巨龙用关于某个生物的流言蜚语和传闻来轰炸90英尺内的一个生物。目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]。此外，其中一个传闻会在目标身上生效，可能迫使其在其下个回合执行以下之一：接近你、逃离（如同其具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑（状态）}状态）、放开其正握持之物、倒下变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}，或原地不动。在完成该任务前，它不能延迟，也不能进行任何反应动作。该生物必须进行一次@Check[type:will|dc:37]意志豁免，效果如下。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物在1轮内为措手不及，且不会遵从命令。

失败 该生物在2轮内为措手不及，且在其下个回合的第一个动作中，该生物必须用一个单动作来服从该传闻。

大成功或大失败 该生物在3轮内为措手不及，且必须在其下个回合用其所有动作来服从该传闻。

The amber dragon bombards a creature within 90 feet with gossip and rumors circulating about them. The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]. Additionally, one of these rumors takes hold of the target, potentially forcing them to do one of the following on their next turn: approach you, run away (as if it had the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} condition), release what it's holding, drop @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, or stand in place. It can't delay or take any reactions until it has completed this task. The creature must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:37] save with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is off-guard for 1 round and doesn't follow the command.

Failure The creature is off-guard for 2 rounds and for the first action on its next turn, the creature must use a single action to obey the rumor.

Critical Failure The creature is off-guard for 3 rounds and must use all its actions on its next turn to obey the rumor.

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术先天法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Translate (Self Only).name: （仅自己） Translate (Self Only)
Translate (Self Only).description:
当你施放该法术时，目标能够理解其正在听到或阅读的一种语言的含义。这不会让其理解密码、以隐喻方式表达的语言等（由GM酌情裁定）。若目标能听到多种语言且知道这一点，它可以选择要理解哪种语言；否则，随机选择其中一种语言。

升阶（3环） 目标也可以说这种语言。

升阶（4环） 你最多可以以10个生物为目标，且目标也可以说这种语言。

The target can understand the meaning of a single language it is hearing or reading when you cast the spell. This doesn't let it understand codes, language couched in metaphor, and the like (subject to GM discretion). If the target can hear multiple languages and knows that, it can choose which language to understand; otherwise, choose one of the languages randomly.

Heightened (3rd) The target can also speak the language.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures, and targets can also speak the language.

Message.name: 信息 Message
Message.description:
你悄声念出词句，但它们不会从你口中发出，而是直接传入目标的耳中。其他人听到你的话并不会比你平常只动嘴唇时更清楚，但目标听到你的话就如同他们正站在你身旁一样。

目标可以以反应动作给出简短回应，或者如果他们愿意，也可以在其下一回合以自由动作（）回应，但他们必须能够看见你并且在射程内才能这样做。如果他们回应，他们的回应会像原始信息一样直接传入你的耳中。

强化（3环） 法术的射程增加至500英尺。

You mouth words quietly, but instead of coming out of your mouth, they're transferred directly to the ears of the target. While others can't hear your words any better than if you normally mouthed them, the target can hear your words as if they were standing next to you.

The target can give a brief response as a reaction, or as a free action on their next turn if they wish, but they must be able to see you and be within range to do so. If they respond, their response is delivered directly to your ear, just like the original message.

Heightened (3rd) The spell's range increases to 500 feet.

Clairaudience.name: 千里耳 Clairaudience
Clairaudience.description:
你在射程内的一个位置创造一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形的}漂浮耳朵（即使它在你的视觉线或效果线之外）。它无法移动，但你可以通过这只耳朵听见，如同使用你正常的听觉感官。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} floating ear at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect). It can't move, but you can hear through the ear as if using your normal auditory senses.

Suggestion.name: 建议 Suggestion
Suggestion.description:
你甜言蜜语的话语令生物难以抗拒。你向目标提出一项行动建议，该建议的措辞必须让目标觉得这是合乎逻辑的行动方案，且不能是自我毁灭的，也不能明显违背目标的自身利益。目标必须尝试进行一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你试图控制它。

成功 目标不受影响，并认为你只是正常地和它说话，而不是对它施放法术。

失败 目标立刻遵从你的建议。该法术的持续时间为1分钟，或直到目标完成一项有限的建议、或该建议变得自我毁灭、或出现其他明显的负面效果为止。

大失败 如同失败，但基础持续时间为1小时。

升阶（第8环） 你可以以最多10个生物为目标。

Your honeyed words are difficult for creatures to resist. You suggest a course of action to the target, which must be phrased in such a way as to seem like a logical course of action to the target and can't be self-destructive or obviously against the target's self-interest. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and knows you tried to control it.

Success The target is unaffected and thinks you were talking to them normally, not casting a spell on them.

Failure The target immediately follows your suggestion. The spell has a duration of 1 minute, or until the target has completed a finite suggestion or the suggestion becomes self-destructive or has other obvious negative effects.

Critical Failure As failure, but the base duration is 1 hour.

Heightened (8th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Sand Trap.name: 沙陷阱 Sand Trap
Sand Trap.description:
频率 每分钟一次

效果 巨龙将压电沙呼出至50尺内的一个 @Template[type:line|distance:10|width:10]{10×10尺方形}。该区域为困难地形。第一次有生物进入该区域时，沙子会释放电击冲击，造成 @Damage[17d6[electricity]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:37|basic:true] 豁免）。1分钟后，沙子仍然存在，但不再带有电荷。

Frequency once per minute

Effect The dragon exhales piezoelectric sand into a @Template[type:line|distance:10|width:10]{10 by 10-foot square} within 50 feet. The area is difficult terrain. The first time a creature enters the area, the sand releases an electric shock, dealing @Damage[17d6[electricity]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:37|basic:true] save). After 1 minute, the sand remains, but it no longer holds an electric charge.

Piezoelectric Glyph.name: 压电刻纹 Piezoelectric Glyph
Piezoelectric Glyph.description:
每当琥珀巨龙施放守卫雕文时，他们可以使用压电物质来创造它。这些雕文总是以接触触发，并且会自动包含一个该守卫雕文所能容纳的最高等级的电爪法术，而无需琥珀巨龙施放电爪。此外，巨龙还可以选择将该雕文作为文字或图像置于一段文本之中，作为常规放置选项之外的额外选择。

Whenever an amber dragon casts glyph of warding, they can create it using piezoelectric substances. These glyphs always trigger by touch and automatically contain a shocking grasp spell of the highest level the glyph of warding could hold, without the amber dragon needing to cast shocking grasp. Additionally, the dragon can choose to place the glyph as a word or image within a text, in addition to the usual placement options.

Sending.name: 发送 Sending
Sending.description:
你向该生物发送一条不超过25个词的心灵信息，而它可以立即用自己不超过25个词的信息回应。

You send the creature a mental message of 25 words or fewer, and it can respond immediately with its own message of 25 words or fewer.

Glyph of Warding.name: 守护徽记 Glyph of Warding
Glyph of Warding.description:
你通过将一个敌对法术束缚进一个符文来制作一个陷阱。在施放该法术时，你还要施放一个更低法术等级的法术并将其储存在符文中。被储存的法术必须用不超过3个动作即可施放，具有敌对效果，并以一个生物为目标或具有一个区域。你可以为符文设置口令、触发条件或两者兼有。任何未说出口令或符合触发条件的生物，只要移动、打开或触碰目标容器，或进入目标区域，便会启动该符文，释放其中的有害法术。

一旦有法术被储存在符文中，符文将获得该法术的所有特征。若被储存的法术以一个或多个生物为目标，它将以触发符文的生物为目标。若它具有区域，则该区域以触发符文的生物为中心。“守卫符文”的持续时间在符文被触发时结束。该符文视为一个魔法陷阱，使用你的法术DC来进行察觉检定以注意到它，以及盗术检定以解除它；两项检定都要求尝试者必须受训才能成功。

你可以解消“守卫符文”。你在同一时间能维持生效的“守卫符文”的最大数量等于你的施法能力调整值。

You craft a trap by binding a hostile spell into a symbol. While Casting this Spell, you also Cast a Spell of a lower spell level to store in the glyph. The stored spell must take 3 actions or fewer to cast, have a hostile effect, and target one creature or have an area. You can set a password, a trigger, or both for the glyph. Any creature that moves, opens, or touches the target container or enters the target area that doesn't speak the password or that matches the trigger activates the glyph, releasing the harmful spell within.

Once a spell is stored in the glyph, the glyph gains all the traits of that spell. If the stored spell targets one or more creatures, it targets the creature that set off the glyph. If it has an area, that area is centered on the creature that set off the glyph. Glyph of warding's duration ends when the glyph is triggered. The glyph counts as a magical trap, using your spell DC for both the Perception check to notice it and the Thievery check to disable it; both checks require the creature attempting them to be trained in order to succeed.

You can Dismiss glyph of warding. The maximum number of glyphs of warding you can have active at a time is equal to your spellcasting ability modifier.

Truespeech (Constant).name: 真言（恒定） Truespeech (Constant)
Truespeech (Constant).description:
目标能够理解所有词语而不受语言影响，并且也能说其他生物的语言。当处于由多种生物组成的混合群体中时，每当目标说话，它都可以选择一个生物，并用该生物能够理解的语言说话，即使目标并不知道那是什么语言。

强化（第7环） 持续时间为8小时。

The target can understand all words regardless of language and also speak the languages of other creatures. When in a mixed group of creatures, each time the target speaks, it can choose a creature and speak in a language that creature understands, even if the target doesn't know what language that is.

Heightened (7th) The duration is 8 hours.

Arcane Prepared Spells.name: 奥术预备法术 Arcane Prepared Spells

Electric Arc.name: 电弧 Electric Arc
Electric Arc.description:
一道闪电弧从一个目标跃向另一个。你造成等于1d4加上你的施法能力调整值的电击伤害。

强化（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

An arc of lightning leaps from one target to another. You deal electricity damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Ghost Sound.name: 幽灵之声 Ghost Sound
Ghost Sound.description:
你创造一个由简单声音构成的听觉幻象，其最大音量相当于四个正常人同时喊叫。声音从你在射程内指定的一个方格中发出。你无法创造可辨识的词语或其他复杂的声音（例如音乐）。

升阶（3环） 射程增加至60尺。

升阶（5环） 射程增加至120尺。

You create an auditory illusion of simple sounds that has a maximum volume equal to four normal humans shouting. The sounds emanate from a square you designate within range. You can't create intelligible words or other intricate sounds (such as music).

Heightened (3rd) The range increases to 60 feet.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 120 feet.

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你专注于目标物体，敞开心智以感知魔法灵光。施放完成后，你会知道该物品是否具有魔法；如果具有魔法，你还会得知其魔法学派。

如果该物体是幻象，只有当该效果的等级低于你的阅读灵光法术的等级时，你才会侦测到这一点。

升阶（3环） 你最多可以以10个物体为目标。

升阶（6环） 你可以以任意数量的物体为目标。

You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras. When the casting is complete, you know whether that item is magical, and if it is, you learn the school of magic.

If the object is illusory, you detect this only if the effect's level is lower than the level of your read aura spell.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to 10 objects.

Heightened (6th) You can target any number of objects.

Sigil.name: 徽记 Sigil
Sigil.description:
你无害地将你独特的魔法印记（约1平方英寸大小）置于选定的目标生物或物体上。该印记可以是可见或不可见的，你可以通过使用一个交互动作接触目标，将其从一种状态变为另一种状态。该印记可以通过5分钟的工作擦洗或刮除。如果它在一个生物身上，它会在一周的过程中自然褪去。印记褪去前的时间会随着你升高的等级而增加。

升高（第3） 该印记改为在1个月后褪去。

升高（第5） 该印记改为在1年后褪去。

升高（第7） 该印记永不褪去。

You harmlessly place your unique magical sigil, which is about 1 square inch in size, on the targeted creature or object. The mark can be visible or invisible, and you can change it from one state to another by using an Interact action to touch the target. The mark can be scrubbed or scraped off with 5 minutes of work. If it's on a creature, it fades naturally over the course of a week. The time before the mark fades increases depending on your heightened level.

Heightened (3rd) The sigil instead fades after 1 month.

Heightened (5th) The sigil instead fades after 1 year.

Heightened (7th) The sigil never fades.

Charm.name: 魅惑 Charm
Charm.description:
对目标而言，你的话语如蜜般甜美，你的面容仿佛沐浴在梦幻般的薄雾之中。它必须尝试一次意志豁免；如果你或你的盟友近期威胁过它或对其使用过敌对动作，则该豁免获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。如果你对目标使用敌对动作，该法术结束。当法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己曾被魅惑，除非它对你的友谊或你说服它采取的动作与它的预期相冲突；这意味着你可能可以通过世俗手段说服目标继续做你的朋友。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且意识到你试图魅惑它。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害之物而非魅惑，除非它辨识该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友善}。如果它原本为友善，则变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于助人}。它不能对你使用敌对动作。

大失败 目标对你的态度变为乐于助人，并且它不能对你使用敌对动作。

升阶（4环） 持续时间持续至你下次进行每日准备。

升阶（8环） 持续时间持续至你下次进行每日准备，且你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Fear.name: 恐惧 Fear
Fear.description:
你在目标心中种下恐惧；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} 并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}，持续 1 轮。

升阶（3环） 你可以以最多五个生物为目标。

You plant fear in the target; it must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to five creatures.

Illusory Object.name: 幻象物体 Illusory Object
Illusory Object.description:
你创造一个静止物体的虚幻视觉影像。整个影像必须完全容纳于该法术的区域内。该物体看起来会自然地动起来，但不会发出声音或产生气味。例如，水看起来会从虚幻的瀑布倾泻而下，但会是无声的。

任何接触该影像的生物，或使用“搜寻”动作来检查它的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻术。

升阶（2环）你的影像会发出适当的声音，产生正常的气味，触感也与真实一致。该法术获得听觉（特征）。持续时间增加至1小时。

升阶（5环）同2环版本，但持续时间为无限。

You create an illusory visual image of a stationary object. The entire image must fit within the spell's area. The object appears to animate naturally, but it doesn't make sounds or generate smells. For example, water would appear to pour down an illusory waterfall, but it would be silent.

Any creature that touches the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (2nd) Your image makes appropriate sounds, generates normal smells, and feels right to the touch. The spell gains the auditory trait. The duration increases to 1 hour.

Heightened (5th) As the 2nd-level version, but the duration is unlimited.

Blur.name: 朦胧术 Blur
Blur.description:
目标的形态看起来模糊不清。它变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。由于此效果的本质仍使目标的位置显而易见，目标不能利用此隐蔽来躲藏或潜行。

The target's form appears blurry. It becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}. As the nature of this effect still leaves the target's location obvious, the target can't use this concealment to Hide or Sneak.

Phantom Crowd.name: 魅影人群 Phantom Crowd
Phantom Crowd.description:
一群与当地相称、紧密聚集的人形生物出现，面向你，并对你说的任何话都大声赞同。触碰人群中一员的生物，或以探索动作检查人群的生物，可以尝试识破你的幻觉。对任何尚未识破该幻觉者而言，人群属于困难地形。

当你花费1个或更多动作来施放一项咏唱法术，或进行一项包含表演检定的行动时，你也可以将维持该法术作为该动作的一部分来进行。

升阶（+1） 人群在射程内额外占据一个10尺见方的方格。这个额外方格不必与该法术创造的任何其他方格相邻。它可以重叠，但在重叠的方格中没有额外效果。

A tightly packed crowd of humanoids appropriate to the area appear, facing you and agreeing loudly with anything you say. A creature that touches a member of the crowd or makes a Seek action to examine the crowd can attempt to disbelieve your illusion. The crowd is difficult terrain for anyone who hasn't disbelieved the illusion.

When you spend 1 or more actions to cast a composition spell or to perform an activity that includes a Performance check, you can also Sustain this Spell as part of that action.

Heightened (+1) The crowd occupies an additional 10-foot square in range. The additional square doesn't need to be adjacent to any other square created by the spell. It can overlap, but there's no additional effect in the overlapped squares.

Translate.name: 请提供需要翻译的英文原文（或上传图片/粘贴文本）。如果有特定术语表（glossary）也请一并提供。 Translate
Translate.description:
当你施放该法术时，目标可以理解它正在听到或阅读的一种语言的含义。这不会让它理解密码、以隐喻方式表达的语言等（由GM酌情裁定）。如果目标能听到多种语言并且知道这一点，它可以选择要理解哪种语言；否则，随机选择一种语言。

升阶（3环） 目标也可以说该语言。

升阶（4环） 你可以以最多10个生物为目标，并且目标也可以说该语言。

The target can understand the meaning of a single language it is hearing or reading when you cast the spell. This doesn't let it understand codes, language couched in metaphor, and the like (subject to GM discretion). If the target can hear multiple languages and knows that, it can choose which language to understand; otherwise, choose one of the languages randomly.

Heightened (3rd) The target can also speak the language.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures, and targets can also speak the language.

Confusion.name: 困惑 Confusion
Confusion.description:
你用奇异的冲动扰乱你的目标，使其随机行动。效果由目标的意志豁免决定。你可以解消该法术。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标语无伦次，并且为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} 状态，持续1分钟。它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免以结束该困惑。

大失败 目标获得 Confused 状态，持续1分钟，且无法通过豁免提前结束。

升阶（8环） 你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

You befuddle your target with strange impulses, causing it to act randomly. The effects are determined by the target's Will save. You can Dismiss the spell.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target babbles incoherently and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 minute. It can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns to end the confusion.

Critical Failure The target is Confused for 1 minute, with no save to end early.

Heightened (8th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Freedom of Movement.name: 行动自如 Freedom of Movement
Freedom of Movement.description:
你排斥那些会妨碍生物或减缓其移动的效果。在此法术效果期间，目标无视那些会给予其速度环境减值的效果。当其尝试以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱} 来摆脱使其 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚} 的效果时，其自动成功，除非该效果具有魔法性质且其等级高于「行动自如」法术。

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher level than the freedom of movement spell.

Hallucination.name: 幻觉 Hallucination
Hallucination.description:
目标会持续将一件事物侦测为另一件事物、无法侦测到实际存在的事物，或侦测到并不存在的事物，但这不会改变其信念。你选择适用上述哪一种效果，并决定幻觉的具体内容。例如，你可以让目标把所有精灵看成是人类、无法侦测到其兄弟的存在、即使怀表不在身上也看见心爱的怀表在自己身上，或看见城镇中心有一座高塔。目标可以尝试一次初始意志豁免，效果如下。每当他们进行“搜寻”或直接与该幻觉进行交互时，他们也会获得一次意志豁免来识破该幻觉。例如，目标每次与精灵交互、意外撞到其兄弟、试图查看怀表或研究高塔时，都可以尝试识破该幻觉。在GM决定的情境下（例如目标试图攀爬那座不存在的高塔），目标可以带有巨大的环境加值来尝试识破。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物会感知到你所选择的内容，直到它识破为止，但它知道幻觉是什么。

失败 该生物会感知到你所选择的内容，直到它识破为止。

大失败 该生物会感知到你所选择的内容，直到它识破为止，并且它信任其虚假的感官，在识破的豁免上承受-4环境减值。

强化（6环） 选择以下之一：目标至多10个生物；或将该法术的持续时间改为直到你下一次进行每日准备。

强化（8环） 选择以下之一：目标任意数量的生物；或将该法术的持续时间改为无限。

The target consistently detects one thing as another, can't detect something that's there, or detects something that's not there, though it doesn't alter their beliefs. You choose which of these effects applies, and you determine the specifics of the hallucination. For example, you could make the target see all elves as humans, be unable to detect the presence of their brother, see their beloved pocket watch on their person even when it isn't, or see a tower in the center of town. The target can attempt an initial Will save, with effects below. They also receive a Will save to disbelieve the hallucination every time they Seek or directly interact with the hallucination. For example, the target could attempt to disbelieve the hallucination each time they interacted with an elf, bumped into their brother accidentally, tried to check their pocket watch, or studied the tower. The target can attempt to disbelieve with a large circumstance bonus in situations determined by the GM, such as if the target attempted to climb the nonexistent tower.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature perceives what you chose until it disbelieves, but it knows what the hallucination is.

Failure The creature perceives what you chose until it disbelieves.

Critical Failure The creature perceives what you chose until it disbelieves, and it trusts its false senses, taking a -4 circumstance penalty to saves to disbelieve.

Heightened (6th) Choose to either target up to 10 creatures or change the spell's duration to until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) Choose to either target any number of creatures or change the spell's duration to unlimited.

Mind Probe.name: 心智探查 Mind Probe
Mind Probe.description:
你将自己的思绪投射进一个生物的心智中，筛选信息。你会获得目标的记忆与知识，除非它以意志豁免将你抵挡。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 在法术持续时间内的每一轮，你可以维持法术来提出一个不同的问题，并尝试揭示答案。对于每个问题，目标都可以针对你的法术DC尝试一次欺瞒检定；若目标成功，你不会得知答案；若为大成功或大失败中的大成功，目标会给出一个你相信为真实的错误答案。一旦你向目标问过某个特定问题，再次询问该问题，即使是以另一次对心智探针的独立施放，也会产生相同结果。

大成功或大失败中的大失败 同失败，且目标在针对你的问题进行欺瞒检定时承受-4环境减值。

You cast your thoughts through a creature's mind, sifting for information. You access the target's memories and knowledge unless it fends you off with a Will save.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure Each round of the spell's duration, you can Sustain the Spell to ask a different question and attempt to uncover the answer. For each question, the target can attempt a Deception check against your spell DC; if the target succeeds, you don't learn the answer, and on a critical success, the target gives you a false answer that you believe is truthful Once you've asked the target a given question, asking it again, even with a separate casting of mind probe, produces the same result.

Critical Failure As failure, and the target takes a -4 circumstance penalty to Deception checks against your questions.

Chain Lightning.name: 连锁闪电 Chain Lightning
Chain Lightning.description:
你向目标释放一道强力的闪电，造成8d12电击伤害。目标必须尝试一次基础反射豁免。电击会弧跳至距离第一个目标30英尺内的另一名生物，再跳至距离该目标30英尺内的另一名生物，如此继续。你可以在任意点结束这条链。你不能将同一名生物作为目标超过一次，并且你必须对所有目标具有效果线。只掷骰一次伤害，并将其应用于每个目标（根据其豁免结果适当地减半或加倍）。如果任一目标在其豁免中获得重击成功，则这条链结束。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d12。

You discharge a powerful bolt of lightning at the target, dealing 8d12 electricity damage. The target must attempt a basic Reflex save. The electricity arcs to another creature within 30 feet of the first target, jumps to another creature within 30 feet of that target, and so on. You can end the chain at any point. You can't target the same creature more than once, and you must have line of effect to all targets. Roll the damage only once, and apply it to each target (halving or doubling as appropriate for its saving throw outcome). The chain ends if any one of the targets critically succeeds at its save.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d12.

Dominate.name: 支配 Dominate
Dominate.description:
你夺取对目标的指挥权，强迫其服从你的命令。如果你下达明显自我毁灭的命令，目标不会行动，直到你下达新的命令为止。该效果取决于其意志豁免。

大成功或大失败：成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标因抵抗你的命令而成为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

失败 你控制目标。它获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled}状态，但它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次意志豁免。若成功，则该法术结束。

大成功或大失败：失败 同失败，但只有当你给予它一条违背其本性的全新命令时（例如杀死其盟友），目标才会进行新的豁免。

升阶（10环） 持续时间为无限。

You take command of the target, forcing it to obey your orders. If you issue an obviously self-destructive order, the target doesn't act until you issue a new order. The effect depends on its Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} as it fights off your commands.

Failure You control the target. It gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled} condition, but it can attempt a Will save at the end of each of its turns. On a success, the spell ends.

Critical Failure As a failure, but the target receives a new save only if you give it a new order that is against its nature, such as killing its allies.

Heightened (10th) The duration is unlimited.

Scrying.name: 占卜探知 Scrying
Scrying.description:
你神奇地监视你选择的一名生物。探知的运作方式如同@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.zvKWclOZ7A53DObE]{Clairvoyance}，但你获得的影像更不精确，不足以用于传送和类似法术。你并非在500尺内的某个固定地点创造一只眼睛，而是创造一只显现在目标正上方的眼睛。你可以通过名字选择目标，或通过触摸其某件随身物品或其身体的一部分来选择目标。若你从未亲自见过该目标，探知的DC降低2；若你并不知道目标的身份（例如你在案发现场找到某个未知生物的獠牙），则DC改为降低10。探知的效果取决于目标的意志豁免。

大成功或大失败 该法术失败，且目标在1周内暂时免疫。目标还会瞥见你，并得知与你之间的大致距离与方向。

成功 该法术失败，且目标在1天内暂时免疫。

失败 该法术成功。

大成功或大失败 该法术成功，且若目标移动，这只眼睛会跟随目标移动，每轮最多移动60尺。

You magically spy on a creature of your choice. Scrying works like @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.zvKWclOZ7A53DObE]{Clairvoyance}, except that the image you receive is less precise, insufficient for teleport and similar spells. Instead of creating an eye in a set location within 500 feet, you instead create an eye that manifests just above the target. You can choose a target either by name or by touching one of its possessions or a piece of its body. If you haven't met the target in person, scrying's DC is 2 lower, and if you are unaware of the target's identity (perhaps because you found an unknown creature's fang at a crime scene), the DC is instead 10 lower. The effect of scrying depends on the target's Will save.

Critical Success The spell fails and the target is temporarily immune for 1 week. The target also gains a glimpse of you and learns its rough distance and direction from you.

Success The spell fails and the target is temporarily immune for 1 day.

Failure The spell succeeds.

Critical Failure The spell succeeds, and the eye follows the target if it moves, traveling up to 60 feet per round.

Illusory Creature.name: 幻象生物 Illusory Creature
Illusory Creature.description:
你创造一个大型或更小体型生物的幻象影像。它会产生相应的声音与气味，并且触感上足够逼真。如果你与影像之间的距离曾经超过500尺，则该法术结束。

该影像不能说话，但你可以用你的动作通过该生物说话，而法术会适当地将你的声音伪装成相应的样子。你可能需要进行一次欺瞒或表演检定来模仿该生物，由GM决定。当你试图模仿某个特定的人，并与认识那个人的对象互动时，这尤其常见。

在战斗中，该幻象每回合可以使用2个动作，而你在维持法术时它才会使用这些动作。它的攻击掷骰使用你的法术攻击掷骰，并且它的AC使用你的法术DC。它的豁免调整值等于你的法术DC - 10。它足够具有实体感，以至于可以夹击其他生物。如果该影像被一次攻击命中或一次豁免失败，则该法术结束。

该幻象可以通过让目标相信幻象的攻击是真实的来造成伤害，但除此之外它无法直接影响物理世界。若该虚幻生物以一次打击命中，则目标受到等同于1d4加上你的施法关键属性调整值的精神伤害。这是一个精神效果。该幻象的打击为非致命。如果该伤害与怪物影像不相符——例如，一个虚幻的大型巨龙只造成5点伤害——GM可能允许目标立即尝试一次察觉检定以识破该法术。若目标认为相关的抗力与弱点适用，则它们会照常适用，由GM裁定。例如，若幻象挥舞战锤并攻击一个对钝击伤害具有抗力的生物，则该生物会受到更少的精神伤害。然而，虚幻伤害不会使再生失效，也不会触发其他需要特定伤害类型的效果。GM应记录该幻象造成的虚幻伤害。

任何接触该影像的生物，或使用搜索动作检查它的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻象。当一个生物识破该幻象时，它会从自己因此幻象所受的一半伤害中恢复（若有），并且不再受到其造成的任何后续伤害。

升阶（+1） 该影像的打击伤害增加1d4，并且你能创造的生物最大体型提高一级（至多为超巨型）。

You create an illusory image of a Large or smaller creature. It generates the appropriate sounds, smells, and feels believable to the touch. If you and the image are ever farther than 500 feet apart, the spell ends.

The image can't speak, but you can use your actions to speak through the creature, with the spell disguising your voice as appropriate. You might need to attempt a Deception or Performance check to mimic the creature, as determined by the GM. This is especially likely if you're trying to imitate a specific person and engage with someone that person knows.

In combat, the illusion can use 2 actions per turn, which it uses when you Sustain the Spell. It uses your spell attack roll for attack rolls and your spell DC for its AC. Its saving throw modifiers are equal to your spell DC - 10. It is substantial enough that it can flank other creatures. If the image is hit by an attack or fails a save, the spell ends.

The illusion can cause damage by making the target believe the illusion's attacks are real, but it cannot otherwise directly affect the physical world. If the illusory creature hits with a Strike, the target takes mental damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. This is a mental effect. The illusion's Strikes are nonlethal. If the damage doesn't correspond to the image of the monster-for example, if an illusory Large dragon deals only 5 damage-the GM might allow the target to attempt an immediate Perception check to disbelieve the spell. Any relevant resistances and weaknesses apply if the target thinks they do, as judged by the GM. For example, if the illusion wields a warhammer and attacks a creature resistant to bludgeoning damage, the creature would take less mental damage. However, illusory damage does not deactivate regeneration or trigger other effects that require a certain damage type. The GM should track illusory damage dealt by the illusion.

Any creature that touches the image or uses the Seek action to examine it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion. When a creature disbelieves the illusion, it recovers from half the damage it had taken from it (if any) and doesn't take any further damage from it.

Heightened (+1) The damage of the image's Strikes increases by 1d4, and the maximum size of creature you can create increases by one (to a maximum of Gargantuan).

Project Image.name: 项目图像 Project Image
Project Image.description:
你投射出一个自己的幻象影像。你必须保持在该影像的射程内，并且如果在任何时候你无法看见该影像，法术结束。每当你施放一个法术（其区域不是“散发”）时，你可以使该法术效果从你自己或该影像之一作为起源点。由于该影像是幻术，它无法从法术中受益，尽管法术的视觉显现仍会出现。该影像具有与你相同的AC与豁免。若它被一次攻击命中或豁免失败，法术结束。

强化（+2） 你能够维持法术的最大持续时间提高至10分钟。

You project an illusory image of yourself. You must stay within range of the image, and if at any point you can't see the image, the spell ends. Whenever you Cast a Spell other than one whose area is an emanation, you can cause the spell effect to originate from either yourself or the image. Because the image is an illusion, it can't benefit from spells, though visual manifestations of the spell appear. The image has the same AC and saves as you. If it is hit by an attack or fails a save, the spell ends.

Heightened (+2) The maximum duration you can Sustain the Spell increases to 10 minutes.

Spell Turning.name: 法术反转 Spell Turning
Spell Turning.description:
该防护系法术会将对你施放的法术反射回其施法者。当一个法术以你为目标时，你可以花费一个反应动作来尝试反射它。这使用反制该法术的规则，但如果成功反制，该效果会被转回施法者身上。无论反制尝试是否成功，法术反转随后结束。法术反转无法影响那些不是以目标为对象的法术（例如区域法术）。如果法术反转将一个法术反射回一名同样处于法术反转效果下的施法者，他们的法术反转可以尝试将他们自己的法术再次反射回你；如果他们这么做，他们的反制尝试自动成功。

This abjuration reflects spells cast at you back at their caster. When a spell targets you, you can spend a reaction to attempt to reflect it. This uses the rules for counteracting the spell, but if the spell is successfully counteracted, the effect is turned back on the caster. Whether or not the counteract attempt is successful, spell turning then ends. Spell turning can't affect spells that aren't targeted (such as area spells). If spell turning reflects a spell back at a caster who is also under the effect of spell turning, their spell turning can attempt to reflect their own spell back at you again; if they do so, their counteract attempt automatically succeeds.

Ancient Amber Dragon (Spellcaster).publicNotes:
琥珀巨龙是诸多巨龙之中最友善、最平易近人的一类。它们富有魅力、热情好客，并且爱交朋友。它们喜欢聊天，精通多种语言，总能知道些有用的事情。它们是出色的倾听者，总是耐心倾听、温和鼓励，促使与之交往的人分享自己觉得有必要说出口的一切。琥珀巨龙常被视为无害的长舌之徒，但它们远比人们给予的鸣谢更狡猾、更善于操纵。

琥珀巨龙不只是爱管闲事的健谈家；它们是善于操弄的谣言贩子，最爱做的事莫过于探听并散播流言。它们对自己选择传播的闲话是否属实毫无兴趣。事实上，传闻越是离奇，它们越可能把它传出去。它们只在乎自我娱乐，并且总乐意为逐渐变得乏味的流言添点润色或扭转一下。它们是不知疲倦的搅局者，丝毫不在意自己的话可能毁掉多少人的人生。

琥珀巨龙偏好生活在生物密集的环境中。通常这意味着都市环境，但它们住在人类城市或矮人要塞的概率，并不比住在妖精飞地或一片健谈动物的林地来得更低。它们不在乎周围环境，只在乎身边有多少聪明的、而且最重要的是健谈的生物。许多琥珀巨龙会在很长一段time里久坐不动。它们喜欢在某个地区安顿下来，尽可能吸收那里的文化、人群与时事新闻。只要还能从自己的“老巢”里摘取更多流言，它们就会留下；当它们厌倦了，便会离开，去寻找一个新的地区并悄然渗入其中。要想抓住一条琥珀巨龙的注意力，一个地区必须人口稠密，其居民也必须容易受操纵。小村落与城镇不足以让琥珀巨龙长久取乐；而那些政府施行过多禁令、可能导致市民噤声或变得过度多疑的地方，同样无法留住它们。

琥珀巨龙明白言语的力量，而且大多数都偏爱文字。与多数巨龙相比，它们更可能收集并囤积稀有书籍、卷轴与典籍；在它们眼中，古老的羊皮纸与雕刻物比黄金与宝石更有价值。它们往往会用守护雕文与其他防护符印来保护自己珍贵的私人藏书。

尽管很少有琥珀巨龙愿意承认，但它们是耐心而聪明的间谍，会观察、倾听并操纵身边发生的事件，以收集最劲爆的故事与八卦来传播。最年轻的琥珀巨龙最在意流言、新闻、时事，以及那些短命者的生活——这些总在不断变化。年长的琥珀巨龙则偏爱更持久的传闻：黑暗而古老的历史、禁忌文本、神话与传奇；以及那些足以掀翻君主、引发社会革命、并制造其他重大事件或动荡的流言。

因圭斯提亚尔

因圭斯提亚尔，“活的法典”，是一条隐居的琥珀巨龙，维持着物质位面上规模最大的图书馆之一。在其中，古老文本与禁忌巨著被藏在远离窥探视线之处——并置于巨龙的守护凝视之下。因圭斯提亚尔允许外来者向他请愿以求入内；那些失败者将再也不会被人见到。

秘密宝藏

琥珀巨龙最珍视的财物，是它们只对自己保守的秘密。大多数会把这些秘密牢记于心，但它们对文本的偏爱意味着许多会把秘密写下来，作为文本或加密账册保存。也有一些会保留一件与秘密相关联的物体，使其作为可触摸的记忆触发。

情报掮客

有些琥珀巨龙会当情报掮客。它们免费散播简单有趣的流言来引诱客户，然后对更敏感的情报与传闻收费。大多数只接受以秘密与个人信息作为报酬——这正好可以转卖给其他客户！

Amber dragons are among the friendliest and most approachable of dragons. They're charismatic, welcoming, and adore making friends. They love to chat, are fluent in numerous languages, and always know something useful. They're excellent listeners, always ready with a patient ear and kind encouragement, prodding those they socialize with to share whatever they feel the need to. Often seen as harmless gossips, amber dragons are far more cunning and manipulative than they're given credit for.

Amber dragons are more than chatty busybodies; they're manipulative rumormongers who adore nothing more than learning and spreading rumors. They have no interest in whether the gossip they choose to spread is true. In fact, the more outlandish a rumor, the more likely they are to spread it. They care for their own entertainment and are always willing to add a bit of embellishment or a twist to rumors that are getting a little stale. They're persistent meddlers who care not for the lives their words could ruin.

Amber dragons prefer to live in populous environments. Usually, this means urban environments, but they're just as likely to live within a human city or a dwarven fortress as they are in a fey enclave or a grove of talkative animals. They care not for their surroundings but for the number of intelligent and, most importantly, talkative creatures around them. Many are sedentary for large portions of time. They love to settle in a region and absorb all they can of its culture, people, and current events. So long as there are more rumors to pluck from their home, they stay, moving on when they grow bored to find a new region into which to insinuate themselves. To hold an amber dragon's attention, a region must be densely populated, and its inhabitants must be susceptible to manipulation. Hamlets and towns aren't big enough to keep an amber dragon amused for long, nor are places whose government enforces too many prohibitions that could cause its citizens to clam up or be overly suspicious.

Amber dragons understand the power of words, and most have a fondness for the written word. They're more likely to collect and hoard rare books, scrolls, and texts than most dragons, placing a higher value on old parchment and carvings than they do on gold and gemstones. They're prone to protecting their valuable personal libraries with glyphs of warding and other protective sigils.

While few amber dragons would admit it, they're patient and clever spies who watch, listen, and manipulate events around them to collect the juiciest tales and gossip to spread. The youngest amber dragons care most for gossip, news, current events, and the lives of the short-lived, which are constantly changing. Older amber dragons favor more lasting rumors, dark and ancient history, forbidden texts, myths, and legends, as well as rumors that could topple monarchs, cause a social revolution, and produce other major events or upheavals.

Inguistial

Inguistial, the "Living Libram," is a reclusive amber dragon who maintains one of the largest libraries on the Material Plane. Within, ancient texts and forbidden tomes are kept far from prying eyes—and under the dragon's protective gaze. Inguistial allows outsiders to petition him for entry; those who fail are never seen again.

Secret Hoards

An amber dragon's most prized possessions are the secrets they keep to themselves. Most keep these secrets memorized, but their fondness for texts means many write them down, keeping them as texts or coded ledgers. Some instead keep an object tied to the secret, which functions as a tactile memory trigger.

Information Brokers

Some amber dragons work as information brokers. They spread simple and entertaining rumors for free to tempt clients, then charge for more sensitive information and rumors. Most accept payment only in secrets and personal information— perfect for selling to other clients!
Ancient Amber Dragon (Spellcaster).prototypeToken: 远古琥珀巨龙 Ancient Amber Dragon

Friend Lello.name: 朋友莱洛 Friend Lello
Friend Lello.publicNotes:
当我说夸克是镇上最好的人时，朋友莱洛（男性班诺格宗教领袖）肯定被我忽略了。正如他的名字所暗示的那样，他非常友好——几乎友好得让人招架不住。他和他的门徒属于一个名为“三度之人”的教派，该教派相信从迷雾谷消失的人们生活在迷雾森林深处的乐土中。“三度之人”喜欢列队进入森林跳舞狂欢——而且不知为何，他们似乎总能再次走出来。与社区中大多数居民不同，朋友莱洛和他的教派期待第三次大规模失踪，并试图通过他们的歌声、舞蹈和祈祷来加速其到来。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.iQEjf0W3ZV0aDyBo]{迷雾谷：迷雾中的谜团}

When I said that Cuarc was the nicest person in town, Friend Lello (male bannog religious leader) must have slipped my mind. As his name would suggest, he's quite friendly—almost overwhelmingly so. He and his disciples are members of a sect called the Third Timers, which believes that the people who disappeared from Mistvale live in a paradise deep in the foggy woods. The Third Timers like to parade into the forest to dance and revel—and against all odds, they always seem to come out again. Unlike most of the community's residents, Friend Lello and his sect look forward to a third mass disappearance and seek to hasten it through their songs, dances, and prayers.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.iQEjf0W3ZV0aDyBo]{Mistvale: Mystery in the Mist}
Friend Lello.blurb:
第三次计时者教派的男性班诺格宗教领袖
male bannog religious leader of the Third Timers sect

Flier.name: 飞行者 Flier
Flier.description:
它获得25尺的飞行速度。

It gains a fly Speed of 25 feet.

Independent.name: 独立 Independent
Independent.description:
在一次遭遇中，如果你不指挥你的魔宠，它每轮仍会获得1个动作。通常，你仍然决定它如何花费那个动作，但是GM可能会裁定你的魔宠会选择自己的战术，而不是执行你偏好的动作。若是像@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.familiar-abilities.Item.9PsptrEoCC4QdM23]{Valet}或类似需要指挥的能力、如果你能够骑乘你的魔宠，或类似情况，则此规则不适用。

In an encounter, if you don't Command your familiar, it still gains 1 action each round. Typically, you still decide how it spends that action, but, the GM might determine that your familiar chooses its own tactics rather than performing your preferred action. This doesn't work with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.familiar-abilities.Item.9PsptrEoCC4QdM23]{Valet} or similar abilities that require a command, if you're capable of riding your familiar, or similar situations.

Second Opinion.name: 第二意见 Second Opinion
Second Opinion.description:
你的魔宠是你的学术知己。

尽管是仆从，你的魔宠在其每个回合开始时获得1个反应动作（），它只能用该反应动作（）通过 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{援助} 你进行一次回忆知识技能检定，且该检定必须使用它拥有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.familiar-abilities.Item.jevzf9JbJJibpqaI]{熟练} 魔宠能力的那项技能（它仍然必须如常为援助反应动作（）做准备以帮助你）。

它在使用这些技能援助你时，会自动在其检定中成功；如果你在相关技能上是大师，则它会自动大成功。你的魔宠必须拥有熟练能力才能选择此项。

Your familiar is your academic confidant.

Despite being a minion, your familiar gains 1 reaction at the start of its turns, which it can use only to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{Aid} you on a Recall Knowledge skill check for a skill in which it has the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.familiar-abilities.Item.jevzf9JbJJibpqaI]{Skilled} familiar ability (it still has to prepare to help you as normal for the Aid reaction).

It automatically succeeds at its check to Aid you with those skills or automatically critically succeeds if you're a master of the skill in question. Your familiar must have the skilled ability to select this.

Skilled (Occultism).name: 熟练（秘学） Skilled (Occultism)
Skilled (Occultism).description:
选择一个除杂技或隐匿以外的技能。你的魔宠在该技能上的调整值等于你的等级加上你的关键施法能力调整值，而非仅等于你的等级。你可以反复选择此能力，每次选择不同的技能。

Choose a skill other than Acrobatics or Stealth. Your familiar's modifier for that skill is equal to your level plus your key spellcasting ability modifier, rather than just your level. You can select this ability repeatedly, choosing a different skill each time.

Speech.name: 语言 Speech
Speech.description:
它理解并会说一种你所知的语言。

It understands and speaks a language you know.

Echolocation.name: 回声定位 Echolocation
Echolocation.description:
一只星盘翼兽拥有回声定位作为一种精确感官，射程为20英尺。

An astroloptera has echolocation as a precise sense with a range of 20 feet.

Cosmic Insight.name: 宇宙洞见 Cosmic Insight
Cosmic Insight.description:
频率 每天一次

效果 星盘蝶可以窥视不久的未来，给予其主人对某种可能未来的视野。选择一个星盘蝶的主人在接下来1分钟内合理可执行、且需要掷骰1d20的动作，并预先掷该d20。星盘蝶的主人在接下来1分钟内第一次采取该动作时会自动获得该结果；如果他们不希望获得该结果，他们可以改为花费1个带有操作（特征）的动作，通过一连串迅捷手势来驱散厄运；若如此，他们将照常掷与该检定相关的d20。

Frequency Once per day

Effect An astroloptera can peer into the near future, granting their master a vision of a possible future. Select one action that the astroloptera's master could reasonably perform in the next minute that requires rolling a 1d20, and roll that d20 in advance. The astroloptera's master automatically receives that result the first time they take that action within the next minute; if they do not wish to receive that result, they can instead spend 1 action with the manipulate trait to perform a quick series of gestures to ward off ill fortune; if they do so, they instead roll the d20 associated with the check normally.

Orpork Bard.name: 奥波克吟游诗人 Orpork Bard
Orpork Bard.tokenName: 奥尔波克吟游诗人 Orpork Bard
Orpork Bard.prototypeToken: 奥尔波克吟游诗人 Orpork Bard

Young Indigo Dragon.name: 幼年靛蓝巨龙 Young Indigo Dragon
Young Indigo Dragon.tokenName: 幼年靛蓝巨龙 Young Indigo Dragon

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60英尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Celebratory Cheer.name: 庆祝欢呼 Celebratory Cheer
Celebratory Cheer.description:
触发 年轻靛蓝巨龙30英尺内的一名盟友对一名敌人造成重击成功

效果 年轻靛蓝巨龙以一阵令人亢奋、极具感染力的热情来庆祝其盟友的成功。年轻靛蓝巨龙在2轮内对其触发盟友重击成功的那名敌人进行的攻击掷骰获得+1状态加值。若年轻靛蓝巨龙在获得来自欢庆喝彩的加值期间对该敌人造成重击成功，则触发欢庆喝彩的盟友可以使用其反应动作来在2轮内对该敌人进行的攻击掷骰获得+1状态加值。

Trigger An ally within 30 feet of the young indigo dragon critically hits a foe

Effect The young indigo dragon celebrates their ally's success with a heady rush of contagious ardor. The young indigo dragon gains a +1 status bonus on attack rolls against the foe that their triggering ally critically hit for 2 rounds. If the young indigo dragon critically hits that foe while they have the bonus from Celebratory Cheer, the ally who triggered Celebratory Cheer can use their reaction to gain a +1 status bonus on attack rolls against that foe for 2 rounds.

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Hideous Laughter.name: 骇人狂笑 Hideous Laughter
Hideous Laughter.description:
目标被无法控制的笑声所淹没。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标饱受无法控制的笑声折磨。它无法使用反应动作。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} 且无法使用反应动作。

大失败 目标倒地 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} 且在1轮内无法使用动作或反应动作。随后它承受失败效果。

The target is overtaken with uncontrollable laughter. It must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is plagued with uncontrollable laugher. It can't use reactions.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and can't use reactions.

Critical Failure The target falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and can't use actions or reactions for 1 round. It then suffers the failure effects.

Charm.name: 魅惑 Charm
Charm.description:
对目标而言，你的话语如蜜般甜美，你的面容仿佛沐浴在梦幻的薄雾中。它必须尝试一次意志豁免；若你或你的盟友最近威胁过它或对其使用过敌对动作，则在该豁免上获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。若你对目标使用敌对动作，则该法术结束。当法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己被魅惑了，除非它对你的友谊或你说服它采取的动作与它的预期相冲突；这意味着你有可能通过世俗手段说服目标继续做你的朋友。

大成功或大失败：成功 目标不受影响，并意识到你试图魅惑它。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害的东西而非魅惑，除非它辨识了该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友善}。若它原本已是友善，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于助人}。它不能对你使用敌对动作。

大成功或大失败：失败 目标对你的态度变为乐于助人，且它不能对你使用敌对动作。

升阶（4环） 持续时间持续至你下次进行每日准备。

升阶（8环） 持续时间持续至你下次进行每日准备，且你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Infectious Enthusiasm.name: 传染性热情 Infectious Enthusiasm
Infectious Enthusiasm.description:
带着魔法的热忱，你鼓励自己把事情完成，并将你的动力分享给你的盟友。你获得+1状态加值，可由你选择适用于攻击掷骰、意志豁免或基于魅力的技能检定之一。在法术的持续时间内，一名在你施放该法术时观察到你并且当时位于30英尺内的盟友，可以以单动作（具有专注（特征））获得你所选择的同样加值，持续至其下个回合开始。

在社交场合使用该法术影响他人通常被视为失礼之举；如果检定的对象观察到你施放该法术，则会使基于魅力的技能所获得的益处失效。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.nU4SxAk6XreHUi5h]{法术效果：传染性热情}

With enchanted gusto, you encourage yourself to get things done and share your motivation with your allies. You gain a +1 status bonus to your choice of attack rolls, Will saves, or Charisma-based skill checks. During the spell's duration, an ally who observed you Casting this Spell and was within 30 feet when you did so can take a single action, which has the concentrate trait, to gain the same bonus you chose until the start of its next turn.

Using this spell to influence someone in a social situation is typically considered a faux pas, negating the benefit on Charisma-based skills if the subject of the check observed you casting the spell.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.nU4SxAk6XreHUi5h]{Spell Effect: Infectious Enthusiasm}

Tangle Vine.name: 缠结藤蔓 Tangle Vine
Tangle Vine.description:
一根藤蔓从虚空中出现，从你手中弹射而出并缠向目标。对目标进行一次法术攻击掷骰。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{法术效果：缠绕藤蔓}

大成功或大失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）}，并在1轮内其速度受到–10尺环境减值。它可以尝试进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}对抗你的法术DC，以移除该减值与禁足（状态）。

成功 目标在1轮内其速度受到–10尺环境减值。它可以尝试进行逃脱对抗你的法术DC，以移除该减值。

失败 目标不受影响。

升阶（2环） 效果持续2轮。

升阶（4环） 效果持续1分钟。

A vine appears from thin air, flicking from your hand and lashing itself to the target. Attempt a spell attack roll against the target.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{Spell Effect: Tangle Vine}

Critical Success The target gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} condition and takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} against your spell DC to remove the penalty and the immobilized condition.

Success The target takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape against your spell DC to remove the penalty.

Failure The target is unaffected.

Heightened (2nd) The effects last for 2 rounds.

Heightened (4th) The effects last for 1 minute.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
靛蓝巨龙吐出旋转并扩散的荆棘与靛蓝花朵爆风，在一个@Template[type:cone|distance:30]内造成@Damage[9d6[piercing]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:26|basic:true] 豁免）。它无法在[[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4轮}内再次使用吐息武器。

The indigo dragon breathes a swirling and spreading blast of thorns and indigo flowers that deals @Damage[9d6[piercing]] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] (@Check[type:reflex|dc:26|basic:true] save). It can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙族狂乱 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
靛蓝巨龙以任意顺序进行两次爪击打击和一次翼打击。

The indigo dragon makes two claw Strikes and one wing Strike in any order.

Ride the High.name: 驰骋高空 Ride the High
Ride the High.description:
频率 每轮一次

触发 靛蓝巨龙正处于一个有益的情绪效果影响下，该效果的持续时间至少为2轮，且该效果的持续时间将要结束

需求 靛蓝巨龙尚未对触发的情绪效果使用过 Ride the High

效果 靛蓝巨龙将情绪的激涌发挥到极致，为了让随之而来的益处不至于消退，它把这种感受在心中再多留片刻。巨龙将触发的情绪效果在其自身上的持续时间（但不包括任何其他生物）延长1轮。若该效果因除正常持续时间到期之外的任何原因而结束，例如被驱散或被反制，巨龙不能使用 Ride the High 来继续该效果。

Frequency once per round

Trigger The indigo dragon is under the effect of a beneficial emotion effect with a duration of at least 2 rounds, and the effect's duration would end

Requirements The indigo dragon hasn't used Ride the High on the triggering emotion effect

Effect The indigo dragon rides the rush of emotion to its fullest, holding the feelings in their heart for just a little while longer in order to keep the benefits that come with that emotion from fading away. The dragon extends the duration of the triggering emotion effect on themself (though not any other creatures) by 1 round. The dragon can't use Ride the High to continue the effect if it ends for any reason other than its normal duration expiring, such as if it is dispelled or counteracted.

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙裔动能 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
当靛蓝巨龙用一次打击造成大成功或大失败时，他们会为自己的吐息武器充能。

When the indigo dragon scores a critical hit with a Strike, they recharge their Breath Weapon.

Young Indigo Dragon.publicNotes:
靛蓝巨龙是社交达人，热爱庆祝与派对。他们喧闹、热情、好玩，总是充满能量与灵体。他们张扬而大胆，无论在动作还是情感上皆是如此。他们体验到超越常人的强烈情绪，毫不羞怯或犹豫地表达自我，并鼓励身边的人同样坦率、自由地表达。靛蓝巨龙富有魅力、善良而好客，十分讨喜，也很快就能交到朋友；他们常常会给遇见的各色人等留下积极印象，即便只是擦肩而过。

靛蓝巨龙冲动、热烈而赤诚，只为快乐本身而尽情欢闹，并毫无额外图谋、也不期待回报或人情地，把同样的幸福与兴奋传递给周围的人。靛蓝巨龙相信享乐不该有任何门槛，因此派对应当是安全、包容的空间，对所有人免费开放、无需邀请。他们到处都有联络人——有时是朋友，有时是朋友的朋友，有时则是某次派对上偶然认识、被他们留下好印象的人。他们能进任何派对，而有他们在的派对总会更精彩。

靛蓝巨龙非常认真地对待狂欢——不是在语气上，而是在重要性上。他们派对开得又猛又勤，但总是致力于让派对延续下去，而不是为了短暂的快感而破坏它。他们努力创造壮观场面、节目与消遣，让快乐在派对过程中不断扩散，在整场活动中逐步堆叠强度，而非一次性爆发。他们会鼓励、烘托并影响一场派对，就像他们对待派对参与者一样，但绝不越界。他们不会哄骗、操纵或施压其他狂欢者或旁观者。事实上，他们认为这类行为品味极差，并相信这种失德会毁掉派对——他们不使用这种粗鄙手段，也不允许在场的其他人如此行事。他们知道并非所有人都喜欢派对或能自在地融入公共聚会；他们会尽力让这类来访者感到放松与受欢迎，但不会强迫他们参与；快乐与同意密不可分。靛蓝巨龙尊重同伴的界限，即使他们并不理解这些界限。

尽管他们热爱那种经典的狂欢，派对也并非靛蓝巨龙做的全部。他们白天努力工作，然后用一场轰轰烈烈的庆祝来结束一天的成功。对靛蓝巨龙而言，一天最好的收尾方式就是喧腾的欢喜与良伴相随。

靛蓝巨龙偏好人群、城市与都市环境——任何大量人群聚集之处。他们喜欢朋友与邻里之间的多样性，因为观点与信念的差异能带来各种新奇而美妙的庆典与体验。靛蓝巨龙更愿意合作与协作，而不是独自工作；只要他们久坐不动，就会变得坐立难安、浑身不自在。他们在大多数聚居地都很合拍，尽管常因打扰近邻而引发不便，却往往仍能在更广泛的社群中留下好印象。作为友善且乐于助人的社群成员，他们几乎每晚都要办派对、主持聚会。这种盛况与喧闹并不总受欢迎。即便如此，也无法否认靛蓝巨龙的存在对社群大有裨益。他们常担任深度参与的社群代表；总是第一个自愿组织社区活动，而他们的庆祝有助于强化社群羁绊并带动本地经济成长。

Celegrateia

Celegrateia 在同类靛蓝巨龙中备受敬重，因为他们保持着举办最长持续庆典的记录。他们臭名昭著的“无尽盛会”已持续了惊人的 157 之年——而且还在继续！这场令人叹服的派对至今仍未迎来高潮。

Dealing With Troublemakers

大多数靛蓝巨龙不喜欢暴力，也很少诉诸暴力——没有什么比血腥斗殴更能迅速毁掉一场庆祝！他们更愿意用三寸不烂之舌与友谊之手来对付捣乱者；当善意失效、无辜生命受到威胁时，才会升级为具有操控与维持和平性质的魔法手段。

Lavish Lairs

大多数靛蓝巨龙过着奢华生活，居住在繁荣城镇与城市中宏伟、开阔的庄园里。他们的家被建造出来就是为了举办奢华舞会、派对及其他活动，并能容纳大批访客。许多庄园拥有广阔的庭园地，并雇佣成群的厨师、清洁工、乐师与艺人。

Indigo dragons are social butterflies who love to celebrate and party. They're boisterous, exuberant, fun, and always full of energy and spirit. They're bombastic and bold, both in action and in emotion. They experience larger-than-life emotions, express themselves without shame or hesitation, and encourage the same openness and freedom of expression in those around them. Charismatic, kind, and welcoming, indigo dragons are charming and make friends quickly, often leaving a positive impression on the various people they meet, even if only in passing.

Indigo dragons are impulsive, passionate, and pure-hearted, making merry for the joy of it and spreading that same happiness and excitement to those around them with no ulterior motives or favors expected in return. Indigo dragons believe there should be no barriers to fun, and thus parties should be safe, inclusive spaces open to all free of charge and without invitation. They have contacts everywhere—sometimes friends, sometimes friends of friends, and sometimes someone they simply met at a party upon whom they made a good impression. They can get into any party, and parties are always better for their presence.

Indigo dragons take revelry very seriously—not in tone but in importance. They party hard and often but always aim to make a party endure rather than disrupt it for short-term enjoyment. They endeavor to create spectacles, events, and diversions that spread joy over the course of the party, building intensity over an entire event rather than all at once. They encourage, build up, and influence a party, just as they do partygoers, but never cross the line. They don't cajole, manipulate, or pressure fellow revelers or bystanders. In fact, they consider such acts in incredibly bad taste and believe such misbehavior spoils a party—they don't utilize such crass methods and don't allow others present to do so either. They know that not everyone likes to party or is comfortable in public gatherings, and while they aim to make such visitors feel at ease and welcome, they don't force them to participate; fun and consent go hand in hand. Indigo dragons respect the boundaries of their fellows, even if they don't understand them.

Despite their love of a good old-fashioned revel, partying isn't all indigo dragons ever do. They work hard throughout the day, then celebrate the day's successes with a bang. To an indigo dragon, a day is best ended with riotous joy and good company.

Indigo dragons prefer crowds, cities, and urban environments—anywhere lots of people gather. They favor variety in their friends and neighbors since diversity in perspectives and beliefs leads to all sorts of new and wonderful celebrations and experiences. Indigo dragons prefer to cooperate and collaborate rather than work alone, and they get fidgety and uncomfortable whenever they are sedentary. They fit in well in most settlements, often making a good impression on their wider communities despite causing disruptions for their close neighbors. While friendly and helpful community members, they throw frequent parties and host gatherings nearly every night. This spectacle and ruckus aren't always welcome. Even so, there's no denying that the presence of an indigo dragon is good for the community. They often serve as deeply involved community representatives; they're always the first to volunteer to organize community events, and their celebrations are good for strengthening community bonds and growing the local economy.

Celegrateia

Celegrateia is deeply respected among their fellow indigo dragons thanks to the fact that they hold the record for hosting the longest- running celebration. Their infamous "Fathomless Fete" has lasted an astonishing 157 years—and counting! The impressive party has yet to reach its climax.

Dealing With Troublemakers

Most indigo dragons dislike violence and resort to it rarely—nothing ruins a celebration faster than a bloody fight! They prefer to confront troublemakers with a silver tongue and the hand of friendship, escalating to magical methods of manipulation and peacekeeping when kindness fails and innocent lives are threatened.

Lavish Lairs

Most indigo dragons live in splendor, residing in magnificent, sprawling manors in prosperous towns and cities. Their homes are built to host lavish galas, parties, and other events and accommodate large crowds of visitors. Many have expansive grounds and employ legions of cooks, cleaners, musicians, and entertainers.
Young Indigo Dragon.prototypeToken: 幼年靛蓝巨龙 Young Indigo Dragon

G'mayun Pirate.name: 格玛尤恩海盗 G'mayun Pirate

Cuarc.name: 夸克 Cuarc
Cuarc.publicNotes:
Cuarc（女性 xotlxotl 法师）或许是整个 Mistvale 里最好的人了，不过这也说明不了多少。她对我一直非常友好，而且作为一名法师，她总是需要我能提供的那种零零碎碎的小东西。话虽如此，她也有她那一套古怪之处。每天早上，她都会拎着一个鼓鼓囊囊的袋子走进 Mist，然后两手空空地回来。她声称自己这么做是为了“让森林有东西吃”，但她断然拒绝透露袋子里装的是什么。不管那是什么，我都非常反对让森林挨饿，尤其是在我来访期间！

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.iQEjf0W3ZV0aDyBo]{Mistvale：迷雾中的谜团}

Cuarc (female xotlxotl wizard) is perhaps the nicest person in all of Mistvale, which isn't saying a lot. She has been nothing but friendly to me, and as a wizard, she always needs the kind of odds and ends that I can supply. That said, she has her share of eccentricities. Each morning she brings a plump bag into the Mist and returns empty-handed. She claims that she does it to "keep the forest fed," although she flatly refuses to reveal what's in the bag. Whatever it is, I'm quite against letting the forest go hungry, especially while I'm visiting!

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.iQEjf0W3ZV0aDyBo]{Mistvale: Mystery in the Mist}
Cuarc.blurb:
雌性 xotlxotl 法师与森林的餍食者
female xotlxotl wizard and feeder of the forest

Lasha.name: 拉莎 Lasha
Lasha.publicNotes:
艾尔德的崇拜者非常独立，在你问他们之前，你永远无法判断他们对这件事的看法；但事实证明，尽管艾尔达蒙擂台战斗在更大的聚居地里越来越受欢迎，僧侣们其实并不怎么欣赏。僧侣们觉得这太过于追求场面；而且即使艾尔达蒙喜欢战斗、也不会在这些战斗中受伤，这些擂台仍然把神圣之事商业化了。他们认可个人之间的艾尔达蒙战斗；只是他们不喜欢那种有付费观众的大型擂台的概念。

尊重他们的意愿，这座小镇从未建造过你在其他一些城市里会看到的那种艾尔达蒙擂台，但这并没有阻止精明的赫姆·巴库——拉莎——真的打造了一座地下擂台。拉莎擂台的存在与位置是公开的秘密，所以就算是新来的人，也很容易找到洞穴入口；在那里，这位蝙蝠形态的巴库在一处巨大的地下洞窟里建立了一个出乎意料地舒适的场所，配套设施比你想象的还要多。他的丈夫希丝纽，一位尼克忒拉小妖精（特征）——他们看起来也许都像蝙蝠妖精，但别把他们搞混；尼克忒拉比赫姆·巴库要小得多——负责提供食物与饮品，并且是位极佳的主人。有些客人甚至更为了饭菜而来，而不是为了娱乐；如果这对伴侣愿意，他们很可能也能把一家旅店经营得相当成功。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.bpeAiPmv1sOnhiuh]{山脊：山岳圣所}

Eld worshipers are so independent that you can never tell their opinion on the matter until you ask them, but it turns out that the monks don't really appreciate eldamon arena battles, despite their growing popularity in larger settlements. They feel like it's too much spectacle, and even though eldamon enjoy fighting and don't get hurt during these battles, these arenas commercialize the sacred. They appreciate personal eldamon battles; they just don't like the idea of a big arena with paid spectators.

Respecting their wishes, the town never built an eldamon arena like the ones you'll see in some other cities, but that didn't stop the enterprising heme bacoo Lasha from making an underground arena—literally. The existence and location of Lasha's Arena are an open secret, so it's easy enough for even a newcomer to find the cave entrance, where the bat-shaped bacoo has set up a surprisingly comfortable establishment in a large subterranean cavern with more amenities than you might expect. His husband, Sithniu, a nyktera sprite—they might both look like bat fey, but don't get them confused; nykteras are a lot smaller than heme bacoo—is in charge of providing food and drink and is an excellent host. Some patrons even come for the meal more than the entertainment, and it's likely the couple could run a successful inn instead if that's what they wanted.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.bpeAiPmv1sOnhiuh]{Crest: The Mountain Sanctum}
Lasha.blurb:
男性 血红素 巴库 地下 艾尔达蒙 竞技场 主办人
male heme bacoo subterranean eldamon arena impresario

River Captain Sharrak.name: 河道船长夏拉克 River Captain Sharrak
River Captain Sharrak.tokenName: 河流船长沙拉克 River Captain Sharrak
River Captain Sharrak.publicNotes:
议会事实上的领袖是河船船长沙拉克。她在议会中领导着一个由五名河船船长组成的投票集团，并以在一切之上为河民的利益而战为荣。即便面对日益猖獗的海盗活动，她仍反对对河道进行任何海军监管，坚持认为河船船长们能够照顾好自己。事实上，她和她的盟友确实把自己照顾得很好。沙拉克是克拉肯最富有的人之一。有些人私下说沙拉克自己也涉足了些许海盗行当（但不是我；我可从不这么私语）。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.y25DHBxDhLKgnZuA]{克拉肯：河之明珠}

The de facto head of the council is River Captain Sharrak. She leads a five-member river captain voting bloc on the council and prides herself on fighting for river folk's interests above all. Even in the face of increasing piracy, she's resistant to any naval oversight of the river, insisting that river captains can take care of themselves. Indeed, she and her allies take care of themselves very well. Sharrak is one of the wealthiest people in Kraken. Some whisper that Sharrak dabbles in a bit of piracy herself (but not me; I whisper no such thing).

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.y25DHBxDhLKgnZuA]{Kraken: The River Jewel}
River Captain Sharrak.blurb:
女性重装钻机长
female hardriggan captain
River Captain Sharrak.prototypeToken: 河流船长沙拉克 River Captain Sharrak

Wildfire Leshy Rogue.name: 野火莱希游荡者 Wildfire Leshy Rogue
Wildfire Leshy Rogue.tokenName: 野火莱什伊 游荡者 Wildfire Leshy Rogue
Wildfire Leshy Rogue.prototypeToken: 野火莱西盗贼 Wildfire Leshy Rogue

Floodtamer.name: 驭洪者 Floodtamer
Floodtamer.publicNotes:
贸易站在技术上是两个村庄合并为一个。乔科里居民往往各自为政，居住在水下的珊瑚结构中。他们的领袖是一位著名的建造者，他设计了一套复杂的活珊瑚闸锁系统，在洪水期间将水导向不同方向，在不扰乱河流生态系统的情况下保护既有城镇免遭灾害。由于一些从未被充分解释的原因，驯洪者从这一标志性成就转而专注于建设贸易站。这位隐居的建筑师很少发表公开声明，但一旦发声便分量十足。

陆地上的建筑约有一半是驯洪者的作品。它们向河中延伸，由珊瑚网络构成，通过泵送水来保持这些建筑及其住户的水分充足。其余建筑则为格迈尤风格，以木材建造。例外是法院——一座花岗岩地标，其墙上雕刻着贸易站的法典。领袖选择在那里执行村庄的法律并仲裁契约争议。非正式地说，所有人都知道驯洪者可以推翻仲裁者马尔科卡恩，但驯洪者并不介入日常事务。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.9CoutgFvImSjZ3kc#tradepost]{贸易站}

Tradepost is technically two villages combined into one. Chochori residents tend to keep to themselves in coral structures underwater. Their leader is a renowned builder who devised a complex series of living coral locks that channel water in different directions during floods, protecting established towns from disaster without disrupting the river's ecosystem. For reasons never fully explained, Floodtamer moved on from such a signature achievement to focus on building up Tradepost. The reclusive architect rarely makes public pronouncements, giving them great weight when they occur.

About half the structures on the land are Floodtamer constructions. They extend into the river and consist of coral networks that pump water to keep them and their occupants hydrated. The remaining buildings are g'mayun in design and built from wood. The exception is the courthouse, a granite landmark with Tradepost's legal code carved into its walls. The leader elected to enforce the village's laws and arbitrate contract disputes there. Unofficially, everyone knows Floodtamer can overrule Arbiter Markokarn, but Floodtamer doesn't get involved in day-to-day business.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.9CoutgFvImSjZ3kc#tradepost]{Tradepost}
Floodtamer.blurb:
忘掉 Chochori 建筑师
vergiss chochori architect

Belledin Muddpool.name: 贝尔丁·马德普尔 Belledin Muddpool
Belledin Muddpool.tokenName: 贝莱丁·穆德普尔 Belledin Muddpool
Belledin Muddpool.publicNotes:
高脚宫廷将其起源追溯到贝莱丁·泥池（男性奥尔波克炼金术师），他曾是海景镇品味学院的教授，后来对神秘学产生了痴迷。大约三十年前，他带领一支远征队前往迷雾谷裂隙，试图取回他认为能够制造迷雾的强大神秘遗物。他声称有某个他称之为“高脚行者”的怪物袭击了他的队伍，而他是唯一返回的人。尽管没有任何证据证明其存在，他仍坚信若不加以阻止，高脚行者将吞噬整个蓝铃镇。大学一度纵容他的说法，出于对他失去队伍的同情，但当他为研究对抗该生物的晦涩魔法而荒废本职工作后，最终将他开除。贝莱丁在一周后从社会中消失，但在此之前，他谋杀了数名学院图书馆员，并盗走了他们所守护的禁书。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.CUe9v3KBxM34L5B5]{迷雾}

The Stilted Court traces its origins to Belledin Muddpool (male orpok alchemist), a former professor at the Academy of Tastes in Seaview who became obsessed with the occult. He led an expedition to Mistvale Rift about thirty years ago to recover what he believed to be a powerful occult artifact that created the mist. Some monster that he claimed to be the Stiltwalker descended upon his team, and he was the only one who returned. He believed that the Stiltwalker would devour all of Bluebell if not stopped, despite possessing no proof it existed. The university humored his claims for a time, sympathetic to the loss of his team, but eventually dismissed him when he neglected his duties in favor of researching obscure magic to combat the creature. Belledin vanished from society a week later, but not before murdering several academy librarians and stealing the restricted tomes they were protecting.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.CUe9v3KBxM34L5B5]{The Mist}
Belledin Muddpool.blurb:
男性欧波克炼金术士
male orpok alchemist

Artokra.name: 阿托克拉 Artokra
Artokra.publicNotes:
最有影响力的议会成员，尽管她本人毫无野心，却几乎可说是议会的领袖，是阿尔托克拉（Artokra），一位克拉格拉克德鲁伊，也是艾尔德（Eld）的祭司。尽管灰烬克拉格拉克以冲动著称，我却发现阿尔托克拉沉着而庄严。她在精神与身体上依旧像任何灰烬克拉格拉克一样灵活，但她拥有如此卓越的感知，以至于她总能让这些特性成为助力而非阻碍。她那稳健的掌控使克雷斯特（Crest）在近期的成长与变迁中仍能延续其非正式体制，这很可能并非夸张之词。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.bpeAiPmv1sOnhiuh]{克雷斯特：山岳圣所}

The most influential council member, who might as well be its leader despite her own lack of ambition, is Artokra, a kragrak druid and priest of the Eld. While ash kragraks have a reputation for being impulsive, I found Artokra to be stoic and dignified. She's still as mentally and physically flexible as any ash kragrak, but she's possessed of such great wisdom that she always makes those traits an asset rather than a hindrance. It's likely not an exaggeration that her steady hand has allowed Crest to continue with its informal system during recent growth and change.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.bpeAiPmv1sOnhiuh]{Crest: The Mountain Sanctum}
Artokra.blurb:
女性克拉格拉克德鲁伊与艾尔德的牧师
female kragrak druid and priest of the Eld

Orpok Mixologist.name: 奥尔波克混酿师 Orpok Mixologist
Orpok Mixologist.tokenName: 奥波克调饮师 Orpok Mixologist
Orpok Mixologist.prototypeToken: 奥尔波克调饮师 Orpok Mixologist

Old Redclay.name: 老红黏土 Old Redclay
Old Redclay.publicNotes:
老红黏土（男性克拉格拉克枪手）是雾泥村最年长的农夫之一。如果你从村子向南走出去，很可能会看到他站在自己某块田地的中央，肩上扛着一支火枪，看起来有点像个岩石做的稻草人。他是破门最受信任的民兵副官，这既因为他敏锐的识人感官，也因为他出色的枪法。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.cYI4YkccGjyFPyLP]{雾泥村：朴素农庄}

Old Redclay (male kragrak gunslinger) is one of Molmist's oldest farmers. If you walk out of the village to the south, you'll probably see him standing in the middle of one of his fields with a musket over his shoulder, looking a bit like a rocky scarecrow. He's Broken Gate's most trusted militia deputy, both for his keen people sense and his crack shooting.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.cYI4YkccGjyFPyLP]{Molmist: Humble Homestead}
Old Redclay.blurb:
男性克拉格拉克枪手兼农夫
male kragrak gunslinger and farmer

Orpok Hamfisted.name: 笨手笨脚的欧波克 Orpok Hamfisted
Orpok Hamfisted.tokenName: 笨手笨脚的奥尔波克 Orpok Hamfisted
Orpok Hamfisted.prototypeToken: 笨手笨脚的奥波克 Orpok Hamfisted

Arguth.name: 阿尔古斯 Arguth
Arguth.publicNotes:
尼尔博格的首席武器匠能够创造并改良魔法武器和护甲。然而，你必须为她提供她施展技艺所需的怪物部件和其他深奥的材料。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.2p0FEYfKak7uy9oZ]{尼尔博格：双城记}

Nilbog's master weaponsmith can create and improve magic weapons and armor. However, you must provide her with the monster parts and other esoteric ingredients she needs to ply her craft.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.2p0FEYfKak7uy9oZ]{Nilbog: A Tale of Two Towns}
Arguth.blurb:
女性克拉格拉克大师武器匠
female kragrak master weaponsmith

Zanaya.name: 扎娜娅 Zanaya
Zanaya.publicNotes:
我是扎娜娅，你们可以叫我本地万事通。我大半辈子都住在鲁姆普兰克，并以熟知每一条街道、每一间店面和每一条小巷而自豪，就像它们都是我的家一样。只要是在鲁姆普兰克发生的事，我都知道！过去几个月里，我一直在整理这份鲁姆普兰克指南，帮助大家更多了解我们这座伟大的城市。让我来把你会遇到的人与地方都告诉你。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.pb3IJrg1AZwdK0Gm]{鲁姆普兰克}的导览员

Zanaya here, and you can call me a local expert on all sorts of topics. I've lived most of my life in Rumplank, and I pride myself on knowing every street, storefront, and back alley, like they were my home. If it happened in Rumplank, I know about it! I've been putting together this guide to Rumplank over the past few months to help folks learn more about our great city. Let me tell you all about the people and places you'll find.

Tour guide for @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.pb3IJrg1AZwdK0Gm]{Rumplank}

Broken Gate.name: 破碎之门 Broken Gate
Broken Gate.publicNotes:
如果说莫尔迷斯特是一个安静的村庄，那很大一部分鸣谢要归功于断门（女性天界巨龙勇士），她是镇上小小民兵的指挥官，并且在上次选举后，成了莫尔迷斯特不情愿的镇长。断门的大多数公务职责包括寻找走失的动物、在格朗克兄弟闹腾时把他们赶走，以及阻止她那位过于热情的副手莉丝——野火莱西——把镇子烧掉。

除了工作之外，断门几乎没有什么个人生活。我的梅羽毛奶奶一直跟我说，我应该约她出去约会，但我奶奶是个积习难改的牵线红娘。就我个人而言，我不认为断门会爱上一个比她自己更不受职责束缚、更不理想主义的人。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.cYI4YkccGjyFPyLP]{莫尔迷斯特：朴素的家园}

If Molmist is a quiet village, a lot of the credit for that goes to Broken Gate (female sky dragon champion), the commander of the town's tiny militia, and, as of the last election, Molmist's reluctant mayor. Most of Broken Gate's official duties consist of finding lost animals, running off the Grunk Brothers when they get rowdy, and keeping her overenthusiastic deputy Liss the wildfire leshy from burning down the town.

Beyond her work, Broken Gate doesn't have much of a personal life. My Granny Mayfeather keeps telling me that I should ask her out on a date, but then my granny is an inveterate matchmaker. Personally, I don't think Broken Gate will ever fall for someone less duty-bound and idealistic than herself.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.cYI4YkccGjyFPyLP]{Molmist: Humble Homestead}
Broken Gate.blurb:
雌性天空巨龙指挥官
 female sky dragon commander

Ekukkatra the Dextrous.name: 灵巧者艾库卡特拉 Ekukkatra the Dextrous
Ekukkatra the Dextrous.tokenName: 灵巧者埃库卡特拉 Ekukkatra the Dextrous
Ekukkatra the Dextrous.publicNotes:
去任何一座山的山脚下，你至少会找到一个迷人的采矿前哨站，那里还有一位很不错的硬掘矮人裁缝。他们以为那些不太习惯寒冷的族裔量身配装为荣。位于颤寒山脉脚下“Shiver Me Shearers”的店主、灵巧的埃库卡特拉（男性硬掘矮人裁缝），甚至还为我的尾巴专门织了一件毛衣！我绝对推荐给任何能成行的人。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.ROrRjBWEaTyteUJj]{黄金山脉}

Go to the base of any of the mountains, and you'll find at least one charming mining outpost with a good hardriggan tailor. They take great pride in outfitting ancestries less accustomed to the cold. Ekukkatra the Dextrous (male hardriggan tailor), owner of Shiver Me Shearers at the foot of the Shivering Mountains, even knitted me a custom sweater for my tail! I definitely recommend them to anyone who can make the trip.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.ROrRjBWEaTyteUJj]{The Golden Mountains}
Ekukkatra the Dextrous.blurb:
男性硬里根裁缝
male hardriggan tailor
Ekukkatra the Dextrous.prototypeToken: 灵巧者埃库卡特拉 Ekukkatra the Dextrous

Pelborii Karnihar.name: 佩尔博里·卡尔尼哈尔 Pelborii Karnihar
Pelborii Karnihar.tokenName: 佩尔博里·卡尼哈尔 Pelborii Karnihar
Pelborii Karnihar.publicNotes:
这里是佩尔博里·卡尼哈尔！我是一位31岁 g'mayun 女性，兴趣是信息、神秘艺术，以及世界事件背后更深层的原因——那些有权势的人有时会试图阻止我们发现这些。哦，还有在海滩上长途散步，不过前提是必须在一条地脉线上并且群星对齐。我是海景城议会的成员，代表非-orpok 的利益，所以我对这座城市有很多话要说。别忘了在即将到来的议会选举中投票给我！

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.FjubW3kX88aRvA0D]{海景城}的导游

Pelborii Karnihar here! I'm a 31-year-old g'mayun woman with interests in information, the mystic arts, and the deeper causes behind world events that powerful folk sometimes try to stop us from finding out. Oh, and long walks on the beach, but only as long as it's on a ley line and the stars are aligned. I'm a member of the Seaview city council, representing non-orpok interests, so I have a lot to say about the city. And don't forget to vote for me in the upcoming council election!

Tour guide for @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.FjubW3kX88aRvA0D]{Seaview}
Pelborii Karnihar.blurb:
女性格玛云安全与非奥波克公民议员
female g’mayun councilor for security and non-orpok citizens
Pelborii Karnihar.prototypeToken: 佩尔博里·卡尔尼哈尔 Pelborii Karnihar

G'mayun Gunslinger.name: 加迈云 枪手 G'mayun Gunslinger
G'mayun Gunslinger.prototypeToken: 加缪恩神枪手 Gamyun Gunslinger

Galtzagorri Swashbuckler.tokenName: 加尔察戈里弄臣剑客 Galtzagorri Swashbuckler
Galtzagorri Swashbuckler.prototypeToken: 加尔察戈里剑客 Galtzagorri Swashbuckler

Hardriggan Rogue.name: 哈德里甘盗贼 Hardriggan Rogue
Hardriggan Rogue.tokenName: 哈德里根游荡者 Hardriggan Rogue

Kragrak Monk.name: 克拉格拉克 武僧 Kragrak Monk
Kragrak Monk.tokenName: 克拉格拉克 武僧 Kragrak Monk
Kragrak Monk.prototypeToken: 克拉格拉克武僧 Kragrak Monk

Amphibious.name: 两栖 Amphibious
Amphibious.description:
它获得25尺的游泳速度（若它已拥有游泳速度，则其速度为25尺）。

It gains a swim Speed of 25 feet (or Speed of 25 feet if it already has a swim Speed).

Gills.name: 鳃 Gills
Gills.description:
你的魔宠长出一套鳃，使其除了能呼吸空气外，也能在水中呼吸。

Your familiar grows a set of gills, allowing it to breathe water in addition to air.

Change Shape.name: 改变形态 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
海泡灵体将其形态从默认形态（无定形的水团）改变为生活在海水中的超小型水栖动物的形态。它可以再次使用此动作以返回其自然形态或采用新的形态。使用改变形态等同于为欺瞒的冒充用途进行一次伪装。海泡灵体的变形会自动战胜用于判断它是否为水栖动物的察觉DC，并且它获得+4状态加值至其欺瞒DC以防止他人看穿其伪装。海泡灵体不会获得新形态的任何特殊能力，只获得其物理形态。作为此变形的一部分，海泡灵体可以将任何专门基于其物理形态的魔宠能力替换为更符合其新形态的能力（但它不能替换两栖或鳃，因为它总是改变为水栖生物，这意味着只有拥有多于最低数量魔宠能力的海泡灵体才会有足够的能力来进行替换）。例如，海泡灵体可能拥有黑暗视觉来体现其深海鮟鱇鱼形态中在黑暗中视物的能力，而当它变形成牡蛎时，会将其替换为掘穴者。

The seafoam changes its shape from its default form as an amorphous blob of water to the form of a Tiny aquatic animal that lives in saltwater. It can use this action again to return to its natural shape or adopt a new shape. Using Change Shape counts as creating a disguise for the Impersonate use of Deception. The seafoam spirit's transformation automatically defeats Perception DCs to determine whether it is an aquatic animal, and it gains a +4 status bonus to its Deception DC to prevent others from seeing through its disguise. The seafoam spirit doesn't gain any special abilities of the new shape, only its physical form. As a part of this transformation, the seafoam spirit can swap out any familiar abilities specifically based on its physical form to better fit its new form (though it can't swap out amphibious or gills, since it always changes to an aquatic creature, which means only a seafoam spirit with more than the minimum number of familiar abilities will have enough abilities to switch them out). For example, a seafoam spirit might have darkvision to represent its form as a deep sea anglerfish with ability to see in the dark that it swaps out for burrower when it transforms into an oyster.

Evaporation.name: 蒸发 Evaporation
Evaporation.description:
在正常情况下，海沫灵体能够从空气、土壤、水坑或其他来源中提取足够的水，以补充它们失去的部分。当处于特别干旱的环境（例如沙漠）时，海沫灵体会经历身体缓慢蒸发。在这种环境中，它们必须每2小时至少摄入1加仑的水，否则就会变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}，直到它们补充回流失的水分为止。若海沫灵体在干旱环境中至少24小时未摄入水，它们会陷入一种迟钝状态，并且在重新补水前不会苏醒。海沫灵体对以脱水为基础的效果具有弱点5。

Under normal conditions, seafoam spirits can extract enough water from the air, soil, puddles, or other sources to replenish what they lose. When in particularly arid environments such as a desert, seafoam spirits experience a slow evaporation of their bodies. They must consume at least 1 gallon of water every 2 hours in such environments or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until they replenish their lost water. If a seafoam spirit goes at least 24 hours in an arid environment without water, they fall into a state of torpor and do not awaken until rehydrated. Seafoam spirits have weakness 5 to effects based on dehydration.

Waveglider.name: 波浪滑翔者 Waveglider
Waveglider.description:
海沫灵体总是被一波随其移动的海水环绕，使其无论走到哪里都能游泳。这些水在灵体与空气中的毒素之间提供缓冲，使其在对抗吸入效果的豁免上获得+2环境加值。

A seafoam spirit is always surrounded by a wave of seawater that moves along with it, allowing it to Swim wherever it goes. This water provides a buffer between the spirit and airborne toxins, granting it a +2 circumstance bonus to saving throws against inhaled effects.

Captain Itheras.name: 伊瑟拉斯船长 Captain Itheras
Captain Itheras.tokenName: 伊瑟拉斯船长 Captain Itheras
Captain Itheras.publicNotes:
当麻烦露头时，通常第一个被通知的人是伊瑟拉斯船长（farose chochori captain），一支浅滩潜水员队伍的领袖。他们不是什么外交官，但至少能维持和平。有一次一些当地硬汉拿我的背包玩躲猫猫，船长把他们赶走，并将我的财物完好无损地还给了我。他们如此有礼，以至于我必须克制自己，不把我对他们的队伍在浅滩中的活动可能存在的任何疑虑明说出来。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.iQEjf0W3ZV0aDyBo]{Mistvale：迷雾中的谜团}

When trouble rears its head, the first person to be notified is usually Captain Itheras (farose chochori captain), the leader of a crew of Shallows divers. They're no diplomat, but at least they keep the peace. When some local toughs were playing keep-away with my pack, the captain sent them packing and returned my property intact. They were so polite that I must refrain from spelling out any suspicions I may have about their crew's activities in the Shallows.
