Critical Failure The dragon makes false assumptions about the creature's motivations. The dragon takes a –2 circumstance penalty on all Deception, Diplomacy, and Intimidation checks attempted against the creature for 1 hour. The creature is temporarily immune to Fool's Insight for 1 day.

Chromatic Armor.name: 幻彩护甲 Chromatic Armor
Chromatic Armor.description:
你用由彩色光片制成的护甲包裹住目标。该护甲在20尺范围内散发明亮光照（接下来的20尺为昏暗光照）。每当一名生物攻击目标且与其相邻时，攻击者必须在其动作结束时尝试一次意志豁免。若失败，则其获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}，持续到其下个回合结束。无论豁免结果如何，攻击者在其下个回合结束前暂时免疫。该致眩效果具有光与视觉（特征）。

当你施放该法术时，在下表中掷骰[[/r 2d8]]{1d8 twice}以决定护甲的颜色（若出现重复则重掷重复结果）。每种颜色给予对应伤害类型抗力5。若你花费三个动作来施放该法术，则改为掷骰[[/r 3d8]]{three}次。

  1. 红色 火
  2. 橙色 酸
  3. 黄色 电击
  4. 绿色 毒素
  5. 蓝色 音波
  6. 靛色 精神
  7. 紫色 力场
  8. 匹配颜色 护甲变为与目标在过去1分钟内最近一次受到的伤害类型相匹配的颜色。若其未受到上述七种伤害类型之一，或护甲已是该颜色，则再次掷骰，并将任何掷出8的结果重掷。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.DHYWmMGmKOpRSqza]{法术效果: 虹彩护甲}

升阶（+3） 抗力提高5。

You wrap the target in armor made of sheets of colored light. The armor sheds bright light for 20 feet (and dim light for the next 20 feet). Whenever a creature attacks the target and is adjacent to it, the attacker must attempt a Will save at the end of its action. On a failure, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the end of its next turn. Regardless of the result of the save, the attacker is temporarily immune until the end of its next turn. The dazzling effect has the light and visual traits.

When you cast the spell, roll [[/r 2d8]]{1d8 twice} on the table below to see the armor's colors (rerolling any duplicates). Each color grants resistance 5 to the indicated damage type. If you spend three actions to Cast the Spell, roll [[/r 3d8]]{three} times instead.

  1. Red fire
  2. Orange acid
  3. Yellow electricity
  4. Green poison
  5. Blue sonic
  6. Indigo mental
  7. Violet force
  8. Matching Color The armor becomes the color matching the type of damage the target took most recently in the past minute. If it didn't take any of those seven types of damage or the armor is already that color, roll again, rerolling any results of 8.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.DHYWmMGmKOpRSqza]{Spell Effect: Chromatic Armor}

Heightened (+3) The resistance is increased by 5.

Chromatic Ray.name: 虹彩射线 Chromatic Ray
Chromatic Ray.description:
你发出一道彩色的光线射向你的敌人，其魔法效果取决于光线的颜色。进行一次法术攻击掷骰。若命中，掷骰 [[/r 1d4]]{1d4} 以决定你施放的是哪一道光束。若该光线造成伤害，则在大成功或大失败命中时该伤害翻倍。任何适用于光线的额外特性会在颜色名称后、括号内列出。

  1. 红色（火）该光线对目标造成 @Damage[30[fire]] 伤害。
  2. 橙色（酸）该光线对目标造成 @Damage[40[acid]] 伤害。
  3. 黄色（电击）该光线对目标造成 @Damage[50[electricity]] 伤害。
  4. 绿色（毒素）该光线对目标造成 @Damage[25[poison]] 伤害，且目标必须在一次强韧豁免中成功，否则获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 1}，持续1分钟（大成功或大失败失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 2}）。

升阶（6环） @Damage[40[fire]]{红色}、@Damage[50[acid]]{橙色}、@Damage[60[electricity]]{黄色}与@Damage[35[poison]]{绿色}的伤害各提高10。掷骰 [[/r 1d8]]{1d8} 以决定光线颜色，使用上方1–4的结果，以及下方5–8的结果。

  1. 蓝色 该光线具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.znv4ECL7ZtuiagtA]{石化}法术的效果。在大成功或大失败命中时，只要目标因血肉化石效果而处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓}，它就会处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。
  2. 靛色（情绪、无能、心智）该光线具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY]{困惑}法术的效果。在大成功或大失败命中时，改为具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs]{扭曲心智}的效果。
  3. 紫色 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓}，持续1分钟。它还必须在一次意志豁免中成功，否则会被传送到距离你120尺、沿远离你的方向的正前方（若该处没有足够空间让其出现，则其会出现在最近的开放空间）；这是一个传送效果。
  4. 强烈色彩 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}，直到你下个回合结束；若你的攻击掷骰为大成功或大失败命中，则改为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明}。再次掷骰并叠加另一种颜色的效果（若结果为8则重掷）。

You send out a ray of colored light streaming toward your enemy, with a magical effect depending on the ray's color. Make a spell attack roll. If you hit, roll [[/r 1d4]]{1d4} to see which beam you cast. If the ray deals damage, that damage is doubled on a critical hit. Any additional traits that apply to a ray are listed in parentheses just after the name of the color.

  1. Red (fire) The ray deals @Damage[30[fire]] damage to the target.
  2. Orange (acid) The ray deals @Damage[40[acid]] damage to the target.
  3. Yellow (electricity) The ray deals @Damage[50[electricity]] damage to the target.
  4. Green (poison) The ray deals @Damage[25[poison]] damage to the target, and the target must succeed at a Fortitude save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 minute (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} on a critical failure).

Heightened (6th) The damage for @Damage[40[fire]]{Red}, @Damage[50[acid]]{Orange}, @Damage[60[electricity]]{Yellow}, and @Damage[35[poison]]{Green} each increase by 10. Roll [[/r 1d8]]{1d8} to determine the ray's color, using the results for 1-4 above and the results for 5-8 below.

  1. Blue The ray has the effect of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.znv4ECL7ZtuiagtA]{Petrify} spell. On a critical hit, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} as long as it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed} by the flesh to stone effect.
  2. Indigo (emotion, incapacitation, mental) The ray has the effect of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY]{Confusion} spell. On a critical hit, it has the effect of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs]{Warp Mind} instead.
  3. Violet The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed} for 1 minute. It must also succeed at a will save or be teleported 120 feet directly away from you (if there isn't room for it to appear there, it appears in the nearest open space); this is a teleportation effect.
  4. Intense Color The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the end of your next turn, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} if your attack roll was a critical hit. Roll again and add the effects of another color (rerolling results of 8).

Clairvoyance.name: 千里眼 Clairvoyance
Clairvoyance.description:
你在射程内的一处位置创造一只悬浮的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}之眼（即使该位置在你的视觉线或效果线之外）。这只眼睛无法移动，但你可以如同使用你正常的视觉感官一样，从该点向所有方向看见。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} floating eye at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect). The eye can't move, but you can see in all directions from that point as if using your normal visual senses.

Clairaudience.name: 千里耳 Clairaudience
Clairaudience.description:
你在射程内的一处位置创造一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的漂浮耳朵（即使它在你的视觉线或效果线之外）。它无法移动，但你可以通过这个耳朵聆听，如同使用你正常的听觉感官。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} floating ear at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect). It can't move, but you can hear through the ear as if using your normal auditory senses.

Haste.name: 加速 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法赋予目标更快行动的力量。它获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{迅捷（状态）}状态，并且每轮只能将该额外动作用于打击与疾走动作。

升阶（7环） 你可以以最多6个生物为目标。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{法术效果：加速术}

Magic empowers the target to act faster. It gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} condition and can use the extra action each round only for Strike and Stride actions.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 6 creatures.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{Spell Effect: Haste}

Translate.name: 请提供需要翻译的英文原文（或上传图片/粘贴文本）。 Translate
Translate.description:
当你施放该法术时，目标可以理解其正在听到或阅读的一种语言的含义。这不会让其理解密码、用隐喻包装的语言等（由 GM 酌情决定）。如果目标能听到多种语言并且知道这一点，它可以选择要理解哪一种语言；否则，从这些语言中随机选择一种。

升阶（3环） 目标也可以说该语言。

升阶（4环） 你最多可以以 10 个生物为目标，且目标也可以说该语言。

The target can understand the meaning of a single language it is hearing or reading when you cast the spell. This doesn't let it understand codes, language couched in metaphor, and the like (subject to GM discretion). If the target can hear multiple languages and knows that, it can choose which language to understand; otherwise, choose one of the languages randomly.

Heightened (3rd) The target can also speak the language.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures, and targets can also speak the language.

Comedic Gold.name: 喜剧黄金 Comedic Gold
Comedic Gold.description:
巨龙表演了一段滑稽的喜剧节目，用机智的俏皮话与犀利的笑料令观众如痴如醉。每个非巨龙生物，若位于@Template[type:emanation|distance:100]范围内，必须成功通过一次@Check[type:will|dc:29]意志豁免，否则将变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{迷魂（状态）}。该效果持续1轮，但巨龙可以在后续轮使用一个带有专注（特征）的动作，将所有受影响生物的持续时间延长1轮且无需进行豁免。当生物因“喜剧金句”而处于迷魂（状态）时，该生物不能因敌对动作而结束其迷魂（状态）。一旦某生物成功通过对抗“喜剧金句”的豁免，该生物在24小时内对“喜剧金句”暂时免疫。

The dragon performs a hilarious comedy routine, enthralling their audience with witty quips and pointed jests. Each non-dragon creature with a @Template[type:emanation|distance:100] must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:29] save to avoid becoming @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated}. The effect lasts for 1 round, but the dragon can use an action on subsequent rounds, which has the concentrate trait, to extend the duration by 1 round for all affected creatures without a save. While fascinated by Comedic Gold, a creature can't end its fascinated condition due to hostile actions. Once a creature succeeds at a save against Comedic Gold, that creature is temporarily immune to Comedic Gold for 24 hours.

Adult Harlequin Dragon (Spellcaster).publicNotes:
丑角巨龙是终极的喜剧大师，是聪明而富有洞察力的弄臣，以机智与世界过招；他们一边耍着轻松的恶作剧，一边喷吐狡黠的侮辱、机敏的俏皮话与爆笑的笑话。尽管他们的轻浮显而易见，丑角巨龙的戏谑却蕴含更深的意义，常常将聚光灯打在社会的怪癖、逻辑谬误与个人真相之上。

丑角巨龙极具洞察力，并以能在一瞥之间评估他人、局势，甚至社会风俗而自豪。他们善于从对象的外在举止中辨别隐藏的动机、感受与偏见，常常得知连当事人自己都尚未发现的秘密。随后，丑角巨龙以幽默向对象揭示这些洞见：用机敏的笑话、嘲弄与恶作剧来掩藏深意，而这些深意会在自省与经历中浮现。大多数丑角巨龙希望他们的对象能解开并理解他们所传达的感知，从而引向有意义的个人启示与积极的改变。通过这些方法，他们希望自己不请自来的忠告能够生根发芽，影响即便是最沉默、最顽固、最停滞的对象，把他们放到自我启示与成长的道路上。就这样，丑角巨龙的幽默是一面镜子，将对象的动机与缺点反照回去。对象是否接受并从所见中学习，仍掌握在他们自己手中。丑角巨龙可以提供启示与引导，但真正的改变必须源自内心。

丑角巨龙认为自己极其聪明、风趣而睿智。他们刻薄又讥讽（尽管很少带着恶意），这会让与他们交互的人感到烦躁。和大多数巨龙一样，他们很骄傲。他们希望他人欣赏他们、他们的机智与他们的感知；当他们的戏谑遭遇冷淡或无视时，会伤到他们的自尊。被冷落的丑角巨龙通常会以“认知”自我安慰：任何不欣赏他们笑话的人，只是没聪明到能领会更深的含义，因此丑角巨龙把这类蠢货当作浪费吐息。更糟的是那些理解丑角巨龙戏谑中隐藏的教训，却要么没有从中学习，要么将这些启示斥为谬误、将忠告视为不可靠的对象。这样的冒犯与顽固的无礼，很少能让丑角巨龙消沉太久。

丑角巨龙总是在狩猎新鲜的观众——这一习惯让他们不断在路上。他们热爱旅行，且很少长期保有巢穴（如果他们真的住在巢穴里）。他们偏好城市区域或能与聪明生物交谈并表演的地区，也不喜欢独处且很容易感到无聊。当丑角巨龙相遇时，往往会演变成一场弄臣决斗：一场令人愉快、节奏飞快的唇枪舌剑与爆笑妙语之战，来来回回能持续数日。

丑角巨龙知道，永远不该以兽皮来评判一本书，也不该凭外貌或环境来评判一个生物。他们以不仅能看见生物当下的状态，也能看见其未来潜能而自豪，并自认是优秀的角色鉴定者。丑角巨龙不会把精力浪费在拒绝倾听的人身上，也不会浪费在那些会利用他们由巨龙赐予的洞见把邪恶带入世界的人身上；相反，他们旨在向自己所娱乐的对象提供引导与帮助，让世界比他们发现它时更美好。

Tavalavat

在所有丑角巨龙中，最具传奇色彩的当属塔瓦拉瓦特（Tavalavat）。她是一位洞察力惊人且极具娱乐性的弄臣，甚至引起了异界存在的注意，并踏上了穿越外环的旅程。人们相信塔瓦拉瓦特居住在涅槃界（Nirvana），以令人愉悦的嘲弄与发自内心的喜悦，引导阿伽西翁与天使走向自我启蒙。

丑角的宝库

不同于大多数巨龙，许多丑角巨龙并不在意黄金、珠宝或无价的宝藏，而在意巧妙的俏皮话、幽默的笑话、某个格外飘忽不定的魔法戏法之秘，以及所有之中最珍贵的宝藏：笑声。

嘲弄之凶灵

邪恶的丑角巨龙也被称为“嘲弄之凶灵（Mocking Grim）”，他们用自身能力塑造忠诚的爪牙，以操纵、揭露秘密、毁坏人生并颠覆社会。他们的笑话残酷而沉重，总是把对象踩进泥里，或更深地推入悲伤与绝望之中。

Harlequin dragons are the ultimate comedians, clever and insightful jesters who match wits with the world, playing light-hearted pranks while spouting cunning insults, witty quips, and hilarious jokes. Despite their obvious frivolity, a harlequin dragon's jests contain deeper meaning, often shining a spotlight on societal idiosyncrasies, logical fallacies, and personal truths.

Harlequin dragons are incredibly insightful, and they pride themselves on being able to assess people, situations, and even social mores at a glance. They're adept at discerning hidden motivations, feelings, and biases from a subject's outer behavior, often learning secrets that their subjects have yet to discover about themselves. Harlequin dragons then reveal these insights to their subjects through humor, with witty jokes, mockeries, and pranks crafted to hide deeper meaning that's revealed through introspection and experience. Most harlequin dragons hope that their subjects can unravel and understand the wisdom they impart, leading to meaningful personal revelations and positive change. Through their methods, they hope their unsolicited advice can take root and influence even the most reticent, stubborn, and stagnant subjects, placing them on a path to self-revelation and growth. In this way, a harlequin dragon's humor is a mirror that reflects a subject's motivations and flaws back at them. Whether the subject accepts and learns from what they see reflected remains in their own hands. While a harlequin dragon can offer revelation and guidance, true change must come from within.

Harlequin dragons consider themselves incredibly brilliant, witty, and wise. They're snarky and sarcastic (though rarely maliciously so), which can grate on the nerves of those with whom they interact. Like most dragons, they're proud. They want others to appreciate them, their wit, and their wisdom, and it wounds their pride when their jests are met with disinterest or disregard. A jilted harlequin dragon typically consoles themselves with the "knowledge" that anyone who doesn't appreciate their jokes simply isn't clever enough to grasp the deeper meaning, and so harlequin dragons treat such fools as a waste of breath. Worse are those subjects who understand the lessons hidden in a harlequin dragon's jests and either fail to learn from them or reject the revelations as faulty or the advice as unsound. Such insults and stubborn insolence rarely keep a harlequin dragon down for long.

Harlequin dragons are always on the hunt for fresh audiences—a habit that keeps them on the road. They love to travel and rarely keep a lair for long (if they reside in one at all). They prefer urban areas or regions where they can converse and perform for intelligent creatures, and they dislike solitude and bore easily. When harlequin dragons meet, it often results in a jester's duel, an entertaining and fast-paced war of cutting quips and hilarious witticisms that can go back and forth for days.

Harlequin dragons know that one should never judge a book by its cover or a creature by its appearance or circumstances. They pride themselves on seeing not only a creature's present status but also their future potential, and they consider themselves excellent judges of character. Harlequin dragons won't waste their efforts on those who refuse to listen or those who would use their dragon-given insights to bring evil into the world; rather, they aim to offer guidance and help to those they entertain, leaving the world a better place than they found it.

Tavalavat

Among the most legendary of all harlequin dragons is Tavalavat, a jester so insightful and entertaining that she caught the attention of otherworldly beings and embarked upon a journey through the Outer Spheres. It's believed that Tavalavat resides in Nirvana, guiding agathions and angels to self-enlightenment through pleasant mockery and heartfelt joy.

A Harlequin's Hoard

Unlike most dragons, many harlequin dragons care not for gold, jewels, or priceless treasures but for clever quips, humorous jokes, the secret of a particularly elusive magic trick, and the most prized treasure of all: laughter.

The Mocking Grim

Evil harlequin dragons, also referred to as the "Mocking Grim," use their abilities to shape devoted minions to manipulate, reveal secrets, ruin lives, and upend societies. Their jokes are cruel and crushing, always driving their subjects to the dirt or deeper into sadness and desperation.
Adult Harlequin Dragon (Spellcaster).prototypeToken: 成年丑角巨龙 Adult Harlequin Dragon

Nadinna Gordun.name: 娜丁娜·戈尔顿 Nadinna Gordun
Nadinna Gordun.tokenName: 娜丁娜·戈尔顿 Nadinna Gordun
Nadinna Gordun.publicNotes:
蓝铃传承博物馆是一座纪念蓝宝石草甸历史的纪念碑，起初设在戈尔顿农场的一座旧谷仓里，门票销售的利润会进入一个救济基金，用于支持小型农场。容纳它的那座谷仓原本计划被拆除，但纳丁娜·戈尔顿将其与祖父的美好回忆联系在一起，于是决定翻修它，并制作一个关于农场历史的展览。她的邻居们很喜欢这个主意，便捐赠了家族过去的传家宝和绘画作品，整个项目也随之发展壮大。最终，纳丁娜筹措资金对谷仓进行扩建，直到它成为一整座博物馆设施，致力于讲述蓝宝石草甸的农业故事。这座博物馆是岛上如此受人喜爱的一部分，以至于汉农农场每年都会捐款给它，尽管博物馆并未以正面的方式描绘他们。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.xl2UWmRkeV1XC07t]{蓝宝石草甸}

The Bluebell Heritage Museum is a monument to Sapphire Meadows' history that started in an old barn on Gordun Farm, and profits from ticket sales go to a relief fund supporting small farms. The barn that houses it was supposed to be demolished, but Nadinna Gordun associated it with fond memories of her grandfather and decided to renovate it and make an exhibit about the farm's history. Her neighbors loved the idea and donated heirlooms and paintings from their families' pasts, and the whole thing grew. Eventually, Nadinna raised funds to add to the barn until it became an entire museum facility dedicated to the story of farming in Sapphire Meadows. The museum is such a beloved part of the island that Hannon's Farms donates to it every year, despite the museum not painting them in a favorable light.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.xl2UWmRkeV1XC07t]{Sapphire Meadows}
Nadinna Gordun.blurb:
女性奥尔波克农夫
female orpok farmer

Nupor Stormbar.name: 努波尔·风暴吧 Nupor Stormbar
Nupor Stormbar.tokenName: 努波尔·风暴巴尔 Nupor Stormbar
Nupor Stormbar.publicNotes:
任何拥有船只的船长表面上都欢迎来与经常出没于船长俱乐部的老水手们一同畅饮——这里是朗姆酒街最古老（也最寒酸）的酒馆。然而，事实上，它的老板——法罗斯的乔科里族船长努波尔·风暴之杖，以及俱乐部里那些资深酒鬼，很少会长期容忍新人。潜在的客人不仅可能会遭到其他饮酒者的冷遇，也会受到风暴之杖船长的冷眼；而那些不识趣的人，可能会被直接扔到外面泥泞的街道上。酒吧的排外让许多被赶走的酒客很不痛快，尤其是来自附近爪击区的无赖们，其中不少人经常挑战船长俱乐部成员进行街头斗殴，或试图破坏风暴之杖船长那艘令人敬畏的双桅纵帆船——铁旋风。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.pb3IJrg1AZwdK0Gm.JournalEntryPage.dbkp6Hug9P6vAOJ1]{12. 船长俱乐部}

Any skipper with a ship is ostensibly welcome to drink alongside the salty dogs who regularly haunt the Captain's Club, Rum Row's oldest (and dingiest) drinking establishment. In truth, however, its proprietor, the farose chochori captain Nupor Stormbar, and the club's veteran topers rarely brook newcomers for long. Prospective patrons are liable to get the cold shoulder from not only their fellow imbibers, but also Captain Stormbar, and those who don't take the hint might find themselves tossed onto the muddy streets outside. The bar's exclusivity has rubbed many exiled drinkers the wrong way, particularly scallywags from nearby Claw Quarter, many of whom regularly challenge Captain's Club members to street brawls or attempt to sabotage Captain Stormbar's formidable brigantine, the Iron Cyclone.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.pb3IJrg1AZwdK0Gm.JournalEntryPage.dbkp6Hug9P6vAOJ1]{12. Captain's Club}
Nupor Stormbar.blurb:
法罗斯·乔科里，乔科里造船厂的经理兼“船长俱乐部”的老板
 farose chochori shipyard manager and owner of the Captain’s Club
Nupor Stormbar.prototypeToken: 努波尔·风暴巴尔 Nupor Stormbar

Chochori Vergiss Wizard.tokenName: 乔科里·维尔吉斯·法师 Chochori Vergiss Wizard

Chamberlain Olg.name: 总管 奥尔格 Chamberlain Olg
Chamberlain Olg.tokenName: 典礼大臣奥尔格 Chamberlain Olg
Chamberlain Olg.publicNotes:
典礼总管奥尔格（非二元性别的疾行巴库，司仪总管）是欣特最广为人知的声音。作为无与伦比的组织者，典礼总管奥尔格确保每一场节庆都尽可能按计划进行——并且在事情出岔子时也足够灵活，能即兴应对。典礼总管奥尔格把触手伸进每一个馅饼里，担任司仪总管、竞赛裁判、评审与治安官。总管最珍贵的财产是他们的魔法海贝项链，它能让他们的声音在整个城镇回响，使所有人都能及时了解当前事件、竞赛获胜者，以及走失的孩子。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.lAghqMX21tcEzpqi]{欣特：风铃草的粮仓}

Chamberlain Olg (nonbinary scuttle bacoo, master of ceremonies) is Hinter's most recognizable voice. An unparalleled organizer, Chamberlain Olg makes sure that each festival runs as much as possible according to plan—and is nimble enough to improvise when things go askew. Chamberlain Olg has a tentacle in every pie, acting as master of ceremonies, contest referee, judge, and constable. The Chamberlain's most prized possession is their magic seashell necklace, which lets their voice echo throughout the town, keeping everyone updated on current events, contest winners, and children gone astray.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.lAghqMX21tcEzpqi]{Hinter: Breadbasket of Bluebell}
Chamberlain Olg.blurb:
非二元 快速爬行 巴库（Bacoo）
nonbinary scuttle bacoo
Chamberlain Olg.prototypeToken: 侍从官奥尔格 Chamberlain Olg

Wildfire Leshy Juggler.name: 野火莱西杂耍者 Wildfire Leshy Juggler
Wildfire Leshy Juggler.tokenName: 野火莱西杂耍者 Wildfire Leshy Juggler

Mayor Shooshoo.name: 舒舒市长 Mayor Shooshoo
Mayor Shooshoo.publicNotes:
诺瓦洛奥塔位于篮筐以东的另一侧。村子以格迈云人为主，离海岸足够近，以至于来自金作物的海盗会定期来“劫掠”它，而所谓“劫掠”，我的意思是“闯入派对”。有人开玩笑说，这个喧闹的村子是朗普兰克的飞地。令人惊讶的是，长期在任的舒舒市长（无性别的巴库政治家）并不是格迈云人，而是一名根茎巴库。不过话说回来，巴库有时确实以派对嗨客的名声著称。诺瓦洛奥塔举办的活动精彩到令人印象深刻，其他村子在重大节日时都会向它聚拢，使其成为四大主要季节性节庆的中心：春分的播种节、夏至的玫瑰日、秋分的丰收节，以及冬至的赠礼日。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.JvFvClrMIo9DUWGN]{篮筐}

Novalo'ota sits on the opposite side of the Basket to the east. The village is majority g'mayun and close enough to the coast that pirates from Goldcrop regularly "raid" it, and by "raid," I mean "party crash." Some joke that the raucous village is an exclave of Rumplank. Surprisingly, long-serving Mayor Shooshoo (nonbinary bacoo politician) is not a g'mayun but a rhizo bacoo. Then again, bacoos sometimes have a reputation for being party animals. Novalo'ota throws such impressive events that other villages gravitate toward it for major holidays, transforming it into the epicenter of the four major seasonal festivals: the spring equinox's planting festival, the summer solstice's rose day, the fall equinox's harvest festival, and the winter solstice's gifting day.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.JvFvClrMIo9DUWGN]{The Basket}
Mayor Shooshoo.blurb:
非二元巴库政治家
nonbinary bacoo politician

Bannog Rogue.name: 班诺格游荡者 Bannog Rogue
Bannog Rogue.tokenName: 班诺格游荡者 Bannog Rogue
Bannog Rogue.prototypeToken: 班诺格游荡者 Bannog Rogue

Ancient Amber Dragon.name: 远古琥珀巨龙 Ancient Amber Dragon
Ancient Amber Dragon.tokenName: 远古琥珀巨龙 Ancient Amber Dragon

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60 尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Sand Vision.name: 沙之视野 Sand Vision
Sand Vision.description:
沙尘不会妨碍琥珀巨龙的视野；他们无视沙尘导致的隐蔽（状态）。

Sand doesn't impair an amber dragon's vision; they ignore the concealed condition from sand.

Electric Shock.name: 电击 Electric Shock
Electric Shock.description:
触发 一个相邻的生物用近战攻击对一只琥珀巨龙造成伤害，或一个生物用近战徒手攻击对一只琥珀巨龙造成伤害。

效果 覆盖琥珀巨龙的薄层压电沙被压缩，使触发生物遭到电击。触发生物受到 @Damage[3d12[electricity]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:37|basic:true] 豁免）。如果触发攻击使用的是金属武器，则触发生物的豁免承受–1环境减值；若该生物由金属制成（如铁魔像），则其豁免承受–2环境减值。若大成功或大失败中出现大失败，则其还会在1轮内成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}，因为其身体因电击而抽搐僵直。

Trigger An adjacent creature deals damage to an amber dragon with a melee attack, or a creature deals damage to an amber dragon with a melee unarmed attack.

Effect The thin layer of piezoelectric sand coating the amber dragon is compressed, electrocuting the triggering creature. The triggering creature takes @Damage[3d12[electricity]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:37|basic:true] save). If the triggering attack was with a metal weapon, the triggering creature takes a –1 circumstance penalty on their saving throw, and if the creature is made of metal (like an iron golem), they take a –2 circumstance penalty on their saving throw. On a critical failure, they're also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round, as their body seizes from the electric shock.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
巨龙吐出一股压电沙爆，在一个@Template[type:cone|distance:50]内造成@Damage[17d6[electricity]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:37|basic:true]豁免）。它在[[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用吐息武器。

The dragon breathes a blast of piezoelectric sand that deals @Damage[17d6[electricity]] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50] (@Check[type:reflex|dc:37|basic:true] save). It can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

Compelling Rumor.name: 引人注目的传闻 Compelling Rumor
Compelling Rumor.description:
琥珀巨龙以关于某个生物的流言蜚语与传闻（在90尺内流传）轰炸它。该目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]。此外，其中一条传闻会在目标身上生根，可能迫使它在下一回合执行以下一项：接近你、逃离（如同它具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑（状态）}状态）、放开它正握持的物品、卧倒@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}，或原地不动。在完成此任务前，它不能延迟或进行任何反应动作。该生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:will|dc:37]意志豁免，具有以下效果。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物在1轮内处于措手不及，且不会遵从命令。

失败 该生物在2轮内处于措手不及，并且在其下一回合的第一个动作中，该生物必须使用单动作来服从传闻。

大成功或大失败 该生物在3轮内处于措手不及，并且必须在其下一回合用尽所有动作来服从传闻。

The amber dragon bombards a creature within 90 feet with gossip and rumors circulating about them. The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]. Additionally, one of these rumors takes hold of the target, potentially forcing them to do one of the following on their next turn: approach you, run away (as if it had the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} condition), release what it's holding, drop @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, or stand in place. It can't delay or take any reactions until it has completed this task. The creature must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:37] save with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is off-guard for 1 round and doesn't follow the command.

Failure The creature is off-guard for 2 rounds and for the first action on its next turn, the creature must use a single action to obey the rumor.

Critical Failure The creature is off-guard for 3 rounds and must use all its actions on its next turn to obey the rumor.

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙狂乱 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
巨龙进行两次爪击打击和一次翼打击，顺序任意。

The dragon makes two claw Strikes and one wing Strike in any order.

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙族动能 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description:
当巨龙用一次打击造成大成功或大失败时，他们会为其吐息武器充能。

When the dragon scores a critical hit with a Strike, they recharge their Breath Weapon.

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Translate (Self Only).name: （仅自身） Translate (Self Only)
Translate (Self Only).description:
当你施放该法术时，目标可以理解它正在听到或阅读的一种语言的含义。这不会让它理解密码、用隐喻表达的语言等（由GM裁定）。如果目标能听到多种语言并且知道这一点，它可以选择要理解哪种语言；否则，随机选择一种语言。

升阶（3环） 目标也可以说该语言。

升阶（4环） 你可以以最多10个生物为目标，且目标也可以说该语言。

The target can understand the meaning of a single language it is hearing or reading when you cast the spell. This doesn't let it understand codes, language couched in metaphor, and the like (subject to GM discretion). If the target can hear multiple languages and knows that, it can choose which language to understand; otherwise, choose one of the languages randomly.

Heightened (3rd) The target can also speak the language.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 creatures, and targets can also speak the language.

Message.name: 信息 Message
Message.description:
你轻声默念词句，但这些话并不会从你口中传出，而是直接传递到目标的耳中。其他人听不见你的话（就像你只是正常地动了动嘴唇一样），但目标能听见你的话，就仿佛他们正站在你身旁。

若他们愿意，目标可以用反应动作给出简短回应，或在他们下一回合以自由动作（）回应，但他们必须能够看见你且处于射程内才能这样做。若他们回应，他们的回应会像原始信息一样，直接传到你的耳中。

升阶（3环） 该法术的射程增加至500英尺。

You mouth words quietly, but instead of coming out of your mouth, they're transferred directly to the ears of the target. While others can't hear your words any better than if you normally mouthed them, the target can hear your words as if they were standing next to you.

The target can give a brief response as a reaction, or as a free action on their next turn if they wish, but they must be able to see you and be within range to do so. If they respond, their response is delivered directly to your ear, just like the original message.

Heightened (3rd) The spell's range increases to 500 feet.

Clairaudience.name: 千里耳 Clairaudience
Clairaudience.description:
你在射程内的一个位置创造一只@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的漂浮耳朵（即使该位置在你的视觉线或效果线之外）。它无法移动，但你可以通过这只耳朵聆听，如同使用你正常的听觉感官一样。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} floating ear at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect). It can't move, but you can hear through the ear as if using your normal auditory senses.

Suggestion.name: 建议 Suggestion
Suggestion.description:
你甜蜜的言辞令生物难以抗拒。你向目标提出一项行动建议；该建议必须以对目标而言看似合乎逻辑的方式措辞，并且不能是自我毁灭的，也不能明显违背目标的自身利益。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你试图控制它。

成功 目标不受影响，并认为你只是正常与它交谈，并未对它施放法术。

失败 目标立刻遵从你的建议。该法术的持续时间为1分钟，或直到目标完成一项有限的建议为止，或该建议变得具有自我毁灭性，或出现其他明显的负面效果。

大失败 同失败，但基础持续时间为1小时。

升阶（8环） 你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

Your honeyed words are difficult for creatures to resist. You suggest a course of action to the target, which must be phrased in such a way as to seem like a logical course of action to the target and can't be self-destructive or obviously against the target's self-interest. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and knows you tried to control it.

Success The target is unaffected and thinks you were talking to them normally, not casting a spell on them.

Failure The target immediately follows your suggestion. The spell has a duration of 1 minute, or until the target has completed a finite suggestion or the suggestion becomes self-destructive or has other obvious negative effects.

Critical Failure As failure, but the base duration is 1 hour.

Heightened (8th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Sand Trap.name: 流沙陷阱 Sand Trap
Sand Trap.description:
频率 每分钟一次

效果 巨龙向50尺内的一个@Template[type:line|distance:10|width:10]{10乘10尺方形}吐出压电沙。该区域为困难地形。第一次有生物进入该区域时，沙子释放电击冲击，造成@Damage[17d6[electricity]]伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:37|basic:true] 豁免）。1分钟后，沙子仍然存在，但不再带有电荷。

Frequency once per minute

Effect The dragon exhales piezoelectric sand into a @Template[type:line|distance:10|width:10]{10 by 10-foot square} within 50 feet. The area is difficult terrain. The first time a creature enters the area, the sand releases an electric shock, dealing @Damage[17d6[electricity]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:37|basic:true] save). After 1 minute, the sand remains, but it no longer holds an electric charge.

Piezoelectric Glyph.name: 压电符文 Piezoelectric Glyph
Piezoelectric Glyph.description:
每当琥珀巨龙施放守卫符文时，它们可以使用压电物质来创造它。这些符文总是由接触触发，并且会自动包含一个该守卫符文所能容纳的最高等级的电击之握法术，而无需琥珀巨龙施放电击之握。此外，除通常的放置选项外，巨龙还可以选择将该符文作为文本中的一个词或图像来放置。

Whenever an amber dragon casts glyph of warding, they can create it using piezoelectric substances. These glyphs always trigger by touch and automatically contain a shocking grasp spell of the highest level the glyph of warding could hold, without the amber dragon needing to cast shocking grasp. Additionally, the dragon can choose to place the glyph as a word or image within a text, in addition to the usual placement options.

Sending.name: 发送 Sending
Sending.description:
你向该生物发送一条不超过25个词的心灵信息，它可以立即用自己不超过25个词的信息回应。

You send the creature a mental message of 25 words or fewer, and it can respond immediately with its own message of 25 words or fewer.

Glyph of Warding.name: 守护雕文 Glyph of Warding
Glyph of Warding.description:
你通过将一个敌对法术束缚进一个符文来制作一个陷阱。在施放该法术时，你还要施放一个更低法术等级的法术并将其储存在符文中。被储存的法术必须需要3个动作或更少来施放，具有敌对效果，并以一个生物为目标或具有一个区域。你可以为该符文设置一个口令、一个触发或两者皆有。任何移动、打开或触碰目标容器的生物，或进入目标区域且未说出口令或符合触发条件的生物，都会启动该符文，释放其中的有害法术。

一旦法术被储存在符文中，该符文获得该法术的所有特征。若被储存的法术以一个或多个生物为目标，则它以触发该符文的生物为目标。若它具有区域，则该区域以触发该符文的生物为中心。“守卫符文”的持续时间在符文被触发时结束。该符文视为一个魔法陷阱，使用你的法术DC进行察觉检定以发现它，以及进行盗窃检定以解除它；两项检定都要求尝试它们的生物必须为受训才能成功。

你可以解消“守卫符文”。你同时能维持的“守卫符文”的最大数量等于你的施法能力调整值。

You craft a trap by binding a hostile spell into a symbol. While Casting this Spell, you also Cast a Spell of a lower spell level to store in the glyph. The stored spell must take 3 actions or fewer to cast, have a hostile effect, and target one creature or have an area. You can set a password, a trigger, or both for the glyph. Any creature that moves, opens, or touches the target container or enters the target area that doesn't speak the password or that matches the trigger activates the glyph, releasing the harmful spell within.

Once a spell is stored in the glyph, the glyph gains all the traits of that spell. If the stored spell targets one or more creatures, it targets the creature that set off the glyph. If it has an area, that area is centered on the creature that set off the glyph. Glyph of warding's duration ends when the glyph is triggered. The glyph counts as a magical trap, using your spell DC for both the Perception check to notice it and the Thievery check to disable it; both checks require the creature attempting them to be trained in order to succeed.

You can Dismiss glyph of warding. The maximum number of glyphs of warding you can have active at a time is equal to your spellcasting ability modifier.

Truespeech (Constant).name: 真言（恒定） Truespeech (Constant)
Truespeech (Constant).description:
目标可以理解所有词语，无论是何种语言，并且还能说出其他生物的语言。当处于由不同生物组成的混合群体中时，每当目标说话，它都可以选择一个生物，并用该生物能够理解的语言交谈，即使目标并不知道那是什么语言。

强化（7环） 持续时间为8小时。

The target can understand all words regardless of language and also speak the languages of other creatures. When in a mixed group of creatures, each time the target speaks, it can choose a creature and speak in a language that creature understands, even if the target doesn't know what language that is.

Heightened (7th) The duration is 8 hours.

Ancient Amber Dragon.publicNotes:
琥珀巨龙是巨龙之中最友善、最平易近人的一类。它们富有魅力、热情好客，并且热爱结交朋友。它们喜欢聊天，精通多种语言，而且总能知道些有用的事情。它们是出色的倾听者，总是耐心聆听并给予温和的鼓励，促使与之交往的人说出自己觉得有必要分享的一切。琥珀巨龙常被视为无害的长舌之徒，但它们的狡猾与操纵性远比人们给予的鸣谢要多得多。

琥珀巨龙不只是爱插手的健谈管闲事者；它们还是善于操弄的谣言贩子，最爱的莫过于探听并散布流言。它们对自己选择传播的闲话是否真实毫无兴趣。事实上，传闻越离奇，它们就越可能去散播。它们只在乎自身的娱乐，也总愿意在开始有些陈腐的流言上添点润色或拐个弯。它们是不知疲倦的多管闲事者，丝毫不在乎自己的话语会毁掉多少人生。

琥珀巨龙偏好生活在生物密集的环境中。通常这意味着城市环境，但它们住在人类城市或矮人要塞的概率，并不比住在妖精飞地或一片爱说话的动物林地更低。它们不在乎周围环境本身，只在乎身边有多少聪明、并且最重要的是爱说话的生物。许多个体会在很长一段time里久居不动。它们喜欢在某个地区安顿下来，尽可能吸收那里的文化、人群与时事。只要还能从自己的居所里采撷到更多流言，它们就会留下；一旦厌倦，便会离开去寻找一处新地区，好让自己再度悄然渗入其中。要吸引一条琥珀巨龙的注意力，一个地区必须人口稠密，且其居民必须容易受操纵。小村落与小镇不足以让琥珀巨龙长久取乐；政府施加过多禁令、足以让市民噤声或变得过度多疑的地方也同样不行。

琥珀巨龙理解言语的力量，而大多数个体也偏爱书面文字。与多数巨龙相比，它们更可能收集并囤积稀有书籍、卷轴与文献，对古老羊皮纸与雕刻的重视甚至胜过黄金与宝石。它们往往会用守护符文以及其他防护印记来保护自己珍贵的私人藏书。

尽管很少有琥珀巨龙愿意承认，但它们是耐心而聪慧的间谍，会观察、倾听并操纵周围环境中的事件，以搜集最劲爆的故事与流言来散播。最年轻的琥珀巨龙最在乎八卦、新闻、时事，以及那些短命者的生活——这些内容总在不断变化。年长的琥珀巨龙则偏爱更持久的传闻、黑暗而古老的历史、禁忌文献、神话与传奇，以及那些足以推翻君主、引发社会革命并制造其他重大事件或动荡的流言。

因奎斯提亚尔

因奎斯提亚尔，“活的书卷”，是一条隐居的琥珀巨龙，在物质位面维持着规模最庞大的图书馆之一。其内，古代文献与禁忌巨著被存放在远离窥探之眼的地方——并置于巨龙的守护注视之下。因奎斯提亚尔允许外来者向他请求入馆；失败者将再也不会被人见到。

秘密宝藏

琥珀巨龙最珍贵的财物，是它们独自保守的秘密。多数会将这些秘密牢记于心，但由于它们喜爱文本，许多也会把秘密写下来，作为文本或加密账簿保存。有些则会保留一件与秘密相关的物体，使其作为可触摸的记忆触发物来运作。

情报掮客

一些琥珀巨龙会从事情报掮客的工作。它们免费传播简单且有趣的流言来引诱客户，然后对更敏感的情报与传闻收费。多数只接受以秘密与个人信息作为报酬——正适合转卖给其他客户！

Amber dragons are among the friendliest and most approachable of dragons. They're charismatic, welcoming, and adore making friends. They love to chat, are fluent in numerous languages, and always know something useful. They're excellent listeners, always ready with a patient ear and kind encouragement, prodding those they socialize with to share whatever they feel the need to. Often seen as harmless gossips, amber dragons are far more cunning and manipulative than they're given credit for.

Amber dragons are more than chatty busybodies; they're manipulative rumormongers who adore nothing more than learning and spreading rumors. They have no interest in whether the gossip they choose to spread is true. In fact, the more outlandish a rumor, the more likely they are to spread it. They care for their own entertainment and are always willing to add a bit of embellishment or a twist to rumors that are getting a little stale. They're persistent meddlers who care not for the lives their words could ruin.

Amber dragons prefer to live in populous environments. Usually, this means urban environments, but they're just as likely to live within a human city or a dwarven fortress as they are in a fey enclave or a grove of talkative animals. They care not for their surroundings but for the number of intelligent and, most importantly, talkative creatures around them. Many are sedentary for large portions of time. They love to settle in a region and absorb all they can of its culture, people, and current events. So long as there are more rumors to pluck from their home, they stay, moving on when they grow bored to find a new region into which to insinuate themselves. To hold an amber dragon's attention, a region must be densely populated, and its inhabitants must be susceptible to manipulation. Hamlets and towns aren't big enough to keep an amber dragon amused for long, nor are places whose government enforces too many prohibitions that could cause its citizens to clam up or be overly suspicious.

Amber dragons understand the power of words, and most have a fondness for the written word. They're more likely to collect and hoard rare books, scrolls, and texts than most dragons, placing a higher value on old parchment and carvings than they do on gold and gemstones. They're prone to protecting their valuable personal libraries with glyphs of warding and other protective sigils.

While few amber dragons would admit it, they're patient and clever spies who watch, listen, and manipulate events around them to collect the juiciest tales and gossip to spread. The youngest amber dragons care most for gossip, news, current events, and the lives of the short-lived, which are constantly changing. Older amber dragons favor more lasting rumors, dark and ancient history, forbidden texts, myths, and legends, as well as rumors that could topple monarchs, cause a social revolution, and produce other major events or upheavals.

Inguistial

Inguistial, the "Living Libram," is a reclusive amber dragon who maintains one of the largest libraries on the Material Plane. Within, ancient texts and forbidden tomes are kept far from prying eyes—and under the dragon's protective gaze. Inguistial allows outsiders to petition him for entry; those who fail are never seen again.

Secret Hoards

An amber dragon's most prized possessions are the secrets they keep to themselves. Most keep these secrets memorized, but their fondness for texts means many write them down, keeping them as texts or coded ledgers. Some instead keep an object tied to the secret, which functions as a tactile memory trigger.

Information Brokers

Some amber dragons work as information brokers. They spread simple and entertaining rumors for free to tempt clients, then charge for more sensitive information and rumors. Most accept payment only in secrets and personal information— perfect for selling to other clients!
Ancient Amber Dragon.prototypeToken: 远古琥珀巨龙 Ancient Amber Dragon

G'mayun Alchemist.name: 格迈云炼金术士 G'mayun Alchemist
G'mayun Alchemist.tokenName: 格梅云炼金术师 G'mayun Alchemist
G'mayun Alchemist.prototypeToken: 戈玛云 炼金术士 G'mayun Alchemist

An'zoki.name: 安佐奇 An'zoki
An'zoki.publicNotes:
失落书信的定位者。

我的击鼓声把你吸引到我这里来了，对吧？我就知道！好吧，你现在在这儿了！而且你看起来确实像那种会喜欢了解靛蓝群岛中大多数人宁愿遗忘的唯一之地的人——那座其歌谣只有我，失落书信的定位者安’佐奇，才敢吟唱的岛。我说的，当然是那座被称为月影岛的闹鬼之岛！来吧，围过来，我来给你讲这个故事。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.viSocpLw8O1QSa8x]{月影岛} 的导游

 

The Locator of Lost Letters.

You were drawn over here to me by my drumming, yes? I knew it! Well, you're here now! And you certainly look like the type who would love to learn about the one place in the Indigo Isles that most folk would rather forget—the one isle whose song only I, An'zoki the Locator of Lost Letters, will dare to sing. I speak, of course, about the haunted isle known as Moonshadow Island! Come, gather ‘round, and I'll tell you the tale.

Tour guide for @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.viSocpLw8O1QSa8x]{Moonshadow Isle}

Nightmare Slayer Morgana.name: 梦魇屠杀者摩甘娜 Nightmare Slayer Morgana
Nightmare Slayer Morgana.tokenName: 梦魇杀手 摩甘娜 Nightmare Slayer Morgana
Nightmare Slayer Morgana.publicNotes:
在Nikko和他的族群最初定居于翡翠丘陵之后，这个最初的团体在数年间分裂成许多不同的群体。许多成员发现丘陵十分理想，便建立了新的洞穴；而另一些则决定与当地已有的小型bannog守望者社群一同定居。其余成员则继续在这片土地上旅行，由梦魇猎手Morgana（女性bannog守望者）带领，并大约每年一次返回翡翠丘陵。家族会在此期间举办“重拾之梦盛宴”来庆祝重聚，来自丘陵各处乃至更远地方的bannog都会前来参加庆典。盛宴是一场为期一周的派对，其特色在于广泛运用魔法来创造幻象，讲述Morgana旅行中的故事。任何关于该地区幽灵（特征）出没、怪异声响以及气温骤变的报告，很可能都可归因于这场盛宴——盛宴每年举行的日期都不相同。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.DujYqSxY9AW3iRV5]{翡翠丘陵与日出海滩}

After Nikko and his colony initially settled in the Emerald Hills, this initial group split into many distinct groups over the years. Many found the Hills ideal and set up new burrows, while others decided to settle down with the small bannog warden community already present. The rest continue to travel the land, led by Nightmare Slayer Morgana (female bannog warden), and circle back to the Emerald Hills about once a year. The family holds the Feast of Rediscovered Dreams during this time to celebrate their reunion, with bannog from around the Hills and beyond arriving for the celebration. The Feast is a week-long party defined by the extensive use of magic to create illusions that tell the stories of Morgana's travels. Any reports of ghost sightings, strange sounds, and sudden temperature changes in this region can likely be attributed to The Feast, which occurs on different dates each year.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.hEW9VvPdJXU1YVdd.JournalEntryPage.DujYqSxY9AW3iRV5]{Emerald Hills and Sunrise Beach}
Nightmare Slayer Morgana.blurb:
女性班诺格守望者
female bannog warden
Nightmare Slayer Morgana.prototypeToken: 梦魇杀手莫甘娜 Nightmare Slayer Morgana

Marrekunogriz.name: 马雷库诺格里兹 Marrekunogriz
Marrekunogriz.publicNotes:
作为你在靛蓝群岛周游时的首要向导，尤其是在金穗镇，请允许我先自我介绍。我是一条名叫 Marrekunogriz 的丑角巨龙，但我的朋友们叫我微光，因为我敏锐的才智能在他人身上看见伟大——即便那只是未来潜能的一丝微光。你也可以叫我微光；等你征服了我挚爱的群岛之谜时，我们必将成为很好的朋友。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO]{靛蓝群岛}的首要向导

As your primary tour guide around the Indigo Isles, specifically Goldcrop, do allow me to introduce myself. I am a Harlequin Dragon named Marrekunogriz, but my friends call me Glimmer because of the way that my acute intellect sees greatness in others, even when it is only a glimmer of potential in the future. You can call me Glimmer; we shall be great friends by the time you've conquered the mysteries of my beloved Isles.

Primary tour guide for @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO]{The Indigo Isles}

Yonce the Seer.name: 先知勇斯 Yonce the Seer
Yonce the Seer.tokenName: 先知勇兹 Yonce the Seer
Yonce the Seer.publicNotes:
梦境市场的事实领袖，“先知”永塞（Yonce the Seer）在同族班诺格中备受敬重，因为他对梦境的研究比尼尔博格几乎任何人都更为深入。无论昼夜，永塞总能在城中四处走动；他们声称自己不再入睡也不再清醒，而是持续生活在两者之间的状态中——这种状态令成对班诺格既嫉妒又好奇。永塞是梦境市场的市长，并在城市的夜间时段担任管理者。若你在梦境市场购买的商品出了问题，就去找永塞。他们严格遵守市场的“概不退货”政策，但会尽最大努力修复由购买引发的任何伤害、中毒、心智崩解的恐怖、石化或闹鬼。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.2p0FEYfKak7uy9oZ]{尼尔博格：双镇物语}

The de facto leader of the Dream Market, Yonce the Seer, is well-respected by his fellow bannog because he has studied dreams more thoroughly than almost anyone else in Nilbog. Yonce can be found out and about at all hours of the day and night; they claim to neither sleep nor wake anymore but to live continuously in a state between the two, a state that makes them the object of envy and interest to twinned bannog. Yonce is the mayor of the Dream Market and the city's administrator during its night hours. If you have trouble with one of your purchases at the Dream Market, see Yonce. They rigidly adhere to the market's "no returns" policy, but they'll do their best to repair any injury, poisoning, mind-shattering horror, petrification, or hauntings incurred by purchases.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.2p0FEYfKak7uy9oZ]{Nilbog: A Tale of Two Towns}
Yonce the Seer.blurb:
非二元班诺格祭司
nonbinary bannog priest
Yonce the Seer.prototypeToken: 先知永斯 Yonce the Seer

Neela Hannon.name: 妮拉·汉农 Neela Hannon
Neela Hannon.publicNotes:
对汉农来说幸运、但对其他任何人都不幸的是，他的手伸进了好几口锅里。他的后裔妮拉·汉农如今经营汉农农场，专注于附近蓝宝石草甸的风铃草培育，而不再采矿。公司塑造了更温和的形象，但关于虐待工人和骚扰竞争对手的投诉依然存在。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.bw8auNDvGSQsWdn1]{无色丘陵}

Luckily for Hannon but not anyone else, he had his fingers in multiple pots. His descendent, Neela Hannon, now runs Hannon's Farms and focuses on bluebell cultivation in the nearby Sapphire Meadows instead of mining. The company has cultivated a softer image, but complaints about poor treatment of workers and harassment of competitors persist.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.bw8auNDvGSQsWdn1]{The Colorless Hills}
Neela Hannon.blurb:
女性兽人创业者
female orpok entrepreneur

Wildfire Leshy Druid.name: 野火莱希德鲁伊 Wildfire Leshy Druid
Wildfire Leshy Druid.tokenName: 野火莱西德鲁伊 Wildfire Leshy Druid
Wildfire Leshy Druid.prototypeToken: 野火莱西德鲁伊 Wildfire Leshy Druid

L'orla.name: 奥尔拉 L'orla
L'orla.publicNotes:
作为蓝铃岛的首席商人和最杰出的小贩，我踏遍了蓝铃岛上的每一条大路、小径和羊肠小道，而且我脚上的水泡就是最好的证明！如果你想买些小饰品、工具或零嘴儿，我最合适。要是你有宝藏要卖，我能告诉你该去哪里出手。要是你只想要一张床和一顿丰盛的晚餐，就让我当你的向导带你游岛。我对蓝铃岛及其众多城镇与村庄的熟悉程度，就像对我蹄背上的纹路一样。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.bpeAiPmv1sOnhiuh]{山脊：群山圣所} 的导游

As Bluebell's master merchant and preeminent peddler, I've tramped down every road, trail, and footpath in Bluebell, and I have the blisters to prove it! If you're looking to buy trinkets, tools, or treats, I'm your woman. If you've got treasure to sell, I can tell you where to unload it. If all you want is a bed and a good dinner, let me be your guide to the island. I know Bluebell and its many towns and villages like the back of my hoof.

Tour guide for @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.bpeAiPmv1sOnhiuh]{Crest: The Mountain Sanctum}

G'mayun Swashbuckler.name: G'mayun 花剑手 G'mayun Swashbuckler
G'mayun Swashbuckler.tokenName: 加迈恩花剑手 Gmayun Swashbuckler
G'mayun Swashbuckler.prototypeToken: 格迈恩游荡剑客 Gmayun Swashbuckler

Young Indigo Dragon (Spellcaster).name: 幼年靛蓝巨龙（施法者） Young Indigo Dragon (Spellcaster)
Young Indigo Dragon (Spellcaster).tokenName: 青年靛蓝巨龙 Young Indigo Dragon

Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 嗅觉（不精确）60尺 Scent (Imprecise) 60 feet

Celebratory Cheer.name: 庆典欢呼 Celebratory Cheer
Celebratory Cheer.description:
触发 年幼靛蓝巨龙30英尺内的一名盟友对一名敌人造成重击成功

效果 年幼靛蓝巨龙以一阵令人陶醉、富有感染力的热忱来庆祝其盟友的成功。年幼靛蓝巨龙在2轮内对其触发的盟友重击成功的那名敌人进行的攻击掷骰获得+1状态加值。若年幼靛蓝巨龙在拥有来自庆祝欢呼的加值期间对该敌人造成重击成功，则触发庆祝欢呼的那名盟友可以使用其反应动作获得+1状态加值，持续2轮，用于对该敌人进行的攻击掷骰。

Trigger An ally within 30 feet of the young indigo dragon critically hits a foe

Effect The young indigo dragon celebrates their ally's success with a heady rush of contagious ardor. The young indigo dragon gains a +1 status bonus on attack rolls against the foe that their triggering ally critically hit for 2 rounds. If the young indigo dragon critically hits that foe while they have the bonus from Celebratory Cheer, the ally who triggered Celebratory Cheer can use their reaction to gain a +1 status bonus on attack rolls against that foe for 2 rounds.

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Hideous Laughter.name: 骇人狂笑 Hideous Laughter
Hideous Laughter.description:
目标被无法控制的笑声所淹没。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标被无法控制的笑声所折磨。它不能使用反应动作。

失败 目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}且不能使用反应动作。

大失败 目标倒地@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}且在1轮内不能使用动作或反应动作。随后它承受失败效果。

The target is overtaken with uncontrollable laughter. It must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is plagued with uncontrollable laugher. It can't use reactions.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and can't use reactions.

Critical Failure The target falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and can't use actions or reactions for 1 round. It then suffers the failure effects.

Charm.name: 魅惑 Charm
Charm.description:
对目标而言，你的话语如蜜糖般甜美，你的面容仿佛沐浴在梦幻般的薄雾中。它必须尝试一次意志豁免；若你或你的盟友最近威胁过它或对它使用过敌对动作，则该豁免获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。若你对目标使用敌对动作，法术结束。法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己曾被魅惑，除非它与你的友谊或你说服它采取的动作与它的预期相冲突；这意味着你可能可以通过世俗手段说服目标继续做你的朋友。

大成功或大失败（成功） 目标不受影响，并且知道你试图魅惑它。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害的东西而非魅惑，除非它辨识出该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友好}。若它原本为友好，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于助人}。它不能对你使用敌对动作。

大成功或大失败（失败） 目标对你的态度变为乐于助人，并且它不能对你使用敌对动作。

升阶（4环） 持续时间持续到你下次进行每日准备。

升阶（8环） 持续时间持续到你下次进行每日准备，且你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Infectious Enthusiasm.name: 传染性热情 Infectious Enthusiasm
Infectious Enthusiasm.description:
你以附魔的热情鼓励自己把事情做完，并将你的动力分享给你的盟友。你在攻击掷骰、意志豁免或基于魅力的技能检定中选择一项，并获得+1状态加值。在法术的持续时间内，一名在你施放此法术时观察到你且当时位于30尺内的盟友，可以花费一个带有专注（特征）的单动作，获得你所选择的同样加值，持续至其下一回合开始。

在社交场合使用此法术来影响他人通常被视为失礼之举；如果检定的对象观察到你施放该法术，则会使基于魅力的技能所获得的好处失效。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.nU4SxAk6XreHUi5h]{法术效果：感染性热情}

With enchanted gusto, you encourage yourself to get things done and share your motivation with your allies. You gain a +1 status bonus to your choice of attack rolls, Will saves, or Charisma-based skill checks. During the spell's duration, an ally who observed you Casting this Spell and was within 30 feet when you did so can take a single action, which has the concentrate trait, to gain the same bonus you chose until the start of its next turn.

Using this spell to influence someone in a social situation is typically considered a faux pas, negating the benefit on Charisma-based skills if the subject of the check observed you casting the spell.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.nU4SxAk6XreHUi5h]{Spell Effect: Infectious Enthusiasm}

Tangle Vine.name: 缠绕藤蔓 Tangle Vine
Tangle Vine.description:
一根藤蔓凭空出现，从你手中甩出并抽击，缠向目标。对目标进行一次法术攻击掷骰。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{法术效果：缠绕藤蔓}

大成功 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）}，并在1轮内其速度获得–10尺环境减值。它可以尝试@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}，对抗你的法术DC，以移除该减值与禁足（状态）。

成功 目标在1轮内其速度获得–10尺环境减值。它可以尝试逃脱，对抗你的法术DC，以移除该减值。

失败 目标不受影响。

升阶（2环） 效果持续2轮。

升阶（4环） 效果持续1分钟。

A vine appears from thin air, flicking from your hand and lashing itself to the target. Attempt a spell attack roll against the target.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{Spell Effect: Tangle Vine}

Critical Success The target gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} condition and takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} against your spell DC to remove the penalty and the immobilized condition.

Success The target takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round. It can attempt to Escape against your spell DC to remove the penalty.

Failure The target is unaffected.

Heightened (2nd) The effects last for 2 rounds.

Heightened (4th) The effects last for 1 minute.

Arcane Prepared Spells.name: 奥术已准备法术 Arcane Prepared Spells

Enthrall.name: 魅惑 Enthrall
Enthrall.description:
你的言辞令目标着迷。你在整个施法与持续时间内不间断地说话或歌唱。注意到你言语或歌声的目标可能会全神贯注；每个目标都必须尝试一次意志豁免。若目标与你的宗教、族裔或政治倾向相对立，或因其他原因不太可能同意你所说的话，GM 可能给予环境加值（至多 +4）。

每个进入射程的生物在你维持法术时都必须尝试一次豁免。若你在说话，enthrall 获得语言（特征）。

大成功或大失败：成功目标不受影响，并注意到你试图使用魔法。

成功目标不必注意你，但不会注意到你试图使用魔法（它可能注意到其他目标被 enthrall 影响）。

失败目标对你处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} 状态。若它目睹自己不同意的动作或言语，则可以再尝试一次意志豁免。若其成功，它不再处于 Fascinated 状态，并在 1 小时内暂时免疫。若目标遭受敌对行为，或若另一名生物对其进行交涉或威吓检定并成功，则该着迷效果立即结束。

大成功或大失败：失败同失败，但若目标不同意你，它无法尝试豁免来结束着迷效果。

Your words fascinate your targets. You speak or sing without interruption throughout the casting and duration. Targets who notice your speech or song might give their undivided attention; each target must attempt a Will save. The GM might grant a circumstance bonus (to a maximum of +4) if the target is of an opposing religion, ancestry, or political leaning, or is otherwise unlikely to agree with what you're saying.

Each creature that comes within range has to attempt a save when you Sustain the Spell. If you're speaking, enthrall gains the linguistic trait.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and notices that you tried to use magic.

Success The target needn't pay attention but doesn't notice you tried to use magic (it might notice others are enthralled).

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} with you. It can attempt another Will save if it witnesses actions or speech with which it disagrees. If it succeeds, it's no longer Fascinated and is temporarily immune for 1 hour. If the target is subject to a hostile act, or if another creature succeeds at a Diplomacy or Intimidation check against it, the fascination ends immediately.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target can't attempt a save to end the fascination if it disagrees with you.

Haste.name: 加速 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法赋予目标更快行动的能力。它获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{迅捷（状态）}状态，并且每轮只能将该额外动作用于打击与疾行动作。

升阶（7环） 你可以以至多6个生物为目标。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{法术效果：加速}

Magic empowers the target to act faster. It gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} condition and can use the extra action each round only for Strike and Stride actions.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 6 creatures.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{Spell Effect: Haste}

Roaring Applause.name: 咆哮喝彩 Roaring Applause
Roaring Applause.description:
你那炫目的华丽动作在观众心中激起极其强烈的情绪，以至于引发欢呼与掌声。此法术的目标必须能够看见、听见或以其他方式理解你。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标被你的表演轻微分心，并在未被完全占用时鼓掌。它不能使用反应动作（）。

失败 目标为你热烈鼓掌，以至于它不能使用反应动作（）并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}。鼓掌投入到带有操作（特征）。这会在目标回合开始时触发基于操作（特征）的反应动作（）。

大失败 同失败，且目标因热烈为你鼓掌而分心到陷入对你的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated}。

升阶（6环） 你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

Your flamboyant flourish invokes such powerful feelings in your audience that you incite cheers and applause. Targets of this spell must be able to see, hear, or otherwise understand you. The targets must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target becomes mildly distracted by your display and applauds while it isn't fully occupied. It can't use reactions.

Failure The target applauds you so vigorously that it can't use reactions and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}. The applause is so involved that it has the manipulate trait. This triggers reactions based on the manipulate trait at the start of the target's turn.

Critical Failure As failure, plus the target is so distracted by its vigorous applauding of you that it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} with you.

Heightened (6th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Befitting Attire.name: 得体装束 Befitting Attire
Befitting Attire.description:
你用幻术为目标披上一层斗篷，将其衣物与穿戴物品塑造成适合特定场合的样式。你在脑海中想象该场合，而法术会为每个目标创造量身定制的幻象装束。例如，如果你想象的是一场贵族舞会，护甲看起来就会像精致的礼服。这不会改变目标外貌中除衣物之外的任何可辨识细节。

任何触碰这些装束的生物、使用搜索动作来检查它，或以其他方式与其交互的生物，都可以尝试识破你的幻术。

升阶（4环） 你可以以至多20个生物为目标。

升阶（5环） 你可以以至多100个生物为目标。

You cloak the targets in an illusion, shaping their clothing and worn items into ones suitable for a particular occasion. You visualize the occasion, and the spell creates illusory attire customized to each target. For instance, if you visualized a noble ball, armor would appear to be fine clothing. This doesn't change identifying details of the targets' appearances other than their clothes.

Any creature that touches the attire, uses the Seek action to examine it, or otherwise interacts with it can attempt to disbelieve your illusion.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 20 creatures.

Heightened (5th) You can target up to 100 creatures.

Glitterdust.name: 闪光尘 Glitterdust
Glitterdust.description:
区域内的生物被闪耀的尘埃勾勒出轮廓。每个生物都必须尝试一次反射豁免。若某个生物的隐形被该法术抵消，则它获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 而非 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}。无论该生物原本已处于Invisible，还是在该法术造成的隐形抵消效果结束前获得新的隐形效果，此规则均适用。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标的隐形被抵消2轮。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} 1分钟，且其隐形被抵消1分钟。

大成功或大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} 1轮，并获得Dazzled 10分钟。其隐形被抵消10分钟。

Creatures in the area are outlined by glittering dust. Each creature must attempt a Reflex save. If a creature has its invisibility negated by this spell, it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} instead of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. This applies both if the creature was already Invisible and if it benefits from new invisibility effects before the end of the invisibility negation effect from this spell.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target's invisibility is negated for 2 rounds.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 minute and its invisibility is negated for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round and Dazzled for 10 minutes. Its invisibility is negated for 10 minutes.

Touch of Idiocy.name: 愚者接触 Touch of Idiocy
Touch of Idiocy.description:
你使目标的心智变得迟钝；目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}。

大失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4}。

You dull the target's mind; the target must attempt a Will save.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4}.

Color Spray.name: 万色返彩 Color Spray
Color Spray.description:
旋转的色彩会根据观看者的意志豁免影响他们。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物在 1 轮内处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 状态。

失败 该生物处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}，在 1 轮内处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明} 状态，并在 1 分钟内处于目眩状态。

大成功或大失败 该生物在 1 轮内处于震慑状态，并在 1 分钟内处于失明状态。

Swirling colors affect viewers based on their Will saves.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round, and Dazzled for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature is Stunned for 1 round and Blinded for 1 minute.

Fleet Step.name: 疾步如飞 Fleet Step
Fleet Step.description:
你获得对你速度的+30英尺状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ThFug45WHkQQXcoF]{法术效果：迅捷步伐}

You gain a +30-foot status bonus to your Speed.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.ThFug45WHkQQXcoF]{Spell Effect: Fleet Step}

Bullhorn.name: 扩音器 Bullhorn
Bullhorn.description:
你强化你的声音，使其响亮到即使在极远处也能轻易被听见。在持续时间内，500尺内的所有听众都能清晰洪亮地听到你的声音，即使周遭环境噪音原本会阻挡声音传播亦然。尽管音量很大，这也不会让你的声音刺耳或令人分心。这不会增加其他听觉或语言类效果的射程或区域，且诸如墙壁与门等物理屏障仍会如常阻挡或减弱你的声音。

你洪亮的声音使你更容易胁迫他人，而良好的声学也有助于你在大型场地中进行表演。你获得+1状态加值，适用于用于胁迫的检定，以及在大型场地进行表演时的听觉表演检定。你可以解除该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.9yzlmYUdvdQshTDF]{法术效果: 扩音喇叭}

升阶（5环） 你的声音最远可在1,200尺外被清晰听见。

升阶（7环） 你的声音最远可在1英里外被清晰听见。

You amplify your voice, loud enough for you to be heard easily at a great distance. For the duration, your voice can be heard loudly and clearly by all listeners within 500 feet, even if other ambient noise would otherwise block the sound. Despite the volume, this doesn't make your voice jarring or distracting. This doesn't increase the range or area of other auditory or linguistic effects, and physical barriers such as walls and doors still block or muffle your voice as normal.

Your loud voice makes it easier to Coerce others, and the acoustics assist in Performing at a large venue. You gain a +1 status bonus to checks to Coerce and auditory Performance checks to Perform at a large venue. You can Dismiss the spell.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.9yzlmYUdvdQshTDF]{Spell Effect: Bullhorn}

Heightened (5th) Your voice can be heard clearly up to 1,200 feet away.

Heightened (7th) Your voice can be heard clearly up to 1 mile away.

Dancing Lights.name: 舞动之光 Dancing Lights
Dancing Lights.description:
你创造最多四个漂浮的光，它们之间任意两者相距不超过10英尺。每个都像火把一样发出光。当你维持该法术时，你可以将任意数量的光移动至多60英尺。每个光必须保持在距你120英尺之内，并且与所有其他光相距不超过10英尺，否则它会熄灭。

You create up to four floating lights, no two of which are more than 10 feet apart. Each sheds light like a torch. When you Sustain the Spell, you can move any number of lights up to 60 feet. Each light must remain within 120 feet of you and within 10 feet of all others, or it winks out.

Prestidigitation.name: 戏法 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法听你差遣。只要你维持法术，你就可以施展简单的魔法效果。每次你维持法术时，你可以从四个选项中选择一个。

  • 烹饪 使1磅非生物材料冷却、变暖或调味。
  • 抬升 缓慢地 将一个无人看管、负载为轻或更低的物体抬起，使其离地1英尺。
  • 制造 创造一个临时物体，其负载可忽略不计，由凝结的魔法物质制成。该物体看起来粗糙且不自然，并且极其脆弱——不能用作工具、武器或法术材料。
  • 整理 为一个负载为轻或更低的物体上色、清洁或弄脏。你可以以10轮的专注影响一个负载为1的物体，而更大的物体则需要每负载1分钟。

戏法伎俩不能造成伤害或导致不利状态。对物体的任何实际改变（除上述内容之外）仅在你维持法术期间持续。

The simplest magic does your bidding. You can perform simple magical effects for as long as you Sustain the Spell. Each time you Sustain the Spell, you can choose one of four options.

  • Cook Cool, warm, or flavor 1 pound of nonliving material.
  • Lift Slowly lift an unattended object of light Bulk or less 1 foot off the ground.
  • Make Create a temporary object of negligible Bulk, made of congealed magical substance. The object looks crude and artificial and is extremely fragile-it can't be used as a tool, weapon, or spell component.
  • Tidy Color, clean, or soil an object of light Bulk or less. You can affect an object of 1 Bulk with 10 rounds of concentration, and a larger object a 1 minute per Bulk.

Prestidigitation can't deal damage or cause adverse conditions. Any actual change to an object (beyond what is noted above) persists only as long as you Sustain the Spell.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
靛蓝巨龙吐出一团旋转并扩散的荆棘与靛蓝花朵爆破，在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30] 内造成 @Damage[9d6[piercing]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:26|basic:true] 豁免）。它无法再次使用吐息武器，直到 [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 轮} 后。

The indigo dragon breathes a swirling and spreading blast of thorns and indigo flowers that deals @Damage[9d6[piercing]] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] (@Check[type:reflex|dc:26|basic:true] save). It can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

Ride the High.name: 乘风疾驰 Ride the High
Ride the High.description:
频率 每轮一次

触发 靛蓝巨龙处于一个有益的情绪效果影响下，且该效果的持续时间至少为2轮，并且该效果的持续时间将要结束

需求 靛蓝巨龙尚未对触发的情绪效果使用过“Ride the High”

效果 靛蓝巨龙将情绪的冲击发挥到极致，将那份感受在心中再多保留片刻，以防随之而来的益处消退。巨龙将触发的情绪效果在自身（但不包括任何其他生物）上的持续时间延长1轮。若该效果因除其正常持续时间届满以外的任何原因结束（例如被驱散或被反制），巨龙无法使用“Ride the High”来延续该效果。

Frequency once per round

Trigger The indigo dragon is under the effect of a beneficial emotion effect with a duration of at least 2 rounds, and the effect's duration would end

Requirements The indigo dragon hasn't used Ride the High on the triggering emotion effect

Effect The indigo dragon rides the rush of emotion to its fullest, holding the feelings in their heart for just a little while longer in order to keep the benefits that come with that emotion from fading away. The dragon extends the duration of the triggering emotion effect on themself (though not any other creatures) by 1 round. The dragon can't use Ride the High to continue the effect if it ends for any reason other than its normal duration expiring, such as if it is dispelled or counteracted.

Young Indigo Dragon (Spellcaster).publicNotes:
靛蓝巨龙是社交达人，热爱庆祝与派对。他们喧闹、热情、好玩，且总是精力充沛、满怀能量与灵体。他们张扬而大胆，无论在动作还是情感上皆是如此。他们的情绪浓烈到夸张，表达自我时毫无羞怯或犹豫，并鼓励周围的人同样坦率与自由地表达。靛蓝巨龙富有魅力、和善且热情好客，既讨人喜欢又能很快交到朋友；他们常常会给遇见的各色人等留下正面印象，即便只是擦肩而过。

靛蓝巨龙冲动、热烈且纯真，为了快乐本身而尽情作乐，也会将同样的幸福与兴奋传递给周围的人，不带任何别有用心，也不期待回报或人情。他们相信快乐不该有门槛，因此派对应当是安全、包容的空间：对所有人开放、免费入场、无需邀请。他们到处都有熟人——有时是朋友，有时是朋友的朋友，有时只是他们在派对上结识并留下好印象的人。他们能进任何派对，而有他们在的派对总会更精彩。

靛蓝巨龙非常重视狂欢——不是语气上的严肃，而是重要性上的认真。他们纵情且频繁地派对，但总是以让派对延续为目标，而非为了短暂的快感去扰乱它。他们致力于创造奇观、活动与消遣，让欢乐贯穿整场派对，并在整个活动期间逐步堆高氛围，而不是一口气爆发。他们会鼓舞、带动并影响派对，就像他们影响参与者那样，但绝不越界。他们不会哄骗、操控或逼迫其他狂欢者或旁观者。事实上，他们认为这种行为极其低俗，并相信这样的不当举动会毁掉派对——他们不会使用这种粗鄙手段，也不允许在场的他人如此行事。他们知道，并非所有人都喜欢派对或能在公开的采集中感到自在；虽然他们会努力让这些来客放松并感到受欢迎，但绝不会强迫他们参与——欢乐与同意总是相伴而行。靛蓝巨龙尊重同伴的界限，即便他们并不理解那些界限。

尽管他们爱极了那种经典老派的狂欢，派对也并非靛蓝巨龙所做的一切。他们白天努力工作，然后用一场轰轰烈烈的庆祝来为这一天的成功收尾。对靛蓝巨龙而言，一天的最佳结尾就是喧腾的喜悦与良伴相随。

靛蓝巨龙偏爱人群、城市与都市环境——任何大量人群聚集之处。他们喜欢朋友与邻里的多样性，因为观点与信念的多元会催生各式各样新奇而美妙的庆祝与体验。靛蓝巨龙更偏好合作与协作，而不是独自工作；一旦久坐不动，他们就会坐立不安、浑身不适。他们在大多数聚居地都能很好地融入，尽管他们可能会给近邻带来干扰，但往往仍能在更广泛的社区中留下好印象。作为友善且乐于助人的社区成员，他们几乎每晚都会举办派对并主持采集。这种排场与喧闹并不总是受欢迎。即便如此，也无法否认靛蓝巨龙的存在对社区有益。他们常常担任深度参与的社区代表；他们总是第一个自愿组织社区活动，而他们的庆祝有助于加强社区羁绊并带动本地经济增长。

Celegrateia

Celegrateia 因为保持着举办持续时间最长的庆祝的记录，而在其他靛蓝巨龙之中深受敬重。他们臭名昭著的“无底盛会”已持续了令人震惊的157年——而且还在继续！这场令人叹服的派对至今仍未到达高潮。

与捣乱者打交道

大多数靛蓝巨龙不喜欢暴力，也很少诉诸暴力——没有什么比一场血腥斗殴更能迅速毁掉庆祝了！他们更倾向于用巧舌如簧与友谊之手来面对捣乱者；当善意失效、无辜的生命受到威胁时，他们才会升级到以操控与维持和平为目的的魔法手段。

奢华巢穴

大多数靛蓝巨龙生活得极尽奢华，居住在繁荣城镇与城市中宏伟、广阔的庄园里。他们的家宅为举办奢华舞会、派对及其他活动而建，能容纳大量来访者。许多庄园拥有辽阔的庭地，并雇用成群的厨师、清洁工、乐师与艺人。

Indigo dragons are social butterflies who love to celebrate and party. They're boisterous, exuberant, fun, and always full of energy and spirit. They're bombastic and bold, both in action and in emotion. They experience larger-than-life emotions, express themselves without shame or hesitation, and encourage the same openness and freedom of expression in those around them. Charismatic, kind, and welcoming, indigo dragons are charming and make friends quickly, often leaving a positive impression on the various people they meet, even if only in passing.

Indigo dragons are impulsive, passionate, and pure-hearted, making merry for the joy of it and spreading that same happiness and excitement to those around them with no ulterior motives or favors expected in return. Indigo dragons believe there should be no barriers to fun, and thus parties should be safe, inclusive spaces open to all free of charge and without invitation. They have contacts everywhere—sometimes friends, sometimes friends of friends, and sometimes someone they simply met at a party upon whom they made a good impression. They can get into any party, and parties are always better for their presence.

Indigo dragons take revelry very seriously—not in tone but in importance. They party hard and often but always aim to make a party endure rather than disrupt it for short-term enjoyment. They endeavor to create spectacles, events, and diversions that spread joy over the course of the party, building intensity over an entire event rather than all at once. They encourage, build up, and influence a party, just as they do partygoers, but never cross the line. They don't cajole, manipulate, or pressure fellow revelers or bystanders. In fact, they consider such acts in incredibly bad taste and believe such misbehavior spoils a party—they don't utilize such crass methods and don't allow others present to do so either. They know that not everyone likes to party or is comfortable in public gatherings, and while they aim to make such visitors feel at ease and welcome, they don't force them to participate; fun and consent go hand in hand. Indigo dragons respect the boundaries of their fellows, even if they don't understand them.

Despite their love of a good old-fashioned revel, partying isn't all indigo dragons ever do. They work hard throughout the day, then celebrate the day's successes with a bang. To an indigo dragon, a day is best ended with riotous joy and good company.

Indigo dragons prefer crowds, cities, and urban environments—anywhere lots of people gather. They favor variety in their friends and neighbors since diversity in perspectives and beliefs leads to all sorts of new and wonderful celebrations and experiences. Indigo dragons prefer to cooperate and collaborate rather than work alone, and they get fidgety and uncomfortable whenever they are sedentary. They fit in well in most settlements, often making a good impression on their wider communities despite causing disruptions for their close neighbors. While friendly and helpful community members, they throw frequent parties and host gatherings nearly every night. This spectacle and ruckus aren't always welcome. Even so, there's no denying that the presence of an indigo dragon is good for the community. They often serve as deeply involved community representatives; they're always the first to volunteer to organize community events, and their celebrations are good for strengthening community bonds and growing the local economy.

Celegrateia

Celegrateia is deeply respected among their fellow indigo dragons thanks to the fact that they hold the record for hosting the longest- running celebration. Their infamous "Fathomless Fete" has lasted an astonishing 157 years—and counting! The impressive party has yet to reach its climax.

Dealing With Troublemakers

Most indigo dragons dislike violence and resort to it rarely—nothing ruins a celebration faster than a bloody fight! They prefer to confront troublemakers with a silver tongue and the hand of friendship, escalating to magical methods of manipulation and peacekeeping when kindness fails and innocent lives are threatened.

Lavish Lairs

Most indigo dragons live in splendor, residing in magnificent, sprawling manors in prosperous towns and cities. Their homes are built to host lavish galas, parties, and other events and accommodate large crowds of visitors. Many have expansive grounds and employ legions of cooks, cleaners, musicians, and entertainers.
Young Indigo Dragon (Spellcaster).prototypeToken: 青年靛蓝巨龙 Young Indigo Dragon

Seeker.name: 追寻者 Seeker
Seeker.publicNotes:
最近，一位来自回声归返、富有进取心的乔可里人“探寻者”（艾克里斯乔可里研究员）在无色丘陵西北部建立了一个引人入胜的地方，简称“农场”。它靠近一处海湾，使所有在那里工作的乔可里人都能轻松获得水，同时仍与丘陵保持近距离。农场致力于检测丘陵的土壤，并发现为何植物无法存活。他们还测试新的种植技术、农耕科技以及魔法仪式，希望修复这一问题，并成为第一批察觉到生命正在回归丘陵的人。他们与当地游侠紧密合作，尽管最初的结果令人鼓舞，但迄今为止仍未发现任何重大进展。不过，这已是解决一个可能会从字面意义上彻底改变金作物地貌的问题的开端。它已成为农业创新的中心，并与来自欣特与海景的园艺师合作，将其知识应用到篮地与蓝宝石草甸的农场中。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.aef8bdHrOuG4eyx1.JournalEntryPage.bw8auNDvGSQsWdn1]{无色丘陵}

Recently, an enterprising chochori from Echoing Return named Seeker (aikrys chochori researcher) founded a fascinating place in the northwestern Colorless Hills simply called The Farm. Its proximity to a bay gives all the chochori who work there easy access to water while still being close to the Hills. The Farm has dedicated itself to testing the Hills' soil and discovering why plants can't survive. They also test new growing techniques, farm technologies, and magical rituals in the hope of fixing the problem and being the first to detect that life is returning to the Hills. They work closely with the local rangers, and although initial results have been promising, nothing significant has been discovered to date. Yet, it's a start to solving a problem that could drastically change the Goldcrop landscape, literally. It has become a center of innovation for agriculture and partners with horticulturists from Hinter and Seaview to implement its knowledge on farms in the Basket and Sapphire Meadows.
